202770.description:
Balance,  Guardian
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy that follows the enemy, dealing up to [8 * 2 * (18.34% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 8 sec within its area. Damage reduced on secondary targets.

Generates 40 Astral Power over its duration.

202918.name: Light of the Sun
202918.description: Reduces the remaining cooldown on Solar Beam by 15 sec when it interrupts the primary target.

203173.name: Death Chain
203173.description: Chains 3 enemies together, dealing (29.484% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and causing 20% of all damage taken to also be received by the others in the chain. Lasts for 10 sec.

203177.name: Heavy Repercussions
203177.description: Shield Slam generates 2 more Rage and extends the duration of Shield Block by 1.0 sec.

203201.name: Crackling Thunder
203201.description: Thunder Clap's radius is increased by 50% and it reduces affected target's movement speed by an additional 20%.

203224.name: Fresh Wound
203224.description: Rake has a 100% increased critical strike chance if used on a target that doesn’t already have Rake active.

203235.name: Hunting Pack
203235.description: Aspect of the Cheetah has 50% reduced cooldown and grants its effects to allies within 15 yds.

203242.name: Wicked Claws
203242.description:
Infected Wounds can now stack up to 2 times, and reduces 8% of all healing received by the target per stack.

Infected Wounds can now also be applied from Rip.

203280.name: World in Flames
203280.description: Empower Flamestrike, dealing up to 50% more damage based on enemies' distance to the center of Flamestrike.

203286.name: Greater Pyroblast
203286.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that deals up to 30% of the target's total health in Fire damage.

203340.name: Diamond Ice
203340.description: Victims of Freezing Trap can no longer be damaged or healed.  Freezing Trap is now undispellable, but has a 4 sec duration.

203550.name: Blind Fury
203550.description: Eye Beam generates 30 Fury every second, has 10% increased duration, and deals 10% increased damage.

203624.name: Early Spring
203624.description:
Wild Growth is now instant cast, and when you heal 6 allies with Wild Growth you gain Full Bloom. This effect has a 30 sec cooldown.

Full Bloom
Your next Wild Growth applies Lifebloom to all targets at 100% effectiveness. Lasts for 30 sec.

203720.name: Demon Spikes
203720.description: Surge with fel power, increasing your Armor by (75 * Agility / 100) [Demon Spikes: and your Parry chance by 8%, for 12 sec].

203953.name: Brambles
203953.description:
Sharp brambles protect you, absorbing and reflecting up to (Attack Power * 0.2) damage from each attack.

While Barkskin is active, the brambles also deal (7.5% of Attack Power) Nature damage to all nearby enemies every 1 sec.

203962.name: Blood Frenzy
203962.description: Thrash also generates 3 Rage each time it deals damage, on up to 5 targets.

203964.name: Galactic Guardian
203964.description:
Your damage has a 5% chance to trigger a free automatic Moonfire on that target.

 Moonfire:
When this occurs, the next Moonfire you cast generates 8 Rage, and deals 300% increased direct damage.

 Red Moon:
When this occurs, you gain 1 charge of Lunar Wrath. Each 20 Rage you spend while Red Moon is active consumes a stack to deal (100% of Spell Power) additional Arcane damage to its target and heal you for (130% of Spell Power).

203965.name: Survival of the Fittest
203965.description: Reduces the cooldowns of Barkskin and Survival Instincts by 12%.

204018.name: Blessing of Spellwarding
204018.description:
Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to magical damage and harmful effects for 10 sec.

Cannot be used on a target with Forbearance. Causes Forbearance for 30 sec.

Shares a cooldown with Blessing of Protection.

204019.name: Blessed Hammer
204019.description:
Throws a Blessed Hammer that spirals outward, dealing (25% of Attack Power) Holy damage to enemies and reducing the next damage they deal to you by (Attack Power * 30 / 100).

Generates 1 Holy Power.

204021.name: Fiery Brand
204021.description: Brand yourself and an enemy target with demonic symbols, reducing the damage you take by 40% and instantly dealing (416% of Attack Power) Fire damage [Fiery Brand: and [(32.2% of Attack Power) * 12] Fire damage over 12 sec] to the enemy.

204023.name: Crusader's Judgment
204023.description: Judgment now has 2 charges, and Grand Crusader now also reduces the cooldown of Judgment by 3 sec.

204053.name: Rend and Tear
204053.description: Each stack of Thrash reduces the target's damage to you by 3% and increases your damage to them by 2%.

204054.name: Consecrated Ground
204054.description: Your Consecration is 15% larger, and enemies within it have 50% reduced movement speed.

204066.name: Lunar Beam
204066.description:
Summons a beam of lunar light at your target's location, dealing (40% of Attack Power) Arcane damage each second to your target and (40% of Attack Power) to up to 5 other enemies within the beam. 

Lunar Beam also increases your mastery by (14 * $mas)%, and heals you for [(280% of Attack Power) * 8] over 8 sec.

204074.name: Righteous Protector
204074.description: Avenging Wrath and Sentinel have 50% reduced cooldown and 40% reduced duration.

204077.name: Final Stand
204077.description: During Divine Shield, all targets within 15 yds are taunted.

204080.name: Deathchill
204080.description:
Your Remorseless Winter and Chains of Ice apply Deathchill, rooting the target in place for 4 sec.

Remorseless Winter 
All targets within 8 yards are afflicted with Deathchill when Remorseless Winter is cast.

Chains of Ice
When you Chains of Ice a target already afflicted by your Chains of Ice they will be afflicted by Deathchill.

204089.name: Bullseye
204089.description: When your abilities damage a target below 20% health, you gain 1% increased critical strike chance for 6 sec, stacking up to 30 times.

204157.name: Throw Glaive
204157.description: Throw a demonic glaive at the target, dealing (21.151% of Attack Power) Physical damage. The glaive can ricochet to [Bouncing Glaives: 1 additional enemies / an additional enemy] within 10 yards. Generates high threat.

204268.name: Voodoo Mastery
204268.description:
Your Hex target is slowed by 70% during Hex and for 6 sec after it ends.

Reduces the cooldown of Hex by 15 sec.

204331.name: Counterstrike Totem
204331.description:
Summons a totem at your feet for 15 sec.

Whenever enemies within (20 * 1 * 1) yards of the totem deal direct damage, the totem will deal 100% of the damage dealt back to attacker.

204336.name: Grounding Totem
204336.description: Summons a totem at your feet that will redirect all harmful spells cast within 30 yards on a nearby party or raid member to itself. Will not redirect area of effect spells. Lasts 3 sec.

204596.name: Sigil of Flame
204596.description:
Place a Sigil of Flame at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Deals (80% of Attack Power) Fire damage, and an additional (200% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 8 sec, to all enemies affected by the sigil.

Generates 25 Fury.

204909.name: Soul Rending
204909.description:
Leech increased by 6%.

Gain an additional 6% leech while Metamorphosis is active.

205021.name: Ray of Frost
205021.description:
Channel an icy beam at the enemy for 4 sec, dealing (450% of Spell Power) Frost damage every 0.50 sec.

Applies 8 stacks of Freezing over its duration.

205022.name: Arcane Familiar
205022.description: Casting Arcane Intellect summons a Familiar that attacks your enemies and increases your maximum mana by 10% for 1 hour.

205025.name: Presence of Mind
205025.description: Causes your next 2 Arcane Blasts to be instant cast.

205026.name: Firestarter
205026.description: Your Fireball and Pyroblast spells always deal a critical strike when the target is above 90% health.

205028.name: Resonance
205028.description: Arcane Barrage deals 8% increased damage per target it hits beyond the first.

205029.name: Flame On
205029.description: Fire Blast gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 2.0 sec.

205030.name: Frozen Touch
205030.description: Frostbolt grants you Fingers of Frost 25% more often and Brain Freeze 20% more often.

205147.name: Eerie Fermentation
205147.description: You gain up to 30% movement speed  and 15% magical damage reduction based on your current level of Stagger.

205148.name: Reverse Entropy
205148.description: Your spells have a chance to grant you 15% Haste for 8 sec.

205180.name: Summon Darkglare
205180.description:
Summons a Darkglare from the Twisting Nether that increases the damage of your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 20% while active.

The Darkglare will serve you for 20 sec, blasting its target for (487.044% of Spell Power) Shadow damage, increased by 10% for every damage over time effect you have active on their current target.

205364.name: Dominate Mind
205364.description: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 sec while still controlling your own mind. Does not work versus Demonic, Mechanical, or Undead beings or players. This spell shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

205411.name: Desperate Instincts
205411.description:
Blur now reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

Additionally, damage taken below 35% Health is reduced by 10%.

205596.name: Detainment
205596.description: Imprison's PvP duration is increased by 1 sec, and targets become immune to damage and healing while imprisoned.

205604.name: Reverse Magic
205604.description: Removes all harmful magical effects from yourself and all nearby allies within 10 yards, and sends them back to their original caster if possible.

205625.name: Cleansed by Flame
205625.description: [Soul Immolation / Immolation Aura] dispels a magical effect on you when cast.

205626.name: Everlasting Hunt
205626.description: Dealing damage increases your movement speed by 15% for 3 sec.

205627.name: Jagged Spikes
205627.description: While Demon Spikes is active, melee attacks against you cause Physical damage equal to 30% of the damage taken back to the attacker.

205629.name: Demonic Trample
205629.description:
Transform to demon form, moving at 175% increased speed for 3 sec, knocking down all enemies in your path and dealing (16% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

During Demonic Trample you are unaffected by snares but cannot cast spells or use your normal attacks. Shares charges with Infernal Strike.

205630.name: Illidan's Grasp
205630.description:
You strangle the target with demonic magic, stunning them in place and dealing (1120% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 5 sec while the target is grasped. Can move while channeling.

Use Illidan's Grasp again to toss the target to a location within 20 yards.

205636.name: Force of Nature
205636.description:
Summons a stand of 3 Treants for 10 sec which immediately taunt and attack enemies in the targeted area.

Generates 20 Astral Power.

205673.name: Savage Momentum
205673.description: Interrupting a spell with Skull Bash reduces the remaining cooldown of Tiger's Fury, Survival Instincts, and [Tiger Dash / Dash] by 10 sec.

205723.name: Red Thirst
205723.description: Reduces the cooldown on Vampiric Blood by 2.0 sec per 10 Runic Power spent.

205727.name: Anti-Magic Barrier
205727.description: Reduces the cooldown of Anti-Magic Shell by 20 sec and increases its duration and amount absorbed by 40%.

205800.name: Oppressor
205800.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

206315.name: Massacre
206315.description: Execute is usable on targets below 35% health and its cooldown is reduced by 1.5 sec.

206416.name: First Blood
206416.description: Blade Dance deals [(3 * (23.35% of Attack Power)% + (70% of Attack Power)%) * 195 / 100 * 1] Chaos damage to the first target struck.

206476.name: Exergy
206476.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase your damage by 5% for 20 sec.

206572.name: Dragon Charge
206572.description: Run at high speed at a distance in front of you. All enemies in your path will take (70% of Attack Power) Physical damage and be knocked back.

206642.name: Electrocute
206642.description: When you successfully Purge a beneficial effect, the enemy suffers (567% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 3 sec.

206803.name: Rain from Above
206803.description: You fly into the air out of harm's way. While floating, you gain access to Fel Lance allowing you to deal damage to enemies below.

206930.name: Heart Strike
206930.description: Instantly strike the target and 1 other nearby enemy, causing (157.334% of Attack Power) Physical damage, and reducing enemies' movement speed by 20% for 8 sec [Heart Strike: Generates 5 bonus Runic Power] [Heartbreaker: plus 2 Runic Power per additional enemy struck].

206967.name: Will of the Necropolis
206967.description: Damage taken below 30% Health is reduced by 20%.

206974.name: Foul Bulwark
206974.description: Each charge of Bone Shield increases your maximum health by 1%.

207017.name: Alpha Challenge
207017.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207018.name: Murderous Intent
207018.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207025.name: Admonishment
207025.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207028.name: Inquisition
207028.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207029.name: Tormentor
207029.description:
You focus the assault on this target, increasing their damage taken by 3% for 6 sec. Each unique player that attacks the target increases the damage taken by an additional 3%, stacking up to 5 times.

Your melee attacks refresh the duration of Focused Assault.

207057.name: Shattering Blade
207057.description:
When Frost Strike damages an enemy with 5 stacks of Razorice it will consume them to deal an additional 115% damage.

Frostbane consumes the Razorice on your main target to deal an additional 300% damage.

207061.name: Murderous Efficiency
207061.description: Consuming the Killing Machine effect has a 20% chance to grant you 1 Rune.

207104.name: Runic Attenuation
207104.description: Auto attacks have a chance to generate 3 Runic Power.

207142.name: Avalanche
207142.description: Casting Howling Blast with Rime active causes jagged icicles to fall on enemies nearby your target, applying Razorice and dealing (22.47% of Attack Power) Frost damage.

207167.name: Blinding Sleet
207167.description:
Targets in a cone in front of you are blinded, causing them to wander disoriented for 5 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

When Blinding Sleet ends, enemies are slowed by 50% for 6 sec.

207200.name: Permafrost
207200.description:
Frost,  Unholy
Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 30% of the damage dealt.

207230.name: Frostscythe
207230.description:
A sweeping attack that strikes all enemies in front of you for (40% of Attack Power) Frost damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. 

Consumes Killing Machine to have its critical strikes deal 4 times the normal damage.

207269.name: Ebon Fever
207269.description: Plagues deal 15% more damage over time in 75% of their duration.

207272.name: Infected Claws
207272.description: The infected claws of your ghouls have a chance to sicken the foe, dealing (20.79% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 12 sec. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

207317.name: Epidemic
207317.description:
Causes each of your Virulent Plagues to flare up, dealing (62.5522% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to the infected enemy and (25.0212% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to foes nearby.

Extends the duration of Dread Plague and Virulent Plague by 1.5 sec.

207347.name: Aura of Pain
207347.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.

207383.name: Abundance
207383.description: For each Rejuvenation you have active, Regrowth's cost is reduced by 8% and critical effect chance is increased by 8%, up to a maximum of 96%.

207387.name: Painbringer
207387.description: Consuming a Soul Fragment reduces all damage you take by 3% for 8 sec.

207401.name: Ancestral Vigor
207401.description: Targets you heal with Healing Wave, Chain Heal, or Riptide's initial heal gain 5% increased health for 10 sec.

207407.name: Soul Carver
207407.description: Carve into the soul of your target, dealing [(463.5% of Attack Power) + (463.5% of Attack Power)] Fire damage and an additional (300% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 3 sec.  Immediately shatters 3 Soul Fragments from the target and 1 additional Soul Fragment  every 1 sec.

207548.name: Agonizing Flames
207548.description: Immolation Aura increases your movement speed by 10% and its duration is increased by 50%.

207684.name: Sigil of Misery
207684.description:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

207697.name: Feast of Souls
207697.description: Soul Cleave heals for an additional (180% of Attack Power).

207739.name: Burning Alive
207739.description: Every 1 sec, Fiery Brand spreads to one nearby enemy.

207777.name: Dismantle
207777.description: Disarm the enemy, preventing the use of any weapons or shield for 5 sec.

208154.name: Warpaint
208154.description: You take 10% reduced damage while Enrage is active.

208652.name: Dire Beast: Hawk
208652.description: Summons a hawk to circle the target area, attacking all targets within 10 yards over the next 10 sec.

209258.name: Last Resort
209258.description:
Sustaining fatal damage instead transforms you to Metamorphosis form.

This may occur once every 8 min.

209389.name: Bulwark of Order
209389.description: Avenger's Shield also shields you for 8 sec, absorbing 60% as much damage as it dealt, up to 50% of your maximum health.

209730.name: Protector of the Grove
209730.description: When using Regrowth on an ally the initial heal will always have a critical effect and the cast time of Regrowth will be reduced by 50% for 6 sec.

209740.name: Moonkin Aura
209740.description: Starsurge grants 2% spell critical strike chance to 8 allies within 40 yards for 18 sec, stacking up to 3 times.

209749.name: Faerie Swarm
209749.description: Swarms the target with Faeries, disarming the enemy, preventing the use of any weapons or shield and reducing movement speed by 30% for 5 sec.

209752.name: Boarding Party
209752.description: Between the Eyes increases the movement speed of all friendly players within 15 yards by 30% for 6 sec.

210128.name: Zombify
210128.description:
Reanimates a nearby corpse, summoning a zombie for 20 sec that slowly moves towards your target. 

If your zombie reaches its target, it explodes after 3.0 sec. The explosion stuns all enemies within 8 yards for 3 sec and deals 10% of their health in Shadow damage.

210256.name: Blessing of Sanctuary
210256.description: Instantly removes all stun, silence, fear and horror effects from the friendly target and reduces the duration of future such effects by 60% for 5 sec.

210341.name: Warrior of Light
210341.description: Increases the damage done by your Shield of the Righteous by 30%, but reduces armor granted by 30%.

210378.name: Darkest before the Dawn
210378.description: Every 5 sec the healing done by your next Light of Dawn is increased by 20%. Stacks up to 5 times.

210476.name: Master of Escape
210476.description: Reduces the cooldown of Invisibility by 60 sec.

210689.name: Lightning Rod
210689.description:
Enhancement (Enhancement Shaman)
Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning make your target a Lightning Rod for 8 sec.
 
Lightning Rods take 8% of all damage you deal with Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning.

 Elemental
 [Tempest: Tempest] [ Elemental: Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake / Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning] make your target a Lightning Rod for 8 sec.
 
Lightning Rods take 10% of all damage you deal with [Tempest: Tempest, Lightning Bolt / Lightning Bolt] and Chain Lightning.

210706.name: Gore
210706.description: Thrash, Swipe, Moonfire, and Maul have a 15% chance to reset the cooldown on Mangle, and to cause it to generate an additional 4 Rage.

210853.name: Elemental Assault
210853.description: Stormstrike damage is increased by 20%, and Stormstrike and Lava Lash have a 100% chance to generate 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

211489.name: Sigil Mastery
211489.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Sigils by an additional 25%.

211522.name: Psyfiend
211522.description:
Summons a Psyfiend with [Total Health * (0.04)] health for 12 sec beside you to attack the target at range with Psyflay.

 Psyflay
Deals up to 1% of the target's total health in Shadow damage every 1 sec. Also slows their movement speed by 50% and reduces healing received by 50%.

212036.name: Mass Resurrection
212036.description: Brings all dead party members back to life with 35% health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

212040.name: Revitalize
212040.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana. Not castable in combat.

212048.name: Ancestral Vision
212048.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana.  Cannot be cast when in combat.

212051.name: Reawaken
212051.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

212056.name: Absolution
212056.description: Returns all dead party members to life with 35% of maximum health and mana.  Cannot be cast when in combat.

212084.name: Fel Devastation
212084.description: Unleash the fel within you, damaging enemies directly in front of you for [(41.1% of Attack Power) * (10)] Fire damage over 2 sec. [Fel Devastation: Causing damage also heals you for up to [(360% of Attack Power) * 10] health]

212182.name: Smoke Bomb
212182.description: Creates a cloud of thick smoke in an 8 yard radius around the Rogue for 5 sec. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the smoke cloud.

212295.name: Nether Ward
212295.description: Surrounds the caster with a shield that lasts 3 sec, reflecting all harmful spells cast on you.

212371.name: Rot and Decay
212371.description:
Shadow Bolt damage increases the duration of your Corruption and Agony on the target by 2.0 sec.

Drain Life and Drain Soul damage increases the duration of your Corruption and Agony on the target by 1.0 sec.

212431.name: Explosive Shot
212431.description: Fires an explosive shot at your target. After 3 sec, the shot will explode, dealing (582% of Attack Power) Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

212459.name: Call Fel Lord
212459.description: Summon a fel lord to guard the location for 15 sec. Any enemy that comes within 6 yards will suffer [(Spell Power * 2) * 1 * 1 * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage, and players struck will be stunned for 1 sec.

212552.name: Wraith Walk
212552.description:
Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70% for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.

212638.name: Tracker's Net
212638.description: Hurl a net at your enemy, rooting them for 6 sec. While within the net, the target's chance to hit is reduced by 80%. Any damage will break the net.

212640.name: Mending Bandage
212640.description:
Instantly clears all bleeds, poisons, and diseases from the target, and heals for 18% damage over 6 sec.

Being attacked will stop you from using Mending Bandage.

212653.name: Shimmer
212653.description: Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way. Unaffected by the global cooldown and castable while casting.

213010.name: Charred Warblades
213010.description:
Vengeance (Vengeance Demon Hunter)
You heal for 4% of all Fire damage you deal.


You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.

213200.name: Freedom of the Herd
213200.description: Your Stampeding Roar clears all roots and snares from yourself and allies.

213410.name: Demonic
213410.description: Eye Beam causes you to enter demon form for 5 sec after it finishes dealing damage.

213480.name: Unending Hatred
213480.description: Taking damage causes you to gain Fury based on the damage dealt.

213634.name: Purify Disease
213634.description: Removes all Disease effects from a friendly target.

213644.name: Cleanse Toxins
213644.description: Cleanses a friendly target, removing all Poison and Disease effects.

213764.name: Swipe
213764.description:
Balance,  Guardian,  Restoration
Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

 Feral
Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

Awards 1 combo point.

213871.name: Bodyguard
213871.description:
Protect an ally, causing 40% of all Physical damage they take to be transfered to you. When the target takes Physical damage, your Shield Slam cooldown has a 30% chance to be reset. Bodyguard is cancelled if the target is further than 20 yards from you. Lasts 1 min.

Only one target can be Bodyguarded at a time.

213915.name: Rebound
213915.description:
Spell Reflection reflects the next 2 incoming spells cast on you and reflected spells deal 100% extra damage to the attacker.

Spell Reflection's cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

214205.name: Trinity
214205.description:
Atonement duration increased by 10 sec.

Smite, Penance, Mind Blast, and Void Blast have 10% reduced cast time when you have Atonement on 3 or more allies.

215568.name: Fresh Meat
215568.description: Bloodthirst always Enrages you the first time you strike a target and it has a 15% increased chance to trigger Enrage.

215652.name: Shield of Virtue
215652.description: When activated, your next Avenger's Shield will interrupt and silence all enemies within 8 yds of the target.

215768.name: Blaze of Light
215768.description: The damage of Smite and Penance is increased by 8%, and Penance increases or decreases your target's movement speed by 25% for 2 sec.

215982.name: Spirit of the Redeemer
215982.description: Your Spirit of Redemption is now an active ability with a 2 minute cooldown, but the duration is reduced by 9 sec and you will no longer enter Spirit of Redemption upon dying.

216331.name: Avenging Crusader
216331.description:
You become the ultimate crusader of light, for 15 sec. Auto-attack damage is increased by 1000%, Judgment and Crusader Strike heal up to 5 injured allies within 40 yds for 80% of the damage done, split evenly among them.

This spell is replaced with Crusader Strike while active.

Crusader Strike:
Strike the target for [(140% of Attack Power) * 1] [Blades of Light: Holystrike / Physical] damage.

Generates 1 Holy Power.

216853.name: Sacred Duty
216853.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Blessing of Protection and Blessing of Sacrifice by 33%.

216855.name: Guarded by the Light
216855.description: Your Flash of Light reduces all damage the target receives by 10% for 6 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.

216868.name: Hallowed Ground
216868.description: Your Consecration clears and suppresses all snare effects on allies within its area of effect.

217200.name: Barbed Shot
217200.description:
Fire a shot that tears through your enemy, causing them to bleed for [(77.9% of Attack Power) * 5] damage over 12 sec. If Barbed Shot is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Barbed Shot.

Generates (5 * 8 / 2) Focus over 8 sec.

217832.name: Imprison
217832.description: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

218164.name: Detox
218164.description: Removes all Poison and Disease effects from the target.

218612.name: Feed the Demon
218612.description: Every 20 Fury spent reduces the remaining cooldown of Demon Spikes by 1.00 sec.

219272.name: Demon Skin
219272.description:
Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.2% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health.

Increases your armor by 45%.

219786.name: Ossuary
219786.description:
While you have at least 5 Bone Shield charges, the cost of Death Strike is reduced by 5 Runic Power.

Additionally, your maximum Runic Power is increased by 10.

221536.name: Heartbreaker
221536.description: Your Heart Strike generates 2 additional Runic Power per target hit.

221562.name: Asphyxiate
221562.description: Lifts the enemy target off the ground, crushing their throat with dark energy and stunning them for 5 sec.

221622.name: Thick as Thieves
221622.description: Tricks of the Trade now increases the friendly target's damage by 15% for 6 sec.

221711.name: Essence Drain
221711.description: Whenever you heal yourself with Drain Life, the enemy target deals 9% reduced damage to you for 10 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

223817.name: Divine Purpose
223817.description: Holy Power spending abilities have a 15% chance to make your next Holy Power spending ability free and deal 15% increased damage and healing.

227174.name: Fallout
227174.description: Immolation Aura's initial burst has a chance to shatter Soul Fragments from enemies.

227847.name: Bladestorm
227847.description:
Fury
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for [5 * (271.635% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage over 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

Generates 5 Rage on each strike.

 Arms
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for [7 * (271.635% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage over 6 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

228049.name: Guardian of the Forgotten Queen
228049.description: Empowers the friendly target with the spirit of the forgotten queen, causing the target to be immune to all damage for until canceled.

228260.name: Voidform
228260.description:
Bombards your target with a Void Volley and twists your Shadowform with void magic, increasing your spell damage by 20% for 20 sec. 

This spell is replaced with Void Volley while Voidform is active.

 Void Volley
Releases a volley of pure void energy, firing 10 bolts at your target and 1 bolt at all enemies within 10 yards of your target for (106.049% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

Generates 10 Insanity.

228431.name: Charging Bash
228431.description: Increases the range of your Skull Bash by 10 yards.

228477.name: Soul Cleave
228477.description:
Viciously strike an enemy and all other enemies in front of you for (208% of Attack Power) Physical damage and heal yourself for (240% of Attack Power). Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Consumes up to 2 Soul Fragments, increasing damage by 20% per fragment consumed.

228920.name: Ravager
228920.description:
Arms
Throws a whirling weapon at your target that chases nearby enemies, inflicting [6 * (119.517% of Attack Power)] Physical damage to all enemies over 12 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Cleave and Whirlwind deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active

 Protection
Throws a whirling weapon at your target that chases nearby enemies, inflicting [6 * (119.517% of Attack Power)] Physical damage to all enemies over 12 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Revenge and Thunder Clap deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active.

Generates 10 Rage each time it deals damage.

231032.name: Improved Regrowth
231032.description: Regrowth's initial heal has a 40% increased chance for a critical effect if the target is already affected by Regrowth.

231040.name: Lingering Healing
231040.description:
Rejuvenation's duration is increased by 3 sec.

Regrowth's duration is increased by 3 sec when cast on yourself.

231063.name: Merciless Claws
231063.description: Shred deals 20% increased damage and [Brutal Slash / Swipe] deals 20% increased damage against bleeding targets.

231548.name: The Beast Within
231548.description: Reduce the cooldown of Bestial Wrath by 60 sec.

231564.name: Arcing Cleave
231564.description: For each Arcane Charge, Arcane Barrage hits 1 additional nearby target for 40% damage.

231644.name: Greater Judgment
231644.description: Judgment deems the target unworthy, preventing the next [(Shadow spell power * 483 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] damage dealt by the target.

231663.name: Greater Judgment
231663.description:
Holy,  Retribution
Judgment causes the target to take 20% increased damage from your next Holy Power ability.

Multiple applications may overlap.

 Protection
Judgment causes the target to take 50% increased damage from your next Holy Power ability.

Multiple applications may overlap.

231682.name: Sanctuary
231682.description: Smite prevents the next [(Shadow spell power * 180 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] damage dealt by the enemy.

231691.name: Improved Sprint
231691.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sprint by 60 sec.

232633.name: Arcane Torrent
232633.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 3% of your mana.

232698.name: Shadowform
232698.description: Assume a Shadowform, increasing your spell damage dealt by 10%.

232876.name: Niuzao's Essence
232876.description: Drinking a Purifying Brew, Celestial Brew, Fortifying Brew, or casting Roll will dispel all snares affecting you.

232893.name: Felblade
232893.description:
Charge to your target and deal (122.94% of Attack Power)% Fire damage.

 [Fracture: Generates 15 Fury.] [Demonic Wards: Generates 15 Fury.]Generates 15 Fury.

233396.name: Delirium
233396.description: Howling Blast applies Delirium, reducing the cooldown recovery rate of movement enhancing abilities by 50% for 12 sec.

233412.name: Last Dance
233412.description: Reduces the cooldown of Dancing Rune Weapon by 50% and its duration by 25%.

233673.name: Disentanglement
233673.description: Efflorescence removes all snare effects from friendly targets when it heals and its Mana cost is reduced by 40%.

233750.name: Moon and Stars
233750.description: Entering an Eclipse summons a beam of light at your location granting you 50% reduction in silence and interrupts for 6 sec.

233754.name: Celestial Guardian
233754.description: Bear Form reduces magic damage taken from spells by 10% and you may now cast Moonfire while in Bear Form.

233755.name: Deep Roots
233755.description: Increases the amount of damage required to cancel your Entangling Roots [Mass Entanglement: or Mass Entanglement] by 75%.

233759.name: Grapple Weapon
233759.description: You fire off a rope spear, grappling the target's weapons and shield, returning them to you for 5 sec.

234153.name: Drain Life
234153.description: Drains life from the target, causing 25 Shadow damage over 5 sec, and healing you for 500% of the damage done.

234299.name: Fist of Justice
234299.description: Hammer of Justice's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

234876.name: Death's Embrace
234876.description: Agony, Corruption, Unstable Affliction, Seed of Corruption, and [Drain Soul / Shadow Bolt] deal up to 40% increased damage on targets below 35% health. Damage increase is higher against lower health targets.

235219.name: Cold Snap
235219.description: Resets the cooldown of your Ice Barrier, Frost Nova, Cone of Cold, Ice Cold, and Ice Block.

235313.name: Blazing Barrier
235313.description:
Shields you in flame, absorbing [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage [Molten Skin: and reducing Physical damage taken by 0%] for 1 min.

Melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take (14.375% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

235450.name: Prismatic Barrier
235450.description:
Shields you with an arcane force, absorbing [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage and reducing magic damage taken by 15% for 1 min.

The duration of harmful Magic effects against you is reduced by 25%.

235484.name: Improved Between the Eyes
235484.description: Critical strikes with Between the Eyes deal 3.0 times normal damage.

235587.name: Miracle Worker
235587.description: Holy Word: Serenity[gains][and Holy Word: Sanctify gain] an additional charge.

235711.name: Chrono Shift
235711.description: Arcane Barrage slows enemies by 50% and increases your movement speed by 10% for 5 sec.

235941.name: Master and Commander
235941.description: Cooldown of Rallying Cry reduced by 120 sec.

236012.name: Malorne's Swiftness
236012.description: Your Travel Form movement speed while within a Battleground or Arena is increased by 20% and you always move at 100% movement speed while in Travel Form.

236019.name: Strength of the Wild
236019.description:
You become further adept in Caster Form and Bear Form.

Caster Form
When using Regrowth on an ally the initial heal will have a 30% increased critical chance and the cast time of Regrowth will be reduced by 50% for 6 sec.

Bear Form
Maximum health while in Bear Form increased by 15% and you gain 5 Rage when attacked in Bear Form.

You also learn:

 Strength of the Wild
Maul the target for 8% of the target's maximum health in Physical damage.

236020.name: Ferocious Wound
236020.description: Attacking with a 5 combo point Ferocious Bite reduces the target's maximum health by up to 3% for 30 sec, stacking up to 2 times. Ferocious Wound can only be active on one target at once.

236068.name: Moment of Clarity
236068.description: Omen of Clarity now triggers 30% more often, can accumulate up to (1u + 1) charges, and increases the damage of your next Shred or [Brutal Slash / Swipe] by 15%.

236077.name: Disarm
236077.description: Disarm the enemy's weapons and shield for 5 sec. Disarmed creatures deal significantly reduced damage.

236144.name: Master Shapeshifter
236144.description:
Your abilities are amplified based on your current shapeshift form, granting an additional effect.

 Caster Form
Rejuvenation heals for 30% more and causes you to instantly generate 25 Rage after entering Bear Form.

 Moonkin Form
Wrath, Starfire, and Starsurge deal 30% additional damage and cause you to instantly generate 25 Rage after entering Bear Form.

 Cat Form
Rip, Ferocious Bite, and Maim deal 60% additional damage and cause you to instantly generate 50 Rage after entering Bear Form when cast with 5 combo points.

236147.name: Malorne's Swiftness
236147.description: Your Travel Form movement speed while within a Battleground or Arena is increased by 20% and you always move at 100% movement speed while in Travel Form.

236180.name: Den Mother
236180.description:
You bolster nearby allies within 15 yards, increasing their maximum health by 15%.

The duration of all stun effects on you is reduced by 15%.

236273.name: Duel
236273.description: You challenge the target to a duel. While challenged, all damage you and the target deal to all targets other than each other is reduced by 50%. Lasts 12 sec.

236279.name: Devastator
236279.description: Your auto-attacks deal an additional (131.4% of Attack Power) Physical damage and have a 25% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Shield Slam.

236308.name: Storm of Destruction
236308.description: Bladestorm, Ravager, and Demolish now snare all targets you hit by 60% for 6 sec and decrease their healing taken by 50% for 10 sec.

236457.name: Slipstream
236457.description: Arcane Missiles and Evocation can now be channeled while moving.

236499.name: Ultimate Radiance
236499.description: Evangelism cooldown is reduced by 45 sec and Power Word: Radiance healing is increased by 15%.

238049.name: Scintillating Moonlight
238049.description: Moonfire reduces damage dealt to you by 1%.

238100.name: Angel's Mercy
238100.description: Reduces the cooldown of Desperate Prayer by 20 sec.

238135.name: Eternal Barrier
238135.description: Power Word: Shield absorbs 20% additional damage and lasts 5 sec longer.

238136.name: Cosmic Ripple
238136.description: When Holy Word: Serenity or Holy Word: Sanctify finish their cooldown, you emit a burst of light that heals up to 5 injured targets within 40 yards for (122.693% of Spell Power).

238558.name: Misery
238558.description: Vampiric Touch also applies Shadow Word: Pain to the target. Shadow Word: Pain lasts an additional 5 sec.

245687.name: Dark Shadow
245687.description: Shadow Dance increases all ability damage by 5%, and Shadowstrike and Shuriken Storm damage by an additional 5%.

247454.name: Spirit Bomb
247454.description: Consume up to 5 Soul Fragments then explode, dealing (200% of Attack Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased by 20 / Soulcrush: 28 / Untethered Rage: 25% per fragment consumed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

247543.name: Entangling Bark
247543.description: Ironbark now also grants the target Nature's Grasp, rooting the first 3 melee attackers for 6 sec.

248443.name: Ranger's Finesse
248443.description:
Casting Aimed Shot provides you with Ranger's Finesse. After gaining 3 stacks of Ranger's Finesse, increase your next Volley's radius and duration by 50%.

Consuming Ranger's Finesse reduces the remaining cooldown of Aspect of the Turtle by 20 sec.

248518.name: Interlope
248518.description:
Misdirection now causes the next 3 hostile spells cast on your target within 10 sec to be redirected to your pet, but its cooldown is increased by 15 sec.

Your pet must be within 20 yards of the target for spells to be redirected.

248855.name: Gateway Mastery
248855.description: Increases the range of your Demonic Gateway by 20 yards, and reduces the cast time by 30%. Reduces the time between how often players can take your Demonic Gateway by 30 sec.

252216.name: Tiger Dash
252216.description: Shift into Cat Form and increase your movement speed by 200%, reducing gradually over 5 sec.

253593.name: Inexorable Assault
253593.description:
Gain Inexorable Assault every 4 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

 [Frostscythe: Obliterate and Frostscythe consume / Obliterate consumes] up to 3 stacks, dealing an additional (26.322% of Attack Power) Frost damage for each stack consumed.

255544.name: Poison Bomb
255544.description: Envenom has a 5% chance per combo point spent to smash a vial of poison at the target's location, creating a pool of acidic death that deals [(38.3328% of Attack Power) * 4] Nature damage over 2 sec to all enemies within it.

255647.name: Light's Judgment
255647.description: Call down a strike of Holy energy, dealing [Attack Power * 4.2 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Holy damage to enemies within 10 yards after 3 sec. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

255654.name: Bull Rush
255654.description: Charge forward for 1 sec, knocking enemies down for 1.5 sec.

255661.name: Cantrips
255661.description: Conjure up an Eldritch Grimoire, allowing you mail access for 1.5 min.

255937.name: Wake of Ashes
255937.description:
Lash out at your enemies, dealing (321.86% of Attack Power) Radiant damage to all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, and applying Truth's Wake, burning the targets for an additional [(65.28% of Attack Power) * (2.73077)] damage over 9 sec.

Demon and Undead enemies are also stunned for 5 sec.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

256165.name: Blinding Powder
256165.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blind by 25% and increases its range by 5 yds.

256170.name: Loaded Dice
256170.description: Activating Adrenaline Rush improves the result of your next Roll the Bones by one level.

256188.name: Retractable Hook
256188.description: Reduces the cooldown of Grappling Hook by 15 sec.

256948.name: Spatial Rift
256948.description: Tear a rift in space. Reactivate this ability to teleport through the rift.

257044.name: Rapid Fire
257044.description:
Shoot a stream of 7 / Double Tap: 13 / Quick Draw: 10 shots at your target over 2 sec, dealing a total of [7 / Double Tap: 12.6 / Quick Draw: 10 * (72.6% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage. Usable while moving.

Each shot generates 3 / Double Tap: 5 / Quick Draw: 6 Focus.

257284.name: Hunter's Mark
257284.description:
Apply Hunter's Mark to the target, causing the target to always be seen and tracked by the Hunter.

Hunter's Mark increases the target's damage taken by 3%. Can only be applied to a target at a time.

257505.name: Shot in the Dark
257505.description: After using Vanish or Shadow Dance, your next Cheap Shot is free and ignores its cooldown.

257620.name: Multi-Shot
257620.description: Fires several missiles, hitting your current target and all enemies within 10 yards for (181.6% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. [Lethal Shots: Multi-Shot has a 30% chance to reduce the cooldown of Rapid Fire by 5.0 sec]

257621.name: Trick Shots
257621.description: When Multi-Shot hits 3 or more targets, your next Aimed Shot or Rapid Fire will ricochet and hit up to 5 additional targets for 60% of normal damage.

258860.name: Essence Break
258860.description: Slash all enemies in front of you for (311% of Attack Power) Chaos damage, causing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance to deal (198% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to them for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

258881.name: Trail of Ruin
258881.description: The final slash of Blade Dance inflicts an additional (72% of Attack Power) Chaos damage over 4 sec.

258887.name: Cycle of Hatred
258887.description: Activating Eye Beam reduces the cooldown of your next Eye Beam by 2.5 sec, stacking up to 10 sec.

258920.name: Immolation Aura
258920.description:
Havoc
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

 Devourer
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

 Vengeance
Engulf yourself in flames, radiating [(13.55% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.
[
Generates 20 Fury.]

Generates 20 Fury over 6 sec.

259489.name: Kill Command
259489.description:
Give the command to kill, causing your pet to savagely deal (300% of Attack Power) Physical damage to the enemy.

Generates 15 / Invigorating Pulse: 20 / Flanker's Advantage: 20 Focus.

259495.name: Wildfire Bomb
259495.description:
Hurl a bomb at the target, exploding for (157.95% of Attack Power) Fire damage in a cone and coating enemies in wildfire, scorching them for (125.928% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 6 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Deals 80% increased damage to your primary target.

260240.name: Precise Shots
260240.description:
Aimed Shot causes your next Arcane Shot or Multi-Shot to deal 50% more damage and cost 60% less Focus.

Precise Shots benefits Kill Shot's damage at 100% effectiveness.

260243.name: Volley
260243.description: Rain a volley of arrows down over 6 sec, dealing up to [(140% of Attack Power) * 12] Physical damage to any enemy in the area, and gain the effects of Trick Shots for as long as Volley is active.

260248.name: Bloodseeker
260248.description: You and your pet gain 10% attack speed for every bleeding enemy within 12 yds.

260285.name: Tip of the Spear
260285.description: Kill Command increases the direct damage of your other abilities by 15%, stacking up to 3 times.

260309.name: Master Marksman
260309.description: Your ranged ability critical strikes cause the target to bleed for an additional 10% of the damage dealt over 6 sec.

260364.name: Arcane Pulse
260364.description: Deals (Attack Power * 1.5) Arcane damage to nearby enemies and reduces their movement speed by 80%. Lasts 8 sec.

260404.name: Calling the Shots
260404.description: Trueshot's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

260643.name: Skullsplitter
260643.description:
Bash an enemy's skull, dealing (202.488% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

Skullsplitter causes your Rend and Deep Wounds on the target to bleed out 100% faster for 10 sec.

Generates (150 / 10) Rage.

260708.name: Sweeping Strikes
260708.description: Your next 12 damaging single-target abilities hit 1 additional target within 8 yds for 75% damage. Lasts 30 sec.

260878.name: Spirit Wolf
260878.description: While transformed into a Ghost Wolf, you gain 5% increased movement speed and 5% damage reduction every 1 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

261917.name: Sharp Reflexes
261917.description: Blackout Kick reduces the cooldown of Rising Sun Kick and Fists of Fury by 1.0 sec.

262150.name: Dreadnaught
262150.description: Overpower causes a seismic wave, dealing (70% of Attack Power) damage to all enemies in a 10 yd line. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

262161.name: Warbreaker
262161.description: Smash the ground and shatter the armor of all enemies within 10 yds, dealing (306.263% of Attack Power) Physical damage and increasing damage you deal to them by 30% for 10 sec.

262231.name: War Machine
262231.description:
Arms
Your auto-attacks generate 1050% more Rage.

Killing an enemy instantly generates 5 Rage and increases your movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

 Fury,  Protection
Your auto-attacks generate 50% more Rage.

Killing an enemy instantly generates 5 Rage and increases your movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

262647.name: Forceful Winds
262647.description: Windfury has a 10% additional chance to trigger and its damage is increased by 50%.

263165.name: Void Torrent
263165.description:
Channel a torrent of void energy into the target, dealing (713.055% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 3 sec and tearing open an Entropic Rift.

 Entropic Rift
Mind Blast tears open an Entropic Rift that follows the enemy for 8 sec. Enemies caught in its path suffer (60% of Spell Power) Shadow damage every 1 sec while within its reach.

Generates 24 Insanity over the duration.

263642.name: Fracture
263642.description:
Rapidly slash your target for [(103.5% of Attack Power)% + (207% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage, and shatter 2 Lesser Soul Fragments from them.

Generates 25 Fury.

264000.name: Creeping Death
264000.description: Your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction deal damage 10% faster.

264078.name: Dreadlash
264078.description: When your Dreadstalkers charge into battle, their Dreadbite attack now hits all targets within 8 yards and deals 10% more damage.

264130.name: Power Siphon
264130.description: Instantly sacrifice up to 2 Wild Imps, generating 2 charges of Demonic Core that cause Demonbolt to deal 30% additional damage.

264332.name: Guerrilla Tactics
264332.description: Wildfire Bomb now has 2 charges, and the initial explosion deals 15% increased damage.

264348.name: Tiger Tail Sweep
264348.description: Increases the range of Leg Sweep by 4 yds.

264735.name: Survival of the Fittest
264735.description: Reduces all damage you and your pet take by 30% for 6 sec.

265046.name: Static Charge
265046.description: Reduces the cooldown of Capacitor Totem by 15 sec.

265187.name: Summon Demonic Tyrant
265187.description:
Summon a Demonic Tyrant that damages your target for 15 sec. 

Damage dealt by Demonic Tyrant is increased by 10% for each Wild Imp and Dreadstalker active. [Soulbound Tyrant: Generates 0 Soul Shards.]

265221.name: Fireblood
265221.description: Removes all poison, disease, curse, magic, and bleed effects and increases your primary stat by (84 * 3) and an additional 84 for each effect removed. Lasts 8 sec.

266086.name: Rain of Chaos
266086.description: While your initial Infernal is active, every Soul Shard you spend has a 15% chance to summon an additional Infernal that lasts 8 sec.

266134.name: Internal Combustion
266134.description: Chaos Bolt consumes up to 5 sec of Immolate's damage over time effect on your target, instantly dealing that much damage.

266921.name: Born To Be Wild
266921.description:
Beast Mastery,  Marksmanship
The cooldown of Aspect of the Cheetah, and Aspect of the Turtle are reduced by 15 sec.

 Survival
The cooldown of Aspect of the Eagle, Aspect of the Cheetah, and Aspect of the Turtle are reduced by 15 sec.

267116.name: Animal Companion
267116.description: Your Call Pet additionally summons the pet from the bonus slot in your stable. This pet will obey your Kill Command, but cannot use pet family abilities.

267214.name: Sacrificed Souls
267214.description: Shadow Bolt and Demonbolt deal 2% additional damage per demon you have summoned.

267216.name: Inner Demons
267216.description: You passively summon a Wild Imp to fight for you every 12 sec.

268175.name: Void Reaver
268175.description: Frailty now also reduces all damage you take from afflicted targets by 5%.

268358.name: Demonic Circle
268358.description:
Summons a Demonic Circle for 15 min. Cast Demonic Circle: Teleport to teleport to its location and remove all movement slowing effects. [Kilrogg's Cunning: If you cast Demonic Circle: Summon while controlling an Eye of Kilrogg, the circle will appear where the eye is located]

You also learn:

 Demonic Circle: Teleport
Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all movement slowing effects.

269513.name: Death from Above
269513.description:
Finishing move that empowers your weapons with energy to perform a deadly attack.

You leap into the air and [Envenom] [Dispatch / Eviscerate] your target on the way back down, with such force that it has a 15% stronger effect.

269650.name: Pyroclasm
269650.description:
Consuming Hot Streak has a 15% chance to make your next non-instant Pyroblast or Flamestrike cast within 15 sec deal 230% additional damage.

Maximum 2 stacks.

269737.name: Alpha Predator
269737.description: Kill Command now has 2 charges, and deals 15% increased damage.

270233.name: Freezing Rain
270233.description:
Frozen Orb makes Blizzard instant cast.

Blizzard damage increased by 20%.

270581.name: Natural Mending
270581.description: Exhilaration's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

271877.name: Blade Rush
271877.description:
Charge to your target with your blades out, dealing [(375.3% of Attack Power)% * 230 / 100] Physical damage to the target and (375.3% of Attack Power)% to all other nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8% targets.

While Blade Flurry is active, damage to non-primary targets is increased by 100%.

Generates 25 Energy over 5 sec.

272026.name: Dancing Steel
272026.description: Blade Flurry strikes 3 additional enemies and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

272651.name: Command Pet
272651.description:
Commands your pet to perform its unique ability. This ability will transform based on the specialization of your active pet. 

Ferocity: Primal Rage
Tenacity: Fortitude of the Bear
Cunning: Master's Call

273221.name: Aftershock
273221.description: Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake have a 25% chance to refund all Maelstrom spent.

273946.name: Hemostasis
273946.description: Each enemy hit by Blood Boil increases the damage and healing done by your next Death Strike by 8%, stacking up to 5 times.

273952.name: Grip of the Dead
273952.description: [Defile / Death and Decay] reduces the movement speed of enemies within its area by 90%, decaying by 10% every sec.

273953.name: Voracious
273953.description: Death Strike's healing is increased by 5% and grants you 12% Leech for 8 sec.

274281.name: New Moon
274281.description:
Deals (258.4% of Spell Power) Astral damage to the target and empowers New Moon to become Half Moon. 

Generates 10 Astral Power.

274586.name: Invigorating Mists
274586.description:
Vivify heals all allies with your Renewing Mist active for (323.18% of Spell Power).

Sheilun's Gift's healing is increased by 500% on its primary target.

274738.name: Ancestral Call
274738.description: Invoke the spirits of your ancestors, granting you 225 of one of your two highest secondary stat for 15 sec.

274837.name: Feral Frenzy
274837.description:
Unleash a furious frenzy, clawing your target 5 times for [(16.3% of Attack Power) * 5] Physical damage and an additional [5 * (32.67% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 5 combo points.

274902.name: Photosynthesis
274902.description: Your periodic heals on targets with Lifebloom have a 8% chance to cause it to bloom.

274909.name: Rising Mist
274909.description: Rising Sun Kick extends your Renewing Mist and Enveloping Mist effects by 4 sec, up to 100% of their original duration.

275334.name: Punish
275334.description: Shield Slam deals 15% increased damage and reduces enemies' damage against you by 3% for 9 sec. Multiple punishments may overlap.

275336.name: Storm Surge
275336.description: Avatar increases the damage of Thunder Clap by 50% and reduces its cooldown by 50%.

275338.name: Menace
275338.description: Intimidating Shout will cause all nearby enemies except your target to flee in fear for 15 sec instead of cowering.

275339.name: Rumbling Earth
275339.description: Shockwave's range increased by 6 yards and when it strikes at least 3 targets its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

275773.name: Judgment
275773.description: Judges the target, dealing (123.75% of Spell Power) Holy damage [Greater Judgment: and preventing [(Shadow spell power * 483 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] damage dealt by the target]. [Judgment: Generates 1 Holy Power.]

275779.name: Judgment
275779.description: Judges the target, dealing (190% of Spell Power) Holy damage [Greater Judgment: and causing them to take 20% increased damage from your next Holy Power ability].

276023.name: Harbinger of Doom
276023.description:
Sudden Doom triggers 30% more often and can accumulate up to 2 charges.

Summoning a Lesser Ghoul with Scourge Strike reduces the cooldown of Putrefy by 2.5 sec.

276079.name: Death's Reach
276079.description:
Increases the range of Death Grip by 10 yds.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Death Grip.

277953.name: Night Terrors
277953.description: Shuriken Storm reduces enemies' movement speed by 50% for 8 sec.

278326.name: Consume Magic
278326.description: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target [Swallowed Anger: and granting you 20 Fury].

279302.name: Frostwyrm's Fury
279302.description: Summons a frostwyrm who breathes on all enemies within 40 yd in front of you, dealing (370.75% of Attack Power) Frost damage, stunning enemies for 3 sec, and slowing movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

279620.name: Twin Moons
279620.description: Moonfire deals 10% increased damage and also hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

279876.name: Opportunity
279876.description:
Sinister Strike has a 30% chance to hit an additional time and grant Opportunity.

 Opportunity
Your next Pistol Shot costs 50% less Energy and deals 100% increased damage.

280197.name: Spiritual Focus
280197.description: The cooldown of Zenith is reduced by 20 sec.

280373.name: Redoubt
280373.description: Armor granted by Shield of the Righteous is increased by up to 60%, based on your missing health.

280392.name: Meat Cleaver
280392.description: Whirlwind [Crashing Thunder: and Thunder Clap deal / deals] 50% additional damage when [Crashing Thunder: they hit / it hits] 3 or more targets.

280515.name: Bob and Weave
280515.description: Increases the duration of Stagger by 5.0 sec, causing Staggered damage to be dealt to you more gradually.

280716.name: Leeching Poison
280716.description: Adds a Leeching effect to your Lethal poisons, granting you 3.0% Leech.

280719.name: Secret Technique
280719.description:
Finishing move that creates shadow clones of yourself. You and your shadow clones each perform a piercing attack on all enemies near your target, dealing Physical damage to the primary target and reduced damage to other targets.
   1 point  : [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 3] total damage
   2 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 2 * 3] total damage
   3 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 3 * 3] total damage
   4 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 4 * 3] total damage
   5 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 5 * 3] total damage
[   6 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 6 * 3] total damage]
[   7 points: [(28.08% of Attack Power) * 7 * 3] total damage]

281001.name: Massacre
281001.description: Execute is usable on targets below 35% health.

281238.name: Obliteration
281238.description:
During Pillar of Frost, Frost Strike [Glacial Advance: Glacial Advance] and Howling Blast always grant Killing Machine and have a 20% chance to generate a Rune.

Additionally during Pillar of Frost, Empower Rune Weapon causes your next Obliterate or Frostscythe to cost no Runes.

281482.name: Reverberate
281482.description: Arcane Pulse has a 50% chance to repeat its explosion at 30% effectiveness.

281954.name: Pterrordax Swoop
281954.description: Reduces your falling speed for 2 min.

285381.name: Primal Wrath
285381.description:
Finishing move that deals instant damage and applies Rip to all enemies within 10 yards. Lasts longer per combo point.

   1 point  : [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 2] plus Rip for (2 * 2) sec
   2 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 3] plus Rip for (2 * 3) sec
   3 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 4] plus Rip for (2 * 4) sec
   4 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 5] plus Rip for (2 * 5) sec
   5 points: [(15.5% of Attack Power) * 6] plus Rip for (2 * 6) sec

287681.name: Turbo Fists
287681.description: Fists of Fury now reduces all targets movement speed by 90%, and you Parry all attacks while channelling Fists of Fury.

287712.name: Haymaker
287712.description: Wind up, then unleash your might upon your foe, dealing [Attack Power * 0.75 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage, stunning for 3 sec, and knocking them back substantially.

288613.name: Trueshot
288613.description:
Increases your critical strike chance by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 15 sec.

 Aimed Shot
Cooldown recovers 40% faster.

 Rapid Fire
Cooldown recovers 60% faster.
[
Applies Spotter's Mark.]

288733.name: Intangibility
288733.description: Dispersion heals you for an additional [(25 * (0 + 6) / 6)]% of your maximum health over its duration and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

288848.name: Necromancer's Cunning
288848.description: When your Lesser Ghouls expire, they explode in viscera, dealing [0.21 * ((200% of Attack Power)) * (1 + Versatility) * 1] Shadow damage to enemies nearby.

288855.name: Life and Death
288855.description:
When the target afflicted with your Dread Plague is healed, you are also healed for 10% of the amount.

Additionally, Dread Plague deals 200% of its remaining damage to the target when dispelled.

289237.name: Master Shapeshifter
289237.description:
Your abilities are amplified based on your current shapeshift form, granting an additional effect.

Wrath, Starfire, and Starsurge deal 30% additional damage and generate 2700 Mana.

Bear Form
Ironfur grants 30% additional armor and generates 3125 Mana.

 Cat Form
Rip, Ferocious Bite, and Maim deal 60% additional damage and generate 12500 Mana when cast with 5 combo points.

289666.name: Greater Heal
289666.description: An exceptional spell that heals an ally for 40% of their maximum health, ignoring healing reduction effects.

289874.name: Ride the Lightning
289874.description: Stormstrike and Lava Lash unleash a Chain Lightning at 100% effectiveness that deals 20% reduced damage with each jump.

290250.name: Rain Dance
290250.description: Healing Rain is now instant, 50% more effective, and costs 60% less mana.

290608.name: Crusader's Direhorn
290608.description: Summons a Crusader's Direhorn, which serves as a mount.

291944.name: Regeneratin'
291944.description: Regenerate 50% of your maximum health over 6 sec, interrupted by direct damage.

292752.name: Embrace of the Loa
292752.description:
Choose your Loa by making an offering at Loa Shrines around the world. 

Each Loa offers unique powers. Guards in Dazar'alor will tell you where Shrines can be found.

301768.name: Verdant Heart
301768.description: Frenzied Regeneration and Barkskin increase all healing received by 20%.

305394.name: Unbound Freedom
305394.description: Blessing of Freedom increases movement speed by 30%, and you gain Blessing of Freedom when cast on a friendly target.

305483.name: Lightning Lasso
305483.description: Grips the target in lightning, stunning and dealing (3850% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 5 sec while the target is lassoed. Can move while channeling.

312411.name: Bag of Tricks
312411.description: Pull your chosen trick from the bag and use it on target enemy or ally. Enemies take [Attack Power * 2.52 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] damage and are snared by 80% for 4 sec, while allies are healed for [Attack Power * 3.78 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] and move 20% faster for 4 sec.

312425.name: Rummage Your Bag
312425.description: Change the contents of your Bag of Tricks. Now where did you put that...?

315341.name: Between the Eyes
315341.description:
Finishing move that blasts your target with your pistol, dealing Physical damage and increasing your damage dealt by 4%. Multiple instances of this bonus can overlap.
   1 point : [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power)] damage, 4 sec
   2 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 2] damage, 6 sec
   3 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 3] damage, 8 sec
   4 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 4] damage, 10 sec
   5 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 5] damage, 12 sec
[   6 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 6] damage, 14 sec]
[   7 points: [((75.1% of Attack Power) * ((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3) / Attack Power) * 7] damage, 16 sec]

315496.name: Slice and Dice
315496.description:
Finishing move that consumes combo points to increase attack speed by 50%. Lasts longer per combo point.
   1 point  : 12 seconds
   2 points: 18 seconds
   3 points: 24 seconds
   4 points: 30 seconds
   5 points: 36 seconds
[   6 points: 42 seconds]
[   7 points: 48 seconds]

315584.name: Instant Poison
315584.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts (7.4% of Attack Power) Nature damage.

315720.name: Onslaught
315720.description:
Brutally attack an enemy for (413.868% of Attack Power) Physical damage [Tenderize: and become Enraged for 4 sec / .]

Generates (300 / 10) Rage.

315924.name: Hand of the Protector
315924.description: When you cast Word of Glory on someone other than yourself, its healing is increased by up to 100% based on the target's missing health.

316239.name: Rune Strike
316239.description: Strike the target for (60% of Attack Power) Physical damage. This attack cannot be dodged, blocked, or parried.

316402.name: Improved Execute
316402.description: Execute no longer costs Rage and now generates 20 Rage.

316405.name: Improved Execute
316405.description: Execute no longer has a cooldown and if your foe survives, 10% of the Rage spent is refunded.

316440.name: Martial Prowess
316440.description: Overpower and Slam increase the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 5%, stacking up to 3 times.

316803.name: Runic Overflow
316803.description: Increases Frost Strike and Glacial Advance damage by 10%.

316916.name: Cleaving Strikes
316916.description:
Frost
Frostscythe deals 20% increased damage during Remorseless Winter.

 Blood
Heart Strike hits up to 3 additional enemies while you remain in Death and Decay.

When leaving your Death and Decay you retain its bonus effects for 4 sec.

 Unholy
Scourge Strike and Festering Strike deal 10% increased damage.

317133.name: Improved Vampiric Blood
317133.description: Vampiric Blood's healing and absorb amount is increased by 5% and duration by 2 sec.

317138.name: Strength of Will
317138.description: Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional 15%.

317610.name: Relish in Blood
317610.description: While Crimson Scourge is active, your next Death and Decay heals you for (30% of Attack Power) health per Bone Shield charge and you immediately gain 10 Runic Power.

318038.name: Flametongue Weapon
318038.description:
Enhancement
Imbue your weapon with the element of Fire for 1 hour, causing each of your attacks to deal (3.96% of Attack Power) additional Fire damage.

 Elemental
Imbue your weapon with the element of Fire for 1 hour, increasing the damage of your Fire spells by 5.0%.

319066.name: Improved Wound Poison
319066.description: Wound Poison can now stack 2 additional times.

319175.name: Black Powder
319175.description:
Finishing move that launches explosive Black Powder at all nearby enemies dealing Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. [Shadowed Finishers: All nearby targets with your Find Weakness suffer an additional 30% damage as Shadow]

   1 point  : [(18.5% of Attack Power)] damage
   2 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 2] damage
   3 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 3] damage
   4 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 4] damage
   5 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 5] damage
[   6 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 6] damage]
[   7 points: [(18.5% of Attack Power) * 7] damage]

319930.name: Stormblast
319930.description:
Stormstrike has an additional charge.

Stormsurge now also causes your next Stormstrike to deal 25% additional damage as Nature damage, stacking up to 2 times.

319949.name: Improved Backstab
319949.description:
[Gloomblade / Backstab] has 15% increased critical strike chance.

While behind your target, Backstab critical strikes grant Find Weakness for 10 sec.

319951.name: Improved Shuriken Storm
319951.description:
Shuriken Storm has 15% increased critical strike chance.

Shuriken Storm critical strikes grant Find Weakness for 10 sec.

320313.name: Swallowed Anger
320313.description: Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.

320331.name: Infernal Armor
320331.description: Immolation Aura increases your armor by 20% and causes melee attackers to suffer [(12% of Attack Power)] Fire damage.

320361.name: Improved Disrupt
320361.description: Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.

320374.name: Burning Hatred
320374.description: Immolation Aura generates an additional 24 Fury over 6 sec.

320386.name: Bouncing Glaives
320386.description: Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.

320387.name: Perfectly Balanced Glaive
320387.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fracture by 1 sec and Throw Glaive by 6 sec.

320413.name: Critical Chaos
320413.description: The chance that Chaos Strike will refund 20 Fury is increased by 30% of your critical strike chance.

320416.name: Blazing Path
320416.description:
Devourer
Shift gains an additional charge.

 Havoc
 gains an additional charge.

 Vengeance
Infernal Strike gains an additional charge.

320418.name: Improved Sigil of Misery
320418.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of [Sigil of Chains: Chains / Misery] by [Sigil of Chains: 30 / 30] sec.

320635.name: Vengeful Bonds
320635.description: Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.

321014.name: Pack Tactics
321014.description:
Barbed Shot now instantly grants 25 Focus.

Passive Focus generation increased by 75%.

321136.name: Shining Light
321136.description: Every 3 Shields of the Righteous make your next Word of Glory cost no Holy Power. Maximum 2 stacks.

321291.name: Death and Madness
321291.description:
If a target dies within 7 sec after being struck by Shadow Word: Death, generate 8 Insanity.

When Shadow Word: Death fails to kill a target below 20% health, its cooldown is reset. Cannot occur more than once every 10 sec.

321297.name: Eyes of the Beast
321297.description: Take direct control of your pet and see through its eyes for 1 min.

321387.name: Enlightened
321387.description:
Arcane damage dealt is increased based on your current mana, up to 6% at full mana.

Mana Regen is increased based on your current mana, up to 20% when out of mana.

321420.name: Improved Clearcasting
321420.description: Clearcasting can stack up to 2 additional times.

321460.name: Deadeye
321460.description: Kill Shot now has 2 charges and has its cooldown reduced by 2.0 sec.

321507.name: Touch of the Magi
321507.description:
Applies Touch of the Magi to your current target, accumulating 20% of the damage you deal to the target for 12 sec, and then exploding for that amount of Arcane damage to the target and reduced damage to all nearby enemies.

Generates 4 Arcane Charges.

321526.name: Mana Adept
321526.description: Arcane Barrage grants you 2.0% of your maximum mana per Arcane Charge spent.

321708.name: Improved Blazing Barrier
321708.description: Blazing Barrier's damage is increased by 200% and it now cauterizes your wounds, healing you for 15% of the damage it absorbs.

321745.name: Improved Prismatic Barrier
321745.description: Prismatic Barrier further reduces magical damage taken by an additional 10% and duration of harmful Magic effects by 15%.

322101.name: Expel Harm
322101.description: Expel negative chi from your body, healing for (120% of Spell Power) and dealing 10% of the amount healed as Nature damage to an enemy within 20 yards. [Expel Harm: Draws in the positive chi of all your Healing Spheres to increase the healing of Expel Harm] [Reverse Harm: Generates [(120% of Spell Power) + 30] Chi.]

322109.name: Touch of Death
322109.description:
You exploit the enemy target's weakest point, instantly dealing damage equal to 100% of your maximum health to [Improved Touch of Death: creatures if they have less health than you / them.

Only usable on creatures that have less health than you] [Deals damage equal to 35% of your maximum health against players and stronger creatures under 15% health / .] [Touch of Death: Reduces delayed Stagger damage by 200% of damage dealt] [Spawns 3 Chi Spheres, granting 1 Chi when you walk through them] [Increases the Monk's Physical damage by 15% for 10 sec]

322113.name: Improved Touch of Death
322113.description: Touch of Death can now be used on targets with less than 15% health remaining, dealing 35% of your maximum health in damage.

322115.name: Light's Promise
322115.description: Power Word: Radiance gains an additional charge.

322118.name: Invoke Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent
322118.description:
Summons an effigy of Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent for 25 sec. Yu'lon will heal injured allies with Soothing Breath, healing the target and up to 2 allies for (210% of Spell Power) over 4.5 sec. 

Enveloping Mist costs 50% less mana while Yu'lon is active.

322120.name: Shuffle
322120.description:
Niuzao's teachings allow you to shuffle during combat, increasing the effectiveness of your Stagger by 100%.

Shuffle is granted by attacking enemies with your Keg Smash, Blackout Kick, and Spinning Crane Kick.

 Stagger: You shrug off attacks, delaying a portion of Physical damage based on your Agility, instead taking it over 10 sec. Affects magical attacks at 58% effectiveness. [Training of Niuzao: Gain up to 15% Mastery based on your current level of Stagger.]

322507.name: Celestial Brew
322507.description: A swig of strong brew that coalesces purified chi escaping your body into a celestial guard, absorbing 0 damage.

322729.name: Spinning Crane Kick
322729.description: Spin while kicking in the air, dealing [4 * (10% of Attack Power)] Physical damage over 1.5 sec to enemies within 8 yds. [Spinning Crane Kick: Dealing damage with Spinning Crane Kick grants Shuffle for 1 sec, and your Healing Spheres travel towards you]

322740.name: Mighty Stomp
322740.description: While active, Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox can be recast to cause Niuzao to stomp mightily and knock nearby enemies into the air.

322960.name: Fortifying Brew: Determination
322960.description:
Fortifying Brew increases Stagger effectiveness by 15% while active.

Combines with other Fortifying Brew effects.

325093.name: Light Brewing
325093.description: Reduces the cooldown of Purifying Brew, Celestial Brew, and Celestial Infusion by 20%.

325153.name: Exploding Keg
325153.description:
Hurls a flaming keg at the target location, dealing (380% of Attack Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies, causing your attacks against them to deal (30% of Attack Power) additional Fire damage, and causing their melee attacks to deal 100% reduced damage for the next 3 sec.

Resets the cooldown of Keg Smash.

325197.name: Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane
325197.description:
Summon an effigy of Chi-Ji for 25 sec that kicks up 3 Gust of Mists when you Blackout Kick, Rising Sun Kick, or Spinning Crane Kick, healing up to 2 allies for [(0.1% of Spell Power) * 50 / 100].

Chi-Ji's presence makes you immune to movement impairing effects, makes Enveloping Mist instant cast, and reduces the mana cost of Enveloping Mist by 20%.

325201.name: Dance of Chi-Ji
325201.description: Spending Chi has a chance to make your next Spinning Crane Kick cost no Chi.

326732.name: Empyrean Power
326732.description: [Crusading Strikes: Crusading Strikes has a 5% / Crusader Strike has a 15%] chance to make your next Divine Storm free and deal 15% additional damage.

326734.name: Healing Hands
326734.description:
The cooldown of Lay on Hands is reduced up to 60%, based on the target's missing health.

Word of Glory's healing is increased by up to 100% on yourself, based on your missing health.

326853.name: Ruinous Bulwark
326853.description: Fel Devastation heals for an additional 10%, and 50% of its healing is converted into an absorb shield for 10 sec.

327541.name: Aetherial Kindling
327541.description: Casting Starfall extends the duration of active Moonfires and Sunfires by 3.0 sec, up to 28 sec.

327993.name: Improved Barkskin
327993.description: Barkskin's duration is increased by 4 sec.

328085.name: Blindside
328085.description: Ambush and Mutilate have a 15% chance to make your next Ambush free and usable without Stealth. Chance increased to 30% if the target is under 35% health.

328670.name: Hasty Provocation
328670.description: Provoked targets move towards you at 50% increased speed.

328725.name: Mortal Dance
328725.description: Blade Dance now reduces targets' healing received by 50% for 6 sec.

329033.name: Demolition
329033.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Shattering Throw or Wrecking Throw by 50% and increases its damage to absorb shields by an additional 250%.

329042.name: Emerald Slumber
329042.description:
Embrace the Emerald Dream, causing you to enter a deep slumber for 8 sec. While sleeping, all other cooldowns recover 400% faster, and allies within 40 yds are healed for 0 every 1 sec.
