Direct damage taken may awaken you.

333889.name: Fel Domination
333889.description: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

333919.name: Echo of the Elements
333919.description:
Elemental
Lava Burst has an additional charge.

 Restoration
Riptide and Lava Burst have an additional charge.

334033.name: Molten Assault
334033.description: Lava Lash cooldown reduced by 6.0 sec, and if Lava Lash is used against a target affected by your Flame Shock, Flame Shock will be spread to up to 5 nearby enemies.

334046.name: Lashing Flames
334046.description: Lava Lash and Sundering increases the damage of Flame Shock on its target by 100% for 20 sec.

334275.name: Curse of Exhaustion
334275.description:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

334308.name: Chaining Storms
334308.description: Chain Lightning now jumps to 2 additional targets and deals 10% increased damage.

334779.name: Collateral Damage
334779.description: When an ability used during Sweeping Strikes damages a second target, your next Cleave or Whirlwind deals 25% increased damage, stacking up to 3 times.

335077.name: Frenzy
335077.description: Rampage increases your haste by 2% for 12 sec. Multiple instances of this effect may overlap.

335467.name: Shadow Word: Madness
335467.description:
A word of madness haunts the target's mind, dealing (227.5% of Spell Power) Shadow damage instantly plus an additional 9 Shadow damage over 6 sec. Heals you for 30% of damage dealt.

When reapplied to a target, all remaining damage is added to the new effect.

336639.name: Charred Flesh
336639.description: Immolation Aura damage increases the duration of your Fiery Brand and Sigil of Flame by 0.25 sec.

341167.name: Mental Agility
341167.description:
Shadow
Reduces the mana cost of Purify Disease and Mass Dispel by 50% and Dispel Magic by 10%.

 Discipline,  Holy
Reduces the mana cost of Purify and Mass Dispel by 50% and Dispel Magic by 10%.

341240.name: Improved Voidform
341240.description: Voidform generates 60 Insanity and increases your spell damage by an additonal 5%.

341491.name: Shadowy Apparitions
341491.description: Shadow Word: Madness conjures Shadowy Apparitions that float towards all targets afflicted by your Vampiric Touch for (85.05% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

341997.name: Renewed Faith
341997.description: Your healing on allies with your Renew is increased by 10%.

342231.name: Arcane Echo
342231.description: Direct damage you deal to enemies affected by [Nether Flux / Touch of the Magi], causes an explosion that deals [Nether Flux: [(10% of Spell Power) * 5] / (10% of Spell Power)] Arcane damage to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

342245.name: Alter Time
342245.description: Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 sec. Effect negated by long distance or death.

342249.name: Master of Time
342249.description: Reduces the cooldown of Alter Time by 5 sec.

342344.name: From the Ashes
342344.description:
Fire Blast damage increased by 15%. 

Your direct damage spells reduce the cooldown of Fire Blast by 0.50 sec.

342601.name: Ritual of Doom
342601.description: Begins a ritual that sacrifices a random participant to summon a doomguard. Requires the caster and 4 additional party members to complete the ritual.

343014.name: Revel in Pain
343014.description:
5.0% of your Fire damage shields you, up to a maximum of (Total Health * 10 / 100).

Shield and maximum values are doubled while Fiery Brand is active.

343127.name: Teleport
343127.description: Teleports you to a major city.

343140.name: Portal
343140.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to a Major City.

343160.name: Premeditation
343160.description: After entering Stealth, your next combo point generating ability generates full combo points.

343183.name: Improved Frost Nova
343183.description: Frost Nova duration is increased by 2 sec.

343207.name: Focused Cleave
343207.description: Soul Cleave deals 60% increased damage to your primary target.

343230.name: Mote of Flame
343230.description: All Fire damage dealt increased by 3%.

343242.name: Wilderness Medicine
343242.description: Mend Pet heals for an additional 25% of your pet's health over its duration, and has a 25% chance to dispel a magic effect each time it heals your pet.

343244.name: Disruptive Rounds
343244.description:
Beast Mastery,  Marksmanship
When Counter Shot interrupts a cast, gain 30 Focus.

 Survival
When Muzzle interrupts a cast, gain 30 Focus.

343247.name: Improved Traps
343247.description: The cooldown of Tar Trap and Freezing Trap is reduced by 5.0 sec.

343248.name: Deathblow
343248.description:
Marksmanship
Aimed Shot has a 10% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next  can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

 Survival
Kill Command has a 10% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Kill Shot can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

 Beast Mastery
Kill Command has a 10% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Kill Shot is reset. Your next Black Arrow can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

343294.name: Soul Reaper
343294.description:
Rupture the soul of your enemy, dealing (450% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and causing the foe to take 20% increased damage from your diseases and minions for 8 sec.

Only usable on enemies below 35% maximum health.

Consumes up to 2 available charges to cast Putrefy.

343311.name: Furious Gaze
343311.description: When Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by an additional 8% for 8 sec.

343527.name: Execution Sentence
343527.description:
Unleash a heavenly blast around the target, dealing (505.312% of Attack Power) Holy damage to all enemies nearby, and call down a hammer that slowly falls from the sky upon the target. 

After 10 sec, they suffer 20% of the Holy damage you dealt to all targets affected by the initial blast during that time.

343647.name: Solstice
343647.description: During the first 6 sec of every Eclipse, Shooting Stars fall 200% more often.

343655.name: Celestial Harmony
343655.description:
When activated, Yu'lon and Chi-Ji apply Chi Cocoons to 5 targets within 40 yds, absorbing [Total Health * 24 / 100 * (1 + Versatility)] damage for 10 sec.

Chi-Ji grants 4 stacks of Teachings of the Monastery when invoked.

Yu'lon reduces the cast speed of Enveloping Mist by 30%.

344357.name: Stormflurry
344357.description: Stormstrike has a 20% chance to strike the target an additional time for 40% of normal damage. This effect can chain off of itself.

344359.name: Ancient Arts
344359.description: Reduces the cooldown of Paralysis by 15 sec and the cooldown of Leg Sweep by 10 sec.

345208.name: Infected Wounds
345208.description: Mangle and Maul cause an Infected Wound in the target, reducing their movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

345829.name: Predestination
345829.description: Killing a player with Touch of Death reduces the remaining cooldown of Touch of Karma by 60 sec.

347461.name: Unbound Chaos
347461.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase the damage of your next Fel Rush or Felblade by 300%. Lasts 12 sec.

351338.name: Quell
351338.description: Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting and prevent any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 6 sec.

352278.name: Ice Wall
352278.description: Conjures an Ice Wall 30 yards long that obstructs line of sight. The wall has 30% of your maximum health and lasts up to 15 sec.

352998.name: Slaughterhouse
352998.description: Rampage and Odyn's Fury damage reduce healing the target receives by 3% for 12 sec, stacking up to 12 times.

353082.name: Ring of Fire
353082.description: Summons a Ring of Fire for 8 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are disoriented and burn for 3% of their total health over 3 sec.

353128.name: Arcanosphere
353128.description: Builds a sphere of Arcane energy, gaining power over 4 sec. Upon release, the sphere passes through any barriers, knocking enemies back and dealing up to [(735% of Spell Power) * 4] Arcane damage.

353294.name: Shadow Rift
353294.description:
Conjure a Shadow Rift at the target location lasting 2 sec. Enemy players within the rift when it expires are teleported to your Demonic Circle.

Must be within 40 yds of your Demonic Circle to cast.

353313.name: Peaceweaver
353313.description: [Restoral: Restoral's / Revival's] cooldown is reduced by 16%, and provides immunity to magical damage and harmful effects for 2 sec.

353361.name: Dematerialize
353361.description: Demateralize into mist while stunned, reducing damage taken by 30%. Each second you remain stunned reduces this bonus by 10%.

353502.name: Counteract Magic
353502.description: Removing hostile magic effects from a target increases the healing they receive from you by 10% for 10 sec, stacking up to 3 times.

353584.name: Eminence
353584.description: Transcendence: Transfer can now be cast if you are stunned. Cooldown reduced by (15)) sec if you are not.

353753.name: Bonds of Fel
353753.description: Encircle enemy players with Bonds of Fel. If any affected player leaves the 8 yd radius they explode, dealing (728% of Spell Power) Fire damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

354124.name: Hemotoxin
354124.description: Shiv also reduces the target's healing received by 30% for 8 sec.

354406.name: Control is King
354406.description: Cheap Shot grants Slice and Dice for 15 sec and Kidney Shot restores 10 Energy per combo point spent.

354425.name: Drink Up Me Hearties
354425.description: Crimson Vial restores 5% additional maximum health and grants 60% of its healing to allies within 15 yds.

354489.name: Glimpse
354489.description: Vengeful Retreat provides immunity to loss of control effects, and reduces damage taken by 35% until you land.

354540.name: Nimble Brew
354540.description: Douse allies in the targeted area with Nimble Brew, preventing the next full loss of control effect within 8 sec.

354541.name: Owlkin Adept
354541.description: Owlkin Frenzy can stack up to 2 times and reduces the cast time of your next Cyclone or Entangling Roots by 10%.

354654.name: Grove Protection
354654.description: Summon a grove to protect allies in the area for 10 sec, reducing damage taken by 50% from enemies outside the grove.

354661.name: Distracting Mirage
354661.description: Distract slows affected enemies by 60% and creates a Mirage that follows an enemy for 8 sec. Reactivate Distract to teleport to your Mirage's location.

354825.name: Thief's Bargain
354825.description: The cooldowns of Shadow Blades, Vanish, and Feint are reduced by 20%, but using one reduces your damage by 10% for 6 sec.

354895.name: Creeping Venom
354895.description: Your Envenom applies Creeping Venom, reducing the target's movement speed by 5% for 4 sec.  Creeping Venom is reapplied when the target moves. Max 18 stacks.

355580.name: Static Field Totem
355580.description: Summons a totem with 4% of your health at the target location for 6 sec that forms a circuit of electricity that enemies cannot pass through.

355614.name: Ultimate Retribution
355614.description: Mark an enemy player for retribution after they kill an ally within your active Aura. If the marked enemy is slain within 12 sec, cast Redemption on the fallen ally.

355630.name: Windveil
355630.description: Interrupting a spell with Wind Shear reduces all spell damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

355897.name: Inner Light
355897.description:
[Inner Light: Embrace the light, reducing the mana cost of healing spells by 10% /  Inner Light: Healing spells cost 10% less mana.

Inner Shadow: Spell damage and Atonement healing increased by 10%.

Activate to swap from one effect to the other, incurring a 6 sec cooldown.]

355913.name: Emerald Blossom
355913.description: Grow a bulb from the Emerald Dream at an ally's location. After 1.5 sec, heal up to 3 injured allies within 10 yds for (323% of Spell Power).

355936.name: Dream Breath
355936.description:
Inhale, gathering the power of the Dream. Release to exhale, healing yourself and 5 injured allies in a 40 yd cone in front of you for [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * (8 + 0)].

I:   Heals (184.32% of Spell Power) instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (8 + 0)] over (16 + 0) sec.

II:  Heals [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * 2] instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (6 + 0)] over (12 + 0) sec.

III: Heals [(184.32% of Spell Power) + (30.72% of Spell Power) * 4] instantly and [(30.72% of Spell Power) * (4 + 0)] over (8 + 0) sec.

355995.name: Blood Moon
355995.description: Consume Magic now affects all enemies within 8 yards of the target and generates a Lesser Soul Fragment. Each effect consumed has a 5% chance to upgrade to a Greater Soul.

356367.name: Death's Echo
356367.description: Death's Advance, Death and Decay, and Death Grip have 1 additional charge.

356470.name: Bitter Chill
356470.description: Chains of Ice reduces the target's Haste by 8%. Frost Strike refreshes the duration of Chains of Ice.

356512.name: Doomburst
356512.description: Sudden Doom also causes your next Death Coil to deal the damage of your plagues an additional time at 25% effectiveness and reduce the target's movement speed by 45% for 3 sec.

356517.name: Star Burst
356517.description:
Starfall calls down collapsing stars that last 15 sec. Enemies that come into contact with a star cause it to burst, knocking nearby enemies upwards and dealing (211.5% of Spell Power) Astral damage. Generates 15 Astral Power.

The Druid and their allies may pick up stars, causing them to orbit around you.

356520.name: Necrotic Wounds
356520.description:
Putrefy applies a Necrotic Wound to the enemy when it deals damage, absorbing 8% of all healing received for 15 sec.

Max 3 stacks. Adding a stack does not refresh the duration.

356707.name: Wild Kingdom
356707.description: Call in help from one of your dismissed Cunning pets for 10 sec. Your current pet is dismissed to rest and heal 30% of maximum health.

356719.name: Chimaeral Sting
356719.description:
Stings the target, dealing (150% of Attack Power) Nature damage and initiating a series of venoms. Each lasts 3 sec and applies the next effect after the previous one ends.

 Scorpid Venom:
90% reduced movement speed.

 Spider Venom:
Silenced.

 Viper Venom:
20% reduced damage and healing.

356962.name: Kindred Beasts
356962.description: Command Pet's unique ability cooldown reduced by 50%, and gains additional effects.

356976.name: The Beast Within
356976.description: Bestial Wrath now provides immunity to Fear and Horror effects for you and your pets for 8 sec. Nearby allied pets are also inspired, increasing their attack speed by 10%.

356995.name: Disintegrate
356995.description: Tear into an enemy with a blast of blue magic, inflicting (475.53% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage over 3 sec, and slowing their movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

357018.name: Consecutive Concussion
357018.description: Concussive Shot slows movement by an additional 10%. Using Steady Shot 3 times on a concussed enemy stuns them for 4 sec.

357170.name: Time Dilation
357170.description: Stretch time around an ally for the next 8 sec, causing 50% of damage they would take to instead be dealt over 8 sec.

357208.name: Fire Breath
357208.description:
Inhale, stoking your inner flame. Release to exhale, burning enemies in a cone in front of you for [((163.409% of Spell Power)) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * (10 + 0 + 0))] Fire damage, reduced beyond 5 targets. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 2 sec]

Empowering causes more of the damage to be dealt immediately instead of over time.

I:   Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (10 + 0 + 0)] over (20 + 0 + 0) sec.

II:  Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * 3)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (7 + 0 + 0)] over (14 + 0 + 0) sec.

III: Deals [(163.409% of Spell Power) + ((39.4834% of Spell Power) * 6)] damage instantly and [(39.4834% of Spell Power) * (4 + 0 + 0)] over (8 + 0 + 0) sec.

357210.name: Deep Breath
357210.description:
Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, spewing molten cinders dealing (400% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage to enemies in your path.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 5 sec]

357211.name: Pyre
357211.description: Lob a ball of flame, dealing (400.277% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your target and all enemies within 8 yds.

357214.name: Wing Buffet
357214.description: With a powerful flap of your wings, knock away enemies in front of you.

357419.name: Cover of Darkness
357419.description: The radius of Darkness is increased by 4 yds, and its duration by 2 sec.

357481.name: Sanctified Ground
357481.description: Holy Word: Sanctify blesses the ground with divine light, causing all allies who stand within to be immune to all silence and interrupt effects. Lasts for 5 sec.

357495.name: Perpetual Paralysis
357495.description: Paralysis range reduced by 5 yards, but spreads to 2 new enemies when removed.

357633.name: Wind Waker
357633.description: Your movement enhancing abilities increases Windwalking on allies by 10%, stacking 2 additional times. Movement impairing effects are removed at 3 stacks.

357711.name: Cascading Horrors
357711.description: Void Eruption sends out slow-moving bolts of Shadow energy at random locations every 0.5 sec for 3 sec, dealing (76.3% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to all targets within 8 yds, and causing them to flee in Horror for 2 sec.

358267.name: Hover
358267.description:
Launch yourself and gain 30% increased movement speed for (6 + 0) sec.

Allows Evoker spells to be cast while moving and is castable while casting. Does not affect empowered spells.

358385.name: Landslide
358385.description: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

358733.name: Glide
358733.description:
Reduces your falling speed.

You can activate this ability with the jump key while falling.

359053.name: Smoke Bomb
359053.description: Creates a cloud of thick smoke in an 8 yard radius around the Rogue for 5 sec. Enemies are unable to target into or out of the smoke cloud.

359073.name: Eternity Surge
359073.description:
Focus your energies to release a salvo of pure magic, dealing [(1088.47% of Spell Power)] Spellfrost damage to an enemy. Damages additional enemies within 25 yds when empowered.

I:   Damages [Eternity's Span: 2 enemies enemy].

II:  Damages [Eternity's Span: 4 enemies / 2 enemies].

III: Damages [Eternity's Span: 6 enemies / 3 enemies].

359793.name: Fluttering Seedlings
359793.description:
Emerald Blossom sends out 1 flying seedling when it bursts, plus up to 2 additional seedlings if Emerald Blossom heals fewer than 3 allies.

Seedlings each heal an ally up to 40 yds away for (260% of Spell Power).

359816.name: Dream Flight
359816.description:
Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, healing all allies in your path for (500% of Spell Power) immediately, and (1000% of Spell Power) over 15 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

Damage taken while you are flying is absorbed, up to 100% of your maximum health.

360194.name: Deathmark
360194.description:
Carve a deathmark into an enemy, dealing (320% of Attack Power) Bleed damage and restoring (10 * 8) Energy to you over 16 sec. Damage dealt to the target by your Garrote, Rupture, and Lethal Poisons is increased by 100%.

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to the target, apply it twice.

360806.name: Sleep Walk
360806.description: Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.

360823.name: Naturalize
360823.description: Cleanses harmful effects from the target, removing all Magic and Poison effects.

360827.name: Blistering Scales
360827.description:
Protect an ally with 15 explosive dragonscales, increasing their Armor by 20% of your own.

Melee attacks against the target cause 1 scale to explode, dealing [$INT * 0.3 * (1 + Versatility) * Percent Damage] Volcanic damage to enemies near them. This damage can only occur every few sec.

Blistering Scales can only be placed on one target at a time. Casts on your enemy's target if they have one.

360995.name: Verdant Embrace
360995.description: Fly to an ally and heal them for (1058% of Spell Power), or heal yourself for the same amount.

361021.name: Sense Power
361021.description: Gauge the magical energy of your allies, showing you when they are using an exceptionally powerful ability.

361178.name: Mass Return
361178.description: Brings all dead party members back to life with 35% health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

361469.name: Living Flame
361469.description:
Send a flickering flame towards your target, [ Preservation: healing an ally for (600% of Spell Power) or dealing (232.001% of Spell Power) Fire damage to an enemy / 

 Devastation,  Augmentation
dealing (232.001% of Spell Power) Fire damage to an enemy or healing an ally for (600% of Spell Power)]

362874.name: Temporal Compression
362874.description: Each cast of a Bronze spell causes your next empower spell to reach maximum level in 10% less time, stacking up to 4 times.

362969.name: Azure Strike
362969.description: Project intense energy onto 2 enemies, dealing (163.185% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage to them.

363534.name: Rewind
363534.description:
Rewind 30% of damage taken in the last 5 seconds by all allies within 40 yds. Always heals for at least (Spell Power * 0.4 * 5).

Healing increased by 200% when not in a raid.

363916.name: Obsidian Scales
363916.description: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% [Renewing Blaze: and causing you to be healed over 8 sec equal to the damage it prevented]. Lasts 12 sec.

364342.name: Blessing of the Bronze
364342.description: Weave the threads of time, reducing the cooldown of a major movement ability for all party and raid members by 15% for 1 hour.

364343.name: Echo
364343.description: Wrap an ally with temporal energy, healing them for (240% of Spell Power) and causing your next healing spell to cast an additional time on that ally at [ceil(70 / Time Lord: 105 / Golden Opportunity: 77)]% of normal healing. Essence spells cannot be Echoed.

365350.name: Arcane Surge
365350.description:
Expend all of your current mana to annihilate your enemy target and nearby enemies for up to [(372% of Spell Power) * 2] Arcane damage based on Mana spent. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

For the next 15 sec, your Mana regeneration is increased by 425% and spell damage is increased by 35%.

Generates Clearcasting.

365585.name: Expunge
365585.description: Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.

365937.name: Ruby Embers
365937.description: Living Flame deals (26.5144% of Spell Power) damage over 12 sec to enemies, or restores (52% of Spell Power) health to allies over 12 sec. Stacks 3 times.

366155.name: Reversion
366155.description:
Reverse an ally's injuries, [Golden Hour: instantly healing them for 15% of damage taken in the last 5 sec and an additional / healing them for] (256.5% of Spell Power) over 12 sec.

When Reversion critically heals, its duration is extended by 2 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.

368275.name: Binding Heals
368275.description: 20% of Flash Heal healing on other targets also heals you.

368412.name: Time of Need
368412.description:
When you or an ally fall below 30% health, a version of yourself enters your timeline and heals them for [(1058% of Spell Power) * 3]. Your alternate self continues healing for 8 sec before returning to their timeline.

May only occur once every 60 sec.

368838.name: Heavy Wingbeats
368838.description: Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

368970.name: Tail Swipe
368970.description: Lash out with your tail, knocking enemies within 8 yds into the air.

369089.name: Volatility
369089.description: Pyre has a 15% chance to flare up and explode again on a nearby target.

369297.name: Essence Burst
369297.description: Living Flame has a 20% chance, and Reversion has a 15% chance to make your next Essence ability free. [Essence Attunement: Stacks 1 times]

369459.name: Source of Magic
369459.description: Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.

369536.name: Soar
369536.description: Muster your strength and launch into the air.

369846.name: Feed the Flames
369846.description:
After casting 6 Pyres, your next Pyre will explode into a Firestorm.

 Firestorm
An explosion bombards the target area with white-hot embers, dealing [(239.4% of Spell Power) * 6] Fire damage to enemies over 10 sec.

369913.name: Natural Convergence
369913.description:
Augmentation
Disintegrate channels 20% faster and Eruption's cast time is reduced by 20%.

 Devastation,  Preservation
Disintegrate channels 20% faster.

369939.name: Leaping Flames
369939.description: Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.

369990.name: Ancient Flame
369990.description: Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by 40%.

370062.name: Field of Dreams
370062.description: Every other Emerald Blossom has a 100% chance for one of your Fluttering Seedlings to grow into a new Emerald Blossom.

370388.name: Swoop Up
370388.description: Grab an enemy and fly with them to the target location.

370455.name: Charged Blast
370455.description: Your Blue damage increases the damage of your next Pyre by 2%, stacking 20 times.

370537.name: Stasis
370537.description: Causes your next 3 helpful spells to be duplicated and stored in a time lock. You may reactivate Stasis any time within 30 sec to quickly unleash their magic.

370553.name: Tip the Scales
370553.description: Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.

370586.name: Elune's Favored
370586.description: While in Bear Form, you are healed for 15% of all Arcane damage done.

370626.name: Gift of the Naaru
370626.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

370665.name: Rescue
370665.description: Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.

370695.name: Fury of Nature
370695.description: While in Bear Form, you deal 10% increased Arcane damage.

370781.name: Imminent Destruction
370781.description: Deep Breath reduces the Essence costs of your next 4 Disintegrates and Pyres by 1. Stacks up to 8 times.

370819.name: Scorching Embers
370819.description: Enemies affected by Fire Breath's damage over time effect take 25% increased damage from your Red spells.

370821.name: Scintillation
370821.description: Disintegrate has a 15% chance each time it deals damage to launch a level 1 Eternity Surge at 40% power.

370837.name: Engulfing Blaze
370837.description: Living Flame deals 10% increased damage and healing and its cast time is reduced by 0.3 sec.

370839.name: Power Swell
370839.description: Casting an empower spell increases your Essence regeneration rate by 100% for 4 sec.

370845.name: Spellweaver's Dominance
370845.description: Your damaging critical strikes deal 230% damage instead of the usual 200%.

370867.name: Iridescence
370867.description: Casting an empower spell increases the damage of your next 2 spells of the same color by 20% within 10 sec.

370888.name: Twin Guardian
370888.description: Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.

370960.name: Emerald Communion
370960.description:
Commune with the Emerald Dream, restoring 20% health and 2% mana every 1 sec for 5 sec. Overhealing is transferred to an injured ally within 40 yds.

Castable while stunned, disoriented, incapacitated, or silenced.

370965.name: The Hunt
370965.description: Charge to your target, striking them for (664.5% of Attack Power) Chaos damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting (429% of Attack Power) Chaos damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

371032.name: Terror of the Skies
371032.description: [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] stuns enemies for 3 sec.

371034.name: Lay Waste
371034.description: Deep Breath's damage is increased by 20%.

371038.name: Honed Aggression
371038.description: The critical strike chance of your spells is increased by 2%.

371257.name: Renewing Breath
371257.description: Dream Breath healing is increased by 15%.

371426.name: Life-Giver's Flame
371426.description: Fire Breath and Deep Breath heal 5 nearby injured allies for 80% of damage done to up to 5 targets, split evenly among them.

371806.name: Recall
371806.description: You may reactivate [Dream Flight: Dream Flight and] [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] within 3 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.

371905.name: After the Wildfire
371905.description: Every 300 Rage you spend causes a burst of restorative energy, healing up to 5 allies within 20 yds for (600% of Attack Power).

372048.name: Oppressing Roar
372048.description: Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec. [Overawe: Removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy]

372119.name: Dream of Cenarius
372119.description: When you take non-periodic damage, you have a chance to cause your next Regrowth to heal for an additional 130%, and to be instant, free, and castable in all forms for 30 sec.

372233.name: Energy Loop
372233.description: Disintegrate deals 35% more damage and generates (2250 * 4) mana over its duration.

372307.name: Burning Vehemence
372307.description:
Increases the damage of Holy Fire by 30%.

Holy Fire deals 75% of its initial damage to all nearby enemies within 12 yards of your target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

372370.name: Gales of Song
372370.description: While channeling Divine Hymn, place 2 stacks of Prayer of Mending on up to 3 allies within its range every 1.0 sec.

372469.name: Scarlet Adaptation
372469.description: Store 20% of your effective healing, up to (Spell Power * 2.254 * 1). Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.

372567.name: Twin Moonfire
372567.description: Moonfire deals 8% increased damage and also hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

372616.name: Empyreal Blaze
372616.description:
Holy Word: Chastise causes your next 2 casts of Holy Fire to be instant, cost no mana, and incur no cooldown.

Refreshing Holy Fire on a target now extends its duration by 7 sec.

372618.name: Vulnerable Flesh
372618.description: Maul and Raze deal 30% increased damage.

372943.name: Untamed Savagery
372943.description: Increases the damage and radius of Thrash by 25%.

372945.name: Reinvigoration
372945.description: Frenzied Regeneration heals over 1.0 additional sec and casts Rejuvenation and Regrowth on you at 100% effectiveness.

372969.name: Holy Ray
372969.description: Each successive Penance bolt during a channel deals 5% increased damage and healing.

372972.name: Dark Indulgence
372972.description: Mind Blast has a 100% chance to grant Power of the Dark Side and deals 20% additional damage.

372991.name: Pain Transformation
372991.description: Pain Suppression also heals your target for 15% of their maximum health and applies Atonement.

373003.name: Revel in Darkness
373003.description: Shadow Word: Pain deals 5% additional damage and spreads to 1 additional target when you cast Penance to its target.

373035.name: Protector of the Frail
373035.description:
Pain Suppression gains an additional charge.

Power Word: Shield reduces the cooldown of Pain Suppression by 3 sec.

373049.name: Indemnity
373049.description: Atonements granted by Power Word: Shield last an additional 4 sec.

373054.name: Abyssal Reverie
373054.description: Atonement heals for 10% more when activated by Shadow spells.

373180.name: Harsh Discipline
373180.description: Power Word: Radiance causes your next Penance to fire 3 additional bolts, stacking up to 2 charges.

373202.name: Mind Devourer
373202.description: Mind Blast has a 8% chance to make your next Shadow Word: Madness cost no Insanity and deal 20% additional damage.

373212.name: Insidious Ire
373212.description: While you have Shadow Word: Pain, Shadow Word: Madness, and Vampiric Touch active on the same target, your Mind Blast, Void Torrent, Mind Flay, and Void Volley deal 20% more damage.

373223.name: Tithe Evasion
373223.description: Shadow Word: Death deals 50% less damage to you.

373270.name: Lifebind
373270.description: Verdant Embrace temporarily bonds your life with an ally, causing your healing on either partner to heal the other for 60% of the amount. Lasts 8 sec.

373273.name: Idol of Yogg-Saron
373273.description:
After conjuring Shadowy Apparitions, gain a stack of Idol of Yogg-Saron. At 20 stacks, you summon a Thing from Beyond that casts Void Spike at nearby enemies for 20 sec.

 Void Spike
Hurls a bolt of dark magic, dealing (93.8961% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and [(93.8961% of Spell Power) * 53 / 100] Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yards of the target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

373280.name: Idol of N'Zoth
373280.description:
You create Horrific Visions when casting harmful spells on enemies.

At 50 stacks of Horrific Visions, your target sees a nightmare, dealing (182% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and granting you 4 Insanity over 3 sec.

At 100 stacks, your target witnesses a vision of N'Zoth, dealing (689% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and granting you 12 Insanity over 3 sec.

373310.name: Idol of Y'Shaarj
373310.description: While Shadowfiend, Mindbender, or Voidwraith are active, your haste is increased by 10%.

373427.name: Inescapable Torment
373427.description:
Shadow
Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death cause your Shadowfiend, Mindbender, and Voidwraith to teleport behind your target, slashing up to 5 nearby enemies for [(190% of Spell Power) * 0.442] Shadow damage and extending their durations by 0.7 sec.

 Discipline
Penance, Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death cause your Shadowfiend, Mindbender, and Voidwraith to teleport behind your target, slashing up to 5 nearby enemies for [(190% of Spell Power) * 0.442] Shadow damage and extending their durations by 0.7 sec.

373446.name: Translucent Image
373446.description: Fade reduces damage you take by 10%.

373450.name: Light's Inspiration
373450.description: Increases the maximum health gained from Desperate Prayer by 10%.

373456.name: Unwavering Will
373456.description:
Discipline
While above 75% health, the cast time of your Flash Heal and Smite are reduced by 5%.

 Shadow
While above 75% health, the cast time of your Flash Heal is reduced by 5%.

 Holy
While above 75% health, the cast time of your Flash Heal, Prayer of Healing, and Smite are reduced by 5%.

373466.name: Twins of the Sun Priestess
373466.description:
Power Infusion also grants you its effect at 100% value when used on an ally. 

If no ally is targeted, it will grant its effect at 100% value to a nearby ally, preferring damage dealers.

373834.name: Call of Ysera
373834.description: Dream Breath healing increased by 20%, and Living Flame healing increased by 30%.

373861.name: Temporal Anomaly
373861.description:
Send forward a vortex of temporal energy, absorbing [Spell Power * 6 * (1 + Versatility)] damage on you and any allies in its path. Absorption is reduced beyond 5 targets.

Applies Echo at 30% effectiveness on the first 5 allies it passes through.

373930.name: Proliferating Chill
373930.description: Chains of Ice affects 1 additional nearby enemy.

374049.name: Suppression
374049.description: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%. When suffering a loss of control effect, this bonus is increased by an additional 6% for 6 sec.

374227.name: Zephyr
374227.description: Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

374251.name: Cauterizing Flame
374251.description: Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for (350% of Spell Power) upon removing any effect.

374261.name: Unholy Bond
374261.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Runeforge effects by 20%.

374277.name: Improved Death Strike
374277.description:
Frost,  Unholy
Death Strike's cost is reduced by 10, and its healing is increased by 60%.

 Blood
Death Strike's cost is reduced by 5, and its healing is increased by 15%.

374346.name: Overawe
374346.description: Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

374348.name: Renewing Blaze
374348.description: Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing 100% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over 8 sec.

374383.name: Assimilation
374383.description: The cooldown of Anti-Magic Zone is reduced by 60 sec and its duration is increased by 2 sec.

374504.name: Brittle
374504.description: Your diseases have a chance to weaken your enemy causing your attacks against them to deal 6% increased damage for 5 sec.

374574.name: Rune Mastery
374574.description: Consuming a Rune has a chance to increase your Strength by 3% for 8 sec.

374598.name: Blood Draw
374598.description:
When you fall below 30% health you drain (120% of Attack Power) health from nearby enemies, the damage you take is reduced by 10% and your Death Strike cost is reduced by 10 for 8 sec.

Can only occur every 2 min.

374715.name: Improved Bone Shield
374715.description: Bone Shield increases your Haste by 10% and it can stack 2 additional times.

374747.name: Perseverance of the Ebon Blade
374747.description: When Crimson Scourge is consumed, you gain 6% Versatility for 6 sec.

374968.name: Time Spiral
374968.description: Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

375087.name: Dragonrage
375087.description:
Erupt with draconic fury and exhale Pyres at 3 enemies within 25 yds.

For 18 sec, Essence Burst's chance to occur is increased to 100% [Tyranny: and you gain the maximum benefit of Mastery: Giantkiller regardless of targets' health].

375406.name: Obsidian Bulwark
375406.description: Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.

375443.name: Clobbering Sweep
375443.description: Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.

375510.name: Blast Furnace
375510.description: Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

375528.name: Forger of Mountains
375528.description: Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, and it can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.

375542.name: Exuberance
375542.description: While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by 10%.

375544.name: Inherent Resistance
375544.description:
Devastation,  Augmentation
Magic damage taken reduced by 2%.

 Preservation
Magic damage taken reduced by 4%.

375554.name: Enkindled
375554.description: Living Flame deals 3% more damage and healing.

375556.name: Tailwind
375556.description: Hover increases your movement speed by 70% for the first 4 sec.

375574.name: Foci of Life
375574.description: Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.

375576.name: Divine Toll
375576.description:
Holy,  Protection
Instantly cast Holy Shock, Avenger's Shield, or Judgment on up to 5 targets within 30 yds.

 Retribution
Instantly cast Judgment on up to 5 targets within 30 yds.

Divine Toll's Judgment deals 100% increased damage.

375618.name: Arcane Intensity
375618.description: Disintegrate and Azure Strike deal 8% more damage.

375721.name: Azure Essence Burst
375721.description: Azure Strike has a 15% chance to cause an Essence Burst, making your next Disintegrate or Pyre cost no Essence.

375757.name: Eternity's Span
375757.description: Eternity Surge hits twice as many targets.

375767.name: Screams of the Void
375767.description: Shadow Word: Madness causes your Shadow Word: Pain and Vampiric Touch to deal damage 40% faster on all targets for 3 sec.

375777.name: Causality
375777.description:
Disintegrate reduces the remaining cooldown of your empower spells by 0.50 sec each time it deals damage.

Pyre reduces the remaining cooldown of your empower spells by 0.40 sec per enemy struck, up to 2.0 sec.

375783.name: Font of Magic
375783.description: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1.

375796.name: Hoarded Power
375796.description: Essence Burst has a 20% chance to not be consumed.

375797.name: Animosity
375797.description:
Casting an empower spell extends the duration of Dragonrage by 5 sec.

Each time this occurs during Dragonrage, its effectiveness is reduced by 25%.

375801.name: Burnout
375801.description: Fire Breath damage has 16% chance to cause your next Living Flame to be instant cast, stacking 2 times.

375888.name: Shadowy Insight
375888.description: Shadow Word: Pain periodic damage has a chance to cause your next Mind Blast to be instant and ignore its cooldown.

375901.name: Mindgames
375901.description:
Assault an enemy's mind, dealing [(300% of Spell Power) * 100 / 100] Shadow damage and briefly reversing their perception of reality.

For 7 sec, the next [(Shadow spell power * 1050 / 100) * (1 + Versatility) * 100 / 100] damage they deal will heal their target, and the next [(Shadow spell power * 1050 / 100) * (1 + Versatility) * 100 / 100] healing they deal will damage their target. [ Shadow: Generates 10 Insanity.]

375994.name: Mental Decay
375994.description: Increases the damage of Mind Flay by 25%.

376079.name: Champion's Spear
376079.description:
Throw a spear at the target location, chaining all enemies in the area to the spear's location and dealing (239.25% of Attack Power) Physical damage instantly and an additional (326.25% of Attack Power) Physical damage over 6 sec. 

While the spear is active, activating this ability will cause you to leap to the spear, dealing (47% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all targets.

All damage dealt reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 10 Rage.

376138.name: Empath
376138.description: Empower spells increase your Essence regeneration rate by 100% for 8 sec.

376150.name: Spiritual Clarity
376150.description: Dream Breath's cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

376164.name: Instinctive Arcana
376164.description: Your Magic damage done is increased by 2%.

376179.name: Lifeforce Mender
376179.description: Red spells deal 20% additional damage and healing.

376204.name: Just in Time
376204.description: Time Dilation gains an additional charge, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

376207.name: Delay Harm
376207.description: 15% of delayed damage from Time Dilation is absorbed.

376237.name: Nozdormu's Teachings
376237.description: Temporal Anomaly reduces the cooldowns of your empower spells by 5 sec.

376239.name: Grace Period
376239.description: Your healing is increased by 10% on targets with your Reversion.

376240.name: Timeless Magic
376240.description: Reversion, Time Dilation, Echo, and [Temporal Barrier / Temporal Anomaly] last 15% longer and cost 15% less mana.

376251.name: Runic Command
376251.description:
Increases your maximum Runic Power by 5.

Increases Rune regeneration rate by 10%.

376743.name: Surge Forward
376743.description:
Flap forward a short distance, gaining speed.
Max 2 Charges

376744.name: Skyward Ascent
376744.description:
Flap upward, gaining height at the cost of some momentum.
Max 1 Charge

376872.name: Ruby Essence Burst
376872.description: Your Living Flame has a 20% chance to cause an Essence Burst, making your next Disintegrate or Pyre cost no Essence.

376888.name: Tyranny
376888.description: During Deep Breath and Dragonrage you gain the maximum benefit of Mastery: Giantkiller regardless of targets' health.

376930.name: Attuned to the Dream
376930.description:
Devastation,  Augmentation
Your healing done and healing received are increased by 2%.

 Preservation
Your healing done and healing received are increased by 3%.

376938.name: Everfrost
376938.description:
Rime empowered Howling Blast deals 50% increased damage to secondary targets.

Remorseless Winter deals 6% increased damage to enemies it hits, stacking up to 10 times.

377053.name: Seal of Reprisal
377053.description: Your [Blessed Hammer] [Hammer of the Righteous / Crusader Strike] deals 20% increased damage.

377056.name: Biting Cold
377056.description: Remorseless Winter damage is increased by 35%. The first time Remorseless Winter deals damage to 3 different enemies, you gain Rime.

377065.name: Mental Fortitude
377065.description: Healing from Vampiric Touch and Shadow Word: Madness when you are at maximum health will shield you for the same amount. The shield cannot exceed 10% of your maximum health.

377073.name: Frigid Executioner
377073.description: Runic Empowerment has a 25% chance to refund 1 additional Rune.

377076.name: Rage of the Frozen Champion
377076.description: Frost Strike and Glacial Advance have a 15% increased chance to trigger Rime and Howling Blast generates 8 Runic Power while Rime is active.

377098.name: Bonegrinder
377098.description: Consuming Killing Machine grants 1% critical strike chance for 10 sec, stacking up to 5 times. At 5 stacks your next Killing Machine consumes the stacks and grants you 10% increased Frost damage for 10 sec.

377099.name: Spark of Insight
377099.description: Consuming a full Temporal Compression grants you Essence Burst.

377100.name: Exhilarating Burst
377100.description: Each time you gain Essence Burst, your critical heals are 230% effective instead of the usual 200% for 10 sec.

377128.name: Golden Path
377128.description: Consecration heals you and 5 allies within it for [(5% of Attack Power)] every 1 sec.

377190.name: Enduring Strength
377190.description: When Pillar of Frost expires, your Strength is increased by 8% for 6 sec. This effect lasts 2 sec longer, up to 20 sec, for each Obliterate and Frostscythe critical strike during Pillar of Frost.

377210.name: Ursoc's Fury
377210.description: Thrash and Maul grant you an absorb shield for 30% of the damage dealt for 15 sec.

377226.name: Frozen Dominion
377226.description:
Pillar of Frost now summons a Remorseless Winter that lasts 4 sec longer.

Each enemy Remorseless Winter damages grants you (4 * $mastery)% Mastery, up to (4 * $mastery * 5)% for 15 sec.

377349.name: Idol of C'Thun
377349.description:
Mind Flay has a chance to spawn a Void Tendril that channels Mind Flay or Void Lasher that channels Mind Sear at your target.

 Mind Flay
Assaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing (321.8% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 10 sec and slowing their movement speed by 30%.

Generates 5 Insanity over the duration.

 Mind Sear
Corrosive shadow energy radiates from the target, dealing [(42.925% of Spell Power) * 5] Shadow damage over 10 sec to all enemies within 10 yards of the target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 5 Insanity over the duration.

377440.name: Unholy Aura
377440.description: Each Magus of the Dead under your command grants you 1.0% Haste.

377509.name: Dream Projection
377509.description: Summon a flying projection of yourself that heals allies you pass through for (200% of Spell Power). Detonating your projection dispels all nearby allies of Magical effects, and heals for (900% of Spell Power) over 20 sec.

377514.name: Reaping
377514.description:
Scourge Strike, Festering Strike, and Death Coil deal 30% additional damage to enemies below 35% health.

Dark Transformation resets Soul Reaper's cooldown and allows it to be used on any target.

377580.name: Putrid Echoes
377580.description: Putrefy deals 20% increased damage, has 2 additional charges and consumes up to 2 available charges.

377587.name: Ghoulish Frenzy
377587.description: Dark Transformation increases the attack speed and damage of you and your Monstrosity by 5% for 15 sec.

377590.name: Ancient Power
377590.description:
Spending Runic Power increases your Strength by 0.50% for 20 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

377592.name: Morbidity
377592.description: Diseased enemies take 1% increased damage from you per disease they are affected by.

377629.name: Leeching Strike
377629.description: Heart Strike heals you for 0.25% health for each enemy hit while affected by Blood Plague.

377637.name: Insatiable Blade
377637.description: Dancing Rune Weapon's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec and now generates 5 Bone Shield charges.

377668.name: Everlasting Bond
377668.description: Summons 1 additional copy of Dancing Rune Weapon and increases its duration by 4 sec.

377796.name: Natural Recovery
377796.description: Healing you receive is increased by 4%.

377801.name: Tireless Pursuit
377801.description: For 3 sec after leaving Cat Form or Travel Form, you retain up to 25% movement speed.

377811.name: Innate Resolve
377811.description:
Frenzied Regeneration's healing is increased by up to 80% based on your missing health.

Frenzied Regeneration has 1 additional charge.

377835.name: Front of the Pack
377835.description:
Stampeding Roar's radius is increased by 30%.

Your movement speed is increased by 5%.

377842.name: Ursine Vigor
377842.description: For 4 sec after shifting into Bear Form, your health and armor are increased by 15%.

377847.name: Well-Honed Instincts
377847.description: When you fall below 40% health, you cast Frenzied Regeneration, up to once every 120 sec.

377933.name: Astral Bulwark
377933.description: Astral Shift reduces damage taken by an additional 20%.

378075.name: Thunderous Paws
378075.description: Ghost Wolf removes snares and increases your movement speed by an additional 25% for the first 3 sec. May only occur once every 20 sec.

378077.name: Spiritwalker's Aegis
378077.description: When you cast Spiritwalker's Grace, you become immune to Silence and Interrupt effects for 5 sec.

378081.name: Nature's Swiftness
378081.description: Your next healing or damaging Nature spell is instant cast and costs no mana.

378193.name: Primordial Fury
378193.description: Elemental Fury increases critical strike damage by an additional 25%.

378196.name: Golden Hour
378196.description: Reversion instantly heals the target for 15% of damage taken in the last 5 sec.

378207.name: Kill Cleave
378207.description: While Beast Cleave is active, Kill Command now also strikes nearby enemies for 40% of damage dealt. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

378209.name: Training Expert
378209.description: All pet damage dealt increased by 3%.

378211.name: Refreshing Waters
378211.description:
Enhancement
Your Healing Surge is 25% more effective on yourself.

 Elemental
Your Healing Surge is 30% more effective on yourself.

 Restoration
Your Healing Wave is 25% more effective on yourself.

378244.name: Cobra Senses
378244.description: Cobra Shot Focus cost reduced by 5. Cobra Shot damage increased by 35%.

378255.name: Call of Fire
378255.description:
Ascendance summons a Greater Fire Elemental to rain destruction on your enemies for 20 sec. 

While the Fire Elemental is active, Flame Shock deals damage 33% faster, and newly applied Flame Shocks last 100% longer.

378266.name: Flames of the Cauldron
378266.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Flame Shock and Voltaic Blaze by 1.5 sec.

Flame Shock deals damage 15% faster.

378270.name: Deeply Rooted Elements
378270.description:
Restoration
Casting Riptide has a 7% chance to activate Ascendance for 6.0 sec.

 Ascendance
Immediately heals for (1287.72% of Spell Power) split between allies within 20 yds and transforms into a Water Ascendant for 15 sec.

While ascended, Chain Heal jumps to 3 additional allies with 10% healing reduced for all jumps, Healing Wave always critical heals and heals 1 additional ally at 50% effectiveness, and the mana cost of Chain Heal and Healing Wave is reduced by 25%.

 Enhancement
Each stack of Maelstrom Weapon consumed has a 0.6% chance to activate Ascendance for 6.0 sec.

 Ascendance
Transform into an Air Ascendant for 15 sec and unleash Doom Winds, reducing the cooldown and cost of Stormstrike by 60%, and transforming your auto attack and Stormstrike into Wind attacks which bypass armor and have a 30 yd range.

378279.name: Gift of the Golden Val'kyr
378279.description:
Each enemy hit by Avenger's Shield reduces the remaining cooldown on Guardian of Ancient Kings by 1.0 sec.

When you drop below 30% health, you become infused with Guardian of Ancient Kings for 4 sec. This cannot occur again for 45 sec.

378285.name: Tyr's Enforcer
378285.description: Your Avenger's Shield is imbued with holy fire, causing it to deal [(12% of Attack Power)] Holy damage to all enemies within 5 yards of each target hit.

378405.name: Light of the Titans
378405.description:
Word of Glory heals for an additional 40% over 10 sec.

Increased by 200% if cast on yourself while you are afflicted by a harmful damage over time effect.

378406.name: Wintertide
378406.description: Frozen Orb has a 100% chance to grant Brain Freeze.

378425.name: Uther's Counsel
378425.description: Your Lay on Hands, Divine Shield, Blessing of Protection, and Blessing of Spellwarding have 15% reduced cooldown.

378427.name: Nimble Fingers
378427.description: Energy cost of Feint and Crimson Vial reduced by 10.

378436.name: Master Poisoner
378436.description: Increases the non-damaging effects of your weapon poisons by 20%.

378437.name: Unburdened Flight
378437.description: Hover makes you immune to movement speed reduction effects.

378438.name: Scouring Flame
378438.description: Fire Breath burns away 2 beneficial Magic effects from all targets.

378441.name: Time Stop
378441.description:
Freeze an ally's timestream for 5 sec. While frozen in time they are invulnerable, cannot act, and auras do not progress.

You may reactivate Time Stop to end this effect early.

378442.name: Wild Instincts
378442.description: When your primary pet uses Stomp, apply Barbed Shot to a target hit by that Stomp. This Barbed Shot will not cause an extra Stomp.

378443.name: Acid Rain
378443.description: Deal [(67.25% of Spell Power)] Nature damage every 1 sec to up to 5 enemies inside of your Healing Rain.

378444.name: Obsidian Mettle
378444.description: While Obsidian Scales is active you gain immunity to interrupt, silence, and pushback effects.

378448.name: Fractured Frost
378448.description: Ice Lance strikes 1 additional target at 100% effectiveness, preferring enemies with more stacks of Freezing.

378457.name: Soaring Shield
378457.description: Avenger's Shield jumps to 2 additional targets.

378743.name: Dire Command
378743.description: Kill Command has a 20% chance to also summon a Dire Beast to attack your target for 8 sec.

378762.name: Ferren Marcus's Fervor
378762.description: Avenger's Shield deals 10% increased damage to its primary target.

378767.name: Focused Aim
378767.description: Consuming Precise Shots reduces the cooldown of Aimed Shot by 2.00 sec.

378773.name: Greater Purge
378773.description: Purges the enemy target, removing 2 beneficial Magic effects.

378807.name: Shadowrunner
378807.description: While Stealth or Shadow Dance is active, you move 20% faster.

378845.name: Focused Enmity
378845.description: When Avenger's Shield strikes a single enemy, it deals 100% additional Holy damage.

378848.name: Coldthirst
378848.description: Successfully interrupting an enemy with Mind Freeze grants 10 Runic Power and reduces its cooldown by 3 sec.

378913.name: Light Ammo
378913.description:
Trick Shots now causes Aimed Shot and Rapid Fire to ricochet to 2 additional targets.

Aspect of the Hydra's damage bonus is increased by 15%.

378919.name: Piercing Cold
378919.description: [Frostfire Bolt / Frostbolt] and Flurry critical strike damage increased by 20%.

378934.name: Lunge
378934.description:
The damage of your auto-attacks is increased by 25%.

Your Agility is increased by 2%, increased by an additional 2% while dual-wielding.

378937.name: Explosives Expert
378937.description: Wildfire Bomb, Boomstick, and Flamefang Pitch damage increased by 5%.

378947.name: Glacial Assault
378947.description:
Flurry has a 12% chance each hit to call down an icy comet, crashing into your target and nearby enemies for (150% of Spell Power) Frost damage.

Applies 1 stack of Freezing.

378955.name: Killer Companion
378955.description: All damage dealt by your pet is increased by 10%.

378988.name: Lycara's Teachings
378988.description:
You gain 3% of a stat while in each form:

No Form: Haste
Cat Form: Critical Strike
Bear Form: Versatility
Moonkin Form: Mastery

378996.name: Recuperator
378996.description: Slice and Dice heals you for up to 1% of your maximum health per 3 sec.

379005.name: Blackjack
379005.description: Enemies have 30% reduced damage and healing for 6 sec after Blind or Sap's effect on them ends.

379021.name: Sanctuary
379021.description: While in your Consecration and for 4.0 sec after leaving it, your damage taken is reduced by 5%.

379022.name: Consecration in Flame
379022.description: Consecration lasts 2 sec longer and its damage is increased by 20%.

379391.name: Quickened Invocation
379391.description:
Protection
Divine Toll's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

 Retribution
Divine Toll's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

 Holy
Divine Toll's, Holy Armament's, and Holy Prism's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

379993.name: Flash Freeze
379993.description: Casting Glacial Spike has a 100% chance to grant you Fingers of Frost.

380188.name: Crusader's Resolve
380188.description: Enemies hit by Avenger's Shield deal 10% reduced melee damage to you for 10 sec.

381542.name: Deadly Precision
381542.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by 5%.

381543.name: Virulent Poisons
381543.description: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 10%.

381620.name: Improved Ambush
381620.description: [Shadowstrike: Shadowstrike damage increased by 8% / Ambush generates 1 additional combo point].

381621.name: Tight Spender
381621.description: Energy cost of finishing moves reduced by 6%.

381623.name: Thistle Tea
381623.description:
Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.

381624.name: Improved Poisons
381624.description: Increases the application chance of your weapon poisons by 5%.

381626.name: Bloody Mess
381626.description: Garrote and Rupture damage increased by 15%.

381627.name: Internal Bleeding
381627.description: Kidney Shot and Rupture also apply Internal Bleeding, dealing up to [5 * (39.12% of Attack Power)] Bleed damage over 6 sec, based on combo points spent.

381629.name: Thrown Precision
381629.description: Fan of Knives has 5% increased critical strike chance and its critical strikes always apply your weapon poisons.

381630.name: Intent to Kill
381630.description: Shadowstep's cooldown is reduced by 33% when used on a target afflicted by your Garrote.

381631.name: Flying Daggers
381631.description: Fan of Knives has its radius increased to 12 yds, deals 20% more damage, and an additional 10% when striking 5 or more targets.

381632.name: Improved Garrote
381632.description: Garrote deals 50% increased damage and has no cooldown when used from Stealth and for 6 sec after breaking Stealth.

381637.name: Atrophic Poison
381637.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by ( - 3 *- 1)% for 10 sec.

381640.name: Lethal Dose
381640.description: Your weapon poisons and Nature or Bleed damage over time abilities deal 1% increased damage to targets for each of your lethal poison or damage over time effects on them.

381647.name: Planes Traveler
381647.description: Reduces the cooldown of Astral Shift by 30 sec.

381650.name: Elemental Warding
381650.description: Reduces all magic damage taken by 8%.

381652.name: Systemic Failure
381652.description: Garrote increases the damage of Ambush and Mutilate on the target by 30%.

381655.name: Nature's Fury
381655.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Nature spells and abilities by 2%.

381664.name: Amplifying Poison
381664.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy, dealing (8.14% of Attack Power) Nature damage and applying Amplifying Poison for 12 sec. Envenom can consume 10 stacks of Amplifying Poison to deal 35% increased damage. Max 20 stacks.

381673.name: Doomblade
381673.description: Mutilate deals an additional 25% Bleed damage over 8 sec.

381689.name: Brimming with Life
381689.description:
Stamina increased by 8%.

While you are at full health, Reincarnation cools down 50% faster.

381707.name: Swelling Maelstrom
381707.description:
Increases your maximum Maelstrom by 50.

Increases Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake damage by 5%.

381708.name: Eye of the Storm
381708.description:
Reduces the Maelstrom cost of Earth Shock and Earthquake by 5.

Reduces the Maelstrom cost of Elemental Blast by 10.

381726.name: Mountains Will Fall
381726.description:
Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake can trigger your Mastery: Elemental Overload at 50% effectiveness.

Overloaded Earthquakes do not knock enemies down.

381782.name: Searing Flames
381782.description: Flame Shock damage has a chance to generate 2 Maelstrom.

381797.name: Dashing Scoundrel
381797.description: Envenom's effect also increases the critical strike chance of your weapon poisons by 5%, and their critical strikes generate 1 Energy.

381798.name: Zoldyck Recipe
381798.description: Your Bleed, weapon poison, and other Nature damage is increased by 15% against targets below 35% health.

381799.name: Scent of Blood
381799.description: Each enemy afflicted by your Rupture increases your Agility by 2%, up to a maximum of 20%.

381801.name: Dragon-Tempered Blades
381801.description: You may apply 1 additional Lethal and Non-Lethal Poison to your weapons, but they have 30% less application chance.

381828.name: Ace Up Your Sleeve
381828.description: Between the Eyes has a 3% chance per combo point spent to grant 4 combo points and reset its own cooldown.

381839.name: Sleight of Hand
381839.description: Roll the Bones has a 20% increased chance of granting more powerful results.

381845.name: Audacity
381845.description:
Using Pistol Shot with Opportunity has a 30% chance to make your next Ambush usable without Stealth.

Chance to trigger this effect matches the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

381846.name: Fan the Hammer
381846.description:
When you gain Opportunity, gain 1 additional charge. Max 6 charges.

Pistol Shot consumes 1 additional charge of Opportunity to fire 1 additional bullet. Additional shots deal 20% reduced damage.

381867.name: Totemic Surge
381867.description: Reduces the cooldown of most totems by 5 sec.

381878.name: Deft Maneuvers
381878.description: Blade Flurry's initial damage is increased by 100% and generates 1 combo point per target struck, but its Energy cost is increased by 30.

381885.name: Heavy Hitter
381885.description: Attacks that generate combo points deal 10% increased damage.

381921.name: Ouroboros
381921.description: Casting Echo grants one stack of Ouroboros, increasing the healing of your next Emerald Blossom by 30%, stacking up to 5 times.

381922.name: Temporal Artificer
381922.description: Rewind's cooldown is reduced by 60 sec.

381930.name: Mana Spring
381930.description:
Restoration
Your Lava Burst and Riptide casts restore 188 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.

Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers.

 Elemental
Your Lava Burst casts restore 125 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.

Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers.

 Enhancement
Your Lava BurstStormstrike casts restore 188 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.

Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers.

381936.name: Flash of Lightning
381936.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning by 10%.

381946.name: Wavespeaker's Blessing
381946.description: Increases Riptide's duration by 6.0 sec and its healing over time by 15%.

381988.name: Swift Slasher
381988.description: Slice and Dice grants additional attack speed equal to 100% of your Haste.

381989.name: Keep It Rolling
381989.description: Increase the remaining duration of your active Roll the Bones combat enhancement by 30 sec.

381990.name: Summarily Dispatched
381990.description: Dispatch deals 10% increased damage and costs 3 less Energy. This damage bonus is increased by 50% while your damage is enhanced by your Between the Eyes.

382015.name: The Rotten
382015.description: After activating Shadow Dance, your next 2 attacks that generate combo points deal 35% increased damage.

382017.name: Veiltouched
382017.description: Your abilities deal 5% increased magic damage.

382020.name: Earthen Harmony
382020.description: Earth Shield reduces damage taken by 3% and its healing is increased by up to 150% as its target's health decreases. Maximum benefit is reached below 50% health.

382021.name: Earthliving Weapon
382021.description: Imbue your weapon with the element of Earth for 1 hour. Your Riptide, Healing Wave, and Chain Heal healing has a 20% chance to trigger Earthliving on the target, healing for (138.915% of Spell Power) over 6 sec.

382030.name: Water Totem Mastery
382030.description: Reduces the cooldown of Healing Stream Totem by 5 sec.

382032.name: Echo Chamber
382032.description: Increases the damage dealt by your Elemental Overloads by 25%.

382039.name: Flow of the Tides
382039.description: Chain Heal bounces an additional time and casting Chain Heal on a target affected by Riptide consumes Riptide, increasing the healing of your Chain Heal by 30%.

382042.name: Surging Elements
382042.description: Casting Sundering grants you 15% Haste for 12 sec, and generates 5 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon.

382045.name: Primal Tide Core
382045.description: Every 4 casts of Riptide also applies Riptide to another friendly target near your Riptide target.

382194.name: Undercurrent
382194.description: For each Riptide active on an ally, your heals are 0.5% more effective.

382197.name: Ancestral Wolf Affinity
382197.description: Cleanse Spirit, Wind Shear, Purge, and totem casts no longer cancel Ghost Wolf.

382201.name: Totemic Focus
382201.description:
Restoration
Increases the radius of your totem effects by 15%.

Increases the duration of your Earthbind and Earthgrab Totems by 10 sec.

Increases the duration of your Healing Stream, Tremor, Poison Cleansing, Ancestral Protection, Earthen Wall, and Wind Rush Totems by 3.0 sec.

 Elemental,  Enhancement
Increases the radius of your totem effects by 15%.

Increases the duration of your Earthbind and Earthgrab Totems by 10 sec.

Increases the duration of your Healing Stream, Tremor, Poison Cleansing, and Wind Rush Totems by 3.0 sec.

382215.name: Winds of Al'Akir
382215.description: Increases your movement speed by 5% and the movement speed bonus of Ghost Wolf by an additional 5%.

382238.name: Lethality
382238.description: Critical strike chance increased by 1%. Critical strike damage bonus of your attacks that generate combo points increased by 10%.

382245.name: Cold Blooded Killer
382245.description: Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by 10%.

382268.name: Flow of Time
382268.description: The cooldowns of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by 3 sec.

382293.name: Incantation of Swiftness
382293.description: [Greater Invisibility: Greater]Invisibility increases your movement speed by 20% for 6 sec.

382297.name: Quick Witted
382297.description: Counterspell's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

382309.name: Ancestral Awakening
382309.description: When you heal with your Healing Wave or Riptide you have a 30% chance to summon an Ancestral spirit to aid you, instantly healing an injured friendly party or raid target within 40 yards for 15% of the amount healed. Critical strikes increase this chance to 60%.

382310.name: Inspiring Presence
382310.description: Rallying Cry's duration is increased by 3 sec and it grants an additional 5% maximum health.

382315.name: Improved Earthliving Weapon
382315.description:
Earthliving receives 150% additional benefit from Mastery: Deep Healing.

Healing Wave always triggers Earthliving on its target.

382424.name: Winter's Protection
382424.description: The cooldown of Ice Block is reduced by 30 sec.

382482.name: Living Stream
382482.description: Healing Stream Totem heals for 100% more, decaying over its duration.

382503.name: Quick Decisions
382503.description: Shadowstep's cooldown is reduced by 20%, and its maximum range is increased by 20%.

382504.name: Dark Brew
382504.description:
Your weapon poisons have 10% increased application chance and now deal damage as Shadow instead of Nature.

Shadow damage increased by 10%.

382505.name: The First Dance
382505.description: Remaining out of combat for 6 sec increases the duration of your next Shadow Dance by 3 sec.

382506.name: Replicating Shadows
382506.description: Shadow Clones deal 15% increased damage and your effects that have a chance to create them have 5% additional chance to occur.

382507.name: Shrouded in Darkness
382507.description: Shroud of Concealment increases the movement speed of allies by 100% and leaving its area no longer cancels the effect.

382508.name: Planned Execution
382508.description: Shadow Dance increases the critical strike damage bonus of your abilities by 10%.

382511.name: Shadowed Finishers
382511.description: Eviscerate and Black Powder deal an additional 30% damage as Shadow while Find Weakness is active.

382512.name: Improved Find Weakness
382512.description: Find Weakness causes your attacks to ignore an additional 20% armor.

382514.name: Fade to Nothing
382514.description: Movement speed increased by 20% and damage taken reduced by 10% for 8 sec after gaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shadow Dance.

382515.name: Cloaked in Shadows
382515.description: Vanish grants you a shield for 6 sec, absorbing damage equal to 18% of your maximum health.

382518.name: Perforated Veins
382518.description: [Gloomblade / Backstab], Shuriken Storm, and Shadowstrike have 10% increased damage while Find Weakness is active.

382524.name: Lingering Shadow
382524.description: After Shadow Dance ends, [Gloomblade / Backstab] deals an additional 50% damage as Shadow, fading by 2.8% per sec.

382525.name: Finality
382525.description: Eviscerate and Black Powder have 15% increased critical strike damage bonus.

382528.name: Danse Macabre
382528.description: While Shadow Dance is active, each different attack that generates or spends combo points lashes out at the target, dealing (420% of Attack Power) Shadow damage.

382536.name: Sanctify
382536.description: Enemies hit by Divine Storm take 20% more damage from Consecration and Divine Hammers for 12 sec.

382549.name: Pain and Gain
382549.description:
When you take any damage, heal for 2.0% of your maximum health. 

This can only occur once every 10 sec.

382550.name: Passing Seasons
382550.description: Nature's Swiftness's cooldown is reduced by 12 sec.

382552.name: Improved Ironbark
382552.description: Ironbark's cooldown is reduced by 20 sec.

382559.name: Unstoppable Growth
382559.description: Wild Growth's healing falls off 40% less over time.

382732.name: Ancestral Reach
382732.description: Chain Heal bounces an additional time and its healing is increased by 8%.

382764.name: Crushing Force
382764.description:
Fury
Bloodthirst deals an additional 5% damage and deals 5% increased critical strike damage.

 Arms
Mortal Strike deals an additional 5% damage and deals 5% increased critical strike damage.

 Protection
Shield Slam deals an additional 5% damage and deals 5% increased critical strike damage.

382886.name: Fire and Ice
382886.description: Increases all Fire and Frost damage you deal by 3%.

382888.name: Flurry
382888.description: Increases your attack speed by 15% for your next 3 melee swings after dealing a critical strike with a spell or ability.

382895.name: One-Handed Weapon Specialization
382895.description: While wielding one-handed weapons your damage is increased by 3% and Leech increased by 2%.

382896.name: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization
382896.description: While wielding two-handed weapons your damage is increased by 3% and damage taken from area of effect attacks is reduced by 2%.

382900.name: Dual Wield Specialization
382900.description: While dual wielding your damage is increased by 3% and movement speed is increased by 2%.

382939.name: Reinforced Plates
382939.description: Stamina increased by 5% and Armor increased by 5%.

382940.name: Endurance Training
382940.description:
Stamina increased by 5% and the duration of [ Arms,  Protection: Fear, Sap and Incapacitate effects on you is reduced by 10% / 

 Fury
movement impairing effects on you is reduced by 10%]

382946.name: Wild Strikes
382946.description: Haste increased by 1% and your auto-attack critical strikes increase your auto-attack speed by 10% for 10 sec.

382948.name: Piercing Challenge
382948.description: Champion's Spear's damage increased by 50% and its Rage generation is increased by 100%.

382953.name: Storm of Steel
382953.description:
[ Protection: Ravager's damage is reduced by 30% but it now has 2 charges and generates 10 additional Rage each time it deals damage / 

 Arms,  Fury
Bladestorm and Ravager's damage are reduced by 30% but they now have 2 charges and generate 10 additional Rage each time they deal damage]

382954.name: Cacophonous Roar
382954.description: Intimidating Shout can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.

382956.name: Seismic Reverberation
382956.description: If Whirlwind [ Arms: or Cleave] [Crashing Thunder: or Thunder Clap] [ Protection: or Revenge]hits 3 or more enemies it hits them 1 additional time for 30% damage.

383005.name: Chrono Loop
383005.description: Trap the enemy in a time loop for 5 sec. Afterwards, they are returned to their previous location and health. Cannot reduce an enemy's health below 20%.

383010.name: Elemental Orbit
383010.description:
Increases the number of Elemental Shields you can have active on yourself by 1.

You can have Earth Shield on yourself and one ally at the same time.

383013.name: Poison Cleansing Totem
383013.description: Summons a totem at your feet that removes all Poison effects from a nearby party or raid member within 30 yards every 1.5 sec for 6 sec.

383016.name: Improved Purify Spirit
383016.description: Purify Spirit additionally removes all Curse effects.

383082.name: Barbaric Training
383082.description:
Fury (Crashing Thunder)
 Thunder Clap, Whirlwind, and Raging Blow deal 10% more damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

 Protection
Revenge deals 10% more damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

 Arms
Slam, Whirlwind, and Cleave deal 10% more damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

 Fury
Whirlwind and Raging Blow deal 10% more damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

383103.name: Fueled by Violence
383103.description:
Protection
You are healed for 110% of the Bleed damage dealt by Rend and Deep Wounds.

 Arms
You are healed for 85% of the Bleed damage dealt by Rend and Deep Wounds.

383115.name: Concussive Blows
383115.description:
Cooldown of Pummel reduced by 1.0 sec. 

Successfully interrupting an enemy increases the damage you deal to them by 5% for 10 sec.

383121.name: Mass Polymorph
383121.description:
Transforms all enemies within 10 yards into sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 15 sec. While affected, the victims cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters.

383154.name: Bloodletting
383154.description:
Rend and Deep Wounds' Bleed effects last 33% longer and have a 5% increased critical strike chance.

If you know Rend, Mortal Strike inflicts Rend on targets below 35% health.

383155.name: Improved Sweeping Strikes
383155.description: Sweeping Strikes affects 6 additional damaging single-target abilities.

383191.name: Regenesis
383191.description: Rejuvenation healing is increased by up to 10%, and Tranquility healing is increased by up to 20%, healing for more on low-health targets.

383195.name: Umbral Intensity
383195.description:
Solar Eclipse increases Wrath damage by an additional 10%. 

Lunar Eclipse increases Starfire damage by an additional 10%.

383197.name: Orbit Breaker
383197.description: Every 30th Shooting Star calls down a Full Moon at 60% effectiveness upon its target.

383222.name: Overflowing Shores
383222.description: Healing Rain instantly restores (75.6756% of Spell Power) health to 5 allies within its area, and its radius is increased by 2 yards.

383228.name: Swift Justice
383228.description: Reduces the cooldown of Judgment by 2 sec and Crusader Strike by 2 sec.

383281.name: Hidden Opportunity
383281.description: Ambush has a chance to grant Opportunity. Chance to trigger this effect is 80% of the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

383287.name: Bloodborne
383287.description: Your Bleed effects deal 5% increased damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

383295.name: Deft Experience
383295.description: Bloodthirst's critical strike chance increased by 5% and if you are Enraged, Bloodthirst extends your Enrage by 0.5 sec. This extension is doubled if Bloodthirst critically strikes your primary target.

383297.name: Critical Thinking
383297.description: Raging Blow's critical strike chance increased by 5% and critical strike damage increased by 5%.

383328.name: Final Verdict
383328.description:
Unleashes a powerful weapon strike that deals (404.408% of Attack Power) [Blades of Light: Holystrike / Holy] damage to an enemy target,

Final Verdict has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Judgment.

383341.name: Sharpened Blades
383341.description: Mortal Strike, Cleave, and Execute damage increased by 5% and critical strike damage increased by 5%.

383342.name: Holy Blade
383342.description: Blade of Justice generates 1 additional Holy Power.

383344.name: Expurgation
383344.description: Your Blade of Justice causes the target to burn for (68.85% of Attack Power) [Holy Crusader: Holy / Radiant] damage over 9 sec. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

383352.name: Tireless Energy
383352.description: Maximum Energy increased by 20 and Energy regeneration increased by 5%.

383391.name: Feel the Burn
