383391.description: Fire Blast increases your mastery by 2% for 4 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

383396.name: Tempest of the Lightbringer
383396.description: Divine Storm projects an additional wave of light, striking all enemies up to 20 yds in front of you for 20% of Divine Storm's damage.

383430.name: Impale
383430.description: Critical strike damage of your abilities is increased by 10%.

383459.name: Swift Strikes
383459.description: Haste increased by 1% and Raging Blow and Bloodthirst generate an additional 1 Rage.

383468.name: Invigorating Fury
383468.description: Enraged Regeneration lasts 3 sec longer and instantly heals for 10% of your maximum health.

383486.name: Focus in Chaos
383486.description: While Enraged, your auto-attacks can no longer miss.

383605.name: Frenzied Flurry
383605.description: Increases auto-attack damage with one-handed weapons by 30% and your auto-attack critical strikes have a 50% chance to Enrage you.

383634.name: Fiery Rush
383634.description: While Combustion is active, Fire Blast recharges 50% faster.

383669.name: Controlled Destruction
383669.description: Damaging an enemy with Fireball, Pyroblast, or Flamestrike increases the damage it receives from Ignite by 0.2%. Stacks up to 50 times.

383676.name: Impetus
383676.description: Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse generate an additional Arcane Charge.

383697.name: Sal'salabim's Strength
383697.description: When you use Keg Smash, the remaining cooldown on Breath of Fire is reset.

383698.name: Scalding Brew
383698.description: Keg Smash deals an additional 20% damage to targets affected by Breath of Fire.

383700.name: Gai Plin's Imperial Brew
383700.description: Purifying Brew instantly heals you for 25% of the Staggered damage it clears.

383703.name: Fatality
383703.description: Mortal Strike has a 50% chance to apply a Fatal Mark to your target, stacking up to 5 times. Your next Execute on a target with a Fatal Mark causes the Fatal Mark to deal (276% of Attack Power) additional Physical damage per stack.

383707.name: Stormstout's Last Keg
383707.description: Keg Smash deals 50% additional damage to its primary target, has 1 additional charge, and its range is increased by 10 yards.

383714.name: Training of Niuzao
383714.description: Gain up to 15% Mastery based on your current level of Stagger.

383762.name: Bitter Immunity
383762.description: Restores 20% health instantly and removes all diseases, poisons, and curses affecting you.

383785.name: Counterstrike
383785.description: Each time you dodge or an enemy misses you, your next Tiger Palm or Spinning Crane Kick deals 100% increased damage.

383810.name: Fevered Incantation
383810.description: Each consecutive critical strike you deal increases critical strike damage you deal by 1%, up to 4% for 6 sec.

383848.name: Frenzied Enrage
383848.description: Enrage increases your haste by 15% and your movement speed by 10%.

383852.name: Spite
383852.description: Bloodthirst and Raging Blow damage increased by 2.5% and critical strike damage increased by 2.5%.

383854.name: Improved Raging Blow
383854.description: Raging Blow has 2 charges and has a 25% chance to instantly reset its own cooldown.

383877.name: Hack and Slash
383877.description: Rampage has a 100% chance to refund a charge of Raging Blow.

383885.name: Vicious Contempt
383885.description: Bloodthirst deals 25% increased damage to enemies who are below 35% health.

383916.name: Annihilator
383916.description: Your auto-attacks deal an additional (13.225% of Attack Power) Physical damage and generate 2 Rage.

383959.name: Cold Steel, Hot Blood
383959.description: Bloodthirst critical strikes generate 4 additional Rage and inflict a Gushing Wound that deals 9 Bleed damage over 6 sec and heals you for the damage dealt.

383967.name: Slow Burn
383967.description:
Combustion grants mastery equal to 75% of your Critical Strike stat.

Combustion causes your spells to apply Ignite at 15% increased effectiveness.

383994.name: Dragonfire Brew
383994.description: Breath of Fire deals 100% increased damage, and after using Breath of Fire, you breathe fire 2 additional times, each dealing (20% of Attack Power) Fire damage.

384027.name: Divine Resonance
384027.description:
Protection
After casting Divine Toll, you instantly cast Avenger's Shield every 5 sec for 15 sec.

 Holy
After casting Divine Toll, you instantly cast Holy Shock every 5 sec for 15 sec.

 Retribution
After casting Divine Toll, your next 3 Judgments cast again at 100% effectiveness.

384036.name: Brutal Vitality
384036.description:
8% of damage you deal adds to your active Ignore Pain or the next Ignore Pain you activate.

Your next Ignore Pain can be increased by up to [Total Health * (0.3) * (0.5)].

384041.name: Strategist
384041.description: Devastate, Thunder Clap, Revenge, and Execute have a 25% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Shield Slam.

384060.name: Illuminated Thoughts
384060.description: Clearcasting has a 3% increased chance to proc.

384063.name: Enduring Alacrity
384063.description: Increases Stamina by 5% and your Haste by 2%.

384067.name: Focused Vigor
384067.description: Increases Strength by 3% and your critical strike chance by 1%.

384072.name: Impenetrable Wall
384072.description: Shield Slam reduces the remaining cooldown of Shield Wall by 6 sec.

384090.name: Titanic Throw
384090.description:
Throws your weapon at the enemy, causing (35% of Attack Power) Physical damage to it and 5 nearby enemies. 

Generates high threat.

384100.name: Berserker Shout
384100.description:
Go berserk, removing and granting immunity to Fear, Sap, and Incapacitate effects for 6 sec.

Also remove fear effects from group members within 12 yds.

384110.name: Wrecking Throw
384110.description: Hurl your weapon at the enemy, causing (600% of Attack Power) Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

384124.name: Armored to the Teeth
384124.description:
Protection
Gain Strength equal to 2% of your Armor.

 Arms,  Fury
Gain Strength equal to 5% of your Armor.

384143.name: Overflowing Maelstrom
384143.description:
Maelstrom Weapon can now stack 5 additional times.

Each Maelstrom Weapon stacks consumed grants Overflowing Maelstrom, reducing the cast time of your next Healing Surge or Chain Heal by 10%, and increasing their healing by 10% up to 10 times. This effect can be accumulated up to 20 times.

384149.name: Raging Maelstrom
384149.description: Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning can consume up to 10 Maelstrom Weapon stacks.

384174.name: Master of Flame
384174.description:
Ignite deals 15% more damage when Combustion is not active.

Fire Blast now spreads an additional 50% of your Ignite.

384277.name: Blood and Thunder
384277.description: Thunder Clap affects 5 nearby targets with Rend, causing them to Bleed for (190.465% of Attack Power) damage over 15 sec.

384318.name: Thunderous Roar
384318.description: Roar explosively, dealing (250.56% of Attack Power) Physical damage to enemies within 12 yds and cause them to bleed for (250.56% of Attack Power) physical damage over 8 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

384352.name: Doom Winds
384352.description:
Unleash a devastating storm around yourself, dealing (120% of Attack Power) Stormstrike damage every 1 sec to nearby enemies for 8 sec.

Increases your chance to activate Windfury Weapon by 100%, and the damage of Windfury Weapon by 20%.

384355.name: Elemental Weapons
384355.description: Each active weapon imbue increases all Fire, Frost, and Nature damage dealt by 5.0%.

384361.name: Bloodsurge
384361.description: Damage from Rend has a chance to generate 5 Rage.

384363.name: Converging Storms
384363.description: Each target hit by Crash Lightning increases the damage of your next Stormstrike by 25%, up to a maximum of 6 stacks.

384404.name: Sidearm
384404.description: Your auto-attacks have a 20% chance to hurl weapons at your target and 1 other enemy in front of you, dealing (70% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

384411.name: Static Accumulation
384411.description: During Doom Winds or Ascendance, you generate 1 Maelstrom Weapon stack every 1 sec.

384444.name: Thorim's Invocation
384444.description:
Doom Winds and Deeply Rooted Elements last 2 sec longer, and the cooldown of Ascendance is reduced by 60 sec.

During Doom Winds or Ascendance, Stormstrike and Crash Lightning consume up to 10 Maelstrom Weapon to discharge a Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning at 100% effectiveness at your enemy, whichever you most recently used.

384450.name: Lightning Strikes
384450.description: Consuming 10 stacks of Maelstrom Weapon increases the damage of your next Stormstrike or Lava Lash by 25% and causes them to generate a stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

384452.name: Arcane Salvo
384452.description: Each wave of Arcane Missiles increases the damage of Arcane Barrage by 3%, up to 60%.

384612.name: Prodigious Savant
384612.description: Arcane Charges increase the damage of Arcane Blast, Arcane Pulse, and Arcane Barrage by an additional 10%.

384651.name: Charged Orb
384651.description: Arcane Orb gains 1 additional charge. Arcane Orb damage increased by 15%.

384665.name: Taste for Blood
384665.description: Ferocious Bite deals 12% increased damage and an additional 12% during Tiger's Fury.

384667.name: Sudden Ambush
384667.description: Finishing moves have a 6% chance per combo point spent to increase the direct damage of your next Rake, Shred, or Swipe by 50% and make it critically strike.

384689.name: Divide and Conquer
384689.description: [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] forms curtains of fire, preventing line of sight to enemies outside its walls and burning enemies who walk through them for (480% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Lasts 6 sec.

384799.name: Hunter's Avoidance
384799.description: Damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 5%.

384815.name: Seal of Charity
384815.description: When you cast Word of Glory on someone other than yourself, you are also healed for 100% of the amount healed.

384820.name: Sacrifice of the Just
384820.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blessing of Sacrifice by 60 sec.

384858.name: Orb Barrage
384858.description: Arcane Barrage has a 4% chance per stack of Arcane Salvo to launch an Arcane Orb in front of you at 100% effectiveness.

384909.name: Improved Blessing of Protection
384909.description:
Protection
Reduces the cooldown of Blessing of Protection and Blessing of Spellwarding by 60 sec.

 Holy,  Retribution
Reduces the cooldown of Blessing of Protection by 60 sec.

384914.name: Recompense
384914.description:
After your Blessing of Sacrifice ends, 50% of the total damage it diverted is added to your next Judgment as bonus damage, or your next Word of Glory as bonus healing.

This effect's bonus damage cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health and its bonus healing cannot exceed 100% of your maximum health.

384969.name: Thunderous Words
384969.description: Increases the duration of Thunderous Roar's Bleed effect by 2.0 sec and Thunderous Roar's Bleed effect causes enemies to take 20% increased damage from all your bleeds.

385059.name: Odyn's Fury
385059.description:
Unleashes your power, dealing [(182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)% + (182.598% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage and an additional (520% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 12 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enrages you and generates 20 Rage.

385167.name: Everlasting Frost
385167.description:
Casting Frozen Orb grants 1 stack of Fingers of Frost.

Damaging one or more enemies with Frozen Orb has a 3% chance to grant Fingers of Frost.

385414.name: Afterimage
385414.description: After you spend 20 Holy Power, your next Word of Glory echoes onto a nearby ally at 30% effectiveness.

385427.name: Obduracy
385427.description: Speed increased by 2% and damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 2%.

385450.name: Seal of Might
385450.description:
Holy
Mastery increased by 2% and Intellect increased by 2%.

 Protection,  Retribution
Mastery increased by 2% and Strength increased by 2%.

385478.name: Shrouded Suffocation
385478.description: Garrote damage increased by 20%. Garrote generates 2 additional combo points when used from Stealth.

385515.name: Holy Aegis
385515.description: Armor and critical strike chance increased by 4%.

385539.name: Rejuvenating Wind
385539.description: Exhilaration now also heals you for an additional 12.0% of your maximum health over 8 sec.

385571.name: Improved Overpower
385571.description: Overpower has 2 charges and deals 15% more damage.

385627.name: Kingsbane
385627.description:
Release a powerful poison from your weapons and inject it into your target, dealing (172.81% of Attack Power) Nature damage instantly and an additional (203% of Attack Power) Nature damage over 14 sec. 

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to a target affected by Kingsbane, Kingsbane damage increases by 20%, up to 1000%.

Awards 1 combo point.

385633.name: Auras of the Resolute
385633.description:
Learn Concentration Aura, Devotion Aura, and Crusader Aura:

Concentration Aura:
Interrupt and Silence effects on party and raid members within 40 yds are 30% shorter. 

 Devotion Aura:
Party and raid members within 40 yds are bolstered by their devotion, reducing damage taken by 3%.

 Crusader Aura:
Increases mounted speed by 20% for all party and raid members within 40 yds.

385696.name: Flow State
385696.description: Empower spells cause time to flow 10% faster for you, increasing movement speed, cooldown recharge rate, and cast speed. Lasts 10 sec.

385703.name: Bloodborne
385703.description: Bloodthirst causes your Bleeds to deal 20% additional damage for 8 sec.

385704.name: Bloodborne
385704.description: Your Deep Wounds and Rend deal 25% increased damage.

385722.name: Silent Storm
385722.description: Gaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shadow Dance causes your next Shuriken Storm to have 100% increased chance to critically strike.

385737.name: Bloody Claws
385737.description: Each stack of Mongoose Fury also increases the damage of Strike as One by 10%.

385786.name: Matted Fur
385786.description: When you use Barkskin or Survival Instincts, absorb [1200 / 100 * 1.25 * Attack Power * (1 + Versatility)] damage for 15 sec.

385810.name: Dire Frenzy
385810.description: Dire Beast lasts an additional 1 sec and deals 10% increased damage.

385840.name: Thunderlord
385840.description:
Increases the radius of Demoralizing Shout by 5 yards.

Each enemy hit by Thunder Clap reduces the remaining cooldown on Demoralizing Shout by 1.5 sec, up to 4.5 sec.

385881.name: Teachings of the Black Harvest
385881.description:
Affliction,  Destruction
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec.

Voidwalker: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec.

Felhunter: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec.

Sayaad: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.

 Demonology
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec.

Voidwalker: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec.

Felhunter: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec.

Sayaad: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.

Felguard: Reduces the cooldown of Pursuit by 5 sec and increases its maximum range by 5 yards.

385888.name: Tough as Nails
385888.description:
Blocking an attack deals (120% of Attack Power) Physical damage to the attacker. Critical blocks deal double damage.

Generates high threat.

385899.name: Soulburn
385899.description:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

385952.name: Shield Charge
385952.description:
Charge to an enemy with your shield, granting you Shield Block and dealing (840% of Attack Power) Physical damage to it and (268.4% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies within 10 yards.

Also stuns the primary target for 4 sec.

Generates 20 Rage.

386011.name: Shield Specialization
386011.description: Increases Block chance by 8% and your Block value by 16%.

386030.name: Brace For Impact
386030.description: Using Shield Slam increases the damage of Shield Slam by 10% and the block value of your shield by 5% for 16 sec. Stacking up to 3 times.

386071.name: Disrupting Shout
386071.description: Taunts all enemies within 14 yds to attack you for 6 sec, interrupts all spellcasting within 14 yds and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 6 sec. Increases the threat you generate against the target by 800%.

386110.name: Fiendish Stride
386110.description: Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by 10%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional 20%.

386113.name: Fel Pact
386113.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by 60 sec.

386124.name: Fel Armor
386124.description:
When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 sec.

Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.

386164.name: Battle Stance
386164.description:
A balanced combat state that increases the critical strike chance of your abilities by 3% and reduces the duration of movement impairing effects by 10%. 

Lasts until canceled.

386185.name: Demonic Knowledge
386185.description: Hand of Gul'dan has a 5% chance to generate a charge of Demonic Core.

386194.name: Carnivorous Stalkers
386194.description: Your Dreadstalkers' attacks have a 10% chance to trigger an additional Dreadbite.

386196.name: Berserker Stance
386196.description:
An aggressive combat state that increases the damage of your auto-attacks by 15% and reduces the duration of Fear, Sap and Incapacitate effects on you by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

386208.name: Defensive Stance
386208.description:
Arms,  Fury
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15% and all damage you deal by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

 Protection
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15%.

Lasts until canceled.

386272.name: Titanic Wrath
386272.description: Essence Burst increases the damage of affected spells by 15.0%.

386283.name: Catalyze
386283.description: While channeling Disintegrate your Fire Breath on the target deals damage 100% more often.

386284.name: Champion's Might
386284.description: The duration of Champion's Spear is increased by 2 sec. You deal (239.25% of Attack Power)% increased critical strike damage to targets chained to your Spear.

386348.name: Onyx Legacy
386348.description: Deep Breath's cooldown is reduced by 1 min.

386394.name: Battle-Scarred Veteran
386394.description:
When your health is brought below 30%, you take 80% less damage for 8 sec and healing you receive is increased by 100%.

Cannot occur more than once every 3 min.

386405.name: Inner Radiance
386405.description: Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are 30% more effective on yourself.

386477.name: Violent Outburst
386477.description: Every 250 rage you spend triggers a Violent Outburst, causing your next Shield Slam to deal 200% increased damage, generate 50% more Rage and grant Ignore Pain.

386617.name: Demonic Fortitude
386617.description: Increases you and your pets' maximum health by 5%.

386628.name: Unhinged
386628.description:
Fury
Every 2 strikes of Bladestorm, you automatically cast a Bloodthirst at your target or random nearby enemy, dealing 100% of normal damage.

 Arms
Every 2 strikes of Bladestorm, you automatically cast a Mortal Strike at your target or random nearby enemy, dealing 100% of normal damage.

386630.name: Battlelord
386630.description: Overpower has a 35% chance to reset the cooldown of Mortal Strike and reduce the cost of your next Mortal Strike by 33%.

386634.name: Executioner's Precision
386634.description: Execute increases the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 35%, stacking up to 2 times.

386648.name: Nightmare
386648.description: Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by 60%.

386653.name: Bulwark of Righteous Fury
386653.description: Avenger's Shield increases the damage of your next Shield of the Righteous by 20% for each target hit by Avenger's Shield, stacking up to 5 times, and increases its radius by 6 yds.

386659.name: Dark Accord
386659.description: Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by 45 sec.

386664.name: Ichor of Devils
386664.description: Dark Pact sacrifices only 5% of your current health for the same shield value.

386686.name: Frequent Donor
386686.description: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by 15 sec.

386689.name: Pact of Gluttony
386689.description:
Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded.

 Demonic Healthstone
Instantly restores 25% health [Empowered Healthstone: plus an additional 30% over 6 sec / .] 60 sec cooldown.

386738.name: Divine Resonance
386738.description:
Protection
After casting Divine Toll, you instantly cast Avenger's Shield every 5 sec for 15 sec.

 Retribution
After casting Divine Toll, you instantly cast Judgment every 5 sec for 15 sec.

 Holy
After casting Holy Prism, Holy Armament, or Divine Toll, you instantly cast Holy Shock every 5 sec for 15 sec.

386763.name: Freezing Cold
386763.description:
Enemies hit by Cone of Cold are frozen in place for 5 sec instead of snared.

When your roots expire or are dispelled, your target is snared by 80%, decaying over 3 sec.

386828.name: Energized Barriers
386828.description: Casting your barrier removes all snare effects.

386870.name: Brutal Companion
386870.description: Barbed Shot has a 25% chance to cause your pet to use its special attack and deal 50% bonus damage.

386937.name: Anvil and Stave
386937.description: Each time you dodge or an enemy misses you, the remaining cooldown on your Brews is reduced by 0.5 sec. Effect reduced by 50% for each additional recent attacker, up to 5.

386951.name: Soul Swap
386951.description:
Copies your damage over time effects and Haunt from the target, preserving their duration.

Your next use of Soul Swap within 10 sec will exhale a copy damage of the effects onto a new target.

386965.name: Charred Passions
386965.description: Your Breath of Fire ignites your right leg in flame for 8 sec, causing your Blackout Kick and Spinning Crane Kick to deal 50% additional damage as Fire damage and refresh the duration of your Breath of Fire on the target.

386976.name: Withering Bolt
386976.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul deal 5% increased damage, up to 15%, per damage over time effect you have active on the target.

386986.name: Sacrolash's Dark Strike
386986.description: Corruption damage is increased by 15%, and each time it deals damage any of your Curses active on the target are extended by 0.5 sec.

387044.name: Fervent Flickering
387044.description: Fire Blast gains 1 additional charge and its damage is increased by 25%.

387046.name: Elusive Footwork
387046.description: Blackout Kick deals an additional 5% damage. Blackout Kick critical hits grant an additional 1 stack of Elusive Brawler.

387103.name: Ruin
387103.description: Increases the critical strike damage of your Destruction spells by 15%.

387108.name: Conflagration of Chaos
387108.description: Conflagrate and Shadowburn have a 100% chance to guarantee your next cast of either ability to critically strike, and increase its damage by your critical strike chance.

387166.name: Raging Demonfire
387166.description: Channel Demonfire fires an additional 2 bolts. Each bolt increases the remaining duration of Immolate on all targets hit by 0.5 sec.

387170.name: Empyrean Legacy
387170.description:
Holy,  Protection
Avenging Wrath empowers your next Word of Glory to automatically activate Light of Dawn with 25% increased effectiveness.

 Retribution
Avenging Wrath empowers your next damage dealing single target Holy Power ability to automatically activate Divine Storm with 25% increased effectiveness.

387173.name: Diabolic Embers
387173.description: Incinerate now generates 100% additional Soul Shard Fragments.

387219.name: Walk with the Ox
387219.description: Your damaging abilities have a chance to invoke Niuzao, causing him to charge to your target's location and Stomp, dealing (400% of Attack Power) Physical damage to your target and reduced damage to secondary targets.

387230.name: Fluidity of Motion
387230.description: Blackout Kick's cooldown is reduced by 1 sec.

387252.name: Ashen Remains
387252.description: Chaos Bolt, Shadowburn, and Incinerate deal 3% increased damage to targets afflicted by Immolate.

387259.name: Flashpoint
387259.description:
When your Immolate deals periodic damage to a target above 80% health, gain 2% Haste for 10 sec.

Stacks up to 3 times.

387275.name: Chaos Incarnate
387275.description: Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, and Shadowburn always gain at least 70% of the maximum benefit from your Mastery: Chaotic Energies.

387276.name: Strength of Spirit
387276.description: Expel Harm's healing is increased by up to 100%, based on your missing health.

387341.name: Walloping Blow
387341.description: Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.

387384.name: Backlash
387384.description:
Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

Physical attacks against you have a 20% chance to make your next Incinerate instant cast. This effect can only occur once every 6 sec.

387506.name: Mayhem
387506.description:
Your single target spells have a 35% chance to apply Havoc to a nearby enemy for 5.0 sec.

 Havoc
Marks a target with Havoc for 5.0 sec, causing your single target spells to also strike the Havoc victim for 60% of the damage dealt.

387625.name: Staggering Strikes
387625.description: When you Blackout Kick, your Stagger is reduced by (Attack Power * 600 / 100), increased by up to 200% based on your missing health.

387638.name: Shadowboxing Treads
387638.description: Blackout Kick's damage increased by 20% and it strikes an additional 2 targets.

387761.name: Panacea
387761.description: Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for (200% of Spell Power) when cast.

387781.name: Commanding Light
387781.description: Beacon of Light transfers an additional 5% of the amount healed.

387786.name: Moment of Compassion
387786.description: Your Flash of Light heals for an additional 50% when cast on a target affected by your Beacon of Light.

387791.name: Empyreal Ward
387791.description: Lay on Hands grants the target 30% increased armor for 8 sec and now ignores healing reduction effects.

387801.name: Echoing Blessings
387801.description: Blessing of Freedom increases the target's movement speed by 30%. [Blessing of Spellwarding / Blessing of Protection] and Blessing of Sacrifice reduce the target's damage taken by 15%. These effects linger for 8 sec after the Blessing ends.

387805.name: Divine Glimpse
387805.description: Holy Shock and Judgment have a 8% increased critical strike chance.

387807.name: Time Manipulation
387807.description: The cooldown of your loss of control spells are reduced by 5 sec.

387808.name: Divine Revelations
387808.description: While empowered by Infusion of Light, Flash of Light heals for an additional 20% and Judgment refunds 0.5% of your maximum mana.

387879.name: Breaking Dawn
387879.description: Increases Light of Dawn's healing by 5%.

387991.name: Tear of Morning
387991.description:
Your [Sheilun's Gift / Invigorating Mist] healing is increased by [Sheilun's Gift: 20% / 20%] and your Enveloping Mist also heals allies with Renewing Mist for 8% of its healing.

The duration of Enveloping Mist is increased by 4 sec while you have a celestial summoned.

388004.name: Slaughtering Strikes
388004.description: Raging Blow causes every strike of your next Rampage to deal an additional 20% damage, stacking up to 5 times.

388020.name: Resplendent Mist
388020.description: Gust of Mists has a 30% chance to do 100% more healing.

388031.name: Jade Bond
388031.description: Chi Cocoons now apply Enveloping Mist for 4 sec when they expire or are consumed, and Chi-Ji's Gusts of Mists healing is increased by 20% and Yu'lon's Soothing Breath healing is increased by 500%.

388038.name: Yu'lon's Whisper
388038.description: While channeling Mana Tea you exhale the breath of Yu'lon, healing up to 5 allies within 15 yards for (91% of Spell Power) every 0.5 sec.

388039.name: Lone Survivor
388039.description: The duration of Survival of the Fittest is increased by 2.0 sec.

388049.name: Raging Armaments
388049.description: Raging Blow gains an extra charge.

388106.name: Soulscar
388106.description: Throw Glaive causes targets to take an additional 80% of damage dealt as Chaos over 6 sec.

388107.name: Ragefire
388107.description:
Each time Immolation Aura deals damage, 35% of the damage dealt by up to 3 critical strikes is gathered as Ragefire.

When Immolation Aura expires you explode, dealing all stored Ragefire damage to nearby enemies.

388108.name: Initiative
388108.description:
Damaging an enemy before they damage you increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 5 sec.

Vengeful Retreat refreshes your potential to trigger this effect on any enemies you are in combat with.

388112.name: Chaotic Transformation
388112.description: When you activate Metamorphosis, the cooldowns of Blade Dance and Eye Beam are immediately reset.

388113.name: Isolated Prey
388113.description:
Chaos Nova, Eye Beam, and Immolation Aura gain bonuses when striking 1 target.

 Chaos Nova:
Stun duration increased by 2 sec.

 Eye Beam:
Deals 30% increased damage.

 Immolation Aura:
Always critically strikes.

388116.name: Shattered Destiny
388116.description: The duration of your active demon form is extended by 0.1 sec per 12 Fury spent.

388118.name: Know Your Enemy
388118.description: Gain critical strike damage equal to 40% of your critical strike chance.

388212.name: Gift of the Celestials
388212.description: Reduces the cooldown of [Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane / Invoke Yul'on, the Jade Serpent] by 1 min, but decreases its duration to 12 sec.

388218.name: Calming Coalescence
388218.description: The absorb amount of Life Cocoon is increased by 80%.

388491.name: Secret Infusion
388491.description:
After using Thunder Focus Tea, your next spell gives 4% of a stat. Only one stat increase may be active at once:
Enveloping Mist: Critical strike
Renewing Mist: Haste
Rising Sun Kick: Versatility

388505.name: Quick Sip
388505.description: Purify 5% of your Staggered damage each time you gain 3 sec of Shuffle duration.

388511.name: Overflowing Mists
388511.description: Your Enveloping Mists heal the target for [(300% of Spell Power) * 2] each time they take direct damage.

388548.name: Mists of Life
388548.description: Life Cocoon applies Renewing Mist and Enveloping Mist to the target.

388551.name: Uplifted Spirits
388551.description: The cooldown of [Restoral / Revival] is reduced by 30 sec and [Restoral / Revival] healing increased by 15%.

388593.name: Peaceful Mending
388593.description: Allies targeted by Soothing Mist receive 40% more healing from your Enveloping Mist and Renewing Mist effects.

388615.name: Restoral
388615.description:
Heals all party and raid members within 40 yds for (5988.28% of Spell Power) and clears them of all harmful Poison and Disease effects. 

Castable while stunned.

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

388667.name: Drain Soul
388667.description:
Replaces Shadow Bolt.

Drains the target's soul, causing (556.875% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 5 sec.

Damage is increased by 100% against enemies below 20% health.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies during this effect.

388681.name: Elusive Mists
388681.description: Reduces all damage taken by you and your target while channeling Soothing Mists by 6%.

388682.name: Misty Peaks
388682.description: Renewing Mist's heal over time effect has a 5.0% chance to apply Enveloping Mist for 2 sec.

388701.name: Dancing Mists
388701.description: Renewing Mist has a 8% chance to immediately spread to an additional target when initially cast or when traveling to a new target.

388779.name: Way of the Crane
388779.description: Tiger Palms strike twice, Blackout Kicks strike an additional 2 targets at 20% effectiveness, and Spinning Crane Kick heals 1 nearby allies for 340% of the damage done.

388809.name: Fast Feet
388809.description: Rising Sun Kick deals 70% increased damage. Spinning Crane Kick deals 10% additional damage.

388812.name: Vivacious Vivification
388812.description:
Brewmaster
After casting Keg Smash, your next Vivify becomes instant cast.

This effect also reduces the energy cost of Vivify by 75%.

 Mistweaver
After casting Rising Sun Kick, your next Vivify becomes instant cast.

 Windwalker
After casting Rising Sun Kick, your next Vivify becomes instant cast.

This effect also reduces the energy cost of Vivify by 75%.

388813.name: Expeditious Fortification
388813.description: Fortifying Brew cooldown reduced by 30 sec.

388814.name: Ironshell Brew
388814.description: Increases your maximum health by an additional 10% and your damage taken is reduced by an additional 10% while Fortifying Brew is active.

388827.name: Explosive Potential
388827.description: Reduces the cooldown of Conflagrate by 2 sec.

388832.name: Scalding Flames
388832.description: Increases the damage of Immolate by 25% and its duration by 3 sec.

388847.name: Rapid Diffusion
388847.description: Rising Sun Kick and Enveloping Mist apply Renewing Mist for 6 seconds to an ally within 40 yds.

388848.name: Crane Vortex
388848.description: Spinning Crane Kick damage increased by 15% and its radius is increased by 15%.

388849.name: Rising Star
388849.description: Rising Sun Kick damage increased by 15% and critical strike damage increased by 10%.

388874.name: Improved Detox
388874.description: Detox additionally removes all Poison and Disease effects.

388903.name: Storm of Swords
388903.description:
Whirlwind has a 7.0 sec cooldown, but deals 80% increased damage. 

Slam has a 9.0 sec cooldown and generates 10 Rage, but deals 100% increased damage.

388933.name: Tenderize
388933.description: Onslaught Enrages you. If you have Slaughtering Strikes, it also grants you 3 stacks of Slaughtering Strikes.

389019.name: Bulletstorm
389019.description:
Damage from Rapid Fire increases the damage of Aimed Shot by 1% for 15 sec, stacking up to 15 times.

New stacks do not refresh duration and are removed upon casting Rapid Fire.

389220.name: Fiery Demise
389220.description: Fiery Brand also increases Fire damage you deal to the target by 15%.

389306.name: Critical Thinking
389306.description: Execute critical strike chance increased by 5% and Execute immediately refunds an additional 10% of the Rage spent.

389367.name: Fel Synergy
389367.description: Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.

389539.name: Sentinel
389539.description:
Call upon the Light and gain 15 stacks of Divine Resolve, increasing your maximum health by 1% and reducing your damage taken by 2% per stack for 20 sec. After 5.0 sec, you will begin to lose 1 stack per second, but each 3 Holy Power spent will delay the loss of your next stack by 1 sec. [Sanctified Wrath: While active, your Judgment generates 1 additional Holy Power, your damage and healing is increased by 20%, and Hammer of Wrath may be cast on any target] [While active, your Judgment generates 1 additional Holy Power] [Avenging Wrath: While active, your damage and healing is increased by 20%, and Hammer of Wrath may be cast on any target]

Combines with Avenging Wrath.

389579.name: Save Them All
389579.description: Your healing is increased by up to 10%, based on the current health of your target. Lower health targets are healed for more.

389590.name: Demonic Resilience
389590.description: Reduces the chance you will be critically struck by 2%. All damage your primary demon takes is reduced by 8%.

389603.name: Unbridled Ferocity
389603.description: Rampage has a 6% chance to grant Recklessness for 4 sec.

389609.name: Abyss Walker
389609.description: Using Demonic Circle: Teleport or your Demonic Gateway reduces all damage you take by 4% for 10 sec.

389623.name: Gorefiend's Resolve
389623.description: Targets resurrected with Soulstone resurrect with 40% additional health and 80% additional mana.

389682.name: Unholy Endurance
389682.description: Increases Lichborne duration by 2 sec and reduces the cooldown by 30 sec.

389687.name: Chaos Theory
389687.description: Blade Dance causes your next Chaos Strike within 8 sec to have a 14-30% increased critical strike chance and will always refund Fury.

389688.name: Tactical Retreat
389688.description: Vengeful Retreat has a 5 sec reduced cooldown and generates 80 Fury over 10 sec.

389693.name: Inner Demon
389693.description: Entering demon form causes your next Chaos Strike to unleash your inner demon, causing it to crash into your target and deal (213% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

389705.name: Fel Flame Fortification
389705.description: You take 10% reduced magic damage while Immolation Aura is active.

389708.name: Darkglare Boon
389708.description: When Fel Devastation finishes fully channeling, it refreshes 15-30% of its cooldown and refunds 15-30 Fury.

389711.name: Soulmonger
389711.description: When consuming a Soul Fragment would heal you above full health it shields you instead, up to a maximum of (Total Health * 10 / 100).

389715.name: Chains of Anger
389715.description: Increases the duration of your Sigils by 2 sec and radius by 2 yds.

389720.name: Calcified Spikes
389720.description: Demon Spikes reduces damage taken by 5% while active.

389724.name: Felfire Fist
389724.description: Activating Infernal Strike out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat places a Sigil of Flame at the target location.

389729.name: Retaliation
389729.description: While Demon Spikes is active, melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take (31.2% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Generates high threat.

389732.name: Down in Flames
389732.description: Fiery Brand has 12 sec reduced cooldown and 1 additional charge.

389763.name: Master of the Glaive
389763.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.

389781.name: Long Night
389781.description: Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.

389783.name: Pitch Black
389783.description: Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.

389794.name: Snowdrift
389794.description:
Summon a strong Blizzard that surrounds you for 6 sec that slows enemies by 70% and deals (20% of Spell Power) Frost damage every 1 sec. 

Enemies that are caught in Snowdrift for 2 sec consecutively become Frozen in ice, stunned for 4 sec.

389824.name: Shattered Restoration
389824.description: The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.

389846.name: Felfire Haste
389846.description:
Havoc
Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.

 Vengeance
Infernal Strike increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.

 Devourer
Shift increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.

389849.name: Lost in Darkness
389849.description: Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.

389942.name: Face Palm
389942.description: Tiger Palm's damage is increased by 100% and reduces the remaining cooldown of your Brews by 0.5 additional sec.

389958.name: Frailty
389958.description:
Enemies struck by Sigil of Flame, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb are afflicted with Frailty for 8 sec.

You heal for 8% of all damage you deal to targets with Frailty.

389976.name: Vulnerability
389976.description: Frailty now also increases all damage you deal to afflicted targets by 3%.

389977.name: Relentless Onslaught
389977.description: Chaos Strike has a 10% chance to trigger a second Chaos Strike.

389978.name: Dancing with Fate
389978.description: The final slash of Blade Dance deals an additional 25% damage.

389985.name: Soulcrush
389985.description: The effects of Frailty are doubled.

390123.name: Berserker's Torment
390123.description: Activating Avatar or Recklessness grants 8 sec of the other.

390135.name: Titan's Torment
390135.description: While Avatar is active Rampage's Rage cost is reduced by 5 and Bloodthirst's cooldown is reduced by 0.1 sec.

390152.name: Collective Anguish
390152.description: Eye Beam summons an allied Vengeance Demon Hunter who casts Fel Devastation, dealing [(26.2% of Attack Power) * 10] Fire damage over 2 sec. Dealing damage heals you for up to [(360% of Attack Power) * 0.384615] health.

390154.name: Serrated Glaive
390154.description: Enemies hit by Chaos Strike or Throw Glaive take 15% increased damage from Chaos Strike and Throw Glaive for 15 sec.

390158.name: Growing Inferno
390158.description: Immolation Aura's damage increases by 10% each time it deals damage.

390163.name: Sigil of Spite
390163.description:
Place a demonic sigil at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Detonates to deal (692% of Attack Power) Chaos damage and shatter up to 3 Soul Fragments from enemies affected by the sigil. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

390166.name: Plague Mastery
390166.description: Critical strike damage of your diseases is increased by 25%

390196.name: Magus of the Dead
390196.description: Dark Transformation and Army of the Dead summon a Magus of the Dead who hurls Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts at your foes for 15 sec.

390218.name: Overflowing Energy
390218.description:
Arcane
Each time your Arcane Barrage fails to critically strike, it gains 10% increased critical strike chance.

Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.

 Fire
Each time your Fireball fails to critically strike, it gains 20% increased critical strike chance.

Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.

 Frost
Each time your Frostbolt fails to critically strike, it gains 10% increased critical strike chance.

Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.

390259.name: Commander of the Dead
390259.description:
Dark Transformation empowers your [Dark Arbiter / Gargoyle], Abomination, Magus and Lesser Ghouls for 30 sec, increasing their damage by 25%.

The duration of Lesser Ghouls are increased by 0% of your Mastery.

390270.name: Coil of Devastation
390270.description: Death Coil deals 10% increased damage and causes the target to take an additional 30% of the direct damage dealt over 4 sec.

390283.name: Superstrain
390283.description: Dread Plague deals damage to an additional nearby enemy at 75% effectiveness and has a chance to grant you 4 Runic Power.

390288.name: Unruly Winds
390288.description: Windfury Weapon has a 100% chance to trigger a third attack.

390370.name: Ashen Catalyst
390370.description: When Lava Lash strikes a target affected by your Flame Shock, its cooldown is reduced by 2.0 sec.

390378.name: Orbital Strike
390378.description:
[Incarnation: Chosen of Elune / Celestial Alignment] blasts all enemies in a targeted area for [(201.4% of Spell Power) * 1.1236] Astral damage and applies Stellar Flare to them.

Reduces the cooldown of [Incarnation: Chosen of Elune / Celestial Alignment] by 60 sec.

 Stellar Flare
Burns the target for (18% of Spell Power) Astral damage, and then an additional (210% of Spell Power) damage over 24 sec. If dispelled, causes (211.5% of Spell Power) damage to the dispeller and blasts them upwards.

Generates 12 Astral Power.

390386.name: Fury of the Aspects
390386.description:
Increases haste by 30% for all party and raid members for 40 sec.

Allies receiving this effect will become Exhausted and unable to benefit from Fury of the Aspects or similar effects again for 10 min.

390428.name: Glass Cannon
390428.description: Increases damage of Fireball, Scorch, and Ignite by 20% but decreases your maximum health by 30%.

390563.name: Hurricane
390563.description:
While Bladestorming or Ravager is active, you gain 5% movement speed and 5% Strength every [ Fury: 1 / 

 Arms,  Protection
1] sec, stacking up to 6 times. Lasts 6 sec. 

Bladestorm cannot be canceled while using Hurricane.

390612.name: Frost Bomb
390612.description:
Places a Frost Bomb on the target. After 5 sec, the bomb explodes, dealing (931% of Spell Power) Frost damage to the target and (465.696% of Spell Power) Frost damage to all other enemies within 10 yards. All affected targets are slowed by 50% for 8 sec. 

If Frost Bomb is dispelled before it explodes, gain a charge of Brain Freeze.

390620.name: Move with Grace
390620.description: Reduces the cooldown of Leap of Faith by 30 sec.

390632.name: Improved Purify
390632.description: Purify additionally removes all Disease effects.

390667.name: Spell Warding
390667.description: Reduces all magic damage taken by 3%.

390670.name: Improved Fade
390670.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fade by (5)) sec.

390676.name: Inspiration
390676.description:
Holy
Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 5% for 15 sec after a critical heal with Flash Heal or Holy Word: Serenity.

 Discipline
Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 5% for 15 sec after a critical heal with Flash Heal or Penance.

 Shadow
Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 5% for 15 sec after a critical heal with Flash Heal.

390684.name: Bright Pupil
390684.description: Reduces the cooldown of Power Word: Radiance by 3 sec.

390685.name: Enduring Luminescence
390685.description: Reduces the cast time of Power Word: Radiance by 30% and causes it to apply Atonement at an additional 10% of its normal duration.

390686.name: Painful Punishment
390686.description: Each Penance bolt extends the duration of Shadow Word: Pain on enemies hit by 1.5 sec.

390689.name: Pain and Suffering
390689.description: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Pain by 8% and increases its duration by 2 sec.

390691.name: Borrowed Time
390691.description: Casting Power Word: Shield increases your Haste by 5% for 4 sec.

390693.name: Inner Focus
390693.description: Flash Heal, Power Word: Shield, Penance, and Power Word: Radiance have a 20% increased chance to critically heal.

390725.name: Sonic Boom
390725.description: Shockwave deals 350% increased damage and will always critical strike.

390772.name: Pouncing Strikes
390772.description:
While stealthed, Rake will also stun the target for 4 sec, and deal 60% increased damage for its full duration.

While stealthed, Shred deals 60% increased damage, has double the chance to critically strike, and generates 1 additional combo point.

390786.name: Weal and Woe
390786.description:
Your Penance bolts increase the absorb of your next Power Word: Shield by 3%.

Stacks up to 10 times.

390808.name: Volatile Flameblood
390808.description:
Immolation Aura has 10% increased critical strike chance and generates 1-5 Fury when it deals critical damage.

This effect may only occur once per 1 sec.

390832.name: Expiation
390832.description: Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death consume 1 sec of Shadow Word: Pain, dealing damage equal to 300% of the amount consumed.

390902.name: Carnivorous Instinct
390902.description: Tiger's Fury's damage bonus is increased by 6%.

390919.name: Sheer Terror
390919.description: Increases the amount of damage required to break your Psychic Scream by 25%.

390954.name: Crisis Management
390954.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Flash Heal and Prayer of Healing by 15%.

390967.name: Prismatic Echoes
390967.description: Increases the healing done by your Mastery: Echo of Light by 5% and your Renew by 13%.

390972.name: Twist of Fate
390972.description: After damaging or healing a target below 35% health, gain 5% increased damage and healing for 8 sec.

390977.name: Prayers of the Virtuous
390977.description: Prayer of Mending jumps 2 additional times.

390992.name: Lightweaver
390992.description:
Flash Heal reduces the cast time of your next Prayer of Healing within 20 sec by 30% and increases its healing done by 18%.

Can accumulate up to 4 charges.

390994.name: Voice of Harmony
390994.description:
Prayer of Mending [Halo: and creating a Halo]reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Serenity by 4 sec.

[Creating a Halo reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Sanctify by 4 sec.
]
Holy Fire reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Chastise by 4 sec.

391054.name: Intercession
391054.description: Petition the Light on the behalf of a fallen ally, restoring spirit to body and allowing them to reenter battle with 60% health and at least 20% mana.

391090.name: Shattered Psyche
391090.description:
Mind Flay damage increases the critical strike chance of Mind Blast by 8%, stacking up to 12 times.

Lasts 10 sec.

391099.name: Dark Evangelism
391099.description: Increases your periodic spell damage by 6%.

391124.name: Restitution
391124.description: After Spirit of Redemption expires, you will revive at up to 100% health, based on your healing done during Spirit of Redemption. After reviving, you cannot benefit from Spirit of Redemption for 10 min.

391142.name: Zealot's Paragon
391142.description: Hammer of Wrath and Judgment deal 10% additional damage and extend the duration of [Echo: Crusade] [Avenging Crusader] [Sentinel / Avenging Wrath] by 0.5 sec.

391151.name: Mastermind
391151.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Mind Blast, Mind Flay, and Shadow Word: Death by 4% and increases their critical strike damage by 20%.

391174.name: Berserk: Heart of the Lion
391174.description: Reduces the cooldown of [Incarnation: Avatar of Ashamane / Berserk] by 60 sec.

391178.name: Roaring Fire
391178.description: Fel Devastation heals you for up to 50% more, based on your missing health.

391186.name: Say Your Prayers
391186.description: Prayer of Mending has a 15% chance to not consume a charge when it jumps to a new target.

391189.name: Burning Wound
391189.description:
[Demon Blades / Demon's Bite] and Throw Glaive leave open wounds on your enemies, dealing (73.45% of Attack Power) Chaos damage over 15 sec and increasing damage taken from your Immolation Aura by 35%.

May be applied to up to 3 targets.

391209.name: Prayerful Litany
391209.description: The primary target of Prayer of Healing is healed for 125% more.

391228.name: Maddening Touch
391228.description: Vampiric Touch deals 20% additional damage and has a chance to generate 1 Insanity each time it deals damage.

391233.name: Divine Service
391233.description: Prayer of Mending heals 4% more for each bounce remaining.

391271.name: Honed Reflexes
391271.description:
Arms
Cooldown of Die By the Sword, Intervene, Interpose, Spell Reflection, Storm Bolt, and Pummel reduced by 10%.

Successfully interrupting an enemy increases the damage you deal to them by 5% for 10 sec.

 Fury
Cooldown of Enraged Regeneration, Intervene, Interpose, Spell Reflection, Storm Bolt, and Pummel reduced by 10%.

Successfully interrupting an enemy increases the damage you deal to them by 5% for 10 sec.

 Protection
Cooldown of Shield Wall, Intervene, Spell Reflection, Storm Bolt, and Pummel reduced by 10%.

Successfully interrupting an enemy increases the damage you deal to them by 5% for 10 sec.

391275.name: Accelerated Blade
391275.description: Throw Glaive deals 60% increased damage, reduced by 30% for each previous enemy hit.

391284.name: Tormented Spirits
391284.description:
Your Shadow Word: Pain damage has a chance to create Shadowy Apparitions that float towards all targets afflicted by your Vampiric Touch. 

Critical strikes increase the chance by 100%.

391330.name: Meridian Strikes
391330.description:
The cooldown of Touch of Death is reduced by 45 sec.

Touch of Death deals an additional 15% damage.

391347.name: Rip and Tear
391347.description: Applying Rip to a target also applies a Tear that deals 15% of the new Rip's damage over 8 sec.

391370.name: Drinking Horn Cover
391370.description: The duration of Zenith is extended by 5 sec.

391381.name: Desperate Times
391381.description: Increases healing by 10% on friendly targets at or below 50% health.

391383.name: Hardened Soles
391383.description: Blackout Kick critical strike chance increased by 10% and critical damage increased by 18%.

391386.name: Blood Feast
391386.description: Anti-Magic Shell heals you for 100% of the damage it absorbs.

391395.name: Iron Heart
391395.description: Blood Shield's duration is increased by 2 sec and it absorbs 20% more damage.

391397.name: Erratic Felheart
391397.description:
Havoc
The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec.

 Vengeance
The cooldown of Infernal Strike is reduced by 1.0 sec.

 Devourer
The cooldown of Shift is reduced by 1.0 sec.

391398.name: Bloodshot
391398.description: While Blood Shield is active, you deal 8% increased damage.

391399.name: Surge of Insanity
391399.description: Mind Flay damage increased by 15% and Insanity generation increased by 30%.

391409.name: Aldrachi Design
391409.description: Increases your chance to parry by 3%.

391458.name: Sanguine Ground
391458.description: You deal 6% more damage and receive 5% more healing while standing in your Death and Decay.

391477.name: Coagulopathy
391477.description: Enemies affected by Blood Plague take 5% increased damage from you and Death Strike increases the damage of your Blood Plague by 10% for 15 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

391517.name: Umbilicus Eternus
391517.description: After Vampiric Blood expires, you absorb damage equal to 5 times the damage your Blood Plague dealt during Vampiric Blood.

391528.name: Convoke the Spirits
391528.description:
Call upon the spirits for an eruption of energy, channeling a rapid flurry of 16 / Ursoc's Guidance: 12 / Elune's Guidance: 12 / Astral Insight: 20 Druid spells and abilities over 4 sec. [Ashamane's Guidance: Chance to use an exceptional spell or ability is increased]

You will cast Wild Growth, Swiftmend, Moonfire, Wrath, Regrowth, Rejuvenation, Rake, and Thrash on appropriate nearby targets, favoring your current shapeshift form.

391546.name: March of Darkness
391546.description: Death's Advance grants an additional 25% movement speed over the first 3 sec. [Price of Progress: Movement speed while using Price of Progress is increased by 5%]

391548.name: Ashamane's Guidance
391548.description:
Incarnation: Avatar of Ashamane
Incarnation: Avatar of Ashamane's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

 Convoke the Spirits
Convoke the Spirits' cooldown is reduced by 50% and its duration and number of spells cast is reduced by 25%. Convoke the Spirits has an increased chance to use an exceptional spell or ability.

391559.name: Surging Shots
391559.description: Rapid Fire deals 35% additional damage, and Aimed Shot has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Rapid Fire.

391566.name: Insidious Chill
391566.description: Your auto-attacks reduce the target's auto-attack speed by 5% for 30 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

391571.name: Gloom Ward
391571.description: Absorbs are 15% more effective on you.

391572.name: Uproar
391572.description: Thunderous Roar's cooldown reduced by 45 sec.

391683.name: Dancing Blades
391683.description: Odyn's Fury increases your auto-attack damage and speed by 30% for 10 sec.

391700.name: Double-Clawed Rake
391700.description: Rake also applies Rake to 1 additional nearby target.

391709.name: Rampant Ferocity
391709.description: Ferocious Bite also deals (35.94% of Attack Power) damage per combo point spent to all nearby enemies. Spending extra Energy on Ferocious Bite increases damage dealt by up to 100%. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

391872.name: Tiger's Tenacity
391872.description:
Tiger's Fury causes your next 3 finishing moves to restore 1 combo point.

Tiger's Fury also increases the periodic damage of your bleeds by an additional 10% for their full duration.

391875.name: Frantic Momentum
391875.description: Finishing moves have a 3% chance per combo point spent to grant 10% Haste for 6 sec.

391881.name: Apex Predator's Craving
391881.description: Rip damage has a 5.0% chance to make your next Ferocious Bite free and deal the maximum damage.

392053.name: Piercing Fangs
392053.description: While Bestial Wrath is active, your pet's critical damage dealt is increased by 35%.

392099.name: Nurturing Dormancy
392099.description: When your Rejuvenation heals a full health target, its duration is increased by 2 sec, up to a maximum total increase of 6 sec per cast.

392116.name: Regenerative Heartwood
392116.description: Allies protected by your Ironbark also receive 75% of the healing from each of your active Rejuvenations and Ironbark's duration is increased by 4 sec.

392124.name: Embrace of the Dream
392124.description: Wild Growth momentarily shifts your mind into the Emerald Dream, instantly healing all allies affected by your Rejuvenation or Regrowth for (216% of Spell Power).

392167.name: Everbloom
392167.description: Lifebloom stacks every 5 sec, stacking up to 3 times.

392221.name: Waking Dream
392221.description: Ysera's Gift now heals every 4 sec and its healing is increased by 8% for each of your active Rejuvenations.

392256.name: Harmonious Blooming
392256.description: Lifebloom counts for 3 stacks of Mastery: Harmony.

392288.name: Nature's Splendor
392288.description: The healing bonus to Regrowth from Nature's Swiftness is increased by 35%.

392302.name: Power of the Archdruid
392302.description: Soul of the Forest now causes your next Rejuvenation or Regrowth to apply to 2 additional allies within 20 yards of the target.

392325.name: Verdancy
392325.description: When Lifebloom blooms, up to 3 targets within your Efflorescence are healed for (94.8672% of Spell Power).

392352.name: Storm's Wrath
392352.description: Increase the chance for Mastery: Enhanced Elements to trigger Windfury and Stormsurge by 150%.

392356.name: Reforestation
392356.description: Every 4 casts of Swiftmend grants you Incarnation: Tree of Life for 10 sec.

392378.name: Improved Nature's Cure
392378.description: Nature's Cure additionally removes all Curse and Poison effects.

392384.name: Fatal Concoction
392384.description: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 20%.

392410.name: Verdant Infusion
392410.description: Swiftmend no longer consumes a heal over time effect, and extends the duration of your heal over time effects on the target by 8 sec.

392507.name: Deathspeaker
392507.description:
Shadow Word: Death damage increased by 25%.

Shadow Word: Death gains its damage and talent bonuses against targets below 35% health instead of 20%.

392536.name: Ashen Juggernaut
392536.description: Execute increases the critical strike chance of Execute by 10% for 15 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

392566.name: Enfeeble
392566.description: Your ghoul's attacks have a chance to apply Enfeeble, reducing the enemies movement speed by 30% and the damage they deal to you by 12% for 6 sec.

392777.name: Cruel Strikes
392777.description: Critical strike chance increased by 1% and critical strike damage of Execute increased by 5%.

392792.name: Frothing Berserker
392792.description:
Arms
Mortal Strike and Cleave have a 20% chance to immediately refund 10% of the Rage spent.

 Fury
Rampage has a 20% chance to immediately refund 10% of the Rage spent.

 Protection
Revenge has a 20% chance to immediately refund 50% of the Rage spent.

392900.name: Vigorous Expulsion
392900.description: Expel Harm's healing increased by 5% and critical strike chance increased by 15%.

392902.name: Resplendent Light
392902.description: Holy Light heals up to 5 targets within 12 yds for 8% of its healing.

392907.name: Inflorescence of the Sunwell
392907.description: Infusion of Light has 1 additional charge.

392910.name: Profound Rebuttal
392910.description: Expel Harm's critical healing is increased by 50%.

392911.name: Unwavering Spirit
392911.description: The cooldown of Aura Mastery is reduced by 30 sec.

392928.name: Tirion's Devotion
392928.description: Lay on Hands' cooldown is reduced by 1.0 sec per Holy Power spent.

392931.name: Cruelty
392931.description: While Enraged, Bloodthirst and Raging Blow deal 5% increased damage.

392936.name: Wrath and Fury
392936.description: Raging Blow deals 15% increased damage and while Enraged, Raging Blow has a 10% increased chance to instantly reset its own cooldown.

392938.name: Veneration
392938.description:
Judgment grants an absorb shield on up to 5 injured allies for 8% of the damage done, split evenly among them.

Flash of Light and Holy Light critical strikes reset the cooldown of Judgment.

392950.name: Icebreaker
392950.description: When empowered by Rime, Howling Blast deals 30% increased damage to your primary target.

392958.name: Glory of the Dawn
392958.description: Rising Sun Kick has a chance equal to 100% of your haste to trigger a second time, dealing (50% of Attack Power) Physical damage and restoring 1 Chi.

392961.name: Imbued Infusions
392961.description: Consuming Infusion of Light reduces the cooldown of Holy Shock by 1.0 sec.

392966.name: Spell Block
392966.description: You are able to block spells for 30 sec.

392979.name: Jade Ignition
392979.description: Spinning Crane Kick detonates into a Chi Explosion, dealing (180% of Attack Power) Nature damage to all enemies within 8 yards, reduced beyond 5 targets.

392982.name: Shadowboxing Treads
392982.description: Blackout Kick damage increased by 5% and strikes an additional 2 targets at 80% effectiveness.

392983.name: Strike of the Windlord
392983.description: Strike with both fists at all enemies in front of you, dealing [(1008% of Attack Power) + (504% of Attack Power)] Physical damage and reducing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec. Deals reduced damage to secondary targets.

392985.name: Thunderfist
392985.description:
Strike of the Windlord and Whirling Dragon Punch grant you 4 stacks of Thunderfist and an additional stack for each additional enemy struck. 

Thunderfist discharges upon melee strikes, dealing (161% of Attack Power) Nature damage.

392986.name: Xuen's Bond
392986.description: Invoke Xuen, the White Tiger's damage is increased by 30% and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

392988.name: Divine Image
392988.description:
Your Holy Words summon an image of a Naaru at your side. For 9 sec, whenever you cast a healing or damaging spell, the Naaru will cast a similar spell.

If an image has already been summoned, that image is empowered instead.

392993.name: Xuen's Battlegear
392993.description:
Rising Sun Kick critical strikes reduce the cooldown of Fists of Fury by 4 sec.

Spinning Crane Kick reduces the cooldown of Fists of Fury by 0.5 sec for each unique target struck, up to 2.5 sec.

The critical strike chance of Rising Sun Kick is increased by 20%.

392994.name: Path of Jade
392994.description: Increases the damage of Jadefire Stomp by 10% per target hit by that damage, up to a maximum of 50% additional damage.

393024.name: Improved Cleanse
393024.description: Cleanse additionally removes all Disease and Poison effects.

393029.name: Furious Throws
393029.description: Throw Glaive now costs 25 Fury and throws a second glaive at the target.

393071.name: Strength in Adversity
393071.description: For each target hit by Avenger's Shield, gain 3% parry for 15 sec.

393114.name: Improved Ardent Defender
393114.description: Ardent Defender reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

393357.name: Tranquil Spirit
393357.description: When you consume a Healing Sphere, you clear 5% of your currently Staggered damage.

393371.name: Cenarius' Guidance
393371.description:
Incarnation: Tree of Life
During Incarnation: Tree of Life, you summon a Grove Guardian every 10 sec. The cooldown of Incarnation: Tree of Life is reduced by 5.0 sec when Grove Guardians fade.

 Convoke the Spirits
Convoke the Spirits' cooldown is reduced by 50% and its duration and number of spells cast is reduced by 25%. Convoke the Spirits has an increased chance to use an exceptional spell or ability.

393414.name: Ursoc's Guidance
393414.description:
Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc: 
Every 25 Rage you spend reduces the cooldown of Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc by 1 sec.

 Convoke the Spirits: 
Convoke the Spirits' cooldown is reduced by 50% and its duration and number of spells cast is reduced by 25%. Convoke the Spirits has an increased chance to use an exceptional spell or ability.

393427.name: Flashing Claws
393427.description:
Thrash has a 10% chance to trigger an additional Thrash.

Thrash stacks 1 additional time.

393516.name: Pretense of Instability
393516.description: Drinking a Brew grants you 10% dodge for 5 sec.

393611.name: Ursoc's Endurance
393611.description: Increases the duration of Barkskin and Ironfur by 2.0 sec.

393618.name: Reinforced Fur
393618.description: Ironfur increases armor by an additional 15% and Barkskin reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

393760.name: Umbral Embrace
393760.description: Wrath and Starfire have a 20% chance to cause your next Wrath or Starfire cast during an Eclipse to become Astral and deal 75% additional damage.

393870.name: Improved Flash Heal
393870.description: Increases healing done by Flash Heal by 15%.

393933.name: War Orders
393933.description: Barbed Shot deals 10% increased damage, and applying Barbed Shot reduces the cooldown of Kill Command by 3.0 sec.

393940.name: Starweaver
393940.description: Starsurge has a 20% chance to make Starfall free. Starfall has a 40% chance to make Starsurge free.

393950.name: Bloodcraze
393950.description: Raging Blow increases the damage of your next Bloodthirst by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

393954.name: Rattle the Stars
393954.description: Starsurge and Starfall deal 8% increased damage and their cost is reduced by 10%.

393970.name: Soothing Darkness
393970.description: You are healed for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec after activating Vanish.

393991.name: Elune's Guidance
393991.description:
Incarnation: Chosen of Elune
Reduces the Astral Power cost of Starsurge by 10, and the Astral Power cost of Starfall by 12.

 Convoke the Spirits
Cooldown is reduced by 50% and its duration and number of spells cast is reduced by 25%. Convoke the Spirits has an increased chance to use an exceptional spell or ability.

394046.name: Power of Goldrinn
394046.description: Starsurge has a chance to summon the Spirit of Goldrinn, which immediately deals [(192.7% of Spell Power) * 1.1236] Astral damage to the target.

394048.name: Balance of All Things
394048.description: Entering Eclipse increases your critical strike chance with Arcane or Nature spells by 20%, decreasing by 2% every 1 sec.

394062.name: Rend
394062.description:
Wounds the target, causing (39.162% of Attack Power) Physical damage instantly and an additional (105.225% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 15 sec. [Thunder Clap: Thunder Clap affects 5 nearby targets with Rend.
]

394065.name: Denizen of the Dream
394065.description: Your Moonfire and Sunfire have a chance to summon a Faerie Dragon to assist you in battle for 30 sec.

394094.name: Sundered Firmament
394094.description: Every other Eclipse creates a Fury of Elune at 25% effectiveness that follows your current target for 8 sec.

394110.name: Escape from Reality
394110.description: After you use Transcendence: Transfer, you can use Transcendence: Transfer again within 10 sec, ignoring its cooldown.

394121.name: Radiant Moonlight
394121.description:
New Moon, Half Moon, and Full Moon deal 25% increased damage. Full Moon becomes Full Moon once more before resetting to New Moon.

Fury of Elune deals 50% increased damage and its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

394123.name: Fatal Touch
394123.description: Touch of Death's cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.

394311.name: Instigate
394311.description:
Devastate deals 20% increased damage and generates 2 Rage.

Devastator deals 10% increased damage and generates 2 Rage.

394320.name: Secret Stratagem
394320.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

394321.name: Devious Stratagem
394321.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

394329.name: Titanic Rage
394329.description: Odyn's Fury's Enrages you, deals 10% increased damage and grants you 4 stacks of Whirlwind.

394931.name: Thrill Seeking
394931.description:
Outlaw
Grappling Hook has 1 additional charge.

 Assassination,  Subtlety
Shadowstep has 1 additional charge.

395152.name: Ebon Might
395152.description:
Increase all damage dealing allies' primary stat by (8 + 0)% of your own and increase your own damage by 20% for 10 sec.

Ebon Might will split its effect when applied to more than 2 other allies.

Eruption, [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath], and your empower spells extend the duration of these effects.

395160.name: Eruption
395160.description: Cause a violent eruption beneath an enemy's feet, dealing (280% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage split between them and nearby enemies. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 1.0 sec]

395422.name: Improved Adrenaline Rush
395422.description: Generate full combo points when you gain Adrenaline Rush.

395446.name: Soul Sigils
395446.description: Afflicting an enemy with a Sigil generates 1 Soul Fragment.

396187.name: Essence Burst
396187.description: Your Living Flame has a 20% chance, and your Azure Strike has a 15% chance, to make your next Eruption [Dream of Spring: or Emerald Blossom]cost no Essence. [Essence Attunement: Stacks 1 times]

396286.name: Upheaval
396286.description:
Gather earthen power beneath your enemy's feet and send them hurtling upwards, dealing (430% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage to the target and nearby enemies. [Sands of Time: Increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 2 sec]

Empowering expands the area of effect.

I:   3 yd radius.

II:  6 yd radius.

III: 9 yd radius.

396749.name: Reckless Abandon
396749.description:
Activating Recklessness generates 50 Rage and while Recklessness is active, Raging Blow and Bloodthirst are upgraded to Crushing Blow and Bloodbath.

 Crushing Blow
Deals increased damage and deals 20% additional critical strike damage.

 Bloodbath
Deals increased damage and wounds the target to suffer (60% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 6 sec. Using Bloodbath on a target affected by Bloodbath extends the bleed by 6 sec.

397103.name: Defender's Aegis
397103.description: Shield Wall gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 60 sec.

397768.name: Inner Peace
397768.description: Increases maximum Energy by 30. Tiger Palm's Energy cost reduced by 5.

399226.name: Burst of Life
399226.description: When Life Cocoon expires, it releases a burst of mist that restores (806% of Spell Power) health to 3 nearby allies.

399491.name: Sheilun's Gift
399491.description:
Draws in all nearby clouds of mist, healing the friendly target and up to 2 nearby allies for (416.96% of Spell Power) and an additional [(416.96% of Spell Power) * 5 / 100] per cloud absorbed.

A cloud of mist is generated every 8 sec while in combat.

400053.name: Veil of Pride
400053.description: Increases Sheilun's Gift cloud of mist generation to every 4 sec.

400059.name: Cosmic Rapidity
400059.description: Your Moonfire and Sunfire deal damage 20% more frequently, also increasing the rate that Shooting Stars fall.

400129.name: Forestwalk
400129.description: Casting Regrowth increases your movement speed and healing received by 8% for 6 sec.

400140.name: Incessant Tempest
400140.description: Reduces the cooldown of Typhoon by 5 sec.

400142.name: Gale Winds
400142.description: Increases Typhoon's radius by 20% and its range by 5 yds.

400205.name: Overpowering Finish
400205.description: Overpower deals 15% additional damage to targets below 35% health.

400254.name: Raze
400254.description: Strike with the might of Ursoc, dealing (212.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage to your target and (115.6% of Attack Power) to all other enemies in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

400278.name: Moonless Night
400278.description: Your direct damage melee abilities against enemies afflicted by Moonfire cause them to burn for an additional 20% Arcane damage.

400320.name: Circle of Life and Death
400320.description: Your damage over time effects deal their damage in 20% less time, and your healing over time effects in 15% less time.

400456.name: Salvo
400456.description:
Volley now also applies Explosive Shot to up to 2 targets hit.

 Explosive Shot
Fires an explosive shot at your target. After 3 sec, the shot will explode, dealing (582% of Attack Power) Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

400533.name: Wild Synthesis
400533.description: Grove Guardians, Efflorescence, and your other summons heal for 30% more.

400629.name: Spirit of the Ox
400629.description:
Blackout Kick has a chance to summon a Healing Sphere.

Healing Sphere:
Summon a Healing Sphere visible only to you. Moving through this Healing Sphere heals you for (330% of Attack Power).

400803.name: Strength of Arms
400803.description:
Overpower and Slam damage increased by 5% and critical strike damage increased by 5%.
Critical strike chance of Slam and Overpower increased by 5%.

400804.name: Unbreakable Stride
400804.description: Reduces the duration of movement slowing effects 30%.

402912.name: Righteous Cause
402912.description: Each Holy Power spent has a 6% chance to reset the cooldown of Blade of Justice [Light Within: and increase the damage of its next cast by 0% / .]

402964.name: Sanctified Plates
402964.description:
Holy,  Retribution
Armor increased by 10%, Stamina increased by 5% and damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%.

 Protection
Armor increased by 5%, Stamina increased by 8% and damage taken from area of effect attacks reduced by 3%.

402971.name: Jurisdiction
402971.description:
[Final Verdict / Templar's Verdict] and Blade of Justice deal 10% increased damage.

The range of [Final Verdict: Final Verdict and]Blade of Justice is increased to 20 yds.

403010.name: Blessed Champion
403010.description: Crusader Strike and Judgment hit an additional 4 targets but deal 25% reduced damage to secondary targets.

403026.name: Burning Crusade
403026.description: Your damage over time effects deal 10% more damage.

403208.name: Draconic Attunements
403208.description:
Learn to attune yourself to the essence of the Black or Bronze Dragonflights:

Black Attunement: You and your 4 nearest allies have 2% increased maximum health.

Bronze Attunement:You and your 4 nearest allies have 10% increased movement speed.

403479.name: Lightforged Blessing
403479.description: Divine Storm heals you and up to 2 nearby allies for (100% of Attack Power).

403495.name: Judgment of Justice
403495.description:
Judgment deals 10% increased damage and increases your movement speed by 10% for 5 sec.

If you have Greater Judgment, Judgment slows enemies by 30% for 8 sec.

403521.name: Tranquil Mind
403521.description: Increases Omen of Clarity's chance to activate Clearcasting to 5% and Clearcasting can stack 1 additional time.

403530.name: Punishment
403530.description:
Retribution
Successfully interrupting an enemy with Rebuke casts an extra Crusader Strike.

 Holy
Successfully interrupting an enemy with Rebuke casts an extra Holy Shock.

 Protection
Successfully interrupting an enemy with Rebuke casts an extra Crusader Strike.

403631.name: Breath of Eons
403631.description:
Fly to the targeted location, exposing a Temporal Wound on enemies in your path for 10 sec [Sands of Time: and granting Ebon Might for 5 sec / .]

Removes roots and grants immunity to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying.

 Temporal Wound
15% of damage dealt by allies affected by Ebon Might is copied as additional Arcane damage to enemies after 10 sec.

Damage is reduced if Ebon Might affects more than 2 other allies.

403664.name: Blades of Light
403664.description: [Templar Strikes: Templar Strikes] [Crusading Strikes: Crusading Strikes / Crusader Strike, ]Judgment and Blade of Justice deal 10% increased damage.

403745.name: Improved Blade of Justice
403745.description: Blade of Justice now has 2 charges.

403826.name: Blade of Vengeance
403826.description:
Blade of Justice now hits nearby enemies for (58.5195% of Attack Power) Holy damage. 

Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

403876.name: Divine Protection
403876.description: Reduces all damage you take by 20% for 8 sec [Shield of Vengeance: and casts Shield of Vengeance]. Usable while stunned.

404195.name: Defy Fate
404195.description:
Fatal attacks are diverted into a nearby timeline, preventing the damage, and your death, in this one.

The release of temporal energy restores [(600% of Spell Power) * (3)] health to you, and (600% of Spell Power) to 4 nearby allies, over 9 sec. Healing starts high and declines over the duration.

May only occur once every 6 min.

404357.name: Guided Prayer
404357.description:
When your health is brought below 25%, you instantly cast a free Word of Glory at 60% effectiveness on yourself.

Cannot occur more than once every 60 sec.

404408.name: Legacy of Wisdom
404408.description: Sheilun's Gift heals 2 additional allies and its cast time is reduced by 0.5 sec.

404436.name: Light of Justice
404436.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blade of Justice by 2 sec.

404512.name: Highlord's Wrath
404512.description: Mastery: Highlord's Judgment is 50% more effective on Judgment and Hammer of Wrath. Judgment applies an additional stack of Greater Judgment if it is known.

404521.name: Rampant Growth
404521.description: Regrowth's healing over time is increased by 100%, and it also applies to the target of your Lifebloom.

404542.name: Crusading Strikes
404542.description: Crusader Strike replaces your auto-attacks and deals (234.731% of Attack Power) $?Physical damage, but you auto-attack 20% slower.

404977.name: Time Skip
404977.description: Surge forward in time, causing your cooldowns to recover 1000% faster for 2 sec.

405278.name: Boundless Judgment
405278.description: Judgment has a 50% increased chance to trigger Mastery: Highlord's Judgment.

405355.name: Seething Flames
405355.description: Wake of Ashes deals significantly reduced damage to secondary targets, but now causes you to lash out 2 extra times for (227.174% of Attack Power) Radiant damage.

406064.name: Art of War
406064.description:
Your auto attacks have a 15% chance to reset the cooldown of Blade of Justice [Light Within: and increase the damage of its next cast by 0% / .]

Critical strikes increase the chance by an additional 10%.

406087.name: Calm the Wolf
406087.description: Activate to control your worgen instincts and automatically assume human form when you leave combat.

406101.name: Faith's Armor
406101.description:
Protection
Shield of the Righteous grants 5% bonus armor for 4.5 sec.

 Holy,  Retribution
