Word of Glory grants 20% bonus armor for 4.5 sec.

406154.name: Heart of the Crusader
406154.description: Crusader Strike and auto-attacks deal 10% increased damage and deal 10% increased critical strike damage.

406157.name: Judge, Jury and Executioner
406157.description:
Holy Power spending abilities deal 5% increased damage.

After casting Execution Sentence, your next 1 Holy Power ability will refund its Holy Power cost.

406468.name: Lightforged Blessing
406468.description: [Denounce / Shield of the Righteous] heals you and up to 2 nearby allies for (100% of Attack Power).

406545.name: Holy Flames
406545.description: You deal 5% increased Holy damage to targets burning from your Expurgation.

406646.name: Templar Strikes
406646.description:
Crusader Strike loses a charge but is now a combo ability.

Templar Strike slashes an enemy for (125% of Attack Power) Radiant damage and gets followed up by Templar Slash that deals (143.75% of Attack Power) Radiant damage. Templar Slash always critically strikes.

406659.name: Ricocheting Pyroclast
406659.description: Eruption deals 30% more damage per enemy struck, up to 150%.

406732.name: Spatial Paradox
406732.description:
Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.

406788.name: Thought Harvester
406788.description: Mind Blast gains an additional charge.

406872.name: Divine Wrath
406872.description: Increases the duration of Avenging Wrath or Crusade by 4 sec.

406890.name: Wild Surges
406890.description: Your Wrath and Starfire chance to critically strike is increased by 10% and they generate 2 additional Astral Power.

406904.name: Volcanism
406904.description: Eruption's Essence cost is reduced by 1.

406907.name: Regenerative Chitin
406907.description: Blistering Scales no longer loses charges and deals 20% more damage.

407028.name: Sticky Tar Bomb
407028.description:
Throw a Sticky Tar Bomb that coats your target's weapons with tar, disarming them for 4 sec. 

After 4 sec, Sticky Tar Bomb explodes onto nearby enemies. Other enemies that are hit by the explosion are affected by Sticky Tar Bomb but this effect cannot spread further.

407067.name: Rush of Light
407067.description: The critical strikes of your Holy Power generating abilities grant you 5% Haste for 10 sec.

407243.name: Aspects' Favor
407243.description:
Obsidian Scales activates Black Attunement, and amplifies it to increase maximum health by 4.0% for 12 sec.

Hover activates Bronze Attunement, and amplifies it to increase movement speed by 25% for 4 sec.

407412.name: Bloody Frenzy
407412.description: Bestial Wrath causes your Barbed Shot to deal damage 100% faster for 10 sec.

407430.name: Voidtouched
407430.description: Increases your Shadow Word: Madness damage by 6% and increases your maximum Insanity by 50.

407469.name: Spectral Horrors
407469.description: Shadow Apparitions deal 30% increased damage to targets affected by your Shadow Word: Madness.

407470.name: Mind's Eye
407470.description: Reduces the Insanity cost of Shadow Word: Madness by 5.

407581.name: Icy Feet
407581.description:
When your Frost Nova or Water Elemental's Freeze is dispelled or removed, become immune to snares for 3 sec. 

This effect can only occur once every 10 sec.

407814.name: Pupil of Alexstrasza
407814.description: When cast at an enemy, Living Flame strikes 1 additional enemy for 100% damage.

407866.name: Plot the Future
407866.description: [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] grants you Fury of the Aspects for 15 sec after you land, without causing Exhaustion.

407869.name: Anachronism
407869.description: Prescience has a 35% chance to grant Essence Burst.

407876.name: Accretion
407876.description: Eruption reduces the remaining cooldown of Upheaval by 1.0 sec.

408002.name: Tectonic Locus
408002.description: Upheaval deals 50% increased damage to the primary target, and launches them higher.

408004.name: Momentum Shift
408004.description: Consuming Essence Burst grants you 5% Intellect for 6 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.

408083.name: Font of Magic
408083.description: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1, and they reach maximum empower level 20% faster.

408233.name: Bestow Weyrnstone
408233.description:
Conjure a pair of Weyrnstones, one for your target ally and one for yourself. Only one ally may bear your Weyrnstone at a time.

A Weyrnstone can be activated by the bearer to transport them to the other Weyrnstone's location, if they are within 100 yds.

408459.name: Divine Purpose
408459.description: Holy Power spending abilities have a 10% chance to make your next Holy Power spending ability free and deal 10% increased damage and healing.

408543.name: Seismic Slam
408543.description: Landslide causes enemies who are mid-air to be slammed to the ground, stunning them for 4 sec and Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

408557.name: Phase Shift
408557.description:
Step into the shadows when you cast Fade, avoiding all attacks and spells for 1 sec.

Interrupt effects are not affected by Phase Shift.

408775.name: Ignition Rush
408775.description: Essence Burst reduces the cast time of Eruption by 40% and increases its damage by 20%.

408853.name: Absolute Faith
408853.description: Leap of Faith also pulls the spirit of the 3 furthest allies within 40 yards and shields you and the affected allies for [Spell Power * 7.5 * 0.9375 * (1 + Versatility) + 1].

409044.name: Distorted Reality
409044.description: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Madness by 20% and causes it to deal its damage over 12 sec, but increases its Insanity cost by 5.

409267.name: Motes of Possibility
409267.description: Eruption has a 25% chance to form a mote of diverted essence near you. Allies who comes in contact with the mote gain a random buff from your arsenal.

409293.name: Burrow
409293.description:
Burrow beneath the ground, becoming unattackable, removing movement impairing effects, and increasing your movement speed by 50% for 5 sec.

When the effect ends, enemies within 6 yards are knocked in the air and take [Spell Power * 6.6 * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage.

409311.name: Prescience
409311.description:
Grant an ally the gift of foresight, increasing their critical strike chance by 3% [Fate Mirror: and occasionally copying their damage and healing spells at 15% power]for 18 sec.

Affects the nearest ally within 25 yds, preferring damage dealers with their cooldowns active, if you do not have an ally targeted.

409329.name: Reactive Hide
409329.description: Each time Blistering Scales explodes it deals 15% more damage for 12 sec, stacking 10 times.

409676.name: Chrono Ward
409676.description: When allies deal damage with Temporal Wounds, they gain a shield for 100% of the damage dealt. Absorption cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

409835.name: Impish Instincts
409835.description:
Taking direct Physical damage reduces the cooldown of Demonic Circle by 3 sec.

Cannot occur more than once every 5 sec.

410126.name: Searing Glare
410126.description: Call upon the light to blind enemy players in a 25 yd cone, causing enemies to miss their spells and attacks for 4 sec.

410248.name: Master Shepherd
410248.description:
While an enemy player is affected by your Polymorph or Mass Polymorph, your movement speed is increased by 25% and your Versatility is increased by 12%. 

Additionally, Polymorph and Mass Polymorph no longer heal enemies.

410253.name: Perilous Fate
410253.description: Breath of Eons reduces enemies' movement speed by 70%, and reduces their attack speed by 50%, for 10 sec.

410260.name: Overlord
410260.description: [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] casts an Eruption at the first 3 enemies struck. These Eruptions have a 100% chance to create a Mote of Possibility.

410261.name: Inferno's Blessing
410261.description: Fire Breath grants the inferno's blessing for 8 sec to you and a nearby ally, giving their damaging attacks and spells a high chance to deal an additional [$INT * 2.69 * 1 * (1 + Versatility) * Percent Damage] Fire damage.

410301.name: Bloodforged Armor
410301.description: Death Strike reduces all Physical damage taken by 25% for 4 sec.

410320.name: Spellwarden
410320.description: Anti-Magic Shell is now usable on allies and its cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

410346.name: Hot Trub
410346.description: Purifying Brew deals 20% of cleared damage split among nearby enemies. After clearing 100% of your maximum health in Stagger damage, your next Breath of Fire incapacitates targets for 4 sec.

410352.name: Stretch Time
410352.description: While flying during [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath], 100% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 10 sec.

410544.name: Dying Stars
410544.description: Enemies that dispel your Moonfire or Sunfire suffer 25% additional damage from their effects for 12 sec. If already vulnerable, 50% of the remaining duration is applied to the dispeller.

410598.name: Soul Rip
410598.description:
Fracture the soul of up to 3 target players within 20 yds into the shadows, reducing their damage done by 25% and healing received by 25% for 8 sec. Souls are fractured up to 20 yds from the player's location.

Players can retrieve their souls to remove this effect.

410643.name: Molten Blood
410643.description: When cast, Blistering Scales grants the target a shield that absorbs up to [Spell Power * 12 * (1 + Versatility)] damage for 30 sec based on their missing health. Lower health targets gain a larger shield.

410685.name: Symbiotic Bloom
410685.description: Emerald Blossom increases targets' healing received by 3% for 10 sec.

410687.name: Prolong Life
410687.description: Your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Symbiotic Bloom.

410784.name: Echoing Strike
410784.description: Azure Strike deals 15% increased damage and has a 10% chance per target hit to echo, casting again.

410939.name: Ethereal Blink
410939.description: Blink and Shimmer apply Slow at 100% effectiveness to all enemies you Blink through. For each enemy you Blink through, the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by 1 sec, up to 5 sec.

411164.name: Event Horizon
411164.description: Eternity Surge's cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.

411165.name: Eye of Infinity
411165.description: Eternity Surge deals 15% increased damage to your primary target.

411212.name: Font of Magic
411212.description: Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1, and they reach maximum empower level 20% faster.

411266.name: Master Shapeshifter
411266.description:
Your abilities are amplified based on your current shapeshift form, granting an additional effect.

 Caster Form
Rejuvenation heals for 30% more and generates 8 Astral Power.

 Bear Form
Ironfur grants 30% additional armor and generates 12 Astral Power.

 Cat Form
Rip, Ferocious Bite, and Maim deal 60% additional damage and generate 60 Astral Power when cast with 5 combo points.

411764.name: Enduring Rage
411764.description:
You have a chance to become Enraged while you are suffering movement impairing effects.

Suffering loss of control effects have a chance to grant you Recklessness for 5 sec.

412710.name: Timelessness
412710.description:
Enchant an ally to appear out of sync with the normal flow of time, reducing threat they generate by 30% for 1 hour. Less effective on tank-specialized allies. 

May only be placed on one target at a time.

412713.name: Interwoven Threads
412713.description: The cooldowns of your spells are reduced by 10%.

412723.name: Tomorrow, Today
412723.description: Time Skip channels for 1 sec longer.

412733.name: Unyielding Domain
412733.description: Upheaval cannot be interrupted, and has an additional 10% chance to critically strike.

412774.name: Fate Mirror
412774.description: Prescience grants the ally a chance for their spells and abilities to echo their damage or healing, dealing 15% of the amount again.

414073.name: Light's Conviction
414073.description: Holy Shock now has 2 charges and it refunds 50% of its mana cost when cast on an enemy.

414113.name: Righteous Judgment
414113.description:
Judgment has a 100% chance to cast Consecration at the target's location.

The limit on Consecration does not apply to this effect.

414131.name: Yu'lon's Grace
414131.description: Find resilience in the flow of chi in battle, gaining a magic absorb shield for 1.0% of your max health every 3 sec in combat, stacking up to 10%.

414132.name: Dance of the Wind
414132.description: Your dodge chance is increased by 5%.

414195.name: Awakening
414195.description:
While in combat, your Holy Power spenders have a 10% chance to cause your next Judgment to deal 30% increased damage and critically strike.

Activating Avenging Wrath activates Awakening.

414443.name: Shining Righteousness
414443.description:
[Denounce / Shield of the Righteous] deals (256% of Spell Power) damage to its first target struck.

 [Denounce / Shield of the Righteous] now has a 35% chance to activate Divine Purpose if talented.

414553.name: Epiphany
414553.description: Your Holy Words have a 25% chance to cause your next cast of Prayer of Mending to ignore its cooldown.

414659.name: Ice Cold
414659.description: Ice Block now reduces all damage taken by 70% for 6 sec but no longer grants Immunity, prevents movement, attacks, or casting spells. Does not incur the Global Cooldown.

414664.name: Mass Invisibility
414664.description:
You and your allies within 40 yards instantly become invisible for 12 sec. Taking any action will cancel the effect.

Does not affect allies in combat.

414720.name: Tirion's Devotion
414720.description: Lay on Hands' cooldown is reduced by 30% and restores 5% of your Mana.

414937.name: Born in Flame
414937.description: Casting Ebon Might grants 2 charges of Burnout, reducing the cast time of Living Flame by 100%.

414969.name: Dream of Spring
414969.description: Emerald Blossom no longer has a cooldown, deals 35% increased healing, and increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 1 sec, but costs 3 Essence.

415091.name: Shield of the Righteous
415091.description: Slams enemies in front of you with your shield, causing (198% of Attack Power) Holy damage, and reducing the cooldown of Holy Shock by 2.0 sec and granting 3000 mana.

415244.name: Divine Plea
415244.description: After casting Aura Mastery, you restore (1786 * 30) Mana over 30 sec, but your healing and damage is decreased by 30%.

415364.name: Reclamation
415364.description: Holy Shock refunds up to 10% of its Mana cost and deals up to 50% more healing or damage, based on the target's missing health.

415416.name: Benevolence
415416.description: Increases the healing of your spells by 3%.

415651.name: Dreamwalker's Embrace
415651.description:
Verdant Embrace tethers you to an ally, increasing movement speed by 40% and slowing and siphoning (125% of Spell Power) life from enemies who come in contact with the tether.

The tether lasts up to 10 sec or until you move more than 30 yards away from your ally.

415945.name: Improved Mass Invisibility
415945.description: The cooldown of Mass Invisibility is reduced by 4 min and can affect allies in combat.

416094.name: Fuel the Fire
416094.description:
Flamestrike has a chance equal to 100% of your spell critical strike chance to build up to a Hot Streak.

Flamestrike deals 5% increased damage for each enemy it damages, up to 25%.

416230.name: Imp-erator
416230.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Wild Imp's Fel Firebolt by 15%.

416250.name: Gift of the Naaru
416250.description: Heals the target for 20% of the caster's total health over 5 sec.

416615.name: Xavius' Gambit
416615.description: Reduces the cast time of Unstable Affliction by 0.15 sec and increases its damage by 5%.

416714.name: Intensifying Flame
416714.description: While Ignite is on 3 or fewer enemies it flares up dealing an additional 30% of its damage to affected targets.

416719.name: Blast Zone
416719.description: Meteor's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

417234.name: Crashing Chaos
417234.description: Summon Infernal increases the damage of your next 8 casts of Chaos Bolt by 25% or your next 8 casts of Rain of Fire by 35%.

417467.name: Inflame
417467.description: Hot Streak increases the amount of Ignite damage from Pyroblast or Flamestrike by an additional 25%.

417489.name: Winter's Blessing
417489.description:
Your Haste is increased by 3%.

You gain 5% more Haste from all sources of Haste.

417855.name: Awestruck
417855.description: Holy Shock, Holy Light, and Flash of Light critical healing increased by 20%.

418101.name: Potent Mana
418101.description: Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.

418359.name: Press the Advantage
418359.description:
Your main hand auto attacks reduce the cooldown on your Brews by 0.50 sec and block your target's chi, dealing (30% of Attack Power) additional Nature damage.

After 10 attacks, the next casts Tiger Palm at 100% effectiveness.

418733.name: Splintering Ray
418733.description: Ray of Frost deals 30% of its damage to 5 nearby enemies.

419110.name: Seraphic Crescendo
419110.description: Reduces the cooldown of Divine Hymn by 60 sec.

421432.name: Saber Jaws
421432.description: When you spend extra Energy on Ferocious Bite, the extra damage is increased by 50%.

421453.name: Ultimate Penitence
421453.description:
Ascend into the air and unleash a massive barrage of Penance bolts, causing [(190% of Spell Power)> * 24] Holy damage to enemies or [(445% of Spell Power)> * 24] healing to allies over 6 sec.

While ascended, gain a shield for 100% of your health. In addition, you are unaffected by knockbacks or crowd control effects.

421975.name: Caustic Spatter
421975.description:
Envenom or Kingsbane apply Caustic Spatter for 10 sec. Limit 1.

Caustic Spatter causes 20% of your Nature damage dealt to splash onto other nearby enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

422031.name: Energizing Brew
422031.description: Mana Tea now channels 50% faster and generates 20% more Mana.

423136.name: Sudden Demise
423136.description:
Bleed damage increased by 10%.

Targets below 35% health instantly bleed out and take fatal damage when the remaining Bleed damage you would deal to them exceeds 150% of their remaining health.

423662.name: Stillshroud
423662.description: Shroud of Concealment has 50% reduced cooldown.

423683.name: Featherfoot
423683.description: Sprint increases movement speed by an additional 30% and has 4 sec increased duration.

423701.name: Superior Mixture
423701.description: Crippling Poison reduces movement speed by an additional 10%.

424058.name: Boundless Moonlight
424058.description:
Balance
 Fury of Elune
Fury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for (216.32% of Spell Power) Astral damage.

 Full Moon
Full Moon calls down 2 Minor Moons that deal (188.5% of Spell Power) Astral damage and generate 3 Astral Power.

 Guardian
 Lunar Beam
Lunar Beam now causes you to leech life equal to 10% of all damage dealt to enemies within the beam.

 Fury of Elune
Fury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for (216.32% of Spell Power) Astral damage.

424113.name: The Eternal Moon
424113.description:
Balance
Further increases the power of Boundless Moonlight.

 Fury of Elune
The flash of energy now generates 6 Astral Power and its damage is increased by 50%.

 Full Moon
New Moon and Half Moon now also call down 1 Minor Moon.

 Guardian
Further increases the power of Boundless Moonlight.

 Lunar Beam
Lunar Beam increases Mastery by an additional (15 * $mas)%, deals 30% increased damage, and lasts 3 sec longer.

 Fury of Elune
The flash of energy now generates  6 Rage and its damage is increased by 50%.

424557.name: Savagery
424557.description: Kill Command damage is increased by 10%. Barbed Shot lasts 2.0 sec longer.

424558.name: Master Handler
424558.description: Each time Barbed Shot deals damage, the cooldown of Kill Command is reduced by 0.50 sec.

424654.name: Safeguard
424654.description:
Intervene now has 2 charges and reduces the ally's damage taken by 20% for 5 sec.

Intervene's cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

424742.name: Battlefield Commander
424742.description:
Your Shout abilities have additional effects.

 Battle Shout:
Grants you an additional 3% attack power.

 Rallying Cry:
Grants an additional 2% health and duration increased by 3 sec.

 Piercing Howl:
Radius increased by 100%

 Berserker Shout:
Radius increased by 100%.

 Intimidating Shout:
Cooldown reduced by 15 sec.

425518.name: Light's Deliverance
425518.description:
Protection
You gain a stack of Light's Deliverance when you call down an Empyrean Hammer.

While Divine Toll and Hammer of Light are unavailable, you consume 60 stacks of Light's Deliverance, empowering yourself to cast Hammer of Light an additional time for free.

 Retribution
You gain a stack of Light's Deliverance when you call down an Empyrean Hammer.

While Wake of Ashes and Hammer of Light are unavailable, you consume 60 stacks of Light's Deliverance, empowering yourself to cast Hammer of Light an additional time for free.

426115.name: Demoniac
426115.description:
Grants access to the following abilities:

 Demonbolt
Send the fiery soul of a fallen demon at the enemy, causing (396.778% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage. [ Demonology: Generates 2 Soul Shards.]

 Demonic Core
When your Wild Imps fade or are imploded, you have a 10% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core. 

When your summoned Dreadstalkers fade away, you have a 100% chance to absorb their life essence, granting you a stack of Demonic Core.

Demonic Core reduces the cast time of Demonbolt by 100%. Maximum 4 stacks.

426352.name: Jinx
426352.description: Casting a curse now applies Corruption and Agony to your target, but curses now costs 1 Soul Shard.

426438.name: Improved Mass Dispel
426438.description: Reduces the cooldown of Mass Dispel by 60 sec.

426555.name: Warning Signs
426555.description: Shadow Dance increases attack speed by 25%.

426591.name: Goremaw's Bite
426591.description:
Lashes out at the target, inflicting (326.7% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and causing your next 3 finishing moves to cost no Energy.

Awards 3 combo points.

426594.name: Shadowcraft
426594.description: While Shadow Dance is active, your Shadow Techniques triggers 40% more frequently, stores 1 additional combo point, and generates 2 additional Energy.

426702.name: Liveliness
426702.description: Your damage over time effects deal their damage 25% faster, and your healing over time effects heal 5% faster.

426784.name: Call of the Elder Druid
426784.description:
When you cast Starsurge, Rake, Shred, or Frenzied Regeneration you gain Call of the Elder Druid for 15 sec, once every 1 min.

 Call of the Elder Druid
Abilities not associated with your specialization are substantially empowered for 45 sec.

 Feral,  Guardian,  Restoration
Balance: Cast time of Balance spells reduced by 30% and damage increased by 20%

 Balance,  Guardian,  Restoration
Feral: Gain 1 Combo Point every 2 sec while in Cat Form and Physical damage increased by 20%

 Balance,  Feral,  Restoration
Guardian: Bear Form gives an additional 20% Stamina, multiple uses of Ironfur may overlap, and Frenzied Regeneration has 2 charges

 Balance,  Feral,  Guardian
Restoration: Healing increased by 30%, and mana costs reduced by 50%

427445.name: Light's Guidance
427445.description:
Protection
Divine Toll is replaced with Hammer of Light for 20 sec after it is cast.

 Hammer of Light:
Hammer down your enemy with the power of the Light, dealing (696.774% of Attack Power) Holy damage and (348% of Attack Power) Holy damage up to 7 nearby enemies. 

Additionally, calls down Empyrean Hammers from the sky to strike 3 nearby enemies for (46.55% of Attack Power) Holy damage each.
Costs 5 Holy Power.

 Retribution
Wake of Ashes is replaced with Hammer of Light for 20 sec after it is cast.

 Hammer of Light:
Hammer down your enemy with the power of the Light, dealing (696.774% of Attack Power) Holy damage and (348% of Attack Power) Holy damage up to 7 nearby enemies. 

Additionally, calls down Empyrean Hammers from the sky to strike 3 nearby enemies for (46.55% of Attack Power) Holy damage each.
Costs 5 Holy Power.

427640.name: Inertia
427640.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat cause your next Fel Rush or Felblade to empower you, increasing damage by 18% for 5 sec.

427775.name: A Fire Inside
427775.description:
Immolation Aura has 1 additional charge, has 6 sec reduced cooldown, and deals Chaos damage instead of Fire.

You can have multiple Immolation Auras active at a time.

427776.name: Deflecting Dance
427776.description: You deflect incoming attacks while Blade Dancing, absorbing damage up to 15% of your maximum health.

427794.name: Dash of Chaos
427794.description: For 2 sec after using Fel Rush, activating it again will dash back towards your initial location.

428232.name: Scars of Suffering
428232.description: Increases Versatility by 4% and reduces threat generated by 8%.

428241.name: Demon Hide
428241.description: Magical damage increased by 3%, and Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.

428377.name: Precision Shot
428377.description: Between the Eyes and Pistol Shot have 10 yd increased range and deal 20% increased damage.

428387.name: Terrifying Pace
428387.description: Shuriken Storm increases your movement speed by 30% for 3 sec when striking 3 or more enemies.

428394.name: Spiteful Reconstitution
428394.description: Increases Demonbolt damage by 10% and consuming a Demonic Core has a chance to summon a Wild Imp.

428486.name: Exhilarating Execution
428486.description: Your finishing moves heal you for 5% of damage done. At full health gain shielding instead, absorbing up to 10% of your maximum health.

428492.name: Chaotic Disposition
428492.description: Your Chaos damage has a 7.77% chance to be increased by 17%, occurring up to 3 total times.

428514.name: Diabolic Ritual
428514.description:
Destruction
Casting Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. If Diabolic Ritual is already active, its duration is reduced by 1 sec instead.

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

 Demonology
Spending a Soul Shard on a damaging spell grants Diabolic Ritual for 20 sec. While Diabolic Ritual is active, each Soul Shard spent on a damaging spell reduces its duration by 1 sec.

When Diabolic Ritual expires you gain Demonic Art, causing your next Hand of Gul'dan to summon an Overlord, Mother of Chaos, or Pit Lord that unleashes a devastating attack against your enemies.

428517.name: Cloven Souls
428517.description: Enemies damaged by your Overlord have their souls cloven, increasing damage taken by you and your pets by 5% for 15 sec.

428518.name: Secrets of the Coven
428518.description:
Destruction
Mother of Chaos empowers your next Incinerate to become Infernal Bolt.

 Infernal Bolt
Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing (1347.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 2 Soul Shards.

 Demonology
Mother of Chaos empowers your next Shadow Bolt to become Infernal Bolt.

 Infernal Bolt
Hurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing (1347.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

428522.name: Ruination
428522.description:
Destruction
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Chaos Bolt to become Ruination.

 Ruination
Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing (2537.91% of Spell Power) Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 1 Diabolic Imp.

Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance and is reduced beyond 8 targets.

 Demonology
Summoning a Pit Lord causes your next Hand of Gul'dan to become Ruination.

 Ruination
Call down a demon-infested meteor from the depths of the Twisting Nether, dealing (2537.91% of Spell Power) Chaos damage on impact to all enemies within 8 yds of the target and summoning 3 Wild Imps.

Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

428544.name: Treants of the Moon
428544.description:
Balance
Your Force of Nature treants cast Moonfire on nearby targets about once every 6 sec.

 Restoration
Your Grove Guardians cast Moonfire on nearby targets about once every 6 sec.

428603.name: Ascending Flame
428603.description: Sigil of Flame damage increased by 50%.

428607.name: Live by the Glaive
428607.description:
When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

428655.name: The Light of Elune
428655.description:
Balance
Moonfire damage has a chance to call down a Fury of Elune to follow your target for 3 sec.

 Fury of Elune
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy, dealing [3000 / 1000 * 2 * (18.34% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 3 sec within its area.

Generates 15 Astral Power over its duration.

 Guardian
Moonfire damage has a chance to call down a Fury of Elune to follow your target for 3 sec.

 Fury of Elune
Calls down a beam of pure celestial energy, dealing [3000 / 1000 * 2 * (18.34% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 3 sec within its area.

Generates 18 Rage over its duration.

428731.name: Harmony of the Grove
428731.description:
Balance
Each of your Force of Nature treants increases damage your spells deal by 4% while active.

 Restoration
Each of your Grove Guardians increases your healing done by 5% while active.

428859.name: Power of Nature
428859.description:
Balance
Your Force of Nature treants no longer taunt and deal 200% increased melee damage.

 Restoration
Your Grove Guardians increase the healing of your Rejuvenation, Efflorescence, and Lifebloom by 10% while active.

428911.name: Soul-Etched Circles
428911.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when casting Demonic Circle: Teleport, increasing your movement speed by 50% and making you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

428937.name: Early Spring
428937.description:
Balance
Force of Nature cooldown reduced by 15 sec.

 Restoration
Swiftmend and Wild Growth cooldowns reduced by 1 sec.

429072.name: Annihilan's Bellow
429072.description: Howl of Terror cooldown is reduced by 10 sec and range is increased by 5 yds.

429115.name: Infernal Vitality
429115.description: Unending Resolve heals you for 30% of your maximum health over 10 sec.

429130.name: Infernal Bulwark
429130.description: Unending Resolve grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of your maximum health and increases the maximum amount Soul Leech can absorb by 10% for 8 sec.

429211.name: Champion of the Glaive
429211.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.

429215.name: Bounteous Bloom
429215.description:
Balance
Force of Nature summons 4 Treants.

 Restoration
Your Grove Guardians' healing is increased by 30%.

429227.name: Durability of Nature
429227.description:
Restoration
Grove Guardians last 20% longer.

 Balance
Your Force of Nature treants have 100% increased health.

429399.name: Expansiveness
429399.description:
Balance
Your maximum mana is increased by 5% and your maximum Astral Power is increased by 20.

 Restoration
Your maximum mana is increased by 5%.

429402.name: Grove's Inspiration
429402.description:
Balance
Wrath and Starfire damage increased by 10%. 

Regrowth and Wild Growth healing increased by 9%.

 Restoration
Wrath and Starfire damage increased by 10%. 

Regrowth, Wild Growth, and Swiftmend healing increased by 9%.

429420.name: Potent Enchantments
429420.description:
Balance
Orbital Strike damage increased by 30%, and damage of Stellar Flares it applies increased by 30%.

Whirling Stars increases the haste you gain during Celestial Alignment by an additional 10%.

 Balance (Incarnation: Chosen of Elune)
Orbital Strike damage increased by 30%, and damage of Stellar Flares it applies increased by 30%.

Whirling Stars increases the haste you gain during Incarnation: Chosen of Elune

 Restoration
Reforestation grants Tree of Life for 6 additional sec.

429433.name: Blooming Infusion
429433.description:
Balance
Every 5 Regrowths you cast makes your next Wrath, Starfire, or Entangling Roots instant and increases damage it deals by 100%.

Every 5 Starsurges or Starfalls you cast makes your next Regrowth or Entangling roots instant.

 Restoration
Every 5 Regrowths you cast makes your next Wrath, Starfire, or Entangling Roots instant and increases damage it deals by 100%.

Every 5 Starsurges you cast makes your next Regrowth or Entangling roots instant.

429483.name: Warp
429483.description:
Hover now causes you to briefly warp out of existence and appear at your destination. Hover's cooldown is also reduced by 5 sec.

Hover continues to allow Evoker spells to be cast while moving.

429520.name: Moon Guardian
429520.description:
Guardian
Free automatic Moonfires from Galactic Guardian generate 5 Rage.

 Balance
Moonfire and Starfire generate 2 additional Astral Power.

429523.name: Lunar Calling
429523.description:
Balance
Starfire deals 120% increased damage to its primary target.

Wrath no longer changes your Eclipse ability's mode to Solar Eclipse.

 Guardian
Thrash now deals Arcane damage and its damage is increased by 12%.

429530.name: Lunar Insight
429530.description:
Balance
Moonfire deals 20% increased damage.

 Guardian
Moonfire deals 8% increased damage.

Red Moon deals 30% increased damage.

429532.name: Atmospheric Exposure
429532.description:
Balance
Enemies damaged by Full Moon or Fury of Elune take 6% increased damage from you for 6 sec.

 Guardian
Enemies damaged by Lunar Beam or Fury of Elune take 6% increased damage from you for 6 sec.

429533.name: Glistening Fur
429533.description: Bear Form and Moonkin Form reduce Arcane damage taken by 6% and all other magic damage taken by 3%.

429536.name: Astral Insight
429536.description:
Balance
Incarnation: Chosen of Elune increases Arcane damage from spells and abilities by 10% while active.

Increases the duration and number of spells cast by Convoke the Spirits by 25%.

 Guardian
Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc increases Arcane damage from spells and abilities by 10% while active.

Increases the duration and number of spells cast by Convoke the Spirits by 25%.

429538.name: Moondust
429538.description: Enemies affected by Moonfire are slowed by 20%.

429539.name: Lunation
429539.description:
Balance
Your Arcane abilities reduce the cooldown of Fury of Elune by 1.5 sec and the cooldown of New Moon, Half Moon, and Full Moon by 1.0 sec.

 Guardian
Your Arcane abilities reduce the cooldown of Lunar Beam by 3.0 sec.

429540.name: Arcane Affinity
429540.description: All Arcane damage from your spells and abilities is increased by 3%.

429581.name: Abyssal Dominion
429581.description:
Demonology
Summon Demonic Tyrant is empowered, dealing 70% increased damage and increasing the damage of your demons by 20% while active.

 Destruction
Summon Infernal becomes empowered, dealing 40% increased damage. When your Summon Infernal ends, it fragments into two smaller Infernals at 50% effectiveness that lasts 10 sec.

429634.name: Colossal Might
429634.description:
Arms
Colossal Might increases damage dealt by your next Demolish by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

Mortal Strike grants a stack of Colossal Might and Cleave grants a stack of Colossal Might when it strikes 3 or more targets.

 Protection
Colossal Might increases damage dealt by your next Demolish by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

Shield Slam grants a stack of Colossal Might and Revenge grants a stack of Colossal Might when it strikes 3 or more targets.

429636.name: Dominance of the Colossus
429636.description:
Colossal Might stacks up to 10 times. If you would gain a stack of Colossal Might and are at max stacks, the cooldown of Demolish is reduced by 5 sec.

Enemies affected by Demolish take up to 10% more damage from you and deal up to 10% less damage to you for 10 sec based on the number of stacks of Colossal Might consumed by Demolish.

429637.name: One Against Many
429637.description:
Protection
Shockwave and Revenge deal 5% more damage per target affected up to 5.

 Arms
Shockwave, Cleave, and Whirlwind deal 5% more damage per target affected up to 5.

429638.name: Martial Expert
429638.description: Critical strike damage of your abilities is increased by 10% and the amount of damage blocked by your critical blocks is increased by 20%.

429639.name: Boneshaker
429639.description: Shockwave's stun duration is increased by 1 sec and reduces the movement speed of affected enemies by 40% for 3 sec after the stun ends.

429641.name: Tide of Battle
429641.description:
Arms
Colossal Might increases the damage of your Overpower by 3% per stack.

 Protection
Colossal Might increases the damage of your Revenge by 3% per stack.

429642.name: Mountain of Muscle and Scars
429642.description:
You deal 5% more damage and take 5% less damage.

Size increased by 5%.

429644.name: No Stranger to Pain
429644.description: Damage prevented by each use of Ignore Pain is increased by 20%.

429647.name: Practiced Strikes
429647.description:
Arms
Mortal Strike and Slam damage increased by 25%.

Cleave and Whirlwind damage increased by 15%.

 Protection
Shield Slam damage increased by 25%.

Revenge and Thunder Clap damage increased by 15%.

Shield Slam generates an additional 3 Rage.

429657.name: Flames of Xoroth
429657.description: Fire damage increased by 4% and damage dealt by your demons is increased by 4%.

429668.name: Stellar Command
429668.description:
Balance
Increases the damage of Fury of Elune by 15% and the damage of Full Moon by 25%.

 Guardian
Increases the damage of Lunar Beam by 30% and Fury of Elune by 15%.

429893.name: Touch of Rancora
429893.description:
Destruction
Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Chaos Bolt, Rain of Fire, or Shadowburn by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

Casting Chaos Bolt reduces the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

 Demonology
Demonic Art increases the damage of your next Hand of Gul'dan by 20% and reduces its cast time by 50%.

429899.name: Gloom of Nathreza
429899.description:
Destruction
Enemies marked by your Havoc take 7% increased damage from your single target spells.

 Demonology
Hand of Gul'dan deals 15% increased damage for each Soul Shard spent.

429902.name: Cruelty of Kerxan
429902.description:
Demonology
Summon Demonic Tyrant grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec.

 Destruction
Summon Infernal grants Diabolic Ritual and reduces its duration by 3 sec.

429917.name: Infernal Machine
429917.description:
Demonology
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Demonic Tyrant is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

 Destruction
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells while your Infernal is active decreases the duration of Diabolic Ritual by 1 additional sec.

430709.name: Smoke Screen
430709.description:
Exhilaration grants you 3 sec of Survival of the Fittest.

Survival of the Fittest activates Exhilaration at 50% effectiveness.

430712.name: Dark Chains
430712.description: While in combat, Disengage will chain the closest target to the ground, causing them to move 40% slower until they move 8 yards away.

431044.name: Frostfire Bolt
431044.description: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing (259.4% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional (21.6% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage over 8 sec.

431066.name: Imbued Warding
431066.description:
Fire
Blazing Barrier also casts an Ice Barrier at 25% effectiveness.

 Frost
Ice Barrier also casts a Blazing Barrier at 25% effectiveness.

431067.name: Elemental Affinity
431067.description:
Frost
The cooldown of Fire spells is reduced by 30%.

 Fire
The cooldown of Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes is reduced by 30%.

431095.name: Isothermic Core
431095.description:
Frost
Comet Storm now also calls down a Meteor, dealing (900% of Spell Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Damage from Meteor Shatters 1 stacks of Freezing.

 Fire
Meteor now also calls down a Comet Storm, dealing [(92.8% of Spell Power) * 7] Frost damage to nearby enemies.

431112.name: Flame and Frost
431112.description:
Fire
Cauterize resets the cooldown of your Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes when it activates.

 Frost
Ice Block and Ice Cold reset the cooldowns of your Fire spells.

431117.name: Thermal Conditioning
431117.description: Frostfire Bolt's cast time is reduced by 10%.

431131.name: Meltdown
431131.description:
You melt slightly out of your Ice Block and Ice Cold, allowing you to move slowly during Ice Block and increasing your movement speed over time.

Ice Block and Ice Cold trigger a Blazing Barrier when they end.

431166.name: Frostfire Infusion
431166.description:
Frost
Frostfire Bolt has an additional 5% chance to grant Brain Freeze.

The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%.

 Fire
Frostfire Bolt's critical strike chance is increased by 15%..

The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%.

431176.name: Frostfire Empowerment
431176.description:
Fire
Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

 Frost
Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Damage from Frostfire Empowerment applies 1 stack of Freezing.

431178.name: Flash Freezeburn
431178.description:
Frost
Glacial Spike damage increased by 15% and it now explodes on impact, dealing 25% of its damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

Additionally, Glacial Spike now grants Frostfire Empowerment.

 Fire
Meteor's damage is increased by 25%.

Meteor now grants Frostfire Empowerment.

431189.name: Severe Temperatures
431189.description: Frostfire Empowerment stacks 1 additional time and it causes Frostfire Bolt to explode for an additional 20% of its damage.

431377.name: Dawnlight
431377.description:
Holy
Casting Holy Prism or Divine Toll causes your next 2 Holy Power spending abilities to apply Dawnlight on your target, dealing (255% of Spell Power) Radiant damage or (538.2% of Spell Power) healing over 8 sec.

8% of Dawnlight's damage and healing radiates to nearby allies or enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Dawnlight's healing does not transfer to Beacon of Light.

 Retribution
Casting Wake of Ashes causes your next 2 Holy Power spending abilities to apply Dawnlight on your target, dealing (255% of Spell Power) Radiant damage or (538.2% of Spell Power) healing over 8 sec.

4% of Dawnlight's damage and healing radiates to nearby allies or enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

431402.name: Luminosity
431402.description:
Retribution
Critical Strike chance of Hammer of Wrath and Divine Storm increased by 10%.

 Holy
Critical Strike chance of Holy Shock and Light of Dawn increased by 5%.

431404.name: Solar Grace
431404.description:
Retribution
Haste is increased by 2%.

 Holy
Haste is increased by 5%.

431406.name: Will of the Dawn
431406.description:
Movement speed increased by 5% while above 80% health.

When your health is brought below 35%, your movement speed is increased by 40% for 5 sec. Cannot occur more than once every 1 min.

431407.name: Lingering Radiance
431407.description: Dawnlight leaves an Eternal Flame for 6 sec on allies or a Greater Judgment on enemies when it expires or is extended.

431413.name: Sun Sear
431413.description:
Retribution
Hammer of Wrath and Divine Storm critical strikes cause the target to burn for an additional (48% of Spell Power) Radiant damage over 4 sec.

 Holy
Holy Shock and Light of Dawn critical strikes cause the target to be healed for an additional (54% of Spell Power) over 4 sec.

431423.name: Illumine
431423.description: Dawnlight reduces the movement speed of enemies by 50% and increases the movement speed of allies by 20%.

431425.name: Sun's Avatar
431425.description:
Holy
You link to your Dawnlights within 30 yds, causing (21.6% of Spell Power) Radiant damage to enemies or (37.26% of Spell Power) healing to allies that pass through the beams, reduced beyond 5 targets.

 Retribution
You link to your Dawnlights within 30 yds, causing (21.6% of Spell Power) Radiant damage to enemies or (37.26% of Spell Power) healing to allies that pass through the beams, reduced beyond 8 targets.

431442.name: Chrono Flame
431442.description:
Preservation
Living Flame is enhanced with Bronze magic, repeating 15% of the damage or healing you dealt to the target in the last 5 sec as Arcane, up to [(Spell Power * 2.5) * (1 + Versatility)].

 Devastation,  Augmentation
Living Flame is enhanced with Bronze magic, repeating 25% of the damage or healing you dealt to the target in the last 5 sec as Arcane, up to [(Spell Power * 2.5) * (1 + Versatility)].

431463.name: Zealous Vindication
431463.description: Hammer of Light instantly calls down 2 Empyrean Hammers on your target when it is cast.

431474.name: Second Sunrise
431474.description:
Retribution
Divine Storm and Hammer of Wrath have a 15% chance to cast again at 30% effectiveness.

 Holy
Light of Dawn and Holy Shock have a 15% chance to cast again at 30% effectiveness.

431480.name: Gleaming Rays
431480.description: Your Holy Power spenders deal 3% additional damage and healing.

431482.name: Morning Star
431482.description:
Every 5.0 sec, your next Dawnlight's damage or healing is increased by 5%, stacking up to 10 times.

Morning Star stacks twice as fast while out of combat.

431484.name: Instability Matrix
431484.description: Each time you cast an empower spell, unstable time magic reduces its cooldown by up to 6 sec.

431533.name: Shake the Heavens
431533.description: After casting Hammer of Light, you call down an Empyrean Hammer on a nearby target every 2 sec, for 8 sec.

431548.name: Precise Might
431548.description:
Arms
Mortal Strike critical strikes grant an additional stack of Colossal Might.

 Protection
Shield Slam critical strikes grant an additional stack of Colossal Might.

431551.name: Wrathful Descent
431551.description:
When Empyrean Hammer critically strikes, 50% of its damage is dealt to nearby enemies.

Enemies hit by this effect deal 5% reduced damage to you for 8 sec.

431615.name: Reverberations
431615.description: [ Preservation: Verdant Embrace heals for an additional 60% over 8 sec]

431657.name: Primacy
431657.description: For each [ Preservation: healing over time effect from Verdant Embrace] gain 3% haste, up to 9%.

431687.name: Higher Calling
431687.description:
Retribution
Crusader Strike, Hammer of Wrath and Blade of Justice extend the duration of Shake the Heavens by 1 sec.

 Protection
Crusader Strike, Hammer of Wrath and Judgment extend the duration of Shake the Heavens by 1 sec.

431695.name: Temporal Burst
431695.description: Tip the Scales overloads you with temporal energy, increasing your haste, movement speed, and cooldown recovery rate by 30%, decreasing over 30 sec.

431715.name: Nozdormu Adept
431715.description:
Devastation,  Augmentation
Prescience cooldown reduced by 2 sec and it grants 1% additional critical strike chance.

 Preservation
Temporal Anomaly mana cost reduced by 15% and cooldown reduced by 4 sec.

431730.name: Sacrosanct Crusade
431730.description:
Protection
Divine Toll surrounds you with a Holy barrier for 15% of your maximum health.

Hammer of Light heals you for 15% of your maximum health, increased by 2% for each additional target hit. Any overhealing done with this effect gets converted into a Holy barrier instead.

 Retribution
Wake of Ashes surrounds you with a Holy barrier for 10% of your maximum health.

Hammer of Light heals you for 5% of your maximum health, increased by 1% for each additional target hit. Any overhealing done with this effect gets converted into a Holy barrier instead.

431873.name: Temporality
431873.description: Warp reduces damage taken by 20%, starting high and reducing over 3 sec.

431874.name: Double-time
431874.description:
Devastation,  Augmentation
Ebon Might and Prescience gain a chance equal to your critical strike chance to grant 50% additional stats.

 Preservation
When Dream Breath or Fire Breath critically strike, their duration is extended by 2 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.

431875.name: Afterimage
431875.description: Empower spells send up to 3 Chrono Flames to your targets.

431984.name: Time Convergence
431984.description:
Non-defensive abilities with a 45 second or longer cooldown grant 5% Intellect for 15 sec.

Essence spells extend the duration by 1 sec.

432004.name: Golden Opportunity
432004.description:
Preservation
Echo is 10% more effective.

 Devastation,  Augmentation
Prescience lasts 15% longer.

432008.name: Motes of Acceleration
432008.description: Warp leaves a trail of Motes of Acceleration. Allies who come in contact with a mote gain 20% increased movement speed for 30 sec.

432181.name: Dance of the Wind
432181.description: Your physical damage taken is reduced by 10% and an additional 10% every 4 sec until you receive a physical attack.

432459.name: Holy Bulwark
432459.description:
Protection
Will the Light to coalesce and become manifest as a Holy Armament, wielded by your friendly target.

 Holy Bulwark:

While wielding a Holy Bulwark, gain an absorb shield for 15.0% of your max health and an additional 2.0% every 2 sec. Lasts 20 sec.

Becomes Sacred Weapon after use.

 Holy
Will the Light to coalesce and become manifest as a Holy Armament, wielded by your friendly target.

 Holy Bulwark:

While wielding a Holy Bulwark, gain an absorb shield for 15.0% of your max health and an additional 2.0% every 2 sec. Lasts 20 sec.

Becomes Sacred Weapon after use.

Generates 3 Holy Power.

432463.name: Hammerfall
432463.description:
Retribution
 and Divine Storm calls down an Empyrean Hammer on a nearby enemy.

While Shake the Heavens is active, this effect calls down an additional Empyrean Hammer.

 Protection
Shield of the Righteous and Word of Glory calls down an Empyrean Hammer on a nearby enemy.

While Shake the Heavens is active, this effect calls down an additional Empyrean Hammer.

432615.name: Endless Wrath
432615.description: Empyrean Hammer has a 10% increased chance to critically strike.

432626.name: Undisputed Ruling
432626.description:
Retribution
Hammer of Light applies Judgment to its targets, and increases your Haste by 12% for 6 sec.

 Protection
Hammer of Light grants Shield of the Righteous, erupts a Consecration beneath its target, and increases your Haste by 12% for 6 sec.

432802.name: Solidarity
432802.description:
If you bestow an Armament upon an ally, you also gain its benefits.

If you bestow an Armament upon yourself, a nearby ally also gains its benefits.

432804.name: Forewarning
432804.description: The cooldown of Holy Armaments is reduced by 20%.

432821.name: Shared Resolve
432821.description: The effect of your active Aura is increased by 33% on targets with your Armaments.

432866.name: Laying Down Arms
432866.description:
Holy
When an Armament fades from you, the cooldown of Lay on Hands is reduced by 15.0 sec and you gain Infusion of Light.

 Protection
When an Armament fades from you, the cooldown of Lay on Hands is reduced by 15.0 sec and you gain Shining Light.

432919.name: Valiance
432919.description:
Holy
Consuming Infusion of Light reduces the cooldown of Holy Armaments by 3.0 sec.

 Protection
Consuming Shining Light reduces the cooldown of Holy Armaments by 3.0 sec.

432929.name: Divine Hammer
432929.description:
Divine Toll summons Divine Hammers that spin around you for 8 sec.

Divine Hammer
Strikes all enemies nearby for [Burning Crusade: [(144% of Attack Power)% * 1.05] Radiant / (144% of Attack Power)% Holy] damage every 2 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

432964.name: Divine Inspiration
432964.description: Your spells and abilities have a chance to manifest a Holy Armament for a nearby ally.

432977.name: Sanctification
432977.description:
Casting Judgment increases the damage of Empyrean Hammer by 5% for 10 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

432990.name: Unrelenting Charger
432990.description: Divine Steed lasts 2 sec longer and increases your movement speed by an additional 30% for the first 3 sec.

432992.name: Bonds of Fellowship
432992.description: You receive 20% less damage from Blessing of Sacrifice and each time its target takes damage, you gain 4% movement speed up to a maximum of 40%.

433011.name: Blessing of the Forge
433011.description: Avenging Wrath summons an additional Sacred Weapon, and during Avenging Wrath your Sacred Weapon casts spells on your target and echoes the effects of your Holy Power abilities.

433015.name: Blessed Assurance
433015.description:
Protection
Casting a Holy Power ability increases the damage and healing of your next Crusader Strike by 200%.

 Holy
Casting a Holy Power ability increases the damage and healing of your next Holy Shock by 200%.

433106.name: Divine Guidance
433106.description:
Holy
For each Holy Power ability cast, your next Consecration deals [(Spell Power * 30 / 10) * (1 + Versatility) * 4.74] damage or healing immediately, split across all enemies and allies.

 Protection
For each Holy Power ability cast, your next Consecration deals [(Spell Power * 37 / 10) * (1 + Versatility) * 1.07] damage or healing immediately, split across all enemies and allies.

433568.name: Rite of Sanctification
433568.description:
Protection
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your armor by 5% and your primary stat by 2%.

Lasts 1 hour.

 Holy
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your armor by 5% and your primary stat by 5%.

Lasts 1 hour.

433583.name: Rite of Adjuration
433583.description:
Imbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your Stamina by 3% and causing your Holy Power abilities to sometimes unleash a burst of healing around a target.

Lasts 1 hour.

433718.name: Hammer and Anvil
433718.description:
Protection
Judgment critical strikes cause a shockwave around the target, dealing (230% of Attack Power) damage to enemies within 5 yards. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

 Holy
Judgment critical strikes cause a shockwave around the target, healing to up to 5 injuried allies for (113.4% of Spell Power).

433748.name: Protective Growth
433748.description: Your Regrowth protects you, reducing damage you take by 8% while your Regrowth is on you.

433831.name: Dream Surge
433831.description:
Balance
Force of Nature grants 3 charges of Dream Burst, causing your next Wrath or Starfire to explode on the target, dealing [(302.1% of Attack Power) * 1.06] Nature damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

 Restoration
When Grove Guardians are summoned, they grow Dream Petals on your target, healing up to 3 nearby allies for (146.4% of Spell Power).

433871.name: Maneuverability
433871.description:
Augmentation
Deep Breath can now be steered in your desired direction.

In addition, Deep Breath burns targets for (600% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage over 12 sec.

 Preservation
Deep Breath can now be steered in your desired direction.

In addition, Deep Breath burns targets for (600% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage over 12 sec.

 Devastation
Deep Breath can now be steered in your desired direction.

In addition, Deep Breath burns targets for (600% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage over 12 sec.

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.

433901.name: Vampiric Strike
433901.description:
Blood
Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 35% chance to make your next Heart Strike become Vampiric Strike.

Vampiric Strike heals you for 1% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 2.0%, up to 10.0% for 20 sec.

 Unholy
Your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike have a 25% chance to make your next  become Vampiric Strike.

Vampiric Strike heals you for 2% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 1.0%, up to 5.0% for 20 sec.

433905.name: Prophet's Will
433905.description:
Holy
Your Flash Heal and Holy Word: Serenity are 30% more effective when cast on yourself.

 Discipline
Your Flash Heal and Power Word: Shield are 30% more effective when cast on yourself.

433934.name: Newly Turned
433934.description: Raise Ally revives players at full health and grants you and your ally an absorb shield equal to 20% of your maximum health.

434028.name: Vampiric Speed
434028.description:
Death's Advance and Wraith Walk movement speed bonuses are increased by 10%.

Activating Death's Advance or Wraith Walk increases 4 nearby allies movement speed by 20% for 5 sec.

434033.name: Blood-Soaked Ground
434033.description: While you are within your Death and Decay, your physical damage taken is reduced by 5% and your chance to gain Vampiric Strike is increased by 5%.

434075.name: Frenzied Bloodthirst
434075.description:
Unholy
Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil and Death Strike by 3%, and Epidemic by 5% per stack.

 Blood
Essence of the Blood Queen stacks 2 additional times and increases the damage of your Death Coil and Death Strike by 6% per stack.

434100.name: Vampiric Aura
434100.description:
Your Leech is increased by 2%.

While Lichborne is active, the Leech bonus of this effect is increased by 100%, and it affects 4 allies within 12 yds.

434136.name: Bloody Fortitude
434136.description:
Icebound Fortitude reduces all damage you take by up to an additional 20% based on your missing health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor reduces the cooldown of Icebound Fortitude by 3 sec.

434143.name: Infliction of Sorrow
434143.description:
Blood
When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your Blood Plague, it extends the duration of the disease by 3.0 sec, and deals 20% of the remaining damage to the enemy.

 Unholy
When Vampiric Strike damages an enemy affected by your plagues, it extends the duration of the plagues by 3.0 sec, and erupts them with 30% increased effectiveness.

434151.name: Incite Terror
434151.description:
Unholy
Vampiric Strike and  cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec.

Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness.

 Blood
Vampiric Strike and Heart Strike cause your targets to take 1% increased Shadow damage, up to 5% for 15 sec.

Vampiric Strike benefits from Incite Terror at 400% effectiveness.

434152.name: Gift of the San'layn
434152.description:
Blood
While Dancing Rune Weapon is active you gain Gift of the San'layn.

Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 200%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your Heart Strike for the duration.

 Unholy
While Dark Transformation is active you gain Gift of the San'layn.

Gift of the San'layn increases the effectiveness of your Essence of the Blood Queen by 80%, and Vampiric Strike replaces your  for the duration.

434157.name: Visceral Strength
434157.description:
Blood
When Crimson Scourge is consumed, you gain 12% Strength for 12 sec.

 Unholy
When Sudden Doom is consumed, you gain 4% Strength for 5 sec.

434220.name: Power of the Dream
434220.description:
Restoration
Dream Surge heals 1 additional ally.

 Balance
Force of Nature grants an additional stack of Dream Burst.

434249.name: Control of the Dream
434249.description:
Balance
Time elapsed while your major abilities are available to be used or at maximum charges is subtracted from that ability's cooldown after the next time you use it, up to 15 seconds.

Affects Force of Nature, and Convoke the Spirits.

 Restoration
Time elapsed while your major abilities are available to be used or at maximum charges is subtracted from that ability's cooldown after the next time you use it, up to 15 seconds.

Affects Nature's Swiftness, Incarnation: Tree of Life, and Convoke the Spirits.

434260.name: The Blood is Life
434260.description:
Unholy
 summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec.

Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 15% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

 Blood
Dancing Rune Weapon summons a Blood Beast to attack your enemy for 10 sec.

Each time the Blood Beast attacks, it stores a portion of the damage dealt. When the Blood Beast dies, it explodes, dealing 25% of the damage accumulated to nearby enemies and healing the Death Knight for the same amount. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

434261.name: Pact of the San'layn
434261.description: You store 10% of all Shadow damage dealt into your Blood Beast to explode for additional damage when it expires.

434263.name: Sanguine Scent
434263.description:
Blood
Your Death Coil and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health.

 Unholy
Your Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike have a 15% increased chance to trigger Vampiric Strike when damaging enemies below 35% health.

434300.name: Bombardments
434300.description:
Devastation
Mass Disintegrate marks your primary target for destruction for the next 6 sec.

You and your allies have a chance to trigger a Bombardment when attacking marked targets, dealing [$INT * 4.75 * (1 + Versatility) * Percent Damage * 1] Volcanic damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

 Preservation,  Augmentation
Mass Eruption marks your primary target for destruction for the next 6 sec.

You and your allies have a chance to trigger a Bombardment when attacking marked targets, dealing [$INT * 4.75 * (1 + Versatility) * Percent Damage] Volcanic damage split amongst all nearby enemies.

434774.name: Transcendence: Linked Spirits
434774.description: Transcendence now tethers your spirit onto an ally for 1 hour. Use Transcendence: Transfer to teleport to your ally's location.

434905.name: Grim Reaper
434905.description:
Reaper's Mark initial strike grants [3 charges of Bone Shield][Killing Machine].

Reaper's Mark explosion deals up to 30% increased damage based on your target's missing health.

434969.name: Lightning Strikes
434969.description:
Fury
Damaging enemies with Thunder Clap, Raging Blow, or Execute has a 25% chance to also strike one with a lightning bolt, dealing (155.1% of Attack Power) Nature damage.

Lightning Strikes occur 30% more often during Avatar.

 Protection
Damaging enemies with Thunder Clap, Revenge, or Execute has a 25% chance to also strike one with a lightning bolt, dealing (155.1% of Attack Power) Nature damage.

Lightning Strikes occur 30% more often during Avatar.

434970.name: Steadfast as the Peaks
434970.description:
Stamina increased by 5%.

 [Impending Victory / Victory Rush] increases your maximum health by 10% for 5 sec. When this health increase expires, you heal for any amount of the original [Impending Victory / Victory Rush] that healed you in excess of your full health.

435005.name: Smothering Offense
435005.description:
Your auto attack damage is increased by 10%. 

This amount is increased for each stack of Icy Talons you have and it can stack up to 2 additional times.

435010.name: Icy Death Torrent
435010.description: Your auto attack critical strikes have a chance to send out a torrent of ice dealing (107.712% of Attack Power) Frost damage to enemies in front of you.

435607.name: Thunder Blast
435607.description:
Shield Slam and Bloodthirst have a 35% chance to grant you Thunder Blast, stacking up to 2 charges.

Thunder Blast
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals (197.781% of Attack Power) Stormstrike damage and generates 2 Rage.

436148.name: Ground Current
436148.description: Lightning Strikes also deal (44.715% of Attack Power) Nature damage to enemies near their target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

436152.name: Thorim's Might
436152.description:
Fury
Lightning Strikes generate 3 Rage.

Raging Blow and Execute damage increased by 25%.

 Protection
Lightning Strikes generate 3 Rage.

Revenge and Execute damage increased by 25%.

436162.name: Storm Bolts
436162.description: Storm Bolt also hits 2 additional nearby targets, stunning them for 2 sec, but its cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

436201.name: Gathering Clouds
436201.description: Your attacks trigger Lightning Strikes 30% more often.

436335.name: Mass Disintegrate
436335.description: Empower spells cause your next Disintegrate to strike up to 3 targets. When striking fewer than 3 targets, Disintegrate damage is increased by 10% for each missing target.

436344.name: Azerite Surge
436344.description:
Draw upon your inner strength. Release to invoke the power of Azerite to harm your foes and aid your allies.

Empowering has the following effects:

I: Deals [Attack Power * 2 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Fire damage.

II: Heals allies for [Attack Power * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)].

III: Deals [Attack Power * 0.75 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] additional Fire damage to the highest health enemy.

436358.name: Demolish
436358.description:
Unleash a series of precise and powerful strikes against your target, dealing [(531.455% of Attack Power) + (531.455% of Attack Power) + (1232.36% of Attack Power)] damage to it, and (1232.36% of Attack Power) damage to enemies within 10 yds of it. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

While channeling Demolish, you take 10% less damage and are immune to stuns, knockbacks, and forced movement effects.

You can block, parry, dodge, and use certain defensive abilities while channeling Demolish.

436687.name: Dark Talons
436687.description:
Frost
Consuming Killing Machine or Rime has a 25% chance to grant 3 stacks of Icy Talons and increase its maximum stacks by the same amount for 6 sec.

Runic Power spending abilities count as Shadowfrost while Icy Talons is active.

 Blood
Marrowrend and Heart Strike have a 25% chance to grant 3 stacks of Icy Talons and increase its maximum stacks by the same amount for 6 sec.

Runic Power spending abilities count as Shadowfrost while Icy Talons is active.

436707.name: Crashing Thunder
436707.description:
Fury
Stormstrike or Nature damage your abilities deal is increased by 5%. Stormstrike damage ignores Armor.

Thunder Clap damage increased by 30%, no longer costs Rage, and now generates 8 Rage.

Improved Whirlwind, Meat Cleaver, and Barbaric Training affect Thunder Clap in addition to Whirlwind.

 Protection
Stormstrike or Nature damage your abilities deal is increased by 5%. Stormstrike damage ignores Armor.

Thunder Clap damage increased by 30%.

437068.name: Strength of the Mountain
437068.description:
Fury
Shield Slam damage increased by 15%.

Bloodthirst and Rampage damage increased by 25%.

 Protection
Shield Slam damage increased by 15%.

Demoralizing Shout reduces damage enemies deal to you by an additional 5%.

437079.name: Flashing Skies
437079.description: Thunder Blast calls down a Lightning Strike on an enemy it hits.

437118.name: Burst of Power
437118.description:
Fury
Lightning Strikes have a 15% chance to make your next 2 Bloodthirsts have no cooldown, deal 35% increased damage, and generate 2 additional Rage.

 Protection
Lightning Strikes have a 15% chance to make your next 2 Shield Slams have no cooldown.

437122.name: Death's Messenger
437122.description: Reduces the cooldowns of Lichborne and Raise Dead by 30 sec.

437134.name: Avatar of the Storm
437134.description:
Casting Avatar grants you 2 charges of Thunder Blast and resets the cooldown of Thunder Clap.

While Avatar is not active, Lightning Strikes have a 10% chance to grant you Avatar for 4 secs.

Thunder Blast
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals Stormstrike damage.

437161.name: Soul Rupture
437161.description:
Blood
When Reaper's Mark explodes, it deals 10% of the damage dealt to nearby enemies.

 Frost
When Reaper's Mark explodes, it deals 20% of the damage dealt to nearby enemies.

438439.name: Dance of Chi-Ji
438439.description: Your spells and abilities have a chance to make your next Spinning Crane Kick deal an additional 400% damage.

438587.name: Mass Eruption
438587.description: Empower spells cause your next Eruption to strike up to 3 targets. When striking less than 3 targets, Eruption damage is increased by 10% for each missing target.

438590.name: Keep Your Feet on the Ground
438590.description:
Physical damage taken reduced by 2%.

Thunder Blast reduces damage you take by 8% for 5 sec.

438597.name: Storm Shield
438597.description: Intervening a target grants them a shield for 5 sec that absorbs magic damage equal to 3 times your Armor.

439528.name: Thriving Growth
439528.description:
Feral
Rip and Rake damage has a chance to cause Bloodseeker Vines to grow on the victim, dealing (97.5% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Wild Growth and Regrowth healing has a chance to cause Symbiotic Blooms to grow on the target, healing for (219.6% of Spell Power) over 6 sec.

Multiple instances of these can overlap.

 Restoration
Rip and Rake damage has a chance to cause Bloodseeker Vines to grow on the victim, dealing (97.5% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Wild Growth, Regrowth, and Efflorescence healing has a chance to cause Symbiotic Blooms to grow on the target, healing for (219.6% of Spell Power) over 6 sec.

Multiple instances of these can overlap.

439760.name: Aurora
439760.description:
Holy
After you cast Holy Prism or Divine Toll, gain Divine Purpose.

 Divine Purpose
Your next Holy Power spending ability is free and deals 15% increased damage and healing.

 Retribution
After you cast Wake of Ashes, gain Divine Purpose.

 Divine Purpose
Your next Holy Power spending ability is free and deals 10% increased damage and healing.

439843.name: Reaper's Mark
439843.description:
Frost
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing (312% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing (40.4853% of Attack Power) damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

 Blood
Viciously slice into the soul of your enemy, dealing (368.55% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and applying Reaper's Mark.

Each time you deal Shadow or Frost damage, add a stack of Reaper's Mark. After 12 sec or reaching 40 stacks, the mark explodes, dealing (45.348% of Attack Power) damage per stack.

Reaper's Mark travels to an unmarked enemy nearby if the target dies.

439851.name: Wave of Souls
439851.description:
Blood
Reaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing (211.92% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path.

Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take 5% increased Shadowfrost damage for 15 sec, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back.

 Frost
Reaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing (96.7079% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path.

Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take 5% increased Shadowfrost damage for 15 sec, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back.

439868.name: Hunt Beneath the Open Skies
439868.description:
Damage and healing while in Cat Form increased by 3%.

Moonfire and Sunfire damage increased by 10%.

439880.name: Resilient Flourishing
439880.description:
Bloodseeker Vines and Symbiotic Blooms last 2 additional sec.

When a target afflicted by Bloodseeker Vines dies, the vines jump to a valid nearby target for their remaining duration.

439882.name: Root Network
439882.description:
Each active Bloodseeker Vine increases the damage your abilities deal by 2%.

Each active Symbiotic Bloom increases the healing of your spells by 2%.

439890.name: Strategic Infusion
439890.description:
Restoration
Attacking from Prowl increases the chance for Shred, Rake, and Swipe to critically strike by 8% for 6 sec.

Your periodic heals have a 4% increased chance to critically heal.

 Feral
Tiger's Fury and attacking from Prowl increase the chance for Shred, Rake, and Swipe to critically strike by 8% for 6 sec.

Your periodic heals have a 4% increased chance to critically heal.

439895.name: Entangling Vortex
439895.description: Enemies pulled into Ursol's Vortex are rooted in place for 3 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

439901.name: Flower Walk
439901.description: During Barkskin your movement speed is increased by 10% and every second flowers grow beneath your feet that heal up to 3 nearby injured allies for (20% of Spell Power).

439926.name: Wildstalker's Power
439926.description:
Feral
Rip and Ferocious Bite damage increased by 5%.

Rejuvenation healing increased by 10%.

 Restoration
Rip and Ferocious Bite damage increased by 5%.

Rejuvenation, Efflorescence, and Lifebloom healing increased by 10%.

439929.name: Bond with Nature
439929.description: Healing you receive is increased by 4%.

439948.name: Expelling Shield
439948.description: When an enemy deals direct damage to your Anti-Magic Shell, their cast speed is reduced by 10% for 6 sec.

440006.name: Purify Disease
440006.description: Removes all Disease effects from a friendly target.

440012.name: Cleanse Spirit
440012.description: Removes all Curse effects from a friendly target.

440013.name: Cleanse Toxins
440013.description: Cleanses a friendly target, removing all Poison and Disease effects..

440015.name: Remove Corruption
440015.description: Nullifies corrupting effects on the friendly target, removing all Curse and Poison effects.

440031.name: Bind in Darkness
440031.description:
Blood
Blood Boil deals 30% increased damage, and is now Shadowfrost.

Shadowfrost damage applies 2 stacks to Reaper's Mark and 4 stacks when it is a critical strike.

 Frost
Rime empowered Howling Blast deals 60% increased damage to its main target, and is now Shadowfrost.

Shadowfrost damage applies 2 stacks to Reaper's Mark and 4 stacks when it is a critical strike.

440040.name: Xalan's Cruelty
440040.description:
Destruction
Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 5% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

 Affliction
Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

440043.name: Blackened Soul
440043.description:
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by 1.

Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every 1 sec to deal (99.6334% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

440044.name: Xalan's Ferocity
440044.description:
Destruction
Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 5% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

 Affliction
Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

440045.name: Mark of Peroth'arn
440045.description:
Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by 10%. 

Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

440046.name: Mark of Xavius
440046.description:
[Agony: Agony damage increased by 30% / Wither damage increased by 25%.]

Blackened Soul deals 2% increased damage per stack of Wither.

440048.name: Hatefury Rituals
440048.description: Wither deals 30% increased periodic damage but its duration is 15% shorter.

440051.name: Bleakheart Tactics
440051.description: Wither damage increased 20%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.

440055.name: Seeds of Their Demise
440055.description:
Destruction
After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals (99.6334% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 sec until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain 2 stacks of Flashpoint.

 Affliction
After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals (99.6334% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 sec until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain Shard Instability.

440057.name: Curse of the Satyr
440057.description:
Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr.

 Curse of the Satyr
Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% and the casting time of all spells by 30% for 2 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

440059.name: Aura of Enfeeblement
440059.description: While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within 30 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at 100% effectiveness.

440065.name: Zevrim's Resilience
440065.description: Dark Pact heals you for (164.583% of Spell Power) every 1 sec while active.

440070.name: Illhoof's Design
440070.description: Sacrifice 10% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional 15% of your maximum health.

440116.name: Harmonious Constitution
440116.description:
Feral
Your Regrowth's healing to yourself is increased by 25%.

 Restoration
Your Regrowth's healing to yourself is increased by 35%.

440117.name: Twin Sprouts
440117.description: When Bloodseeker Vines or Symbiotic Blooms grow, they have a 30% chance to cause another growth of the same type to immediately grow on a valid nearby target.

440118.name: Implant
440118.description:
Restoration
Casting Swiftmend or Wild Growth causes a Symbiotic Bloom to grow on a target for 6 sec.

 Feral
When you gain or lose Tiger's Fury, your next single-target melee ability causes a Bloodseeker Vine to grow on the target for 4 sec.

440119.name: Vigorous Creepers
440119.description:
Bloodseeker Vines increase the damage your abilities deal to affected enemies by 4%.

Symbiotic Blooms increase the healing your spells do to affected targets by 20%.

440120.name: Bursting Growth
440120.description:
When Bloodseeker Vines expire or you use Ferocious Bite on their target they explode in thorns, dealing (86.4% of Attack Power) physical damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

When Symbiotic Blooms expire or you cast Rejuvenation on their target flowers grow around their target, healing them and up to 3 nearby allies for (42.09% of Spell Power).

440282.name: Rune Carved Plates
440282.description: Each Rune spent reduces the magic damage you take by 1.5% and each Rune generated reduces the physical damage you take by 1.5% for 5 sec, up to 5 times.

440476.name: Pact of the Deathbringer
440476.description:
