When you suffer a damaging effect equal to 25% of your maximum health, you instantly cast Death Pact at 50% effectiveness. May only occur every 2 min.

When a Reaper's Mark explodes, the cooldowns of this effect and Death Pact are reduced by 5 sec.

440662.name: Preventive Measures
440662.description:
Holy
Increases the healing done by Prayer of Mending by 15%.

All damage dealt by Smite, Holy Fire and Holy Nova increased by 40%.

 Discipline
Power Word: Shield absorbs 30% additional damage.

All damage dealt by Penance, Smite and Holy Nova increased by 15%.

440669.name: Save the Day
440669.description: For 6 sec after casting Leap of Faith you may cast it a second time for free, ignoring its cooldown.

440670.name: Divine Feathers
440670.description:
Your Angelic Feathers increase movement speed by an additional 10%.

When an ally walks through your Angelic Feather, you are also granted 100% of its effect.

440671.name: Preemptive Care
440671.description:
Discipline
Increases the duration of Atonement by 4 sec.

 Holy
Increases the duration of your Renew by 40%.

440681.name: Waste No Time
440681.description:
Discipline
Reduces the cooldown of Power Word: Shield by 1.5 sec.

 Holy
Reduces the cooldown of Prayer of Mending by 1.5 sec.

440738.name: Foreseen Circumstances
440738.description:
Holy
Guardian Spirit lasts an additional 2 sec.

 Discipline
Pain Suppression reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

440742.name: Twinsight
440742.description:
Discipline
3 additional Penance bolts are fired at an enemy within 40 yards when healing an ally with Penance, or fired at an ally within 40 yards when damaging an enemy with Penance.

 Holy
An additional 4 stacks of Prayer of Mending is placed on a second ally within 40 yards when casting Prayer of Mending.

440766.name: Assured Safety
440766.description:
Holy
Casting Prayer of Mending applies Power Word: Shield to your target.

 Power Word: Shield
Shields an ally for 15 sec, absorbing 0 damage.

 Discipline
Power Word: Shield casts apply 4 stacks of Prayer of Mending to your target.

 Prayer of Mending
Places a ward on an ally that heals them for (61% of Spell Power) the next time they take damage, and then jumps to another ally within 30 yds. Jumps up to 4 times and lasts 30 sec after each jump.

440992.name: Earthquaker
440992.description: Shockwave also knocks enemies into the air and its cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

440993.name: Veteran Vitality
440993.description:
When your health is brought below 35%, you gain a Second Wind, healing you for 12% of your max health over 2 sec.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 60 sec.

440995.name: Arterial Bleed
440995.description: Colossal Might increases the damage of your Rend and Deep Wounds by 3% per stack.

441146.name: Unseen Blade
441146.description:
Subtlety
 and Shadowstrike now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing (280% of Attack Power) damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.

Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.

This effect may occur once every 20 sec.

 Outlaw
Sinister Strike and Ambush now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing (280% of Attack Power) damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.

Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.

This effect may occur once every 20 sec.

441176.name: Melt Armor
441176.description:
Augmentation
Deep Breath causes enemies to take 20% increased damage from Bombardments and Essence abilities for 12 sec.

 Preservation
Deep Breath causes enemies to take 20% increased damage from Bombardments and Essence abilities for 12 sec.

 Devastation
Deep Breath causes enemies to take 20% increased damage from Bombardments and Essence abilities for 12 sec.

The duration of this effect is extended when Deep Breath is cast multiple times.

441180.name: Hardened Scales
441180.description: Obsidian Scales reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

441181.name: Menacing Presence
441181.description: Knocking enemies up or backwards reduces their damage done to you by 15% for 8 sec.

441206.name: Wingleader
441206.description:
Preservation,  Augmentation
Bombardments reduce the cooldown of Breath of Eons by 1.0 sec for each target struck, up to 3.0 sec.

 Devastation
Bombardments reduce the cooldown of Deep Breath by 0.5 sec for each target struck, up to 1.5 sec.

441212.name: Extended Battle
441212.description: Essence abilities extend Bombardments by 1 sec.

441219.name: Diverted Power
441219.description: Bombardments have a chance to generate Essence Burst.

441245.name: Onslaught
441245.description: Entering combat grants a charge of Burnout, causing your next Living Flame to cast instantly.

441246.name: Unrelenting Siege
441246.description:
Devastation
For each second you are in combat, Azure Strike, Living Flame, and Disintegrate deal 1% increased damage, up to 15%.

 Preservation,  Augmentation
For each second you are in combat, Azure Strike, Living Flame, and Eruption deal 1% increased damage, up to 15%.

441247.name: Smoke
441247.description: You take 5% reduced damage from Fazed targets.

441250.name: Mirrors
441250.description: Feint reduces damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by an additional 10%

441253.name: Nimble Flyer
441253.description: While Hovering, damage taken from area of effect attacks is reduced by 10%.

441257.name: Slipstream
441257.description: [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] resets a charge of Hover.

441263.name: Devious Distractions
441263.description:
Outlaw
Killing Spree applies Fazed to any targets struck.

 Subtlety
Secret Technique applies Fazed to any targets struck.

441273.name: Surprising Strikes
441273.description: Attacks that generate combo points deal 50% increased critical strike damage to Fazed targets.

441274.name: Disorienting Strikes
441274.description:
Outlaw
Killing Spree has 10% reduced cooldown and allows your next 2 strikes of Unseen Blade to ignore its cooldown.

 Subtlety
Secret Technique has 10% reduced cooldown and allows your next 2 strikes of Unseen Blade to ignore its cooldown.

441321.name: Flawless Form
441321.description:
Outlaw
Unseen Blade and Killing Spree increase the damage of your finishing moves by 4% for 12 sec. Max 5 stacks.

 Subtlety
Unseen Blade and Secret Technique increase the damage of your finishing moves by 2% for 12 sec. Max 5 stacks.

441346.name: Thousand Cuts
441346.description: Slice and Dice grants 10% additional attack speed and gives your auto-attacks a chance to refresh your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

441359.name: Flickerstrike
441359.description:
Taking damage from an area-of-effect attack while Feint is active or dodging while Evasion is active refreshes your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

441367.name: Nimble Flurry
441367.description:
Outlaw
Blade Flurry damage is increased by 25% while Flawless Form is active.

 Subtlety
Your auto-attacks, Unseen Blade, and Coup de Grace also strike up to 7 nearby enemies for 50% of normal damage while Flawless Form is active.

441378.name: Exterminate
441378.description:
Blood
After Reaper's Mark explodes, your next 2 Marrowrends cost 1 Rune and summon 2 scythes to strike your enemies.

The first scythe strikes your target for (858.54% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and the second scythe strikes all enemies around your target for (469.2% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage[and applies Frost Fever]. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

 Frost
After Reaper's Mark explodes, your next 2 Obliterates or Frostscythes cost 1 Rune and summon 2 scythes to strike your enemies.

The first scythe strikes your target for (530.368% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage and has a 100% chance to grant Killing Machine, the second scythe strikes all enemies around your target for (214.468% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage[and applies Frost Fever]. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

441398.name: No Scruples
441398.description: Finishing moves have 12% increased chance to critically strike Fazed targets.

441403.name: So Tricky
441403.description: Tricks of the Trade's threat redirect duration is increased to 1 hour.

441415.name: Don't Be Suspicious
441415.description:
Blind and Shroud of Concealment have 10% reduced cooldown.

Pick Pocket and Sap have 10 yd increased range.

441423.name: Coup de Grace
441423.description:
Outlaw
After 4 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next Dispatch will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed 5 additional combo points, and granting you 5 stacks of Flawless Form.

 Subtlety
After 4 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next Eviscerate will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed 5 additional combo points, and granting you 5 stacks of Flawless Form.

441429.name: Cloud Cover
441429.description:
Outlaw
Activating Adrenaline Rush creates a cloud of smoke for 6 sec, allowing attacks from within the cloud to apply Fazed, stacking up to 1 additional time.

Effect persists for 6 sec after leaving the cloud.

 Subtlety
Activating Shadow Blades creates a cloud of smoke for 6 sec, allowing attacks from within the cloud to apply Fazed, stacking up to 2 additional times.

Effect persists for 6 sec after leaving the cloud.

441583.name: Ravage
441583.description:
Feral
Your auto-attacks have a chance to make your next Ferocious Bite become Ravage.

Ravage
Finishing move that slashes through your target in a wide arc, dealing Physical damage per combo point to your target and consuming up to 25 additional Energy to increase that damage by up to 100%. Hits all other enemies in front of you for reduced damage per combo point spent. 

1 point: [(185.6% of Attack Power) / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) / 5] in an arc
2 points: [(185.6% of Attack Power) * 2 / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) * 2 / 5] in an arc
3 points: [(185.6% of Attack Power) * 3 / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) * 3 / 5] in an arc
4 points: [(185.6% of Attack Power) * 4 / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) * 4 / 5] in an arc
5 points: [(185.6% of Attack Power) * 5 / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) * 5 / 5] in an arc

 Guardian
Your auto-attacks have a chance to make your next Maul become Ravage.

Ravage
Slash through your target in a wide arc, dealing (272% of Attack Power) Physical damage to your target and (142.8% of Attack Power) to all other enemies in front of you.

441675.name: Fount of Strength
441675.description:
Your maximum Energy and Rage are increased by 20.

Frenzied Regeneration also increases your maximum health by 10%.

441678.name: Wildshape Mastery
441678.description:
Feral,  Guardian
Ironfur and Frenzied Regeneration persist in Cat Form.

When transforming from Bear to Cat Form, you retain 80% of your Bear Form armor and health for 6 sec.

For 6 sec after entering Bear Form, you heal for 10% of damage taken over 8 sec.

441689.name: Empowered Shapeshifting
441689.description:
Frenzied Regeneration can be cast in Cat Form for 40 Energy.

Bear Form reduces magic damage you take by 6%.

Shred and [Brutal Slash / Swipe] damage increased by 10%. Mangle damage increased by 25%.

441691.name: Wildpower Surge
441691.description:
Feral
Shred and Swipe grant Ursine Potential. When you have 8 stacks, the next time you transform into Bear Form, your next Mangle deals 50% increased damage or your next Swipe deals 50% increased damage. Either generates 15 extra Rage.

 Guardian
Mangle grants Feline Potential. When you have 6 stacks, the next time you transform into Cat Form, gain 5 combo points and your next Ferocious Bite or Rip deals 50% increased damage for its full duration.

441809.name: Dreadful Wound
441809.description:
Guardian
Ravage also inflicts a Bleed that causes (100% of Attack Power) damage over 6 sec and saps its victims' strength, reducing damage they deal to you by 15%.

Dreadful Wound is not affected by Circle of Life and Death. 

 Feral
Ravage also inflicts a Bleed that causes (50.4% of Attack Power) damage over 6 sec and saps its victims' strength, reducing damage they deal to you by 4%.

Dreadful Wound is not affected by Circle of Life and Death. If a Dreadful Wound benefiting from Tiger's Fury is re-applied, the new Dreadful Wound deals damage as if Tiger's Fury was active.

441814.name: Ruthless Aggression
441814.description: Ravage increases your auto-attack speed by 35% for 6 sec.

441824.name: Killing Strikes
441824.description:
Guardian
Ravage increases your Agility by 8% and the armor granted by Ironfur by 20% for 8 sec.

Your first Mangle after entering combat makes your next Maul become Ravage.

 Feral
Ravage increases your Agility by 8% and the armor granted by Ironfur by 20% for 8 sec.

Your first Tiger's Fury after entering combat makes your next Ferocious Bite become Ravage.

441829.name: Aggravate Wounds
441829.description:
Feral,  Guardian
Every [Maul, Raze, Mangle,  Thrash, or Swipe / attack with an Energy cost that] you cast extends the duration of your Dreadful Wounds by 0.6 sec, up to 8 additional sec.

441835.name: Claw Rampage
441835.description:
Guardian
During Berserk, Mangle, Thrash, and Swipe have a 20% chance to make your next Maul become Ravage.

 Feral
During Berserk, Shred, and Swipe have a 20% chance to make your next Ferocious Bite become Ravage.

441841.name: Bestial Strength
441841.description:
Feral
Ferocious Bite and Rampant Ferocity damage increased by 10% and Primal Wrath's direct damage increased by 60%.

 Guardian
Maul and Raze damage increased by 10%.

441844.name: Pack's Endurance
441844.description: Stampeding Roar's duration is increased by 25%.

441845.name: Strike for the Heart
441845.description:
Guardian
Mangle damage increased by 10% and its critical strike chance is increased by 10%.

Mangle heals you for 5% of maximum health.

 Feral
Shred, Swipe, and Rake damage increased by 10% and their critical strike chance is increased by 5%.

441846.name: Tear Down the Mighty
441846.description:
Feral (Frantic Frenzy)
Damage dealt by Chomp and Feral Frenzy.

 Feral
Damage dealt by Chomp and Frantic Frenzy increased by 25%.

 Guardian
The cooldown of Sundering Roar is reduced by 15 sec.

441894.name: Wither Away
441894.description:
Blood
Blood Plague deals its damage 100% faster, and the second scythe of Exterminate applies Blood Plague.

 Frost
Frost Fever deals its damage 100% faster, and the second scythe of Exterminate applies Frost Fever.

442290.name: Art of the Glaive
442290.description:
Vengeance
Consuming 20 Soul Fragments or casting Sigil of Spite converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive.

 Reaver's Glaive: 
Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing (385% of Attack Power) Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies.
 
Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next  and Soul Cleave.

The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.

 Havoc
Consuming 6 Soul Fragments or casting The Hunt converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive.

 Reaver's Glaive: 
Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing (385% of Attack Power) Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies.
 
Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next Chaos Strike and Blade Dance.

The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.

442492.name: Incisive Blade
442492.description:
Havoc
Chaos Strike deals 10% increased damage.

 Vengeance
Soul Cleave deals 10% increased damage.

442502.name: Warblade's Hunger
442502.description:
Vengeance
Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next  to deal (62% of Attack Power) additional Physical damage.

 Havoc
Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next Chaos Strike to deal (62% of Attack Power) additional Physical damage.

Felblade consumes up to 5 nearby Soul Fragments.

442679.name: Reaver's Mark
442679.description:
Vengeance
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive,  applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks.

Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Soul Cleave.

 Havoc
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Chaos Strike applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks.

Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Blade Dance.

442683.name: Aldrachi Tactics
442683.description: The second enhanced ability in a pattern shatters an additional Soul Fragment.

442686.name: Thrill of the Fight
442686.description: After consuming both enhancements, gain Thrill of the Fight, increasing the damage of your next Reaver's Glaive by 30% and increasing Haste by 8% for 30 sec.

442687.name: Xuen's Guidance
442687.description:
Teachings of the Monastery has a 15% chance to refund a charge when consumed. 

The damage of Tiger Palm is increased by 10%.

442714.name: Army Unto Oneself
442714.description: Felblade surrounds you with a Blade Ward, reducing damage taken by 10% for 5 sec.

442718.name: Fury of the Aldrachi
442718.description:
Havoc
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Blade Dance casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

If cast after Chaos Strike, cast 6 slashes instead.

 Vengeance
When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Soul Cleave casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

If cast after , cast 6 slashes instead.

442719.name: Restore Balance
442719.description:
Windwalker
Damage increased by 5% while Xuen, the White Tiger is active.

 Mistweaver
Healing increased by 5% while Chi-Ji, the Red Crane or Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent is active.

442726.name: Malevolence
442726.description:
Dark magic erupts from you and corrupts your soul for 20 sec, causing enemies suffering from your Wither to take (1265.51% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage and increase its stack count by 6.

While corrupted your Haste is increased by 8% and spending Soul Shards on damaging spells grants 1 additional stack of Wither.

442736.name: Incorruptible Spirit
442736.description:
Vengeance
Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 10% of the amount healed.

 Havoc
Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 15% of the amount healed.

442743.name: Temple Training
442743.description:
Windwalker
Fists of Fury and Spinning Crane Kick deal 10% more damage.

 Mistweaver
The healing of Enveloping Mist, Vivify, and Sheilun's Gift is increased by 6%.

442747.name: Niuzao's Protection
442747.description: Fortifying Brew grants you an absorb shield for 25% of your maximum health.

442806.name: Wounded Quarry
442806.description:
Vengeance
Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark, causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 25% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

 Havoc
Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark, causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 30% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

443028.name: Celestial Conduit
443028.description:
Brewmaster,  Windwalker
The August Celestials empower you, causing you to radiate [(220% of Attack Power) * 5] Nature damage onto enemies and [(1100% of Spell Power) * 5] healing onto up to 5 injured allies within 15 yds over 4 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

You may move while channeling, but casting other healing or damaging spells cancels this effect.

 Mistweaver
The August Celestials empower you, causing you to radiate [(1100% of Spell Power) * 5] healing onto up to 5 injured allies and [(220% of Attack Power) * 5] Nature damage onto enemies within 20 yds over 4 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

You may move while channeling, but casting other healing or damaging spells cancels this effect.

443046.name: Elune's Grace
443046.description: Using Wild Charge while in Bear Form or Moonkin Form incurs a 3 sec shorter cooldown.

443059.name: Jade Sanctuary
443059.description:
You heal for 10% of your maximum health instantly when you activate Celestial Conduit and receive 15% less damage for its duration. 

This effect lingers for an additional 8 sec after Celestial Conduit ends.

443087.name: Courage of the White Tiger
443087.description:
Windwalker
Tiger Palm has a chance to cause Xuen to claw your target for (337.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage, healing a nearby ally for 100% of the damage done.

Invoke Xuen, the White Tiger guarantees your next cast activates this effect.

 Mistweaver
Tiger Palm, Vivify, and Sheilun's Gift have a chance to cause Xuen to claw a nearby enemy for (337.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage, healing a nearby ally for 100% of the damage done.

Invoke Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent or Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane guarantees your next cast activates this effect.

443110.name: Strength of the Black Ox
443110.description:
Windwalker
After Xuen assists you, your next Blackout Kick refunds 2 stacks of Teachings of the Monastery and causes Niuzao to stomp at your target's location, dealing (200% of Attack Power) damage to nearby enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

 Mistweaver
After Xuen assists you, your next Enveloping Mist's cast time is reduced by 50% and causes Niuzao to grant an absorb shield to 5 nearby allies for 0.

443177.name: Lifespark
443177.description: Reversion healing has a chance to cause your next Living Flame to cast instantly and deal 50% increased healing or damage. Stacks up to 2 charges.

443264.name: Titan's Gift
443264.description: Essence Burst increases the effectiveness of your next Essence ability by 35%.

443294.name: Heart of the Jade Serpent
443294.description:
Windwalker
Strike of the Windlord and Whirling Dragon Punch call upon Yu'lon to increase the cooldown recovery rate of Fists of Fury, Strike of the Windlord, Rising Sun Kick, and Whirling Dragon Punch by 75% for 8 sec. 

The channel time of Fists of Fury is reduced by 50% while Yu'lon is active.

 Mistweaver
Thunder Focus Tea calls upon Yu'lon to increase the cooldown recovery rate of Renewing Mist, Rising Sun Kick, Life Cocoon, and Thunder Focus Tea by 75% for 8 sec.

443418.name: Elemental Reverb
443418.description:
Elemental
Lava Burst gains an additional charge and deals 10% increased damage.

 Restoration
Lava Burst gains an additional charge and deals 10% increased damage.

Riptide gains an additional charge and heals for 20% more.

443423.name: Ancient Fellowship
443423.description: Ancestors have a 20% chance to call another Ancestor for 8 sec when they depart.

443425.name: Spiritwalker's Momentum
443425.description: Using spells with a cast time increases the duration of Spiritwalker's Grace and Spiritwalker's Aegis by 1 sec, up to a maximum of 4 sec.

443441.name: Earthen Communion
443441.description: Earth Shield has an additional 3 charges and heals you for 25% more.

443442.name: Natural Harmony
443442.description: Reduces the cooldown of Nature's Guardian by 15 sec and causes it to heal for an additional 10% of your maximum health.

443445.name: Routine Communication
443445.description:
Elemental
Lightning Bolt, Lava Burst, Flame Shock, Voltaic Blaze, and Chain Lightning have a 8% chance to call an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

 Restoration
Riptide has a 15% chance to call an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

443446.name: Final Calling
443446.description:
Elemental
When an Ancestor departs, they cast Elemental Blast at a nearby enemy.

 Restoration
When an Ancestor departs, they cast Hydrobubble on a nearby injured ally.

 Hydrobubble
Surrounds your target in a protective water bubble for 15 sec.

The shield absorbs the next 0 incoming damage, but the absorb amount decays fully over its duration.

443447.name: Maelstrom Supremacy
443447.description:
Elemental
Increases the damage of Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake by 25%.

Increases the healing of Healing Surge and Chain Heal by 25%.

 Restoration
Increases the healing done by Healing Wave, Downpour, and Chain Heal by 25%.

443448.name: Primordial Capacity
443448.description:
Elemental
Increases your maximum Maelstrom by 25.

 Restoration
Increases your maximum mana by 10%.

Tidal Waves can now stack up to 3 times.

443449.name: Latent Wisdom
443449.description: Your Ancestors' spells are 25% more powerful.

443450.name: Call of the Ancestors
443450.description:
Elemental
Stormkeeper calls an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

Whenever you cast a healing or damaging spell, the Ancestor will cast a similar spell.

 Restoration
Unleash Life calls an Ancestor to your side for 12 sec.

Whenever you cast a healing or damaging spell, the Ancestor will cast a similar spell.

443451.name: Offering from Beyond
443451.description:
Restoration
When an Ancestor is called, they reduce the cooldown of Riptide by 2 sec.

 Elemental
When an Ancestor is called, they reduce the cooldown of Stormkeeper by 3 sec.

443454.name: Ancestral Swiftness
443454.description:
Your next healing or damaging spell is instant, costs no mana, and deals 10% increased damage and healing.

If you know Nature's Swiftness, it is replaced by Ancestral Swiftness and causes Ancestral Swiftness to call an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

443560.name: Swift and Painful
443560.description:
Blood
If no enemies are struck by Soul Rupture, you gain 10% Strength for 8 sec.

Wave of Souls is 100% more effective on the main target of your Reaper's Mark.

 Frost
If no enemies are struck by Soul Rupture, you gain 8% Strength for 8 sec.

Wave of Souls is 100% more effective on the main target of your Reaper's Mark.

443566.name: Chi-Ji's Swiftness
443566.description: Your movement speed is increased by 75% during Celestial Conduit and by 15% for 3 sec after being assisted by any Celestial.

443571.name: Inner Compass
443571.description:
You switch between alignments every 8 sec, increasing a corresponding secondary stat by 2%.

Crane Stance:
Haste

Tiger Stance:
Critical Strike

Ox Stance:
Versatility

Serpent Stance: 
Mastery

443589.name: Unity Within
443589.description:
Celestial Conduit can be recast once during its duration to call upon all of the August Celestials to assist you at 200% effectiveness.

Unity Within is automatically cast when Celestial Conduit ends if not used before expiration.

443625.name: Yu'lon's Knowledge
443625.description: Rising Sun Kick damage increased by 15%.

443739.name: Splintering Sorcery
443739.description:
Arcane
Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Pulse conjures an Arcane Splinter.

Arcane Splinter:
Conjure raw Arcane magic into a sharp projectile that deals (43.65% of Spell Power) Arcane damage.


 Frost
Casting Frostbolt or Flurry conjures a Frost Splinter.

Frost Splinter:
Conjure raw Frost magic into a sharp projectile that deals (45.3% of Spell Power) Frost damage.

443783.name: Splinterstorm
443783.description:
Arcane
Casting Arcane Surge generates 8 Arcane Splinters.

During Arcane Surge, your chance to conjure an additional Arcane Splinter is increased to 100%.

 Frost
Each time Ray of Frost damages one or more enemies, it generates 1 Frost Splinter.

For 10 sec after casting Ray of Frost, your chance to conjure an additional Frost Splinter is increased to 100%.

444005.name: Rider's Champion
444005.description:
Spending Runes has a chance to call forth the aid of a Horsemen for 10 sec.

Mograine
Casts Death and Decay at his location that follows his position and extends the duration of your diseases by 1.0 sec whenever it deals damage.

Whitemane
Casts Undeath on your target dealing (6.86532% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage per stack every 3 sec, for 24 sec. Each time Undeath deals damage it gains a stack. Cannot be refreshed.

Trollbane
Casts Chains of Ice on your target slowing their movement speed by 40% and increasing the damage they take from you by 5% for 8 sec.

Nazgrim
While Nazgrim is active you gain Apocalyptic Conquest, increasing your Strength by 5%.

444008.name: On a Paler Horse
444008.description: While outdoors you are able to mount your Acherus Deathcharger in combat.

444010.name: Death Charge
444010.description:
Call upon your Death Charger to break free of movement impairment effects.

For 10 sec, while upon your Death Charger your movement speed is increased by 100%, you cannot be slowed below 100% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks.

444016.name: Enkindle
444016.description: Essence abilities are enhanced with Flame, dealing 20% of healing or damage done as Fire over 8 sec.

444020.name: Burning Adrenaline
444020.description:
Preservation
Fire Breath and Dream Breath reach their maximum empower level 20% faster.

 Devastation
Fire Breath reaches its maximum empower level 20% faster.

444033.name: Whitemane's Famine
444033.description:
Unholy
When  damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy.

 Frost
When Obliterate or Frostscythe damages an enemy affected by Undeath it gains 1 stack and infects another nearby enemy.

444037.name: Hungering Thirst
444037.description:
Unholy
The damage of your diseases and Death Coil are increased by 5%.

 Frost
The damage of your diseases and Frost Strike are increased by 5%.

444040.name: Apocalypse Now
444040.description: Army of the Dead and Frostwyrm's Fury call upon all 4 Horsemen to aid you for 20 sec.

444047.name: Mograine's Might
444047.description:
Frost
Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain 5% critical strike chance while inside Mograine's Death and Decay.

 Unholy
Your damage is increased by 5% and you gain the benefits of your Death and Decay while inside Mograine's Death and Decay.

444052.name: Nazgrim's Conquest
444052.description:
If an enemy dies while Nazgrim is active, the strength of Apocalyptic Conquest is increased by 3%.

Additionally, each Rune you spend increase its value by 1%.

444069.name: Fury of the Horsemen
444069.description: Every 50 Runic Power you spend extends the duration of the Horsemen's aid in combat by 1 sec, up to 5 sec.

444072.name: A Feast of Souls
444072.description:
Unholy
While you have 2 or more Horsemen aiding you, your Death Coil deals 20% and Epidemic deals 20% increased damage.

 Frost
While you have 8 or more Horsemen aiding you, your Runic Power spending abilities deal increased damage.

444074.name: Horsemen's Aid
444074.description:
While at your aid, the Horsemen will occasionally cast Anti-Magic Shell on you and themselves at 80% effectiveness.

You may only benefit from this effect every 45 sec.

444083.name: Pact of the Apocalypse
444083.description: When you take damage, 5% of the damage is redirected to each active horsemen.

444088.name: Consume Flame
444088.description:
Devastation
Disintegrate damage consumes 1.0 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 150% of the amount consumed.

Pyre damage consumes 4 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 115% of the amount consumed.

 Preservation
Verdant Embrace healing consumes 4 sec of Dream Breath from allies it heals, detonating it and healing them for 200% of the amount consumed.

Emerald Blossom healing consumes 2 sec of Dream Breath from allies it heals, detonating it and healing them for 200% of the amount consumed.

444097.name: Trollbane's Icy Fury
444097.description:
Unholy
 shatters Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing (105.3% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

 Frost
Obliterate and Frostscythe shatter Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing (105.3% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

444099.name: Mawsworn Menace
444099.description:
Unholy
% increased damage and the cooldown of your Death and Decay is reduced by 5 sec.

 Frost
Obliterate deals 5% increased damage and your Remorseless Winter lasts 2 sec longer.

444256.name: Splintering Orbs
444256.description:
Arcane
Enemies damaged by your Arcane Orb conjure 2 Arcane Splinters, up to 4.

Arcane Orb damage is increased by 10%.

 Frost
Enemies damaged by your Frozen Orb conjure 1 Frost Splinter, up to 4.

Frozen Orb damage is increased by 40%.

444322.name: Lifecinders
444322.description: Obsidian Scales also applies to your target or 1 nearby injured ally at 50% value.

444483.name: Controlled Instincts
444483.description:
Arcane
40% of the direct damage dealt by an Arcane Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

 Frost
60% of the direct damage dealt by a Frost Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

444675.name: Shifting Shards
444675.description:
Frost
Gaining Brain Freeze conjures 2 Frost Splinters.

 Arcane
Gaining Clearcasting conjures 2 Arcane Splinters.

444719.name: Force of Will
444719.description:
Arcane
Casting Arcane Barrage conjures an Arcane Splinter for every 5 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed.

 Frost
Ice Lance conjures a Frost Splinter for every 2 Freezing stacks Shattered from its primary target.

444752.name: Slippery Slinging
444752.description: You have 40% increased movement speed during Alter Time.

444756.name: Look Again
444756.description: While in combat, Blink summons a Mirror Image at your previous location.

444767.name: Slayer's Dominance
444767.description: Your attacks against your primary target have a 15% chance to overwhelm their defenses and trigger a Slayer's Strike, dealing (840.42% of Attack Power) Physical damage and granting you a stack of Executioner, increasing your Execute damage by 3% for 12 sec. Multiple stacks of Executioner may overlap.

444769.name: Imminent Demise
444769.description:
Every 3 Slayer's Strikes you gain Sudden Death.

Using Sudden Death accelerates your next Bladestorm, striking 1 additional time (max 3). Bladestorm's total duration is unchanged.

Sudden Death has a 100% chance to trigger Reap the Storm at 100% effectiveness.

444770.name: Death Drive
444770.description: You heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sudden Death.

444771.name: Show No Mercy
444771.description: Executioner also increases your Execute critical strike chance and critical strike damage by 3% per stack.

444772.name: Overwhelming Blades
444772.description: Each strike of Bladestorm applies Overwhelmed to all enemies affected, increasing damage you deal to them by 1% for 20 sec, max 5 stacks.

444773.name: Fierce Followthrough
444773.description:
Fury
Bloodthirst critical strikes increase the damage of your next Bloodthirst by 20%.

 Arms
Mortal Strike critical strikes increase the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 20%.

444774.name: Opportunist
444774.description:
Arms
When Overpower has its cooldown reset by Tactician, your next Overpower deals 10% additional damage and 10% additional critical damage. Stacking up to 2 times.

 Fury
When Raging Blow resets its own cooldown, your next Raging Blow deals 10% additional damage and 10% additional critical damage. Stacking up to 2 times.

444775.name: Reap the Storm
444775.description:
Arms
When Cleave hits 3 or more targets you have a 20% chance to unleash a flurry of steel, striking all nearby enemies for (771.909% of Attack Power) Physical damage and applying Overwhelmed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

 Fury
When Rampage hits 3 or more targets via Improved Whirlwind you have a 20% chance to unleash a flurry of steel, striking all nearby enemies for (771.909% of Attack Power) Physical damage and applying Overwhelmed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

444776.name: Relentless Pursuit
444776.description:
Charge increases your movement speed by 70% for 3 sec.

Charge removes all movement impairing effects, this effect cannot occur more than once every 30 sec.

444777.name: Vicious Agility
444777.description: Heroic Leap reduces the cooldown of Charge by 5 sec and Charge reduces the cooldown of Heroic Leap by 2 sec.

444778.name: Culling Cyclone
444778.description: Each strike of Bladestorm deals an additional 20% damage evenly split across all targets.

444779.name: Slayer's Malice
444779.description:
Arms
Overpower and Execute damage increased by 15%.

 Fury
Raging Blow and Execute damage increased by 15%.

444780.name: Unrelenting Onslaught
444780.description:
Using Sudden Death causes you to both reduce the cooldown of Bladestorm by 5 sec and apply 1 stack of Overwhelmed to your primary target per stack of Executioner you have.

You can use Pummel and Storm Bolt while Bladestorming.

Bladestorm damage increased by 20%.

444784.name: Phantasmal Image
444784.description: Your Mirror Image summons 1 extra clone.

444827.name: Reactive Barrier
444827.description:
Frost
Your Ice Barrier can absorb up to 25% more damage based on your missing Health.

Max effectiveness when under 25% health.

 Arcane
Your Prismatic Barrier can absorb up to 25% more damage based on your missing Health.

Max effectiveness when under 25% health.

444843.name: Conduit of Flame
444843.description: Critical strike chance against targets above 50% health increased by 15%.

444845.name: Expanded Lungs
444845.description: Fire Breath's damage over time is increased by 30%. Dream Breath's heal over time is increased by 30%.

444849.name: Trailblazer
444849.description:
Devastation
Hover and Deep Breath travel 40% faster, and Hover travels 40% further.

 Preservation
Hover, Deep Breath, and Dream Flight travel 40% faster, and Hover travels 40% further.

444926.name: Evasive Action
444926.description: Vengeful Retreat can be cast a second time within 3 sec.

444931.name: Unhindered Assault
444931.description: Vengeful Retreat resets the cooldown of Felblade.

444968.name: Archmage's Wrath
444968.description:
Arcane
Arcane Surge damage increased by 30%.

Your chance to gain Clearcasting is increased by 3%.

 Frost
Ray of Frost damage increased by 20%.

Your chance to gain Brain Freeze from Frostbolt is increased by 5%.

444986.name: Spellfrost Teachings
444986.description:
Arcane
Direct damage from Arcane Splinters reduces the cooldown of Arcane Orb by 0.25 sec.

 Frost
Direct damage from Frost Splinters reduces the cooldown of Frozen Orb by 0.25 sec.

444995.name: Surging Totem
444995.description:
Enhancement
Summons a totem at the target location that creates a Tremor immediately and every 6 sec for (122.382% of Attack Power) Flamestrike damage. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Lasts 25 sec.

 Restoration
Summons a totem at the target location that maintains Healing Rain with 20% increased effectiveness for 25 sec.

Replaces Healing Rain.

444997.name: Preemptive Strike
444997.description: Throw Glaive deals (20% of Attack Power) Physical damage to enemies near its initial target.

445024.name: Whirling Elements
445024.description:
Enhancement
Elemental motes orbit around your Surging Totem. Your abilities consume the motes for enhanced effects. 

Air: [ Enhancement: Your next Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning or Elemental Blast unleashes 3 Surging Bolts at your Surging Totem / 

 Elemental,  Restoration
The cast time of your next healing spell is reduced by 40%]

Earth: [ Enhancement: Your next Sundering deals 100% increased damage and summons a Searing Totem / 

 Elemental,  Restoration
Your next Chain Heal applies Earthliving at 150% effectiveness to all targets hit]

Fire: Your next Lava Lash grants you Hot Hand for 8 sec.

 Restoration
Elemental motes orbit around your Surging Totem. Your abilities consume the motes for enhanced effects. 

Water: Your next Healing Wave also heals an ally inside of your Healing Rain at 50% effectiveness.

Air: [ Enhancement: Your next Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning or Elemental Blast unleashes 3 Surging Bolts at your Surging Totem / 

 Elemental,  Restoration
The cast time of your next healing spell is reduced by 40%]

Earth: [ Enhancement: Your next Sundering deals 100% increased damage and summons a Searing Totem / 

 Elemental,  Restoration
Your next Chain Heal applies Earthliving at 150% effectiveness to all targets hit]

445025.name: Totemic Rebound
445025.description:
Restoration
Chain Heal now jumps to a nearby totem within 20 yards once it reaches its last target, causing the totem to cast Chain Heal on an injured ally within 30 yards for (220.5% of Spell Power). Jumps to 2 nearby targets within 20 yards.

 Enhancement
Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning and Elemental Blast has a chance to unleash a Surging Bolt at your Surging Totem, increasing the totem's damage by 10%, and then redirecting the bolt to your target for (161% of Attack Power) Nature damage. The damage bonus effect can stack.

445026.name: Oversized Totems
445026.description: Increases the size and radius of your totems by 15%, and the health of your totems by 30%.

445027.name: Swift Recall
445027.description:
Successfully removing a harmful effect with Tremor Totem or Poison Cleansing Totem, or controlling an enemy with Capacitor Totem or Earthgrab Totem reduces the cooldown of the totem used by 5 sec.

Cannot occur more than once every 20 sec per totem.

445028.name: Imbuement Mastery
445028.description:
Enhancement
Increases the chance for Windfury Weapon to trigger by 5% and increases its damage by 8%.

When Flametongue Weapon triggers from Windfury Weapon attacks, it has a chance to gather a whirl of flame around the target, dealing 300% of its damage to all nearby enemies.

 Restoration
Increases the duration of your Earthliving effect by 3 sec.

445029.name: Amplification Core
445029.description: While Surging Totem is active, your damage and healing done is increased by 3%.

445030.name: Oversurge
445030.description: Surging Totem deals 50% more damage while Ascendance or Healing Tide Totem is active.

445031.name: Wind Barrier
445031.description: If you have a totem active, your totem grants you a shield absorbing (Total Health * 6 / 100) damage for 30 sec every 30 sec.

445032.name: Pulse Capacitor
445032.description:
Enhancement
Increases the damage of Surging Totem by 18%.

 Restoration
Increases the healing done by Surging Totem by 25%.

445033.name: Supportive Imbuements
445033.description:
Enhancement
Increases the critical strike chance of Flametongue Weapon by 25%, and its critical strike damage by 100%.

 Restoration
Learn a new weapon imbue, Tidecaller's Guard.

 Tidecaller's Guard
Imbue your shield with the element of Water for 1 hour. Your healing done is increased by 2.0% and the duration of your Healing Stream Totem is increased by 3.0 sec.

445034.name: Lively Totems
445034.description:
Enhancement
Lava Lash has a chance to summon a Searing Totem to hurl Searing Bolts that deal (65.205% of Spell Power) Fire damage to a nearby enemy. Lasts 8 sec.

Lava Lash and Voltaic Blaze cause your Searing Totems to shoot a Searing Volley at up to 5 nearby enemies for (92.736% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

 Restoration
When you summon a Healing Tide Totem, Healing Stream Totem, or Spirit Link Totem you cast a free instant Chain Heal at 100% effectiveness.

445035.name: Splitstream
445035.description:
Enhancement
While Hot Hand is active Lava Lash shatters the earth, causing a Sundering at 80% effectiveness.

 Restoration
Your Healing Stream Totems heals an additional ally at 30% effectiveness.

Healing Tide Totem healing increased by 25%.

445036.name: Totemic Coordination
445036.description:
Restoration
Chain Heals from Lively Totem and Totemic Rebound are 25% more effective.

 Enhancement
Increases the critical strike chance of your Searing Totem's attacks by 15%, and its critical strike damage by 30%.

445074.name: Shape of Flame
445074.description: Tail Swipe and Wing Buffet scorch enemies and blind them with ash, causing their next attack within 4 sec to miss.

445200.name: Blessing of An'she
445200.description:
Holy
The healing and damage of Holy Shock is increased by 15%.

 Retribution
Your damage and healing over time effects have a chance to increase the damage of your next Judgment by 50%.

445468.name: Wither
445468.description:
Destruction
Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing (19.8375% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional (296.544% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage over 18 sec.

Periodic damage generates 1 Soul Shard Fragment and has a 50% chance to generate an additional 1 on critical strikes.

Replaces Immolate.

 Affliction
Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing (19.8375% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional (296.544% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage over 18 sec.

Replaces Corruption.

445625.name: Titanic Precision
445625.description:
Devastation
Living Flame and Azure Strike have 1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when they critically strike.

 Preservation
Living Flame has 1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when it critically strikes.

445958.name: Draconic Instincts
445958.description: Your wounds have a small chance to cauterize, healing you for 30% of damage taken. Occurs more often from attacks that deal high damage.

446085.name: Brutal Finish
446085.description:
Arms
Your next Mortal Strike after Bladestorm ends deals 50% additional damage.

 Fury
Your next Rampage after Bladestorm ends deals 50% additional damage.

446260.name: Crane Style
446260.description:
Rising Sun Kick now kicks up a Gust of Mist to heal 2 allies within 40 yds for (0.1% of Spell Power). 

Spinning Crane Kick and Blackout Kick have a chance to kick up a Gust of Mist to heal 1 ally within 40 yds for (0.1% of Spell Power).

446326.name: Zen Pulse
446326.description: Renewing Mist's heal over time has a chance to cause your next [Sheilun's Gift / Vivify] to also trigger a Zen Pulse on its target and all allies with Renewing Mist, healing them for (160% of Spell Power) increased by 6% per Renewing Mist active, up to 30%.

446345.name: Deep Clarity
446345.description: After you fully consume Thunder Focus Tea, your next Vivify triggers Zen Pulse.

446663.name: Burn to Ash
446663.description:
When Truth's Wake critically strikes, its duration is extended by 2 sec.

Your other damage over time effects deal 30% increased damage to targets affected by Truth's Wake.

447131.name: Thriving Vegetation
447131.description: Rejuvenation instantly heals your target for 20% of its total periodic effect and Regrowth's duration is increased by 3 sec.

447444.name: Entropic Rift
447444.description: Mind Blast tears open an Entropic Rift that follows the enemy for 8 sec. Enemies caught in its path suffer (60% of Spell Power) Shadow damage every 1 sec while within its reach.

447985.name: Light of the Martyr
447985.description: While above 80% health, Holy Shock's healing is increased 20%, but creates a heal absorb on you for 30% of the amount healed that prevents Beacon of Light from healing you until it has dissipated.

448040.name: Bestow Light
448040.description:
Light of the Martyr's health threshold is reduced to 70% and increases Holy Shock's healing by an additional 5% for every 5 sec Light of the Martyr is active, stacking up to 3 times.

While below 70% health, the light urgently heals you for (20% of Spell Power) every 1 sec.

448278.name: Inner Quietus
448278.description:
Discipline
Power Word: Shield absorbs 20% additional damage.

 Shadow
Vampiric Touch and Shadow Word: Pain deal 20% additional damage.

448403.name: Collapsing Void
448403.description:
Discipline
Each time Penance damages or heals, Entropic Rift is empowered, increasing its damage and size by 10%.

After Entropic Rift ends it collapses, dealing (440% of Spell Power) Shadow damage split amongst enemy targets within 15 yds.

 Shadow
Each time you cast Shadow Word: Madness, Entropic Rift is empowered, increasing its damage and size by 20%.

After Entropic Rift ends it collapses, dealing (440% of Spell Power) Shadow damage split amongst enemy targets within 15 yds.

448601.name: Spellfire Spheres
448601.description:
Arcane
Casting a damaging spell has a 12% chance to conjure a Spellfire Sphere.

While you're out of combat, you will slowly conjure Spellfire Spheres over time.

 Spellfire Sphere
Increases your spell damage by 1.0%. Stacks up to 3 times.

 Fire
Consuming Hot Streak has a 25% chance to conjure a Spellfire Sphere.

While you're out of combat, you will slowly conjure Spellfire Spheres over time.

 Spellfire Sphere
Increases your spell damage by 1.0%. Stacks up to 3 times.

448658.name: Invocation: Arcane Phoenix
448658.description:
Arcane
When you cast Arcane Surge, summon an Arcane Phoenix to aid you in battle.

  Arcane Phoenix
Your Arcane Phoenix aids you for the duration of your Arcane Surge, casting random Arcane and Fire spells.

 Fire
When you cast Combustion, summon an Arcane Phoenix to aid you in battle.

  Arcane Phoenix
Your Arcane Phoenix aids you for the duration of your Combustion, casting random Arcane and Fire spells.

449182.name: Ursoc's Spirit
449182.description:
Stamina increased by 4%.

Stamina in Bear Form is increased by an additional 5%.

449184.name: Instincts of the Claw
449184.description: Ferocious Bite and Maul damage increased by 8%.

449185.name: Lore of the Grove
449185.description: Moonfire and Sunfire damage increased by 10%.

449191.name: Oakskin
449191.description: Survival Instincts and Barkskin reduce damage taken by an additional 10%.

449193.name: Fluid Form
449193.description:
Shred, Rake, and Skull Bash can be used in any form and shift you into Cat Form, if necessary. 

Mangle can be used in any form and shifts you into Bear Form. 

Wrath and Starfire shift you into Moonkin Form, if known.

449293.name: Mana Cascade
449293.description:
Arcane
Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Barrage grants you 0.5% Haste for 10 sec. Stacks up to 10 times. Multiple instances may overlap.

 Fire
Consuming Hot Streak grants you 0.5% Haste for 10 sec. Stacks up to 10 times. Multiple instances may overlap.

449330.name: Merely a Setback
449330.description:
Arcane
The bonuses provided by your Barrier spells persist an additional 8 sec after your Barrier is removed.

 Fire
The bonuses provided by your Barrier spells persist an additional 8 sec after your Barrier is removed.

Additionally, Cauterize no longer deals damage to you.

449349.name: Sunfury Execution
449349.description:
Arcane
Arcane Barrage deals 5% increased damage to enemies affected by your Touch of the Magi.

 Fire
Pyroclasm's damage bonus is increased by 20% and Meteor grants Pyroclasm if talented.

449382.name: Codex of the Sunstriders
449382.description:
Arcane
When your Arcane Phoenix is summoned, it consumes all your Spellfire Spheres.

Each Sphere consumed increases your spell damage during Arcane Surge by 1% and causes your Arcane Phoenix to cast an exceptional Arcane or Fire spell over its duration.

 Fire
When your Arcane Phoenix is summoned, it consumes all your Spellfire Spheres.

Each Sphere consumed increases your spell damage during Combustion by 2% and causes your Arcane Phoenix to cast an exceptional Arcane or Fire spell over its duration.

449394.name: Glorious Incandescence
449394.description:
Arcane
Arcane Barrage summons 1 Meteorite for every 6 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed.

 Meteorite
Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing (102% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets.

 Fire
Generating a Spellfire Sphere causes your next cast of Fire Blast to call down a storm of 4 Meteorites on its target.

 Meteorite
Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing (102% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets.

449412.name: Savor the Moment
449412.description:
Arcane
When you cast Arcane Surge, its duration is extended by 0.4 sec for each Spellfire Sphere you have, up to 2.0 sec.

 Fire
When you cast Combustion, its duration is extended by 0.4 sec for each Spellfire Sphere you have, up to 2.0 sec.

449537.name: Coiled to Spring
449537.description: If you generate a combo point in excess of what you can store, your next Ferocious Bite or Primal Wrath deals 10% increased direct damage.

449582.name: Lighter Than Air
449582.description: Roll causes you to become lighter than air, allowing you to double jump to dash forward a short distance once within 5 sec, but the cooldown of Roll is increased by 2 sec.

449596.name: Rondurmancy
449596.description: Spellfire Spheres can now stack up to 5 times.

449614.name: Demonic Soul
449614.description:
A demonic entity now inhabits your soul, allowing you to detect if a Soul Shard has a Succulent Soul when it's generated.

Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing (353.236% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

449619.name: Memory of Al'ar
449619.description:
Arcane
During Arcane Surge, you gain twice as many stacks of Mana Cascade.

When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it empowers you, granting Arcane Soul for 4.0 sec.

Arcane Soul:
Arcane Barrage grants Clearcasting and generates 4 Arcane Charges.

Each cast of Arcane Barrage grants 5 stacks of Arcane Salvo and casting Arcane Barrage does not consume Arcane Salvo.

 Fire
During Combustion, you gain twice as many stacks of Mana Cascade.

When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it empowers you, granting Hyperthermia for 4.0 sec.

 Hyperthermia:
Pyroblast and Flamestrike have no cast time, are guaranteed to critically strike, and increase the damage of Pyroblast and Flamestrike by 15%.

449620.name: Necrolyte Teachings
449620.description:
Affliction
Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul damage increased by 20%. Nightfall increases the damage of Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul by an additional 50%.

 Demonology
Shadow Bolt damage increased by 20%. Power Siphon increases the damage of Demonbolt by an additional 20%.

449624.name: Soul Anathema
449624.description:
Unleashing your demonic soul bestows a fiendish entity unto the soul of its targets, dealing (114.712% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 10 sec.

If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Soul Anathema.

449627.name: Lessons in Debilitation
449627.description: Your Arcane Phoenix has picked up a few tricks, and will Spellsteal when it is summoned and when it expires.

449629.name: Demoniac's Fervor
449629.description:
Affliction
Your demonic soul deals 100% increased damage to targets affected by your Unstable Affliction.

 Demonology
Your demonic soul deals 200% increased damage to the main target of Hand of Gul'dan.

449631.name: Wicked Reaping
449631.description:
Affliction
Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%.

Consuming Nightfall feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal (601.005% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to your target.

 Demonology
Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 30%.

Consuming Demonic Core feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal [(601.005% of Spell Power) * 0.4] Shadow damage to your target.

449634.name: Quietus
449634.description:
Demonology
Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster.

Consuming Demonic Core activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

 Affliction
Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster.

Consuming Nightfall activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

449637.name: Sataiel's Volition
449637.description:
Affliction
Corruption deals damage 25% faster and Haunt grants Nightfall.

 Demonology
Wild Imp damage increased by 35% and Wild Imps that are imploded have an additional 5% chance to grant a Demonic Core.

449638.name: Shadow of Death
449638.description:
Affliction
Your Dark Harvest spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant 1 Soul Shard that each contain a Succulent Soul every 1 sec while channeled.

 Demonology
Your Summon Demonic Tyrant spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant 3 Soul Shards that each contain a Succulent Soul.

449645.name: Savage Fury
449645.description: Tiger's Fury increases your Haste by 10% and Energy recovery rate by 25% for 8 sec.

449701.name: Gorebound Fortitude
449701.description: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

449703.name: Friends In Dark Places
449703.description: Dark Pact now shields you for an additional 50% of the sacrificed health.

449704.name: Shared Fate
449704.description:
When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for 3 sec. This effect inflicts (50.6531% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds every 1 sec.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

449706.name: Feast of Souls
449706.description: When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.

449707.name: Eternal Servitude
449707.description: Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.

449806.name: Divine Halo
449806.description: Halo now centers around you and returns to you after it reaches its maximum distance, healing allies and damaging enemies each time it passes through them.

449874.name: Energy Compression
449874.description: Halo damage and healing is increased by 30%.

449880.name: Voidheart
449880.description:
Discipline
While Entropic Rift is active, your Atonement healing is increased by 20%.

 Shadow
While Entropic Rift is active, your Shadow damage is increased by 5%.

449912.name: Darkening Horizon
449912.description:
Discipline,  Shadow
Void Blast increases the duration of Entropic Rift by 1.0 sec, up to a maximum of 3 sec.

450138.name: Void Empowerment
450138.description:
Discipline
Summoning an Entropic Rift extends the duration of your 5 shortest Atonements by 1 sec.

 Shadow
Summoning an Entropic Rift grants you Shadowy Insight.

450154.name: Rushing Reflexes
450154.description: Your heightened reflexes allow you to react swiftly to the presence of enemies, causing you to quickly lunge to the nearest enemy in front of you within 10 yards after you Roll.

450212.name: Stellar Amplification
450212.description: Starsurge increases the damage the target takes from your periodic effects and Shooting Stars by 16% for 5 sec. Reapplying this effect extends its duration, up to 20 sec.

450335.name: Crashing Momentum
450335.description: Targets you Roll through are snared by 40% for 5 sec.

450347.name: Nature's Grace
450347.description: When Eclipse ends or when you enter combat, enter a Dreamstate, reducing the cast time of your next 2 Starfires or Wraths by 30%.

450356.name: Touch the Cosmos
450356.description:
Casting Wrath has a 15% chance to make your next Starsurge or Starfall free.

Casting Starfire has a 20% chance to make your next Starsurge or Starfall free.

450373.name: Don't Look Back
450373.description: Consuming Sentinel's Mark grants you an absorb shield equal to 10.0% of your maximum health.

450379.name: Invigorating Pulse
450379.description:
Survival
Kill Command grants an additional 5 Focus and its damage is increased by 20%. 

Maximum Focus increased by 25.

 Marksmanship
Steady Shot grants an additional 5 Focus and its damage is increased by 20%. 

Maximum Focus increased by 25.

450391.name: Chi Wave
450391.description:
Brewmaster
Every 15 sec, your next Keg Smash or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing (20% of Attack Power) Nature damage or (60% of Attack Power) healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

 Mistweaver
Every 15 sec, your next Rising Sun Kick or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing (20% of Attack Power) Nature damage or (60% of Attack Power) healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

 Windwalker
Every 15 sec, your next Rising Sun Kick or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing (20% of Attack Power) Nature damage or (60% of Attack Power) healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

450405.name: Void Blast
450405.description:
Shadow
Entropic Rift upgrades Mind Blast into Void Blast while it is active.

Void Blast:
Sends a blast of cosmic void energy at the enemy, causing (210% of Spell Power) Shadow damage. [ Shadow: Generates 0 Insanity.]

 Discipline
Entropic Rift upgrades Smite into Void Blast while it is active.

Void Blast:
Sends a blast of cosmic void energy at the enemy, causing (150% of Spell Power) Shadow damage. [ Shadow: Generates 0 Insanity.]

450426.name: Chi Proficiency
450426.description: Magical damage done increased by 5% and healing done increased by 5%.

450427.name: Martial Instincts
450427.description: Increases your Physical damage done by 5% and Avoidance increased by 2%.

450432.name: Pressure Points
450432.description: Paralysis now removes all Enrage effects from its target.

450448.name: Peace and Prosperity
450448.description: Reduces the cooldown of Ring of Peace by 5 sec and Song of Chi-Ji's cast time is reduced by 0.5 sec.

450503.name: Quick Footed
450503.description: The duration of snare effects on you is reduced by 20%.

450508.name: Aspect of Harmony
450508.description:
Mistweaver
Store vitality from 10% of your damage dealt and 30% of your healing. Vitality stored from overhealing is reduced.

For 10 sec after casting Thunder Focus Tea your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional healing over 8 sec.

 Brewmaster
Store vitality from 12% of your damage dealt and 6% of your effective healing.

For 10 sec after casting Celestial Brew or Celestial Infusion your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional damage over 8 sec.

450514.name: Wind's Reach
450514.description:
The range of Disable is increased by 5 yds.
 
The duration of Crashing Momentum is increased by 3 sec and its snare now reduces movement speed by an additional 20%.

450520.name: Bounding Agility
450520.description: Roll and Chi Torpedo travel a small distance further.

450529.name: Coalescence
450529.description:
Brewmaster
When Aspect of Harmony deals damage, it has a chance to spread to a nearby enemy. When you directly attack an affected target, it has a chance to intensify, withdrawing additional vitality to increase its effect by up to 20%.

Keg Smash no longer contributes vitality. While Aspect of Harmony is not active, Keg Smash instead draws on available vitality to deal an additional 100% damage over 8 sec.

Vitality stored by other abilities is increased by 50%.

 Mistweaver
When Aspect of Harmony heals, it has a chance to spread to a nearby ally. When you directly heal an affected target, it has a chance to intensify, withdrawing additional vitality to increase its effect by up to 20%.

Vivify no longer contributes vitality. While Aspect of Harmony is not active, Vivify instead draws on available vitality to deal an additional 100% healing over 8 sec.

Vitality stored by other abilities is increased by 50%.

450553.name: Jade Walk
450553.description: While out of combat, your movement speed is increased by 15%.

450558.name: Harmony of the Heavens
450558.description: Starsurge or Starfall increase your current Eclipse's Arcane or Nature damage bonus by an additional 2%, up to 6%.

450560.name: Healing Winds
450560.description: Transcendence: Transfer immediately heals you for 10% of your maximum health.

450569.name: Flow of Chi
450569.description:
You gain a bonus effect based on your current health.

Above 90% health: Movement speed increased by 5%. This bonus stacks with similar effects.

Between 90% and 35% health: Damage taken reduced by 5%.

Below 35% health: Healing received increased by 10%.

450595.name: Spirit's Essence
450595.description: Transcendence: Transfer snares targets within 10 yds by 70% for 4 sec when cast.

450598.name: Astral Communion
450598.description: Increases maximum Astral Power by 20. Entering Eclipse reduces the Astral Power cost of your next Starsurge or Starfall by 15.

450612.name: Void Infusion
450612.description:
Shadow
Void Blast generates 2 additional Insanity.

 Discipline
While Entropic Rift is active, Atonement healing with Void Blast and Penance is 50% more effective.

450615.name: Flurry Strikes
450615.description:
Windwalker
Your auto attacks have a chance to generate 1-2 Flurry Charges. When you cast Fists of Fury, unleash all Flurry Charges, dealing (60% of Attack Power) Physical damage per charge. 

 Brewmaster
Your auto attacks have a chance to generate 1-2 Flurry Charges. When you cast Keg Smash, unleash all Flurry Charges, dealing (60% of Attack Power) Physical damage per charge.

450622.name: Swift Art
450622.description: Roll removes a snare effect once every 30 sec.

450631.name: Energy Transfer
450631.description: Successfully interrupting an enemy reduces the cooldown of Paralysis and Roll by 5 sec.

450638.name: Celestial Determination
450638.description: While your Celestial is active, you cannot be slowed below 90% normal movement speed.

450746.name: Scald
450746.description:
Fireball always critically strikes enemies below 30% health.

When Fireball or Scorch damage an enemy below 30% health, Fireball deals 25% increased damage and Scorch deals 250% increased damage.

450831.name: Fire's Ire
450831.description:
Your spell critical strike chance is increased by 2.5%.

Combustion increases your critical strike damage by 2.5%.

450867.name: Purified Spirit
450867.description:
Brewmaster
When Aspect of Harmony ends, any remaining vitality is expelled as damage over 8 sec, split among nearby targets.

 Mistweaver
When Aspect of Harmony ends, any remaining vitality is expelled as healing over 8 sec, split among nearby targets.

450870.name: Harmonic Gambit
450870.description:
Brewmaster
During Aspect of Harmony, Expel Harm and Vivify withdraw vitality to heal for an additional 40% over 8 sec.

 Mistweaver
During Aspect of Harmony, Rising Sun Kick, Blackout Kick, and Tiger Palm also withdraw vitality to damage enemies for an additional 20% over 8 sec.

450875.name: Manifestation
450875.description:
Brewmaster
Chi Burst and Chi Wave deal 50% increased damage and healing.

 Mistweaver
Chi Wave deals 50% increased damage and healing.

450889.name: Balanced Stratagem
450889.description: Casting a Physical spell or ability increases the damage and healing of your next Fire or Nature spell or ability by 3%, and vice versa. Stacks up to 5.

450892.name: Endless Draught
450892.description:
Brewmaster
Celestial Brew and Celestial Infusion have 1 additional charge.

 Mistweaver
Thunder Focus Tea has 1 additional charge.

450912.name: Path of Resurgence
450912.description: Chi Burst increases vitality stored by 25% for 10 sec.

450925.name: Lightning Volley
450925.description: The stormrook unleashes lightning bolts capable of seeking targets.

450965.name: Way of a Thousand Strikes
450965.description:
Brewmaster
Blackout Kick and Tiger Palm contribute 30% additional vitality.

 Mistweaver
Rising Sun Kick, Blackout Kick and Tiger Palm contribute 30% additional vitality.

450979.name: Pride of Pandaria
450979.description: Flurry Strikes have 15% additional chance to critically strike.

450982.name: High Impact
450982.description: Enemies who die within 10 sec of being damaged by a Flurry Strike explode, dealing (100% of Attack Power) physical damage to uncontrolled enemies within 8 yds.

450988.name: One Versus Many
450988.description:
Brewmaster
Auto attack critical strikes generate double the amount of Flurry Charges.


Keg Smash damage increased by 35%.

 Windwalker
Auto attack critical strikes generate double the amount of Flurry Charges.

Fists of Fury damage increased by 50%.

450989.name: Efficient Training
450989.description:
Brewmaster
Energy spenders deal an additional 20% damage.
The cooldown of Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox is reduced by 25 sec.

 Windwalker
Energy spenders deal an additional 20% damage.
The cooldown of Zenith is reduced by 10 sec.

450991.name: Whirling Steel
450991.description:
When your health drops below 50%, summon Whirling Steel, increasing your parry chance and avoidance by 15% for 6 sec.

This effect can not occur more than once every 180 sec.

450992.name: Predictive Training
450992.description:
Windwalker
When you dodge or parry an attack, reduce all damage taken by 10% for the next 6 sec.

 Brewmaster
When you dodge or parry an attack, reduce all damage taken by 8% for the next 6 sec.

450993.name: Vigilant Watch
450993.description: Blackout Kick deals an additional 30% critical damage.

451017.name: Clarity of Purpose
451017.description:
Mistweaver
Casting Enveloping Mist stores [(Spell Power * 300 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] additional vitality.

 Brewmaster
Casting Purifying Brew stores [(Spell Power * 300 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] additional vitality.

451018.name: Dark Energy
451018.description:
Shadow
Void Torrent can be used while moving. While Entropic Rift is active, you move 20% faster.

 Discipline
While Entropic Rift is active, you move 20% faster.

451024.name: Overwhelming Force
451024.description:
Brewmaster
Blackout Kick and Tiger Palm deal 15% additional damage to enemies in a line in front of you. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

 Mistweaver
Rising Sun Kick, Blackout Kick and Tiger Palm deal 15% additional damage to enemies in a line in front of you. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

451029.name: Mantra of Tenacity
451029.description:
Brewmaster
Fortifying Brew applies a Chi Cocoon, absorbing [Total Health * 12 / 100 * (1 + Versatility)] damage.

 Mistweaver
Fortifying Brew grants 20% Stagger.

451035.name: Burden of Power
451035.description:
Arcane
Arcane Blast damage increased by 30%.

Arcane Pulse damage increased by 20%.

 Fire
Pyroblast damage increased by 3%.

Flamestrike damage increased by 3%.

451036.name: Mantra of Purity
451036.description:
Brewmaster
Purifying Brew removes 10% additional Stagger and causes you to absorb up to [(Attack Power * 100 / 100) * (1 + Versatility)] incoming Stagger.

 Mistweaver
When cast on yourself, your single-target healing spells heal for 10% more and restore an additional (150% of Spell Power) health over 6 sec.

451041.name: Tiger's Vigor
451041.description: Casting Tiger's Lust reduces the remaining cooldown on Roll by 5 sec.

451043.name: Roar from the Heavens
451043.description: Tiger's Lust grants 20% movement speed to up to 2 allies near its target.

451204.name: No Escape
451204.description: Entropic Rift slows enemies by up to 70%, increased the closer they are to its center.

451211.name: Starlight Conduit
451211.description:
Balance,  Feral,  Guardian,  Restoration
Wrath, Starsurge, and Starfire damage increased by 5%. 

Starsurge's cooldown is reduced by 4 sec and its mana cost is reduced by 50%.

451234.name: Voidwraith
451234.description:
When Entropic Rift ends, a Voidwraith is summoned from the collapsed rift for 5 sec.

Voidwraith
Summon a Voidwraith that casts Void Flay from afar. Void Flay deals bonus damage to high health enemies, up to a maximum of 50% if they are full health. [ Shadow: Generates 1 Insanity each time the Voidwraith attacks. / 

 Discipline,  Holy
Generates 0.5% Mana each time the Voidwraith attacks.]

451294.name: Momentum Boost
451294.description:
Fists of Fury's damage is increased by 100% of your haste and Fists of Fury does 10% more damage each time it deals damage, resetting when Fists of Fury ends.

Your auto attack speed is increased by 60% for 8 sec after Fists of Fury ends.

451311.name: Void Leech
451311.description: Every 3 sec siphon an amount equal to 4% of your health from an ally within 40 yds if they are higher health than you.

451466.name: Pyromaniac
451466.description:
Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike while Hot Streak is active has a 6% chance to repeat the spell cast at 50% effectiveness.

This effect counts as consuming Hot Streak.

451485.name: Brawler's Intensity
451485.description: The cooldown of Rising Sun Kick is reduced by 1.0 sec and the damage of Blackout Kick is increased by 12%.

451498.name: Energy Burst
451498.description: When you consume Blackout Kick!, you have a 100% chance to generate 1 Chi.

451515.name: Sequenced Strikes
451515.description: You have a 100% chance to gain Blackout Kick! after consuming Dance of Chi-Ji.

451524.name: Revolving Whirl
451524.description: Strike of the Windlord and Whirling Dragon Punch have a 100% chance to activate Dance of Chi-Ji.

451529.name: Knowledge of the Broken Temple
451529.description:
Strike of the Windlord and Whirling Dragon Punch grant 4 stacks of Teachings of the Monastery.

Teachings of the Monastery can now stack up to 8 times.

451569.name: Embrace the Shadow
451569.description: You absorb 3% of all magic damage taken. Absorbing Shadow damage heals you for 100% of the amount absorbed.

451573.name: Singularly Focused Jade
451573.description: Jadefire Stomp now strikes 1 target, but deals 300% increased damage and healing.

451576.name: Communion With Wind
451576.description: Strike of the Windlord and Whirling Dragon Punch have their cooldowns reduced by 5 sec and their damage is increased by 20%.

451823.name: Dual Threat
451823.description: Your auto attacks have a 30% chance to instead kick your target dealing (372.6% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Damage increased while using a two-handed weapon.

451840.name: Devour Matter
451840.description:
Discipline
Shadow Word: Death consumes absorb shields from your target, dealing (255% of Spell Power) extra damage to them and granting you 1% mana if a shield was present.

 Shadow
Shadow Word: Death consumes absorb shields from your target, dealing (255% of Spell Power) extra damage to them and granting you 5 Insanity if a shield was present.

451875.name: Spontaneous Combustion
451875.description: Casting Combustion refreshes up to 1 charge of Fire Blast.

452137.name: Flurry of Xuen
452137.description:
Your spells and abilities have a chance to activate Flurry of Xuen, unleashing a barrage of deadly swipes to deal [(54.88% of Attack Power) * 10] Physical damage in a 10 yd cone, damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Invoking Xuen, the White Tiger activates Flurry of Xuen.

452198.name: Eureka
452198.description: When a spell consumes Clearcasting, its damage is increased by 20%.

452402.name: Demonsurge
452402.description:
Havoc
Metamorphosis now also causes Demon Blades to generate 3 additional Fury.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Demonsurge, causing you to explode with Fel energy, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

 Devourer
Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing (625% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

452403.name: Wave of Debilitation
452403.description:
Havoc
Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades. 

 Devourer
Void Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.

452404.name: Pursuit of Angriness
452404.description: Movement speed increased by 1% per 10 Fury.

452405.name: Focused Hatred
452405.description:
Havoc
Demonsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.

 Devourer
Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.

452406.name: Set Fire to the Pain
452406.description:
5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec.

Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.

452407.name: Improved Soul Rending
452407.description:
Havoc
Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Metamorphosis is active.

 Devourer
Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Void Metamorphosis is active.

452408.name: Burning Blades
452408.description:
Devourer
Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Hungering Slash, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage.

Reap damage increased by 20%.

 Havoc
Your blades burn with Fel energy, causing the damage from Chaos Strike, Throw Glaive, Blade Dance's First Blood, and auto-attacks to burn for an additional 35% damage as Fire over 6 sec.

452409.name: Violent Transformation
452409.description:
Devourer
Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt.

The Hunt deals 25% increased damage and resets the cooldown of Soul Immolation.

 Havoc
When you activate Metamorphosis, reset the cooldown of Immolation Aura.

452410.name: Enduring Torment
452410.description:
Havoc
The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance damage by 15%, and Haste by 5%.

 Devourer
The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

452411.name: Untethered Fury
452411.description:
Devourer
Maximum Fury increased by 20.

Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

 Havoc
Maximum Fury increased by 50.

452412.name: Student of Suffering
452412.description:
Havoc
Eye Beam applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (8 * $mas)% and granting 5 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

 Devourer
Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (4 * $mas)% and granting 1 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

452413.name: Flamebound
452413.description:
Devourer
Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 125% increased critical strike damage bonus.

 Havoc
Immolation Aura has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.

452414.name: Monster Rising
452414.description:
Havoc
Agility increased by 8% while not in demon form.

 Devourer
Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

Collapsing Star damage increased by 15%.

452415.name: Demonic Intensity
452415.description:
Havoc
Activating Metamorphosis greatly empowers Eye Beam, Immolation Aura.

Demonsurge damage is increased by 5% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

 Devourer
Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt.

Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

452494.name: Fight Through the Flames
452494.description: Defensive Stance additionally reduces magic damage you take by 6%.

452536.name: Hand of Fate
452536.description:
Flip a Fatebound Coin each time a finishing move consumes 5 or more combo points. Heads increases the damage of your attacks by 10%, lasting 15 sec or until you flip Tails. Tails deals (168% of Attack Power) Cosmic damage to your target.

For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Heads increases damage by an additional 2% and Tails increases its damage by 10%.

452902.name: Swift Artifice
452902.description: Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by 50%.

452997.name: Energized Familiar
452997.description:
During Arcane Surge, your Familiar fires 4 bolts instead of 1.

Damage from your Arcane Familiar has a 6% chance to grant you up to 2% of your maximum mana.

452999.name: Siphon Life
452999.description: Corruption deals 30% increased damage and its periodic damage heals you for 5% of the damage dealt.

453080.name: Improved Shadow Bolt
453080.description: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 15% and increases its damage by 40%.

453087.name: Malediction
