453087.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 5%.

453096.name: Contagion
453096.description: Increases critical strike damage dealt by Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 15%.

453105.name: Summoner's Embrace
453105.description: Increases the damage dealt by your spells and your demon by 3%.

453109.name: Power Surge
453109.description: Casting Halo also causes you to create a Halo around you at 100% effectiveness every 5 sec for 10 sec.

453172.name: Cunning Cruelty
453172.description: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul have a chance to trigger a Shadow Bolt Volley, dealing [(124.74% of Spell Power) * 1 * 1] Shadow damage to 5 enemies within 10 yards of your current target.

453282.name: Flame Accelerant
453282.description: The cast time of Pyroblast and Flamestrike is reduced by 20%.

453428.name: Mean Streak
453428.description:
Outlaw
Fatebound Coins flipped by Dispatch are 33% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

 Assassination
Fatebound Coins flipped by Envenom are 33% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

453457.name: Edge Case
453457.description:
Outlaw
Activating Adrenaline Rush flips a Fatebound Coin and causes it to land on its edge, counting as both Heads and Tails.

 Assassination
Activating Deathmark flips a Fatebound Coin and causes it to land on its edge, counting as both Heads and Tails.

453699.name: Flametouched
453699.description: Increases the attack speed of your Dreadstalkers by 10% and their critical strike chance by 15%.

453726.name: Word of Supremacy
453726.description: Power Word: Fortitude grants you an additional 5% stamina.

453729.name: Heightened Alteration
453729.description:
Shadow
Increases the duration of Dispersion by 2 sec.

 Holy
Increases the duration of Spirit of Redemption by 5 sec.

453744.name: Rune of Shadows
453744.description: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 10% and increases its damage by 15%.

453783.name: Manifested Power
453783.description:
Holy
Creating a Halo grants Surge of Light.

 Surge of Light
Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost  [ Holy: 50 / 50]% less mana. Stacks to 2.

 Shadow
Creating a Halo upgrades your next Mind Flay to Mind Flay: Insanity.

 Mind Flay: Insanity
Assaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing (542.36% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 1.5 sec and slowing their movement speed by 70%.

Generates 8 Insanity over the duration.

453785.name: Earthen Ordinant's Ramolith
453785.description: Summons the Earthen Ordinant's Ramolith, which serves as a mount.

453799.name: Empowered Surges
453799.description:
Shadow
Increases the damage done by Mind Flay: Insanity by 30%.



 Holy
Your spells affected by Surge of Light heal for 5% more while Surge of Light is active.

453800.name: Improved Demonic Tactics
453800.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your primary demon by 50% of your critical strike chance.

453828.name: Energy Cycle
453828.description:
Shadow
Casting Mind Flay: Insanity has a 100% chance to conjure Shadowy Apparitions.

 Holy (Ultimate Serenity)
Consuming Surge of Light reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Serenity by 4 sec.Consuming Surge of Light reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Sanctify by 4 sec.

453845.name: Resonant Energy
453845.description:
Holy
Allies healed by your Halo receive 2% increased healing from you for 8 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

 Shadow
Enemies damaged by your Halo take 2% increased damage from you for 8 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

453852.name: Shock Pulse
453852.description: Halo damage reduces enemy movement speed by 5% for 5 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

453908.name: Demonic Brutality
453908.description: Damaging critical strikes dealt by you and your demons deal 230% damage instead of the usual 200%.

453917.name: Perfected Form
453917.description:
Shadow
Your damage dealt is increased by 5% while Voidform is active.

 Holy
Your healing done is increased by 10% while Apotheosis is active.

453918.name: Incessant Screams
453918.description: Psychic Scream creates an image of you at your location. After 4 sec, the image will let out a Psychic Scream.

454001.name: Sustained Potency
454001.description:
Holy
Creating a Halo extends the duration of Apotheosis by 1 sec. If Apotheosis is not active, up to 6 seconds is stored.

While out of combat or affected by a loss of control effect, the duration of Apotheosis is paused for up to 20 sec.

 Shadow
Creating a Halo extends the duration of Voidform by 1 sec. If Voidform is not active, up to 6 seconds is stored.

While out of combat or affected by a loss of control effect, the duration of Voidform is paused for up to 20 sec.

454009.name: Tempest
454009.description:
Enhancement
Each Maelstrom Weapon spent has a 2.00% chance to upgrade your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.


Tempest0.2% of base mana40 yd range2 sec cast
Requires ShamanCalls down a tremendous lightning strike that deals (388.125% of Spell Power) Nature damage to your target and [(388.125% of Spell Power) * 65 / 100] Nature damage to enemies within 8 yds of your target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

 Elemental
Each Maelstrom spent has a 0.30% chance to upgrade your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.


Tempest0.2% of base mana40 yd range2 sec cast
Requires ShamanCalls down a tremendous lightning strike that deals (388.125% of Spell Power) Nature damage to your target and [(388.125% of Spell Power) * 65 / 100] Nature damage to enemies within 8 yds of your target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

454021.name: Stormcaller
454021.description:
Enhancement
Increases the critical strike chance of your Nature damage spells by 5% and the critical strike damage of your Nature spells by 10%.

 Elemental
Increases the critical strike chance of your Nature damage spells by 5% and the critical strike damage of your Nature spells by 5%.

454022.name: Electroshock
454022.description: Tempest increases your movement speed by 20% for 5 sec.

454026.name: Rolling Thunder
454026.description:
Enhancement
Doom Winds summons a Nature Feral Spirit for 12 sec.

Feral Spirit
An Elemental Spirit infused with Nature magic, granting the summoner with 5% increased Nature damage and 5% Physical damage for 12 sec.

 Elemental
Reduces the cooldown of Stormkeeper by 15 sec.

454027.name: Nature's Protection
454027.description: Lightning Shield reduces the damage you take by 3%.

454286.name: Tempted Fate
454286.description: You have a 30% chance to absorb 10% of any damage taken.

454372.name: Surging Currents
454372.description: Casting Tempest grants Surging Currents, increasing the effectiveness of your next Chain Heal or Healing Surge by 16%, up to 80%.

454391.name: Unlimited Power
454391.description:
Enhancement
Spending Maelstrom Weapon stacks grants you 1% haste for 15 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

 Elemental
Spending Maelstrom grants you 1% haste for 15 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

454419.name: Deal Fate
454419.description:
Outlaw
Sinister Strike generates 1 additional combo point when it grants Opportunity.

 Assassination
Mutilate, Ambush, and Fan of Knives generate 1 additional combo point when they trigger Seal Fate.

454432.name: Inexorable March
454432.description: You cannot be slowed below 70% of normal movement speed while your Fatebound Coin flips have an active streak of at least 2 flips matching the same face.

454433.name: Death's Arrival
454433.description:
Outlaw
Grappling Hook may be used a second time within 3 sec with no cooldown, but its total cooldown is increased by 5 sec.

 Assassination
Shadowstep may be used a second time within 3 sec with no cooldown, but its total cooldown is increased by 5 sec.

454435.name: Destiny Defined
454435.description:
Outlaw
Sinister Strike has 5% increased chance to strike an additional time and grant Opportunity and your Fatebound Coins flipped have an additional 5% chance to match the same face as the last flip. 

 Assassination
Weapon poisons have 5% increased application chance and your Fatebound Coins flipped have an additional 5% chance to match the same face as the last flip.

454483.name: August Blessing
454483.description: When you would be healed above maximum health, you instead convert an amount equal to 40% of your critical strike chance to a heal over time effect.

454484.name: One With the Wind
454484.description: You have a 10% chance to not reset your Elusive Brawler stacks after a successful dodge.

454735.name: Devastation
454735.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Destruction spells by 3%.

454744.name: Emberstorm
454744.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire spells by 2% and reduces the cast time of your Incinerate spell by 20%.

454786.name: Ice Prison
454786.description: Chains of Ice now also roots enemies for 4 sec but its cooldown is increased to 12 sec.

454788.name: Runic Protection
454788.description: Your chance to be critically struck is reduced by 3% and your Armor is increased by 6%.

454822.name: Subduing Grasp
454822.description: When you would pull an enemy, the damage they deal to you is reduced by 6% for 6 sec.

454835.name: Osmosis
454835.description: Anti-Magic Shell increases healing received by 15%.

454842.name: Null Magic
454842.description:
Frost,  Unholy
Magic damage taken is reduced by 5% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%.

 Blood
Magic damage taken is reduced by 8% and the duration of harmful Magic effects against you are reduced by 35%.

454851.name: Vestigial Shell
454851.description: Casting Anti-Magic Shell grants 2 nearby allies a Lesser Anti-Magic Shell that Absorbs up to 0 magic damage and reduces the duration of harmful Magic effects against them by 50%.

454919.name: Voltaic Surge
454919.description:
Enhancement
Crash Lightning and Chain Lightning damage increased by 20%.

 Elemental
Earthquake and Chain Lightning damage increased by 5%.

454969.name: Memory of the Monastery
454969.description: Tiger Palm's chance to activate Blackout Kick! is increased by 75% and Tiger Palm's damage is increased by 30%.

454983.name: Arcane Reach
454983.description: The range of your helpful magics is increased by 5 yards.

455068.name: Ox Stance
455068.description: Casting Purifying Brew grants a charge of Ox Stance. When you take damage that is greater than 60% of your current health, a charge is consumed to increase the amount you Stagger.

455072.name: Rapid Injection
455072.description: Envenom's effect increases the damage of Envenom by 15%.

455096.name: Arc Discharge
455096.description:
Elemental
Casting Tempest grants a charge of Stormkeeper.

 Enhancement
Tempest causes your next Chain Lightning to be instant cast, deal 40% increased damage, and cast an additional time.

Can accumulate up to 2 charges.

455110.name: Supercharge
455110.description:
Enhancement
Lightning Bolt, Tempest, and Chain Lightning have a 35% chance to refund 2 Maelstrom Weapon stacks.

 Elemental
Lightning Bolt, Tempest, and Chain Lightning have a 50% chance to cause an additional Elemental Overload.

455123.name: Conductive Energy
455123.description:
Enhancement
Gain the effects of the Lightning Rod talent:

 Lightning Rod
[Tempest: Tempest] [ Elemental: Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake / Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning] make your target a Lightning Rod for 8 sec.
 
Lightning Rods take 8% of all damage you deal with [Tempest: Tempest, Lightning Bolt / Lightning Bolt] and Chain Lightning.

 Elemental
Lightning Rod targets now also take 10% of the damage that Tempest deals, and Tempest also applies Lightning Rod effect.

455129.name: Awakening Storms
455129.description:
Elemental
Each Maelstrom spent has an additional 0.30% chance to upgrade your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

 Enhancement
Stormstrike has a small chance to upgrade your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

455135.name: Menacing Magus
455135.description: Your Magus of the Dead Shadow Bolt now fires a volley of Shadow Bolts at up to 8 nearby enemies.

455139.name: Elixir of Determination
455139.description: When you fall below 40% health, you gain an absorb for 30% of your recently Purified damage, or a minimum of 8% of your maximum health. Cannot occur more than once every 15 sec.

455143.name: Acrobatic Strikes
455143.description: Auto-attacks increase auto-attack damage by 3% and movement speed by 1% for 3 sec, stacking up to 10 times.

455386.name: Doomed Bidding
455386.description: Consuming Sudden Doom summons forth a Lesser Ghoul to assist you for 6 sec.

455396.name: Foul Infections
455396.description: Your diseases deal 10% more damage and have a 5% increased chance to critically strike.

455397.name: Festering Scythe
455397.description:
Festering Strike now follows up with a Festering Scythe that costs no Runes.

Festering Scythe
Slashes through all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, dealing (101.25% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and hastening all of your plagues on targets hit to deal damage 35% faster for 25 sec.

455428.name: Barrier Diffusion
455428.description: When your Barrier is removed, reduce its cooldown by 5 sec.

455449.name: Mark of Shatug
455449.description:
Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Gloomhound and learns the following ability:

 Gloom Slash
Tooth and claw are drenched in malignant shadow magic, causing the Gloomhound's melee attacks to deal an additional (31.7766% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

455450.name: Mark of F'harg
455450.description:
Your Summon Vilefiend becomes Summon Charhound and learns the following ability:

 Infernal Presence
Cloaked in the ever-burning flames of the abyss, dealing (15.9865% of Spell Power) Fire damage to enemies within 10 yards every 1 sec.

455461.name: Lethal Preservation
455461.description: When you remove an effect with Soothe or [Nature's Cure / Remove Corruption], gain a combo point and heal for 4% of your maximum health. If you are at full health an injured party or raid member will be healed instead.

455590.name: Earthsurge
455590.description:
Restoration
Allies affected by your Earthliving effect receive 15% increased healing from you.

 Enhancement
Casting Sundering within 40 yards of your Surging Totem causes it to create a Tremor at 125% effectiveness at the target area.

455797.name: Cenarius' Might
455797.description:
Balance
Entering Eclipse increases your haste by 8% for 6 sec.

 Restoration
Swiftmend healing is increased by 20%.

455945.name: Absolute Serenity
455945.description: Celestial Conduit now prevents all crowd control for its duration.

455993.name: Frostbane
455993.description:
Each foe struck with Glacial Advance has a chance to transform your next Frost Strike into Frostbane. The chance increases with the number of Razorice stacks on the target.

Frostbane
Start a frozen onslaught that strikes twice, unleashing the chilling essence of winter, dealing (85.698% of Attack Power) Frost damage to all enemies caught in its wake with each strike.

Each enemy struck reduces the damage dealt to the next foe by 5%, down to 40%.

456230.name: Arctic Assault
456230.description: Consuming Killing Machine fires a Glacial Advance through your target at 60% effectiveness.

456237.name: Cryogenic Chamber
456237.description: When Howling Blast consumes Rime, 15% of the damage it deals is gathered into the next cast of Remorseless Winter, up to 20 times.

456238.name: Hyperpyrexia
456238.description: Your Runic Power spending abilities have a chance to additionally deal 30% of the damage dealt over 4 sec.

456240.name: The Long Winter
456240.description: While Pillar of Frost is active your auto-attack critical strikes increase its duration by 1 sec, up to a maximum of 4 sec.

456270.name: Snap Induction
456270.description:
Protection
Activating Demoralizing Shout grants a charge of Thunder Blast.

 Fury
Activating Recklessness grants a charge of Thunder Blast.

456951.name: Improved Chaos Bolt
456951.description: Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 10% and reduces its cast time by 0.5 sec.

457022.name: Ethereal Cloak
457022.description: Cloak of Shadows duration increased by 2 sec.

457034.name: Bait and Switch
457034.description:
Evasion reduces magical damage taken by 15%. 

Cloak of Shadows reduces physical damage taken by 20%.

457052.name: Deathstalker's Mark
457052.description:
Assassination
Garrote applies 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to your target, unless Deathstalker's Mark is already active. You learn Mark for Death.

When you spend 5 or more combo points on attacks against a Marked target you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, dealing (156% of Attack Power) Plague damage.


Mark for Death
Move your active Deathstalker's Mark to your target.

 Subtlety
Shadowstrike applies 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to your target, unless Deathstalker's Mark is already active. You learn Mark for Death.

When you spend 5 or more combo points on attacks against a Marked target you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, dealing (156% of Attack Power) Plague damage.


Mark for Death
Move your active Deathstalker's Mark to your target.

457054.name: Hunt Them Down
457054.description: Auto-attacks against Marked targets deal an additional (10% of Attack Power) Plague damage.

457055.name: Singular Focus
457055.description: Damage dealt to targets other than your Marked target deals 5% Plague damage to your Marked target.

457056.name: Lingering Darkness
457056.description:
Assassination
After Deathmark expires, gain 30% increased Nature damage for 30 sec.

 Subtlety
After Shadow Blades expires, gain 30% increased Shadow damage for 30 sec.

457057.name: Shadewalker
457057.description: Each time you consume a stack of Deathstalker's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Shadowstep by 3 sec.

457058.name: Darkest Night
457058.description:
Assassination
When you consume the final Deathstalker's Mark from a target or your target dies, gain 30 Energy and Darkest Night, causing your next Envenom cast with 5 or more combo points to critically strike, deal 35% additional damage, and apply 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to the target if no other Deathstalker's Mark is active.

Envenom cast with Darkest Night does not consume a stack of active Deathstalker's Marks.

 Subtlety
When you consume the final Deathstalker's Mark from a target or your target dies, gain 30 Energy and Darkest Night, causing your next Eviscerate cast with 5 or more combo points to critically strike, deal 50% additional damage, and apply 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to the target if no other Deathstalker's Mark is active.

Eviscerate cast with Darkest Night does not consume a stack of active Deathstalker's Marks.

457062.name: Symbolic Victory
457062.description:
Assassination
Kingsbane additionally increases the damage of your next two Envenoms by 18%.

 Subtlety
Shadow Dance additionally increases the damage of your next Eviscerate or Black Powder by 15%.

457063.name: Shroud of Night
457063.description: Shroud of Concealment duration increased by 5 sec.

457067.name: Momentum of Despair
457067.description:
Assassination
If you have critically struck with Fan of Knives, increase the critical strike chance of Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 8 sec.

 Subtlety
If you have critically struck with Shuriken Storm, increase the critical strike chance of Shuriken Storm and Black Powder by 10% and critical strike damage by 30% for 8 sec.

457068.name: Follow the Blood
457068.description:
Assassination
Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest deal 30% additional damage while 2 or more enemies are afflicted with Rupture.

 Subtlety
Shuriken Storm and Black Powder deal 15% additional damage while Find Weakness is active.

457512.name: Sanguine Stratagem
457512.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

457521.name: Mana Bomb
457521.description: Arcane Surge's damage is increased by an additional 50% based on your mana spent.

457574.name: Unyielding Will
457574.description: Anti-Magic Shell now removes all harmful magical effects when activated, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

457735.name: Heat Shimmer
457735.description: While Combustion is not active, damage from Ignite has a small chance to make your next Scorch instant, deal 100% increased damage, and deal damage as though your target was below 30% health.

457803.name: Molten Fury
457803.description: Damage dealt to targets below 30% health is increased by 15%.

457974.name: Jadefire Stomp
457974.description: At the end of your Fists of Fury channel, you release a Jadefire Stomp, dealing (100% of Attack Power) damage to 5 enemies in front of you and increasing your movement speed by 20% for 3 sec.

458034.name: Improved Haunt
458034.description: Increases the damage of Haunt by 35% and reduces its cast time by 0.3 sec.

458359.name: Radiant Glory
458359.description:
[Avenging Wrath: Crusade / Avenging Wrath] is replaced with Radiant Glory.

Radiant Glory
Wake of Ashes activates [Avenging Wrath: Crusade for 8 sec / Avenging Wrath for 8 sec].

458431.name: Lotus Infusion
458431.description: Allies with Renewing Mist receive 6% more healing from you and Renewing Mist's duration is increased by 2 sec.

458437.name: Inspired Intellect
458437.description: Arcane Intellect grants you an additional 2% Intellect.

458572.name: Bone Collector
458572.description:
When you would pull an enemy generate 1 charge of Bone Shield.

 Bone Shield
Surrounds you with a barrier of whirling bones, increasing Armor by (180 * Strength / 100) [Marrowrend: and your Haste by 0%]. Each melee attack against you consumes a charge. Lasts 30 sec or until all charges are consumed.

458623.name: Ferociousness
458623.description: Critical Strike chance increased by 2%. This effect is increased by 100% while Xuen, the White Tiger is active.

458718.name: Desperate Measures
458718.description:
Desperate Prayer lasts an additional 10 sec.

Angelic Bulwark's absorption effect is increased by 15% of your maximum health.

458752.name: Carnage
458752.description:
Consumption now contributes to your Mastery: Blood Shield.

Each time an enemy strikes your Blood Shield, the cooldown of Consumption has chance to be reset.

458753.name: Bloodied Blade
458753.description:
Parrying an attack grants you a charge of Bloodied Blade, increasing your Strength by 0.5%, up to 4.0% for 15 sec.

At 8 stacks, your next parry consumes all charges to unleash a Heart Strike at 300% effectiveness, and increases your Strength by 10% for 6 sec.

459120.name: Rumbling Earth
459120.description: Upheaval causes an aftershock at its location, dealing 30% of its damage 2 additional times.

459440.name: Ravenous Afflictions
459440.description: Critical strikes from your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction have a chance to grant Nightfall.

459450.name: Padded Armor
459450.description: Survival of the Fittest gains an additional charge.

459455.name: Scout's Instincts
459455.description: You cannot be slowed below 80% of your normal movement speed while Aspect of the Cheetah is active.

459460.name: Tar-Coated Bindings
459460.description: Binding Shot's stun duration is increased by 1 sec.

459488.name: Moment of Opportunity
459488.description: When a trap triggers, gain 30% increased movement speed for 3 sec.

459502.name: Serrated Tips
459502.description: You gain 2% more critical strike from critical strike sources.

459507.name: Territorial Instincts
459507.description: The cooldown of Intimidation is reduced by 20 sec.

459517.name: Emergency Salve
459517.description: Feign Death and Aspect of the Turtle removes poison and disease effects from you.

459527.name: Unnatural Causes
459527.description:
Your damage over time effects deal 10% increased damage.

This effect is increased by 50% on targets below 20% health.

459537.name: Imminent Destruction
459537.description: [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] reduces the Essence cost of your next 6 Eruptions by 1.

459542.name: Specialized Arsenal
459542.description:
Marksmanship
Aimed Shot deals 10% increased damage.

 Beast Mastery
Kill Command deals 10% increased damage.

 Survival
Wildfire Bomb deals 10% increased damage.

459546.name: No Hard Feelings
459546.description:
When Misdirection targets your pet, it reduces the damage they take by 50% for 5 sec.

The cooldown of Misdirection is reduced by 5 sec.

459550.name: Go for the Throat
459550.description: Kill Command deals increased critical strike damage equal to 100% of your critical strike chance.

459552.name: Laceration
459552.description: When your pet attacks critically strike, they cause their target to bleed for 8% of the damage dealt over 6 sec.

459559.name: Phantom Reach
459559.description: Increases the range of most spells by 15%.

459693.name: Thundering Hooves
459693.description:
Bestial Wrath causes all active pets to Stomp at 200% effectiveness.

Stomp damage increased by 30%.

459730.name: Huntmaster's Call
459730.description:
Summoning a Dire Beast 8 times sounds the Horn of Valor, summoning either Hati or Fenryr to battle.

Hati
Increases the damage of all your pets by 4%.

Fenryr
Pounces your primary target, inflicting a heavy bleed that deals (800% of Attack Power) damage over 8 sec and grants you 4% Haste.

459783.name: Penetrating Shots
459783.description: Gain critical strike damage equal to 25% of your critical strike chance.

459794.name: Quick Draw
459794.description:
Rapid Fire shoots 3 additional shots.

Aimed Shot grants 50% increased movement speed for 2 sec, decaying rapidly over its duration.

459802.name: Small Game Hunter
459802.description: Explosive Shot deals 15% increased damage and Volley deals 25% increased damage.

459843.name: Grenade Juggler
459843.description:
Flamefang Pitch gains 1 additional charge. 

Throwing your Flamefang Pitch grants 1 charge of Wildfire Bomb.

459939.name: Outland Venom
459939.description: Each damage over time effect on a target increases the critical strike damage they receive from you by 4%.

459964.name: Flanker's Advantage
459964.description: Kill Command grants an additional 5 Focus and its critical strike chance is increased by 10%.

459983.name: Kodo Tranquilizer
459983.description: Tranquilizing Shot removes 1 additional Magic effect from up to 2 nearby targets.

459991.name: Devilsaur Tranquilizer
459991.description: If Tranquilizing Shot removes only an Enrage effect, its cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

460198.name: Wildfire Infusion
460198.description:
Kill Command damage increased by 15%.

Kill Command reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 1.0 sec.

460276.name: Rising Dragon Sweep
460276.description: Whirling Dragon Punch knocks enemies up into the air and causes them to fall slowly until they reach the ground.

460551.name: Doom
460551.description:
When Demonbolt consumes a Demonic Core it inflicts impending doom upon the target, dealing (403.121% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds of its target after 20 sec or when removed. Damage is reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hand of Gul'dan reduces the duration of Doom by 3 sec.

460590.name: Permafrost Lances
460590.description: Frozen Orb increases Shatter's damage by 10% for its duration.

460697.name: Totem of Wrath
460697.description:
[ Restoration: Nature's Swiftness] [ Elemental: Stormkeeper / 

 Enhancement
Sundering] summons a totem at your feet for 15 sec that increases the critical effect of damage and healing spells of all nearby allies within (40 * 1 * 1) yards by 15% for 15 sec.

460720.name: Wrench Evil
460720.description: Turn Evil's cast time is reduced by 100%.

461063.name: Quiet Contemplation
461063.description: Draws upon your inner energy, restoring 100% of your maximum health and (96750 / 5 * 20) mana over 20 sec. Must remain seated during contemplation.

461243.name: Light's Protection
461243.description: Allies with Beacon of Light receive 5% less damage.

461244.name: Overflowing Light
461244.description: 30% of Holy Shock's overhealing is converted into an absorb shield. The shield amount cannot exceed 10% of your max health.

461246.name: Glorious Dawn
461246.description: Holy Shock has a 12% chance to refund a charge when cast and its healing is increased by 10%.

461248.name: High Voltage
461248.description:
Each wave of Arcane Missiles has a 50% chance to grant you 1 Arcane Charge.

Arcane Missiles damage increased by 20%.

461251.name: Charged Missiles
461251.description: Each wave of Arcane Missiles will consume an Arcane Charge to increase its damage by 40%.

461257.name: Focusing Crystal
461257.description: Each wave of Arcane Missiles has a 50% chance to grant 1 additional stack of Arcane Salvo.

461260.name: Consortium's Bauble
461260.description: Reduces Arcane Blast's mana cost by 5% and increases its damage by 8%.

461261.name: Brainstorm
461261.description:
Frost
Gaining Brain Freeze increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple instances may overlap.

 Arcane
Gaining Clearcasting increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple instances may overlap.

 Fire
Gaining Hot Streak increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple instances may overlap.

461273.name: Truth Prevails
461273.description: Judgment heals you for (240% of Spell Power) and its mana cost is reduced by 30%. 50% of overhealing from this effect is transferred onto 2 allies within 40 yds.

461278.name: Extrication
461278.description: Word of Glory and Light of Dawn gain up to 30% additional chance to critically strike, based on their target's current health. Lower health targets are more likely to be critically struck.

461287.name: Liberation
461287.description: 12% of Word of Glory and Light of Dawn's healing is converted into Holy damage that strikes a nearby enemy.

461917.name: Bane of Havoc
461917.description: [Havoc: Replaces Havoc]Curses the ground with a demonic bane, causing all of your single target spells to also strike targets marked with the bane for  60% of the damage dealt. Lasts 10 sec.

462036.name: Blackrock Munitions
462036.description: Wildfire Bomb and Flamefang Pitch deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

462368.name: Elemental Resistance
462368.description: Healing from Healing Stream Totem reduces Fire, Frost, and Nature damage taken by 6% for 3 sec.

462375.name: Master of the Elements
462375.description:
Casting Lava Burst increases the healing of your next Healing Wave by 30%, stacking up to 2 times.

Healing Wave applies Flame Shock to a nearby enemy when empowered by Master of the Elements.

462383.name: Spouting Spirits
462383.description: Spirit Link Totem reduces damage taken by an additional 5%, and it restores (1146.6% of Spell Power) health to all nearby allies 1 second after it is dropped. Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

462424.name: Tidewaters
462424.description: When you cast Healing Rain, each ally with your Riptide on them is healed for (264.6% of Spell Power).

462440.name: First Ascendant
462440.description:
Restoration
The cooldown of Ascendance and Healing Tide Totem is reduced by 60 sec.

 Elemental
The cooldown of Ascendance is reduced by 60 sec.

462443.name: Preeminence
462443.description:
Elemental
Your haste is increased by 20% during Ascendance and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

 Restoration
Your haste is increased by 25% while Ascendance or Healing Tide Totem is active and their durations are increased by 3 sec.

462454.name: Reactive Warding
462454.description:
Elemental,  Enhancement
When refreshing Earth Shield, your target is healed for (218.663% of Spell Power) for each stack of Earth Shield they are missing.

Additionally, Earth Shield can consume charges 1.0 sec faster.

 Restoration
When refreshing Earth Shield, your target is healed for (218.663% of Spell Power) for each stack of Earth Shield they are missing.

When refreshing Water Shield, you are refunded 357 mana for each stack of Water Shield missing.

Additionally, Earth Shield and Water Shield can consume charges 1.0 sec faster.

462486.name: Downpour
462486.description:
Casting Healing Rain grants a use of Downpour for 16 sec.

 Downpour
A burst of water at your Healing Rain's location heals up to 5 injured allies within 12 yards for (323.4% of Spell Power).

462587.name: White Water
462587.description: Your critical heals have 215% effectiveness instead of the usual 200%.

462620.name: Earthquake
462620.description:
Causes the earth within 8 yards of your target to tremble and break, dealing [6 * (63.25% of Spell Power)] Nature damage over 6 sec and has a 5% chance to knock the enemy down. Multiple uses of Earthquake may overlap.

This spell is cast at your target.

462695.name: Storm Frenzy
462695.description: Reduces the cast time of Lightning Bolt [Tempest: Tempest] and Chain Lightning by 15%.

462757.name: Thunderstrike Ward
462757.description: Imbue your shield with the element of Lightning for 1 hour, giving Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning a chance to call down 2 Thunderstrikes on your target for (71.5% of Spell Power) Nature damage.

462762.name: Encasing Cold
462762.description: Increases the cooldown of Frost Shock by 15 sec, but Frost Shock now freezes targets in place for 4 sec.

462764.name: Arctic Snowstorm
462764.description: Enemies within 10 yds of your Frost Shock are snared by 30%.

462791.name: Ascending Air
462791.description: Wind Rush Totem's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec and its movement speed effect lasts an additional 2 sec.

462796.name: Enhanced Imbues
462796.description:
Restoration
The effects of your weapon and shield imbues are increased by 20%.

 Elemental
The effects of your weapon and shield imbues are increased by 30%.

 Enhancement
The effects of your weapon imbues are increased by 15%.

462817.name: Jet Stream
462817.description: Wind Rush Totem's movement speed bonus is increased by 10% and now removes snares.

462840.name: Fusion of Elements
462840.description: Consuming Power of the Maelstrom additionally fires an Elemental Blast at your target at 40% effectiveness.

462854.name: Skyfury
462854.description:
Harness the fury of the Windlord to grant a target ally 2% Mastery and empower their auto attacks to have a 20% chance to instantly strike again for 1 hour.

If the target is in your party or raid, all party and raid members will be affected.

462862.name: Lightning Capacitor
462862.description: While Lightning Shield is active, your Nature damage dealt is increased by 8%.

462866.name: Elemental Unity
462866.description:
While a Fire Elemental is active, your Fire damage dealt is increased by 6%.

While a Storm Elemental is active, your Nature damage dealt is increased by 6%.

462867.name: Everlasting Elements
462867.description: Increases the duration of your Elementals by 20%.

466867.name: Avian Specialization
466867.description:
The damage bonus of Spotter's Mark is increased by 20%.

Additionally, your Eagle learns how to Fetch.

 Spotter's Mark
Damaging an enemy with abilities empowered by Precise Shots has a 30% chance to apply Spotter's Mark to the primary target, causing your next Aimed Shot to deal 20% increased damage to the target.

466904.name: Harrier's Cry
466904.description:
Your Eagle descends from the skies with a screech, giving the signal to attack.

Increases haste by 30% for all party and raid members for 40 sec.

Allies receiving this effect will become Sated and unable to benefit from Harrier's Cry or similar effects again for 10 min.

466930.name: Black Arrow
466930.description: You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing (348.4% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and (400% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

466932.name: Black Arrow
466932.description:
Your Kill Shot is replaced with Black Arrow.

 Black Arrow
You attempt to finish off a wounded target, dealing (348.4% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and (400% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 8 sec. Only usable on enemies above 80% health or below 20% health.

466990.name: Withering Fire
466990.description:
Beast Mastery
Bestial Wrath causes you to surrender to darkness, granting you Withering Fire for 10 sec and Deathblow.

 Withering Fire
Casting Black Arrow fires a barrage of 2 additional Black Arrows at nearby targets at 50% effectiveness, prioritizing enemies that aren't affected by Black Arrow's damage over time effect.

 Marksmanship
Trueshot causes you to surrender to darkness, granting you Withering Fire for the duration of Trueshot and Deathblow.

 Withering Fire
Casting Black Arrow fires a barrage of 2 additional Black Arrows at nearby targets at 50% effectiveness, prioritizing enemies that aren't affected by Black Arrow's damage over time effect.

467270.name: Refreshment
467270.description: Life Cocoon grants up to 5 stacks of Mana Tea and applies 2 stacks of Healing Elixir to its target.

467293.name: Jadefire Teachings
467293.description:
Ancient Teachings transfers an additional 270% damage to healing.

Your Stamina is increased by 8%.

467307.name: Rushing Wind Kick
467307.description:
Brewmaster,  Windwalker
Kick up a powerful gust of wind, dealing (179.75% of Attack Power) Nature damage in a 25 yd cone to enemies in front of you, split evenly among them. Damage is increased by 6% for each target hit, up to 30%.



 Mistweaver
Kick up a powerful gust of wind, dealing (179.75% of Attack Power) Nature damage in a 25 yd cone to enemies in front of you, split evenly among them. Damage is increased by 6% for each target hit, up to 30%.

Heals up to 5 allies affected by your heal over time effects for (500% of Spell Power).

467316.name: Jade Empowerment
467316.description: Crackling Jade Lightning's damage is increased by 300% and now chains to 4 additional enemies at 25% effectiveness.

467644.name: The Bell Tolls
467644.description:
Beast Mastery
All pet damage increased by 6%.

Dire Beast damage increased by 10%.

 Marksmanship
Critical strike chance increased by 3%.

Dark Minion damage increased by 10%.

467741.name: Shadow Dagger
467741.description: While in combat, Disengage releases a fan of shadow daggers, dealing (0.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage per second and reducing affected target's movement speed by 30% for 6 sec.

467749.name: Bleak Arrows
467749.description:
Your auto shot now deals Shadow damage, allowing it to bypass armor.

Auto shot damage increased by 100%.

467778.name: Lightning Conduit
467778.description:
You have a chance to get struck by lightning, increasing your movement speed by 50% for 5 sec. The effectiveness is increased to 100% in outdoor areas.

You call down a Thunderstorm when you Reincarnate.

467897.name: Ebon Bowstring
467897.description:
Marksmanship
Casting Black Arrow has a 15% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of  is reset. Your next  can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

 Beast Mastery
Casting Black Arrow has a 15% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Black Arrow is reset. Your next Black Arrow can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

467902.name: Banshee's Mark
467902.description: Black Arrow and Bleak Powder critical strike damage increased by 10%.

467911.name: Bleak Powder
467911.description:
Beast Mastery,  Marksmanship
Black Arrow now explodes in a cloud of shadow and sulfur on impact, dealing (250% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within an 8 yd cone behind the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

468430.name: Zen Focus Tea
468430.description: Thunder Focus Tea provides immunity to Silence and Interrupt effects for 5 sec.

468454.name: Bear the Burden
468454.description: Word of Glory's mana cost is reduced by 100% and now reduces the cooldown of Blessing of Freedom by 4 sec when cast, but its healing is reduced by 50% when cast on allies.

468571.name: Herald of the Storms
468571.description: Reduces the cooldown of Stormkeeper by 15 sec.

468625.name: Charged Conduit
468625.description: Increases the duration of Lightning Rod by 4 sec and its damage bonus by 25%.

468626.name: Earthshatter
468626.description: Increases Earth Shock and Earthquake damage by 8% and the stat bonuses granted by Elemental Blast by 25%.

468695.name: Snakeskin Quiver
468695.description: Your auto shot has a 15% chance to also fire a Cobra Shot at your target.

468701.name: Serpentine Strikes
468701.description:
Cobra Shot critical damage dealt increased by 50%.

When Cobra Shot critically strikes, it refunds 10 Focus.

468743.name: Whirling Stars
468743.description: [Incarnation: Chosen of Elune / Celestial Alignment]'s cooldown is reduced by 60 seconds and it has two charges.

468936.name: Sunseeker Mushroom
468936.description:
Sunfire damage has a chance to grow a magical mushroom at a target's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing (265.85% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (150% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.

Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

469004.name: Hail of Stars
469004.description: Casting a free Starsurge or Starfall grants Solstice for 3 sec.

469279.name: Worthy Sacrifice
469279.description:
You automatically cast Blessing of Sacrifice onto an ally within 40 yds when they are below 35% health and you are not in a loss of control effect.

This effect activates 100% of Blessing of Sacrifice's cooldown.

469304.name: Steed of Liberty
469304.description:
Divine Steed also grants Blessing of Freedom for 3.0 sec.

 Blessing of Freedom:
Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to movement impairing effects [Unbound Freedom: and increasing movement speed by 30%]for 8 sec.

469309.name: Eye for an Eye
469309.description:
Protection
Melee and ranged attackers receive (35% of Spell Power) Holy damage each time they strike you during Ardent Defender and Divine Shield.

 Holy,  Retribution
Melee and ranged attackers receive (35% of Spell Power) Holy damage each time they strike you during Divine Protection and Divine Shield.

469314.name: Feral Spirit
469314.description:
Casting Sundering summons 1 Fire Feral Spirit and Doom Winds summons 1 Nature Feral Spirit by your side for 8 sec.

Feral Spirit
An Elemental Spirit [Glyph of Spirit Raptors: Raptor / Wolf] infused with Fire or Nature magic, granting the summoner with 5% increased Fire or Nature damage and 5% Physical damage for 8 sec.

469316.name: Stoicism
469316.description: The duration of stun effects on you is reduced by 20%.

469317.name: Stand Against Evil
469317.description: Turn Evil now affects 5 additional enemies.

469321.name: Righteous Protection
469321.description: Blessing of Sacrifice now removes and prevents all Poison and Disease effects.

469325.name: Light's Countenance
469325.description: The cooldown of Blinding Light is reduced by 15 sec.

469337.name: Sacred Strength
469337.description: Holy Power spending abilities have 2% increased damage and healing.

469409.name: Divine Spurs
469409.description: Divine Steed's cooldown is reduced by 20%, but its duration is reduced by 40%.

469411.name: A Just Reward
469411.description:
Protection,  Retribution
After Cleanse Toxins successfully removes an effect from an ally, they are healed for [(540% of Spell Power)].

 Holy
After Cleanse successfully removes an effect from an ally, they are healed for [(540% of Spell Power)].

469416.name: Lightbearer
469416.description: 10% of all healing done to you from other sources heals up to 4 nearby allies, divided evenly among them.

469434.name: Selfless Healer
469434.description:
Holy
Flash of Light and Holy Light are 30% more effective on your allies and 40% of the healing done also heals you.

 Protection,  Retribution
Flash of Light is 30% more effective on your allies and 40% of the healing done also heals you.

469439.name: Inspired Guard
469439.description:
Protection
Ardent Defender increases healing taken by 15% for its duration.

 Holy,  Retribution
Divine Protection increases healing taken by 15% for its duration.

469445.name: Holy Reprieve
469445.description: Your Forbearance's duration is reduced by 10 sec.

469476.name: Divine Reach
469476.description: The radius of your auras is increased by 20 yds.

469638.name: Soul Drinker
469638.description:
Marksmanship
Aimed Shot's chance to grant Deathblow is increased by 10%. Rapid Fire has a 100% chance to grant Deathblow.
 Deathblow
The cooldown of  is reset. Your next  can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

 Beast Mastery
Kill Command has a 20% chance and Barbed Shot has a 50% chance to grant Deathblow.

 Deathblow
The cooldown of Black Arrow is reset. Your next Black Arrow can be used on any target, regardless of their current health.

469642.name: Death Perception
469642.description:
Find Weakness increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

Shadow Dance increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

Shadow Blades increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

469701.name: Tempered in Battle
469701.description:
When you or an ally wielding a Holy Bulwark are healed above maximum health, transfer 100% of the overhealing to your ally.

When you or an ally wielding a Sacred Weapon drop below 40% health, redistribute your health immediately and every 1 sec for 4 sec. May only occur once per cast.

469770.name: Blessed Calling
469770.description: Allies affected by your Blessings have 15% increased movement speed.

469780.name: Lead the Charge
469780.description:
Divine Steed reduces the cooldown of 4 nearby ally's major movement ability by 3.0 sec.

Your movement speed is increased by 3%.

469870.name: Reaper's Onslaught
469870.description:
Blood
Reduces the cooldown of Reaper's Mark by 15 sec, but the amount of Marrowrends empowered by Exterminate is reduced by 1.

 Frost
Reduces the cooldown of Reaper's Mark by 15 sec, but the amount of Obliterates and Frostscythes empowered by Exterminate is reduced by 1.

469880.name: Barbed Scales
469880.description: Casting Cobra Shot reduces the cooldown of Barbed Shot by 2 sec.

469883.name: Refining Fire
469883.description: Enemies struck by Avenger's Shield burn with holy fire, suffering 100% additional Radiant damage over 5 sec.

469886.name: Authoritative Rebuke
469886.description:
Holy
Successfully dispelling a harmful effect reduces Cleanse's cooldown by 1.0 sec. Effect increased by 100% while wielding a Holy Armament.

 Protection
Successfully interrupting an enemy spellcast reduces Rebuke's cooldown by 1.0 sec. Effect increased by 100% while wielding a Holy Armament.

469895.name: Spellbreaker
469895.description: Eye for an Eye can now also trigger at 100% effectiveness from direct Magic damage.

470021.name: Signature Spell
470021.description:
Arcane
Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse damage increased by 15%.

Casting Touch of the Magi conjures 4 Arcane Splinters.

 Frost
Frostbolt and Blizzard damage increased by 25%.

Glacial Spike conjures 2 additional Frost Splinters.

470057.name: Voltaic Blaze
470057.description:
Elemental
Instantly shocks the target and 5 enemies within 10 yds with blazing thunder, applying Flame Shock and dealing (400% of Spell Power) Nature damage. Always critically strikes.

Generates 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

 Enhancement
Instantly shocks the target and 5 enemies within 10 yds with blazing thunder, applying Flame Shock and dealing (400% of Spell Power) Nature damage. Always critically strikes.

Generates 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

470076.name: Coalescing Water
470076.description: Healing Wave and Chain Heal increase the initial healing of your next Riptide by 30%, stacking up to 2 times.

470347.name: Supercharger
470347.description:
Outlaw
Adrenaline Rush supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

 Assassination
Kingsbane supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

 Subtlety
Shadow Dance supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

470411.name: Flame Shock
470411.description:
Sears the target with fire, causing (22.425% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage and then an additional (120.06% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage over 18 sec.

Flame Shock can be applied to a maximum of 6 targets.

 Elemental,  Enhancement
If Flame Shock is dispelled, a volcanic eruption wells up beneath the dispeller, exploding for (3175.2% of Spell Power) Volcanic damage and knocking them into the air

470562.name: Renewing Surge
470562.description: Swiftmend cooldown is reduced by 15%, increasing up to 30% on lower health targets.

470668.name: Forced Induction
470668.description: Increase the bonus granted when a damaging finishing move consumes a supercharged combo point by 1.

470669.name: Echoing Reprimand
470669.description:
Subtlety
After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Backstab also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing (118% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

 Assassination
After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Mutilate also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing (118% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

 Outlaw
After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Sinister Strike also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing (118% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

470943.name: Feathered Frenzy
470943.description:
Trueshot sends your Spotting Eagle into a frenzy, instantly applying Spotter's Mark to your target. 

During Trueshot, your chance to apply Spotter's Mark is increased by 100%.

470945.name: Aspect of the Hydra
470945.description: Aimed Shot, Rapid Fire, and Arcane Shot now hit 1 additional target for 35% of their damage.

471306.name: Void Metamorphosis
471306.description:
Collecting 50 Soul Fragments grants access to Void Metamorphosis.

 Void Metamorphosis
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.

471350.name: Obsidian Arrowhead
471350.description: The damage of your auto shot is increased by 25% and its critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

471363.name: Headshot
471363.description: Damage from Kill Shot increases the damage your target receives from Kill Shot by 3%, stacking up to 10 times.

471366.name: Tensile Bowstring
471366.description: Trueshot now also reduces the cast time of Aimed Shot by 40% and reduces the Focus cost of Aimed Shot by 60%.

471369.name: Precision Detonation
471369.description: When Aimed Shot damages a target affected by your Explosive Shot, Explosive Shot instantly explodes, dealing 20% increased damage.

471428.name: Incendiary Ammunition
471428.description: Bulletstorm now increases your critical strike damage by 2%. Additionally, Bulletstorm now stacks 5 more times.

471492.name: Ursol's Warding
471492.description: Gain magical damage reduction equal to 10% of your damage reduction from armor.

471504.name: Lasting Words
471504.description:
Holy Word: Serenity applies 12 sec of Renew to its target.

Holy Word: Sanctify applies 6 sec of Renew to allies it heals.

 Renew
Fill the target with faith in the light, healing for [(304.64% of Spell Power) * 12000 / 15000] over 12 sec.

471668.name: Light in the Darkness
471668.description:
Increases the healing done by Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify by 30%.

Increases the radius of Holy Word: Sanctify by 30%.

471761.name: Emperor's Favor
471761.description: Sheilun's Gift's healing is increased by 20% and its cast time is reduced by 100%, but it now only heals a single ally.

471876.name: Howl of the Pack Leader
471876.description:
Beast Mastery,  Survival
While in combat, every 30 sec your next Kill Command summons the aid of a Beast.

 Wyvern
A Wyvern descends from the skies, letting out a battle cry that increases the damage of you and your pets by 10% for 12 sec.

 Boar
A Boar charges through your target 1 time, dealing (1440% of Attack Power) damage to nearby enemies and an additional (1200% of Attack Power) physical damage to its primary target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

 Bear
A Bear leaps into the fray, rending the flesh of your enemies, dealing (400% of Attack Power) damage over 10 sec to up to 8 nearby enemies.

472352.name: Dire Summons
472352.description:
Beast Mastery
Kill Command reduces the cooldown of Howl of the Pack Leader by 1.0 sec.

Cobra Shot reduces the cooldown of Howl of the Pack Leader by 1.0 sec.

 Survival
Kill Command reduces the cooldown of Howl of the Pack Leader by 1.5 sec.

Raptor Strike reduces the cooldown of Howl of the Pack Leader by 1.0 sec.

472357.name: Better Together
472357.description:
Survival
Damage dealt by your pet is increased by 5%.

Raptor Strike damage increased by 5%.

 Beast Mastery
Damage dealt by your pets is increased by 2%.

Barbed Shot damage increased by 10%.

472358.name: Pack Mentality
472358.description:
Beast Mastery
Howl of the Pack Leader increases the damage of your Kill Command by 25%.

Summoning a Beast reduces the cooldown of Barbed Shot by 4.0 sec.

 Survival
Howl of the Pack Leader increases the damage of your Kill Command by 50%.

Summoning a Beast reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 6.0 sec.

472361.name: Divine Procession
472361.description: Smite extends the duration of an active Atonement by 2.0 sec.

472433.name: Evangelism
472433.description: Immediately Power Word: Radiance your target at 150% effectiveness, and causes your next 2 casts of Power Word: Radiance to be instant cast with 40% reduced mana cost.

472476.name: Ursine Fury
472476.description: When your Bear is summoned, it is joined by 2 Dire Beasts.

472524.name: Sharpened Claws
472524.description: The damage of your Bear's Rend Flesh is increased by 15%.

472550.name: Fury of the Wyvern
472550.description:
Beast Mastery
Your pet's attacks increase your Wyvern's damage bonus by 1%, up to 10%.

Casting Kill Command extends the duration of your Wyvern by 0.5 sec, up to 5 additional sec.

 Survival
Your pet's attacks increase your Wyvern's damage bonus by 1%, up to 10%.

Casting Wildfire Bomb extends the duration of your Wyvern by 5.0 sec, up to 10 additional sec.

472568.name: Encroaching Shadows
472568.description: Shadow Word: Pain Spreads to [Revel in Darkness: 2 nearby enemies / a nearby enemy] when you cast Penance on the target.

472639.name: Hogstrider
472639.description:
Survival
Each time your Boar deals damage, the damage of your next Boomstick is increased by 5%, up to 20%.

 Beast Mastery
When your Boar deals damage, the damage of your next Cobra Shot is increased by 200%.

Each additional enemy damaged by your Boar causes Cobra Shot to strike 1 additional target, up to 4.

472660.name: No Mercy
472660.description:
Beast Mastery
Your Bleed effects deal 10% increased damage.

 Survival
Your Bleed effects deal 35% increased damage.

472707.name: Shell Cover
472707.description: Survival of the Fittest now summons a Turtle to aid you, further increasing its damage reduction effect by 10%.

472719.name: Slicked Shoes
472719.description: When Disengage removes a movement impairing effect, its cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

472729.name: Horsehair Tether
472729.description: When an enemy is stunned by Binding Shot, it is dragged to Binding Shot's center.

472741.name: Stampede!
472741.description:
Beast Mastery
Casting Bestial Wrath grants Howl of the Pack Leader and causes your next Kill Command to rouse the nearby wildlife into a Stampede, charging your target and dealing [(150% of Attack Power) * 9] Physical damage over 7 sec.

 Survival
Casting Takedown grants Howl of the Pack Leader and causes your next Kill Command to rouse the nearby wildlife into a Stampede, charging your target and dealing [(150% of Attack Power) * 9] Physical damage over 7 sec.

473369.name: Eagle's Accuracy
473369.description:
Aimed Shot deals 5% increased damage.

Rapid Fire deals 10% increased damage.

473370.name: Double Tap
473370.description: Casting Trueshot or Volley grants Double Tap, causing your next Aimed Shot to fire again at 80% power, or your next Rapid Fire to fire 80% additional shots during its channel.

473520.name: Shrapnel Shot
473520.description: Casting Explosive Shot has a 100% chance to grant Lock and Load.

473523.name: Windrunner Quiver
473523.description:
Consuming Precise Shots has a 30% to grant Precise Shots.

The damage bonus of Precise Shots is increased by an additional 15%.

473662.name: Consume
473662.description:
Drain the essence from your target, dealing (196.7% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

Castable while moving.

Generates 8 Fury.

473728.name: Void Ray
473728.description:
Requires 100 Fury
Unleash a beam of concentrated void energy, dealing (20.25% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage and consuming 5 Fury every 0.2 sec.

Effect ends after 3 sec or upon reaching 0 Fury.

474421.name: Intimidation
474421.description:
Your Spotting Eagle descends from the skies, stunning your target for 5 sec. [Binding Shackles: Targets stunned by Intimidation deal 10% less damage to you for 8 sec after the effect ends]

This ability does not require line of sight when used against players.

474440.name: Cunning
474440.description:
Your Spotting Eagle gains the Cunning specialization, granting you Master's Call and Pathfinding.

 Master's Call
Your pet removes all root and movement impairing effects from itself and a friendly target, and grants immunity to all such effects for 4 sec.

 Pathfinding
Your movement speed is increased by 8%.

474456.name: Tenacious
474456.description:
Your Spotting Eagle gains the Tenacity specialization, granting you Endurance Training and Air Superiority.

 Endurance Training
You gain 5% increased maximum health.

 Air Superiority
Your Spotting Eagle alerts you to oncoming danger, reducing all damage you take by 3%

474526.name: Grievous Wounds
474526.description: Rake, Rip, and Thrash damage increased by 10%.

474530.name: Circle of the Wild
474530.description:
Restoration
Physical damage dealt by your abilities increased by 25%.

 Balance,  Feral,  Guardian
Physical damage dealt by your abilities increased by 5%.

474541.name: Circle of the Heavens
474541.description:
Restoration
Magical damage dealt by your spells increased by 25%.

 Balance,  Feral,  Guardian
Magical damage dealt by your spells increased by 5%.

474678.name: Aessina's Renewal
474678.description:
When a hit deals more than 12% of your maximum health, instantly heal for 10% of your health.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 30 seconds.

474738.name: Unerring Vision
474738.description: Trueshot now increases your critical strike chance by an additional 10% and increases your critical strike damage by an additional 20%.

474746.name: Solitary Companion
474746.description: Your pet damage is increased by 35% and your pet is 10% larger.

474750.name: Symbiotic Relationship
474750.description: Form a bond with an ally. Your self-healing also heals your bonded ally for 10% of the amount healed. Your healing to your bonded ally also heals you for 8% of the amount healed.

556606.name: Luminescence
556606.description: Lightbearer's healing transfer is increased by up to 150% based on your current health. Lower health heals allies for more.

936051.name: Shining Revelation
936051.description: The light reveals all enemies in stealth or invisible to you while under the effects of Divine Shield. This effect lingers for 20 sec after Divine Shield fades.

1213597.name: Perfectly-Honed Instincts
1213597.description: Well-Honed Instincts can trigger up to once every 90 sec.

1214442.name: Demonfire Infusion
1214442.description:
Periodic damage from Immolate has a 4% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at 100% increased effectiveness.

Incinerate has a 25% chance to fire a Demonfire bolt at 100% increased effectiveness.

1214467.name: Rain of Fire
1214467.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire upon your target, dealing [(45.9162% of Spell Power) * 8] Fire damage over 8 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at your target.

1214909.name: Roll the Bones
1214909.description:
Roll the dice of fate, providing a combat enhancement of random power for 30 sec.

1 set or better: Add 20% increased chance to gain Opportunity.

2 sets or better: Add increased combo point generation.

3 sets or better: Add 30% bonus to Restless Blades' effect.

Jackpot: Add 10% increased critical strike chance.

1215241.name: Divinity
1215241.description:
Your healing is increased by 10% while Apotheosis is active.

Casting Apotheosis causes your next 3 Prayer of Healing casts to be instant and heal for 25% more.

1215245.name: Eternal Sanctity
1215245.description: Increases the duration of Apotheosis by 12 sec.

1215265.name: Dispersing Light
1215265.description: 5% of healing done with Flash Heal is replicated to 4 injured allies within 40 yards.

1215275.name: Holy Celerity
1215275.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Holy Words by 15 sec.

1215617.name: Predator's Thirst
1215617.description:
Consume damage increased by 15%.

Consume generates a Soul Fragment.

1216953.name: Freezing Winds
1216953.description: Shattering enemies inside your Blizzard increases Shatter's area damage by 15%.

1217017.name: Thorns
1217017.description:
Restoration
Casting Barkskin or Ironbark sprouts thorns on you for 12 sec. When victim to melee attacks, thorns deals (114% of Spell Power) Nature damage back to the attacker.

Attackers also have their movement speed reduced by 50% for 4 sec.

 Balance,  Feral
Casting Barkskin sprouts thorns on you for 12 sec. When victim to melee attacks, thorns deals (114% of Spell Power) Nature damage back to the attacker.

Attackers also have their movement speed reduced by 50% for 4 sec.

1217092.name: Storm Conduit
1217092.description:
Elemental (Elemental Shaman)
Casting Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning reduces the cooldown of Astral Shift, Gust of Wind, Wind Shear, and Nature Totems by 1.0 sec.

Interrupt duration reduced by 30% on Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning casts.

 Restoration
Casting Lightning Bolt or Chain Lightning reduces the cooldown of Astral Shift, Gust of Wind, Wind Shear, and Nature Totems by 1.0 sec.

Interrupt duration reduced by 65% on Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning casts.

1217102.name: Sniper's Advantage
1217102.description: Trueshot and Volley increase the range of all shots by 30% for their duration.

1217413.name: Slicing Winds
1217413.description:
Envelop yourself in razor-sharp winds, then lunge forward dealing (448% of Attack Power) Nature damage to enemies in your path. Damage reduced beyond 5 enemies.

Hold to increase lunge distance.

1217474.name: Forest Guardian
1217474.description:
Wrath, Starfire, Cyclone, and Combo-Point generating abilities extend the duration of your active heal over time effects by 1.0 sec on up to 3 allies.

Starsurge and Combo-Point spending abilities increase the rate of your heal over time spells by 20% for 4 sec.

1217524.name: Dire Cleave
1217524.description: When summoned, Dire Beasts gain Beast Cleave at 100% effectiveness for 8.0 sec.

1217605.name: Void Metamorphosis
1217605.description:
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.

1217622.name: Therazane's Resilience
1217622.description:
Restoration
Earth Shield and Water Shield no longer lose charges and are 115% effective.

 Elemental,  Enhancement
Earth Shield no longer loses charges and is 115% effective.

1217941.name: Lifetreading
1217941.description: Efflorescence healing increased by 25%, and it now automatically grows beneath your Lifebloom target's feet.

1218047.name: Primordial Storm
1218047.description:
Sundering transforms into a single use Primordial Storm for 15 sec after it is cast.

Primordial Storm
Devastate nearby enemies with a Primordial Storm dealing (118.8% of Attack Power) Flamestrike, (118.8% of Attack Power) Froststrike, (118.8% of Attack Power) Stormstrike damage, and unleashing a Lightning Bolt or a Chain Lightning at 150% effectiveness. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Consumes Maelstrom Weapon for increased damage.

1218211.name: Dark Archangel
1218211.description: Casting Evangelism increases your damage, and the damage of all allies with your Atonement by 10% for 12 sec.

1218447.name: Fulminous Roar
1218447.description:
Preservation
Fire Breath and Dream Breath deal their damage and healing 20% more often.

 Devastation
Fire Breath deals its damage 20% more often.

1218603.name: Death's Cold Embrace
1218603.description:
Pillar of Frost grants you Remorseless Winter and increases its damage by 400% and its radius by 150%, but your movement speed is heavily reduced for its duration.

Pillar of Frost's cooldown is increased by 15 sec.

1218692.name: Bloodstones
1218692.description: Your Healthstones are replaced with Bloodstones which increase their user's haste by 20% for 12 sec instead of healing.

1219122.name: Preemptive Maneuver
1219122.description: Feint decreases your damage taken by an additional 40% while stunned and its energy cost is reduced by 30%.

1219162.name: Aspect of the Fox
1219162.description: Aimed Shot may be cast while moving during Aspect of the Cheetah and Aspect of the Cheetah's delayed effect is increased by 4 sec.

1219165.name: Sharpen Blade
1219165.description: Colossus Smash causes your next Mortal Strike to deal 15% increased damage and reduce healing taken by 50% for 4 sec.

1219723.name: Azure Celerity
1219723.description: Disintegrate deals damage 25% more often, but deals 10% less damage.

1220506.name: Screaming Brutality
1220506.description: Blade Dance automatically triggers Throw Glaive on your primary target for 100% damage and each slash has a 50% chance to Throw Glaive an enemy for 35% damage.

1220739.name: Overpowered Barrier
1220739.description:
Your barriers absorb 100% more damage and have an additional effect, but last 4 sec. [ Frost:  Ice Barrier
If the barrier is fully absorbed, enemies within 10 yds suffer (650% of Spell Power) Frost damage and are slowed by 70% for 4 sec /  Fire:  Blazing Barrier
Reflects 40% of damage absorbed / 

 Arcane
 Prismatic Barrier
If the barrier is fully absorbed, your next Blink or Shimmer within 15 sec grants Invisibility and immunity to damage for 3 sec. The damage reduction is lost if Invisibility ends]

1221167.name: Collapsing Star
1221167.description:
While in Void Metamorphosis, every 30 Soul Fragments harvested grants access to Collapsing Star.

 Collapsing Star
Channel an immense amount of void energy into a single, cataclysmic blast, dealing (562.5% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to your target and [(562.5% of Spell Power) * 0.75] Cosmic damage to all nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While casting Collapsing Star, your Fury drain is significantly reduced.

1223171.name: Guile
1223171.description: The cast range of Voidblade, Consume Magic, and Disrupt are increased by 20 yds.

1223323.name: Unbreakable Bond
1223323.description:
Regain access to Call Pet.

While outdoors, your pet deals 15% increased damage and takes 15% reduced damage.

1223798.name: Intuition
1223798.description: Upon reaching maximum stacks of Arcane Salvo, your next Arcane Barrage deals 25% increased damage.

1223918.name: Waste Not
1223918.description: Damage from Void Ray has a 200% increased chance to generate a Soul Fragment.

1226019.name: Reap
1226019.description:
Cut a hole in the fabric of reality, sending a concentrated bolt of cosmic matter towards your target, dealing (673.2% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

Reap gathers up to 4 nearby souls.

1226033.name: Eradicate
1226033.description:
Fully channeling Void Ray upgrades your Reap to Eradicate.

 Eradicate
Slam your Scythe to the ground, dealing (673.2% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to your primary target and [(673.2% of Spell Power)] to all other enemies within a 25 yd cone in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Eradicate gathers up to 4 nearby souls.

1226140.name: Grove Guardians
1226140.description: Casting Swiftmend or Wild Growth summons a Treant that casts Nourish on that target or a nearby ally periodically, healing for [(61% of Spell Power)]. Lasts 8 sec.

1227280.name: Tentacle Slam
1227280.description:
Summons a massive shadowy appendage to slam the ground, dealing (68.7926% of Spell Power) Shadow damage in front of you and 8 yds around your target.

Applies Vampiric Touch to up to 6 enemies, prioritizing ones without Vampiric Touch.

Generates 6 Insanity.

1227707.name: Impending Apocalypse
1227707.description: Each Collapsing Star you cast increases the damage of your next Collapsing Star by 30%.

1227751.name: Berserker Roar
1227751.description: Berserker Shout also reduces the duration of the next crowd control effect within 5 sec by 50% on group members within 12 yds.

1228516.name: Subservient Shadows
1228516.description: Summoned minions last 20% longer and deal an additional 15% damage.

1229376.name: Single-Button Assistant
1229376.description:
Casts damaging abilities for use in combat, rotating through them based on priority.

The global cooldown of abilities used through the Single-Button Assistant is 25% longer.

1230153.name: Killing Streak
1230153.description:
Obliterate and Frostscythe consume all Killing Machines to deal 25% increased critical strike damage and grant 1.5% Haste for 8 sec for each stack consumed.

Multiple applications may overlap.

1230223.name: Howling Blades
1230223.description: Rime empowered Howling Blast unleashes 2 icy blades at its target that deal (25.2% of Attack Power) Frost damage and have 15% chance to grant Killing Machine.

1230272.name: Icy Onslaught
1230272.description:
Frost Strike and Glacial Advance now cause your next Frost Strike and Glacial Advance to deal 15% increased damage and cost 5 more Runic Power. 

This effect stacks until the next Runic Empowerment.

1230284.name: Northwinds
1230284.description:
Howling Blast now hits an additional target with maximum effectiveness. 

Rime increases Howling Blast damage done by an additional 75%.

1230301.name: Frostreaper
1230301.description:
Obliterate deals 10% increased damage and has a chance to tether the souls of its target and a nearby enemy to yours.

Frost Strike severs the tethers, dealing (205.92% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to both foes.

1230339.name: Mindbender
1230339.description:
Casting Voidform summons a Mindbender for 10 sec.

 Mindbender
Summons a shadowy fiend to attack your target.

Generates 1 Insanity each time the Mindbender attacks.

1231346.name: Ancient Madness
1231346.description:
Casting Shadow Word: Madness increases the duration of Voidform by 3.0 sec.

Each time this occurs during Voidform, its effectiveness is reduced by 25%.

1232616.name: Pillars of Light
1232616.description:
Beacon of Faith:
Allies with Beacon of Light or Beacon of Faith are healed for (33% of Spell Power) every 3 sec.

 Beacon of Virtue:
Beacon of Virtue instantly heals allies for (390.625% of Spell Power).

1232739.name: Wildspeaker
1232739.description:
Dire Beasts will now obey your Kill Command, dealing its damage at 30% effectiveness.

Bestial Wrath now sends your Dire Beasts into a rage, increasing their damage dealt by 10% for 15 sec. Dire Beasts summoned during a Bestial Wrath will benefit at a reduced duration.

1232897.name: Lycara's Inspiration
1232897.description:
You gain a bonus while in each form inspired by the breadth of your Druidic knowledge:

No Form: 4% Magic Damage
Cat Form: 4% Stamina
Bear Form: 5% Movement Speed
Moonkin Form: 3% Area damage taken reduction

1232955.name: Unmatched Precision
1232955.description: The damage bonus of Precise Shots is increased by an additional 10%.

1233429.name: Price of Progress
1233429.description: You sacrifice 1% of your health every 1 sec and in exchange you cannot be slowed below 90% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks. Lasts until canceled.

1233448.name: Dark Transformation
1233448.description:
Corrupt and evolve your Ghoul into a Monstrosity, greatly empowering its abilities for 15 sec.

Death Coil and Epidemic extends the duration of this effect by 1.0 sec.

1234195.name: Void Nova
1234195.description: Unleash an eruption of void energy, dealing (27.4816% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage and stunning your target and all nearby enemies for 2 sec.

1234559.name: Desecrate
1234559.description: Death and Decay deals its damage 100% faster.

1234791.name: Power Through Adversity
1234791.description:
Second Wind reduces damage taken by 10% to 40%, with larger attacks being reduced by more.

While Shield Wall is active, healing reductions do not apply to you.

1234796.name: Shift
1234796.description: Shift through the void, reappearing at your targeted destination.

1235022.name: Hunker Down
1235022.description: Damage you take from area of effect attacks is reduced by 2%. Spell Reflection reduces magic damage taken by an additional 10%.

1235023.name: Spellbreaker
1235023.description: You have a 8% chance to disrupt magic damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 50%.

1235047.name: Unyielding Stance
1235047.description: Defensive Stance reduces damage taken by an additional 4%.

1235088.name: Heavy Handed
1235088.description: Execute hits up to 2 additional targets for 70% damage.

1235091.name: Lay In Wait
1235091.description: Sigil of Misery has 2 charges and now lays in wait for up to 90 sec at your selected location until an enemy approaches.

1235113.name: Whirling Blade
1235113.description: Your attacks have a chance to target a nearby enemy with Ravager for 4 sec.

1235211.name: Shadow Tap
1235211.description: Mind Blast deals 150% increased damage, but costs 40% more mana.

1235397.name: Umbral Reach
1235397.description:
Beast Mastery
Bleak Powder now applies Black Arrow's periodic effect to all enemies it damages.

If Bleak Powder damages 2 or more enemies, gain Beast Cleave if talented.

 Marksmanship
Bleak Powder now applies Black Arrow's periodic effect to all enemies it damages.

If Bleak Powder damages 2 or more enemies, gain Trick Shots if talented.

1237270.name: Feast of Souls
1237270.description: Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

1237885.name: Thorn Bloom
1237885.description:
Command powerful thorns to assault 8 enemies and heal 8 allies within 10 yds of the target area.

Enemies are dealt [Attack Power * 0.5 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Nature damage and an additional [(Attack Power * 0.125 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)) * 12] Nature damage over 12 sec. Allies are healed for [Attack Power * 0.65 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] and an additional [(Attack Power * 0.15 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)) * 12] over 12 sec.

1237978.name: Tempo Charged
1237978.description: Bronze healing and absorption increased by 15%.

1238488.name: Moment of Craving
1238488.description: After fully channeling Void Ray, the cooldown of Reap is reset and your next Reap will collect up to 6 additional Soul Fragments.

1238680.name: Frostbound Will
1238680.description: Consuming Rime reduces the cooldown of Empower Rune Weapon by 6 sec.

1238739.name: Soulshaper
1238739.description: Each Soul Fragment gathered by Reap increases its damage by 8%.

1238900.name: Grave Mastery
1238900.description: Critical strike damage of your minions is increased by 15%

1239519.name: Hungering Slash
1239519.description:
After dealing damage with The Hunt or Voidblade, Voidblade is replaced with Hungering Slash for 6 sec.

 Hungering Slash
Violently slash your scythe around you, dealing (247.5% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to nearby enemies and generating 10 Fury. Shatters up to 2 Soul Fragments from nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hungering Slash grants a temporary charge of Vengeful Retreat and causes your next Vengeful Retreat within 6 sec to deal an additional (150% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

1239581.name: Unshakable
1239581.description: Your empower spells are 10% more effective. While charging a healing empower spell, you cannot be knocked back.

1239669.name: Eclipse
1239669.description:
You may draw the sun and moon into alignment for 15 sec, empowering either your Nature or Arcane spells. Casting Wrath or Starfire changes what mode of Eclipse will be entered, and the two modes of Eclipse share a button and 32 sec cooldown.

 Eclipse (Solar)
Nature spells deal 15% additional damage and Wrath damage is increased by 40%.

 Eclipse (Lunar)
Arcane spells deal 15% additional damage and Starfire damage is increased by 40%.

1240185.name: Celestial Fire
1240185.description: Moonfire, Sunfire, and Shooting Stars damage increased by 8%.

1240188.name: Sculpt the Stars
1240188.description: The cooldowns of Lunar Eclipse and Solar Eclipse are reduced by 2 sec.

1240189.name: Master Summoner
1240189.description: Increases Mastery by 3% and reduces the cast time of your Summon Demonic Tyrant and Summon Felguard by 0.5 sec.

1240201.name: Devourer's Bite
1240201.description: Damage from Voidblade and the Hunt increases the damage your target takes from you by 12% for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

1240202.name: Voidglare Boon
1240202.description: After fully channeling Void Ray, gain 10 Fury.

1240203.name: Focused Ray
1240203.description: Void Ray deals 80% more damage when damaging 3 targets.

1240204.name: Star Fragments
1240204.description: Collapsing Star now generates 3 Soul Fragments.

1240206.name: Total Eclipse
1240206.description: Entering any Eclipse has a 10% chance to grant the benefits of both Lunar and Solar Eclipse.

1240283.name: Elune's Challenge
1240283.description: When you exit Eclipse with less than 40 Astral Power, Wrath and Starfire's cast times are reduced by 20% for 15 sec or until you enter an Eclipse.

1240364.name: Death's Torment
1240364.description: Shadow Word: Death deals damage 2 additional times at 15% effectiveness.

1240388.name: Dark Thoughts
1240388.description: Increases the chance for Shadowy Insight to occur by 25%. When consuming Shadowy Insight, Mind Blast generates 1 additional Insanity.

1240394.name: Madness Weaving
1240394.description: The damage bonus from your Mastery: Shadow Weaving gains 50% additional benefit from Shadow Word: Madness.

1240906.name: Improved Eclipse
1240906.description: Lunar Eclipse and Solar Eclipse have one additional charge.

1240907.name: Meteorites
1240907.description: Every time Starfall drops a wave of stars, a meteorite also falls on up to 2 targets in its range, each dealing (22.45% of Spell Power) Astral damage.

1241059.name: Celestial Infusion
1241059.description: A strong herbal brew that coalesces purified chi escaping your body into a celestial guard, absorbing 30% of incoming damage, up to [(Attack Power * 22.68) * (1 + Versatility)] total.

1241097.name: Niuzao's Resolve
1241097.description: Healing Spheres now heal over 10 sec, and their healing is increased by up to 80% based on your missing health.

1241136.name: Zen State
1241136.description: The effectiveness of your Stagger is increased by up to 15%, based on your missing health.

1241275.name: Tyr's Deliverance
