1241275.description:
Activating Avenging Wrath releases the Light within yourself, healing 5 injured allies instantly and an injured ally every 1 sec within 40 yds for (35.1% of Spell Power).

Allies healed also receive 10% increased healing from your Holy Light, Flash of Light, and Holy Shock spells for 12 sec.

1241288.name: Hammer of Wrath
1241288.description:
Holy,  Protection
During Avenging Wrath, Judgment is empowered into Hammer of Wrath.

 Hammer of Wrath
Hurls a divine hammer that strikes an enemy for [(123.75% of Attack Power) * 1] [Blades of Light: Holystrike / Holy] damage.

Generates 1 Holy Power.

 Retribution
During Avenging Wrath, Judgment is empowered into Hammer of Wrath.

Hammer of Wrath
Hurls a divine hammer that strikes an enemy for [(143.871% of Attack Power) * 1] Holy damage.

Generates 1 Holy Power.

1241352.name: Nullifying Shroud
1241352.description: Verdant Embrace wreathes you in arcane energy, preventing the next full loss of control effect against you. Lasts 3 sec.

1241358.name: Empyrean Legacy
1241358.description: Judgment critical strikes empower your next Word of Glory to automatically activate Light of Dawn at 30% effectiveness.

1241462.name: Arcane Pulse
1241462.description:
A pulse of Arcane magic erupts from underneath your target, dealing (91% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to all enemies within 2 yds. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Each Arcane Charge increases damage by 60%, radius by 2 yds, and mana cost by 100%. [ Arcane (Level 10): Generates 1 Arcane Charge.]

1241511.name: Call of the Righteous
1241511.description:
Avenging Wrath's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, but its duration is reduced by 5.0 sec.

Avenging Crusader's cooldown is reduced by 30.0 sec, but its duration is reduced by 3.0 sec.

1241542.name: Ringing of the Heavens
1241542.description: Activating Aura Mastery also casts a Divine Toll at 100% effectiveness.

1241567.name: Clawing Shadows
1241567.description:
Shadows guide your strikes, increasing the damage of your Scourge Strike by 25%, and causing it to grant you Clawing Shadows up to 4 times.

For each stack of Clawing Shadows, your Scourge Strike chains to an additional enemy. Each subsequent chain deals 20% reduced damage.

1241669.name: Dream Simulacrum
1241669.description: Verdant Embrace healing is increased by 30%. In addition, it no longer causes you to leap to your target, instead sending forth a Dream Simulacrum.

1241704.name: Wings of Liberty
1241704.description: Verdant Embrace gains an additional charge.

1241705.name: Outnumber
1241705.description:
Each Lesser Ghoul increases the damage of your permanent Ghoul by 10%, and Dark Transformation additionally empowers the Claw attacks of your Lesser Ghouls to Sweeping Claws.

Sweeping Claws
Rakes an enemy with deformed claws, dealing  [(Attack Power * 0.2484) * (1 + Versatility) * 2 * 1.144] Shadow damage to the target and  [(Attack Power * 0.17155125) * (1 + Versatility) * 2 * 1.144] Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

1241714.name: Seraphic Barrier
1241714.description: Word of Glory and Light of Dawn now convert 15% of their healing into an absorb shield instead.

1241805.name: Glistening Radiance
1241805.description: While at maximum health, targets with Beacon of Light generate an absorb shield equal to 1% of their health every 3 sec, up to a maximum of 5%.

1241858.name: Unholy Devotion
1241858.description:
Putrefy causes your permanent Ghoul to go on an unholy frenzy, increasing its attack speed and energy regeneration by 25% for 12 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

1241937.name: Soul Immolation
1241937.description: Light your soul aflame, healing yourself for (4 * 6)% of your maximum health, generating 30 Fury and shattering 3 Soul Fragments over 5 sec.

1241945.name: Blessing of Dusk
1241945.description:
Holy,  Retribution
Damage taken reduced by up to 10%, increasing as your health decreases.

 Protection
Damage taken reduced by up to 20%, increasing as your health decreases.

1241958.name: Vengeful Wrath
1241958.description: Hammer of Wrath deals up to 50% additional damage based on its target's health. Lower health targets receive more damage.

1242008.name: Hand of Divinity
1242008.description: Activating Avenging Wrath calls upon the Light to empower you, causing your next [Avenging Crusader: Holy Light / 2 Holy Lights] to be instant cast and cost 50% less mana.

1242031.name: Twin Echoes
1242031.description: Casting Emerald Blossom causes your next Echo to cast on an additional ally within 25 yards at 100% effectiveness. Stacks up to 2 charges.

1242147.name: Summon Gargoyle
1242147.description:
Army of the Dead now summons a Gargoyle into the battlefield to bombard your enemies for 25 sec.

The Gargoyle gains 1% increased damage for every 1 Runic Power you spend and always critically strikes.

1242158.name: Forbidden Knowledge
1242158.description:
Army of the Dead siphons the power of the fallen, transforming Death Coil and Epidemic into Necrotic Coil and Graveyard for 30 sec.

Necrotic Coil
Unleash a vortex of necrotic energy and bone, dealing (219.375% of Attack Power) Shadowstrike damage up to 3 foes and (69% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all pierced enemies.

Graveyard
The dead erupt beneath all foes with Virulent Plague, dealing (95.4678% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and (38.1876% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to enemies nearby.

1242492.name: Emptiness
1242492.description: Every soul consumed in Void Metamorphosis grants 0.25% haste, up to 25%.

1242495.name: Calamitous
1242495.description: Your damaging critical strikes deal 240% damage instead of the usual 200%.

1242604.name: Scourging
1242604.description:
Scourge Strike now causes your Plagues to erupt at 50% effectiveness.

Clawing Shadows can now stack 1 additional times.

1242608.name: Raise Abomination
1242608.description: Army of the Dead now raises an Abomination for 30 sec to attack enemies while emitting a disease cloud, dealing (35% of Attack Power) Plague damage to nearby enemies every 2 sec.

1242745.name: Inner Flame
1242745.description: Casting Dream Flight or Stasis increases your healing over time by 60% and causes Living Flame and Reversion to have a 100% increased chance to grant Essence Burst. Lasts [Dream Flight: 20 / 15] sec.

1242768.name: Sweet Release
1242768.description: Your chance to shatter a Soul Fragment from enemies you damage is increased by 2%.

1242779.name: Phantom Menace
1242779.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Shadowy Apparitions by 10% and their critical strike damage by 40%.

1242862.name: Instilled Doubt
1242862.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Vampiric Touch and Shadow Word: Pain by 8% and their critical strike damage by 20%.

1242910.name: Jade Infusion
1242910.description: Thunder Focus Tea summons a Jade Serpent Statue at your location. When you channel Soothing Mist, the statue will also begin to channel Soothing Mist on your target, healing for (560% of Spell Power) over 8 sec.

1243155.name: Way of the Serpent
1243155.description: [Sheilun's Gift / Vivify] healing increased by 15% and Renewing Mist's healing is increased by 30%.

1243287.name: Diffuse Magic
1243287.description: Activating Fortifying Brew transfers all currently active harmful magical effects on you back to their original caster if possible.

1243307.name: Aether Attunement
1243307.description: Arcane Missiles now damages 2 additional targets at 50% effectiveness.

1243418.name: Healing Spheres
1243418.description:
Your healing has a chance to coalesces a Healing Sphere out of the mists at your target's location after 1.5 sec. If allies walk through it, they consume the sphere, healing themselves for (450% of Spell Power) and dispelling all harmful periodic magic effects.

Maximum of 3 Healing Spheres can be active by the Monk at any given time.

1243435.name: Orb Mastery
1243435.description:
Casting Arcane Orb while you have Clearcasting causes you to fire 2 additional Arcane Orbs at 100% effectiveness.

Casting Arcane Orb now consumes Clearcasting.

1243507.name: Aegwynn's Technique
1243507.description: Casting Touch of the Magi grants Clearcasting.

1243542.name: Overflowing Insight
1243542.description: The damage of Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse are increased by 15%, but their mana costs are increased by 25%.

1243554.name: Zen Spheres
1243554.description:
Soothing Mist, Crackling Jade Lightning, and Rising Sun Kick form a sphere of Hope or Despair above their targets. Only one of each sphere can be active at a time.

 Sphere of Hope: Increases your healing done to the target by 10%.
 Sphere of Despair: Target deals 3% less damage and takes 10% increased damage from all sources.

1243557.name: Expanded Mind
1243557.description:
Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Pulse grants 2 stacks of Arcane Salvo.

Casting Arcane Orb grants 2 stacks of Arcane Salvo.

1243659.name: Last Stand
1243659.description: Activating Shield Wall increases your maximum health by 30% for 8 sec and instantly heals you for that amount.

1243660.name: Resonant Voice
1243660.description: The effects of your shouts last 20% longer.

1243807.name: Frantic Frenzy
1243807.description:
Unleash a furious frenzy, flickering to nearby targets in front of you 5 times and clawing all enemies around them for (15.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage and an additional [(31.08% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec.

Awards 5 combo points.

1244001.name: Arcane Singularity
1244001.description:
Arcane Salvo damage bonus increased by 2%.

 Arcane Salvo:
Increases the damage of your next Arcane Barrage by 3%.

1244019.name: Undying Embers
1244019.description: You are healed for 100% of the damage dealt by Refining Fire.

1244025.name: Improved Conjuration
1244025.description: Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

1244069.name: Improved Ice Barrier
1244069.description: Ice Barrier reduces your physical damage taken by 10% and absorbs an additional 5% of your maximum health.

1244070.name: Searing Sunlight
1244070.description: Casting Avenger's Shield causes Consecration to deal its damage and healing again immediately at 100% effectiveness.

1244087.name: Time Walk
1244087.description: Alter Time resets the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer when you return to your original location.

1244088.name: Interpose
1244088.description: Run at high speed toward a target location near your allies, taking 30% of all damage dealt to allies within 3 yards for 8 sec or until you take at least [(0.2) * Total Health] damage from this effect.

1244090.name: Temporal Realignment
1244090.description: Upon dropping below 25% health, your past self corrects your timeline, casting Alter Time and instantly returning 50% of your maximum health.

1244105.name: Charm of Aegwynn
1244105.description: The critical strike damage of your spells is increased by 5%.

1244110.name: Glacial Bulwark
1244110.description: Ice Block and Ice Barrier now have an additional charge.

1244220.name: Voidpurge
1244220.description: Void Ray's cooldown during Void Metamorphosis is reduced by 2.0 sec.

1244222.name: Devourer's Edge
1244222.description: Reap and Consume damage increased by 10%.

1244237.name: Rolling Torment
1244237.description: When Void Metamorphosis expires, for each unused Soul you harvested, gain 5 Fury and increase your damage by 0.50% for 12 sec.

1244258.name: Chomp
1244258.description:
Chomp your target, causing (900% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Chomp critical strikes deal 3 times normal damage.

Chomp can only be used when you fall below 30% Energy or for 2 seconds afterward.

1244295.name: Sweet Suffering
1244295.description:
The duration of Feast of Souls is increased by 1 sec.

 Feast of Souls
Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

1244310.name: Roaring Blaze
1244310.description:
Increases Conflagrate damage by 10%. 

Conflagrate now erupts the target's Immolate, spreading it up to 3 nearby enemies.

1244329.name: Overpowered Missiles
1244329.description: Gaining Clearcasting has a 25% chance to cause your next Arcane Missiles to be Overpowered, causing it to deal 100% increased damage, generate maximum stacks of Arcane Salvo, and strike 3 additional targets at 50% effectiveness.

1244331.name: Everbloom
1244331.description: 20% of Lifebloom's final bloom heals up to 6 injured allies within 40 yds.

1244340.name: Improved Blink
1244340.description: [Shimmer / Blink]'s cooldown is reduced by 2 sec.

1244460.name: Improved Havoc
1244460.description: Increases the duration of Havoc by 5 sec and increases the damage Havoc victims are dealt by an additional 10%.

1244470.name: Everbloom
1244470.description: Lifebloom bursts into a Blooming Frenzy when you consume Soul of the Forest, causing it to bloom 3 times in rapid succession.

1244532.name: Blood Spattered
1244532.description: Ferocious Bite's damage to its primary target increased by 2% for each enemy affected by your Rip, up to 10.

1244544.name: Focused Frenzy
1244544.description: Feral Frenzy's cooldown reduced by 15 sec and its damage is increased by 20%.

1244547.name: Hunger for Battle
1244547.description: When an enemy afflicted by your Rip dies, gain 10 Energy and your damage dealt is increased by 5% for 8 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

1244557.name: Glaive Tempest
1244557.description: The final slash of Blade Dance consumes 25 Fury when it strikes 3 or more enemies, launching two demonic glaives in a whirlwind of energy, causing [14 * (13.2% of Attack Power)] Chaos damage over 3 sec to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1244632.name: Lacerating Claws
1244632.description: Damage of your bleeds increased by 10%.

1244788.name: Chaotic Inferno
1244788.description: Increases Chaos Bolt damage by 5% and Chaos Bolt now has a 25% chance to make your next Incinerate instant.

1244877.name: Lake of Fire
1244877.description:
Cataclysm now leaves behind a lake of fire that deals [(60% of Spell Power) * 10] Fire damage to enemies within it over 10 sec.

Immolate deals 20% increased damage to enemies within the lake of fire.

1244878.name: Beacon of the Savior
1244878.description:
While in combat, apply a Beacon of the Savior to the lowest health ally within 30 yds that causes your direct healing on others to also heal that ally for 10% of the amount healed.

Beacon of the Savior transfers to the lowest health ally within 30 yds if it heals a target past maximum health or if an ally drops below 50% health.

1244928.name: Destructive Rapidity
1244928.description: Increases how quickly Rain of Fire deals damage by 25% and how quickly your Infernal's Immolation deals damage by 10%.

1244941.name: Alythess's Ire
1244941.description: Rain of Fire has a 20% chance to reduce the cost of your next Rain of Fire within 8 sec by 100%.

1245089.name: Avatar of Destruction
1245089.description:
Casting Soul Fire summons an Overfiend.

Opening a Dimensional Rift has a chance to summon an Overfiend instead.

 Summon Overfiend
Generates 1 Soul Shard Fragment every 1 sec and casts Chaos Bolt at 80% effectiveness at its summoner's target. Lasts 8 sec.

1245354.name: Vision of Sanctity
1245354.description: Consecration deals 100% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

1245367.name: Beacon of the Savior
1245367.description: Beacon of the Savior transfers an additional 10% of the amount healed and allies with Beacon of the Savior receive 10% more healing from you.

1245368.name: Beacon of the Savior
1245368.description:
Every 8 sec or when Beacon of the Savior transfers to a new injured target, they are granted an absorb shield that prevents the next 0 damage and reduces damage taken by 10% for 15 sec.

Beacon of the Savior now additionally follows the target of your Holy Light and Flash of Light spells once every 5 sec.

1245412.name: Voidblade
1245412.description: Unleash your glaives and charge to your target, dealing (225% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage.

1245633.name: Fiendish Cruelty
1245633.description: Critical strikes dealt by Chaos Bolt, Conflagrate, or Incinerate have a 10% chance to make your next cast of Shadowburn within 30 sec cost no Soul Shards and usable on any target regardless of health.

1245891.name: Solace
1245891.description: Consecration heals you for 300% of the damage it deals.

1245979.name: Valiant Crusade
1245979.description: While out of combat, Divine Steed grants Shield of the Righteous for its duration and an additional 4.0 sec after it fades.

1246030.name: Explosive Potential
1246030.description:
Arcane
After casting Arcane Surge, your next Blink will cause a Blast Wave at your previous location, dealing (54.3375% of Spell Power) Fire damage, knocking enemies back 8 yds, and slowing them by 70% for 6 sec.

 Fire
After casting Combustion, your next Blink will cause a Blast Wave at your previous location, dealing (54.3375% of Spell Power) Fire damage, knocking enemies back 8 yds, and slowing them by 70% for 6 sec.

1246126.name: Call of Ohn'ahra
1246126.description: Nature's Swiftness now also affects Cyclone, but its cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

1246131.name: Call of Al'Akir
1246131.description: Nature's Swiftness now also affects Hex, but its cooldown is increased by 30 sec.

1246167.name: The Hunt
1246167.description: Charge to your target, striking them for (600% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting (382.5% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

1246481.name: Empyrean Authority
1246481.description: Guardian of Ancient Kings has 1 additional charge.

1246488.name: Sweeping Verdict
1246488.description: Judgment chains to 2 additional targets at 50% effectiveness.

1246517.name: Ultimate Serenity
1246517.description:
Increases the healing done by Holy Word: Serenity by 10% and causes it to heal 4 nearby injured allies within 40 yards for 15% of its healing done.

Talents that affect Holy Word: Sanctify instead affect Holy Word: Serenity.

1246549.name: Lightburst
1246549.description: Increases the damage of Holy Nova by 400%, its healing by 500%, and its cooldown by 30 sec.

1246555.name: Tempered Soul
1246555.description: The cooldown of Soul Immolation is reduced by 30 sec and it gains 1 additional charge.

1246556.name: Spontaneous Immolation
1246556.description: Soul Immolation heals for an additional 4% of your health over its duration and its cooldown is reset upon killing an enemy that yields experience or honor.

1246562.name: Duty Eternal
1246562.description: Voidblade damage increased by 100% and Voidblade now generates 20 Fury.

1246799.name: Prompt Prognosis
1246799.description:
Holy
Casting Prayer of Mending heals your target for (940% of Spell Power).

 Discipline
The first bolt of each Penance cast damages or heals for 125% more.

1246802.name: Piety
1246802.description:
Discipline
15% of overhealing done is redistributed to up to 4 nearby injured allies.

 Holy
20% of overhealing done is redistributed to up to 4 nearby injured allies.

1246811.name: Improved Shatter
1246811.description: Shatter damage has a 50% increased chance to critically strike.

1246832.name: Icicles
1246832.description:
While in combat, Frost crystallizes around you, generating an Icicle every 6.0 sec. Upon generating 5 Icicles, [Frostfire Bolt / Frostbolt] upgrades to Glacial Spike for its next cast.

 Glacial Spike
Conjures a massive spike of ice that impales your target, dealing (1300% of Spell Power) damage and slowing the target's movement speed by 50% for 8 sec.

Applies 3 stacks of Freezing.

1246968.name: Psychic Shroud
1246968.description: When your Psychic Scream affects 1 or more players, the next crowd control effect against you is prevented. Lasts 6 sec.

1247025.name: Deep Shatter
1247025.description: Shatter's critical strike damage is increased by 50% of your critical strike chance.

1247055.name: Frigid Focus
1247055.description: Ray of Frost damage increased by 30%.

1247090.name: Cone of Frost
1247090.description: Cone of Cold now applies 3 stacks of Freezing to up to 5 enemies.

1247131.name: Efficient Prayers
1247131.description: Reduces the mana cost of Prayer of Healing by 15%.

1247166.name: Healing Focus
1247166.description: Reduces the mana cost of Flash Heal by 15%.

1247178.name: Spiritwell
1247178.description:
Shadow
Increases Shadowy Apparition damage by 10%.

 Holy
Surge of Light can now be consumed by Prayer of Healing in addition to Flash Heal.

 Surge of Light
Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost  [ Holy: 50 / 50]% less mana. Stacks to 2.

1247227.name: Crimson Tempest
1247227.description:
Slash all enemies within 10 yds dealing (110% of Attack Power) damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Copy the longest Garrote and Rupture on the enemies you hit onto up to 2 other enemies. 

Awards 1 combo point.

1247378.name: Putrefy
1247378.description: Summon a Lesser Ghoul to strike the enemy for (234.9% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and have them explode for (121.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to nearby enemies.

1247534.name: Soul Glutton
1247534.description:
Void Metamorphosis requires 15 less souls.

Your Fury drains 25% faster while in Void Metamorphosis.

1247538.name: Demonic Instinct
1247538.description: Void Ray and Hungering Slash damage increased by 10%.

1247544.name: Crystalline Refraction
1247544.description: Ray of Frost generates 2 stacks of Fingers of Frost over its duration.

1247729.name: Thermal Void
1247729.description: Consuming Brain Freeze has a 100% chance to cause your next Ice Lance to Shatter 4 additional stacks of Freezing.

1247742.name: Hailstones
1247742.description: The time it takes to generate an Icicle is reduced by 1.0 sec.

1247743.name: Rimecaster
1247743.description: [Frostfire Bolt / Frostbolt] and Glacial Spike damage increased by 10%.

1247759.name: Glacial Attunement
1247759.description: Flurry and Blizzard damage increased by 10%.

1247777.name: Comet Storm
1247777.description:
Casting Ray of Frost replaces your Ray of Frost with Comet Storm, calling down a series of 7 icy comets on and around the target, that deals up to [7 * (86% of Spell Power)] Frost damage to all enemies within 8 yds of its impacts.

Each Comet Shatters 1 stack of Freezing.

1247798.name: Glaciate
1247798.description: When Ice Lance Shatters a stack of Freezing, the cooldown of Ray of Frost is reduced by 0.10 sec.

1247799.name: Heart of Ice
1247799.description: Ice Lance Shatters 1 additional stack of Freezing.

1248002.name: Heat Sink
1248002.description:
Fire
Fire Blast now deals Frostfire damage and its damage is increased by 15%.

 Frost
Flurry now deals Frostfire damage and its damage is increased by 25%.

1248014.name: Dualcasting Adept
1248014.description:
Frost
Your Fire spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

Shatter damage increased by 40%.

Blizzard damage increased by 15%.

 Fire
Your Frost spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

Pyroblast damage increased by 15%.

Flamestrike damage increased by 10%.

1248016.name: Blast Radius
1248016.description:
Frost
Comet Storm damage increased by 50%.

Meteor damage increased by 20%.

 Fire
Meteor damage increased by 20%.

Comet Storm damage increased by 20%.

1248423.name: Guiding Light
1248423.description:
Discipline
Penance gains an additional charge.

 Holy
Prayer of Mending gains an additional charge.

1248704.name: Skyfire Heel
1248704.description:
Rising Sun Kick's critical strike chance is increased by 4% for each nearby enemy, up to 5 enemies.

10% of Rising Sun Kick's damage splashes onto nearby enemies. Damage is reduced beyond 5 targets.

1248747.name: Crashing Fists
1248747.description: The damage of Fists of Fury is increased by 20%.

1248749.name: Cyclone's Drift
1248749.description: You gain 10% more Haste from all sources of Haste.

1248774.name: Unshakeable Drive
1248774.description:
Subtlety
When you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, the damage of your next  is increased by 50% or Shadowstrike increased by 25%.

 Assassination
When you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, the damage of your next Ambush or Mutilate is increased by 50%.

1248785.name: Corrupt the Blood
1248785.description:
Subtlety
Deathstalker's Mark damage increased by 25%.

 Assassination
Rupture damage increased by 20%.

1248793.name: Clear the Witnesses
1248793.description:
Assassination
Fan of Knives damage increased by 60%.

 Subtlety
Shuriken Storm damage increased by 60%.

1248825.name: Frostbite
1248825.description:
When [Frostfire Bolt / Frostbolt] critically strikes, it applies 1 additional stack of Freezing.

Each stack of Freezing that you Shatter deals (22.5% of Spell Power) damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

1248829.name: Blizzard
1248829.description:
Ice shards pelt the target area, dealing [(44.28% of Spell Power) * 8] Frost damage over 12 sec and reducing movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

This spell is cast at your target.

1248833.name: Airborne Rhythm
1248833.description: Slicing Winds now generates 1 Chi when cast.

1248837.name: Hurricane's Vault
1248837.description: Slicing Winds now costs 2 Chi to cast, but its damage is increased by 40%.

1248970.name: Lucky Coin
1248970.description:
Every 7 coin flips, keep a lucky coin that bends you towards your fate for 12 sec. Your Agility is increased by 4%, the damage and bonuses of Fatebound Coins are increased by 50%, and coin flips are 15% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

Coin flips do not count toward finding a lucky coin while you have a lucky coin.

1248989.name: Celestial Conduit
1248989.description:
After Invoking Xuen, the White Tiger you may cast Celestial Conduit within 1 min.

 Celestial Conduit:
[ Mistweaver: The August Celestials empower you, causing you to radiate [(1100% of Spell Power) * 5] healing onto up to 5 injured allies and [(220% of Attack Power) * 5] Nature damage onto enemies within 20 yds over 4 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets]

You may move while channeling, but casting other healing or damaging spells cancels this effect.

1249190.name: Overflowing Purse
1249190.description:
Outlaw
Dispatch has a 4% chance to flip 3 Fatebound Coins.

 Assassination
Envenom has a 15% chance to flip 3 Fatebound Coins.

1249194.name: Delivered Doom
1249194.description:
Outlaw
Dispatch and Between the Eyes deal 5% more damage when they consume 5 or more combo points.

 Assassination
Envenom deals 5% more damage when it consumes 5 or more combo points.

1249201.name: Chosen's Revelry
1249201.description: Flipping a Fatebound Coin restores (30% of Attack Power) health.

1249204.name: Rush to the Inevitable
1249204.description:
Outlaw
Gain 2 Energy every time you flip a Fatebound Coin. Gain 10 Energy for Coins that land on their edge.

 Assassination
Gain 5 Energy every time you flip a Fatebound Coin. Gain 15 Energy for Coins that land on their edge.

1249215.name: Fate Intertwined
1249215.description:
Outlaw
Blade Flurry causes an additional 5% of attack damage dealt to be dealt to affected enemies.

 Assassination
Caustic Spatter causes an additional 5% of Nature damage dealt to be dealt to affected enemies.

1249230.name: Focused Power
1249230.description: Increases the damage of your spells by 3%.

1249233.name: Everlasting Light
1249233.description: Surge of Light occurs up to 50% more often based on your missing mana.

1249625.name: Zenith
1249625.description:
Chi costs are reduced by 1 and Blackout Kick reduces the cooldown of affected abilities by an additional 1 sec for 15 sec.

Activating Zenith resets the remaining cooldown on Rising Sun Kick.

1249658.name: Breath of Sindragosa
1249658.description:
Call upon Sindragosa's aid in battle for 8 sec, continuously dealing [(139.788% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Frost damage every 1 sec to enemies in a cone in front of you. Consuming Killing Machine or Rime increases the duration by 0.8 sec. Deals reduced damage to secondary targets.

Grants a charge of Empower Rune Weapon at the start and 2 Runes at the end.

1249809.name: Finish the Job
1249809.description: All damage you deal is increased by 10% while Deathmark is active.

1249832.name: Obsidian Spiral
1249832.description: During Zenith, Blackout Kick generates 1 Chi.

1250036.name: Inspiring Strike
1250036.description: Applying Envenom while Envenom is already active causes it to increase all damage you deal by 5% in addition to increasing your poison application chance.

1250041.name: Harmonic Combo
1250041.description: Fists of Fury's Chi cost is reduced by 1, but its damage is reduced by 10%.

1250042.name: Echo Technique
1250042.description: Casting Strike of the Windlord or Whirling Dragon Punch grants Blackout Kick!.

1250088.name: Midnight
1250088.description:
All Cosmic damage dealt increased by 3%.

Collapsing Star's critical strike damage is increased by 50% of your critical strike chance.

1250094.name: Midnight
1250094.description: Entering Void Metamorphosis causes your soul to erupt, generating 5 Soul Fragments and granting immediate access to Collapsing Star.

1250141.name: Secondary Poisoning
1250141.description: When you apply a Weapon Poison with a single-target attack, you have a 50% chance to strike a nearby enemy for (15% of Attack Power) Physical damage and apply the same Weapon Poison to them.

1250271.name: Deadly Momentum
1250271.description: Finishing moves have a 3% chance per combo point spent to increase your chance to critically strike by 6% for 6 sec.

1250293.name: Occultist
1250293.description: Shadow damage and healing done increased by 15%.

1250315.name: Frost Conditioning
1250315.description: Hypothermia's duration is reduced by 10 sec.

1250318.name: Poisoner's Drive
1250318.description: Applying Envenom while Envenom is already active restores 1 combo point.

1250325.name: Regicide's Reward
1250325.description: When Kingsbane ends, gain 2% haste for every 5 stacks of increased Kingsbane damage that you had, decreasing by 2% every 2 sec.

1250364.name: Elemental Tempo
1250364.description:
Elemental damage increased by 10%. 

Each stack of Maelstrom Weapon consumed reduces the cooldown of Stormstrike by 0.3 sec and Lava Lash by 0.3 sec.

1250378.name: Spectral Illusion
1250378.description: Fade creates an illusion of you for 4 sec, tricking enemies to attack it instead.

1250492.name: Tormenting Whispers
1250492.description: Increases Shadow Word: Madness damage by 15%.

1250562.name: Uplifting Words
1250562.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify by 10%.

1250565.name: Angelic Touch
1250565.description: Your healing spells critically strike for 220% of healing done instead of the usual 200%.

1250566.name: Rushing Wind Kick
1250566.description:
After consuming Blackout Kick!, Rising Sun Kick has a 60% chance to become Rushing Wind Kick.

Rushing Wind Kick:
Kick up a powerful gust of wind, dealing (179.75% of Attack Power) Nature damage in a 25 yd cone to enemies in front of you, split evenly among them. Damage is increased by 6% for each target hit, up to 30%.

 [ Mistweaver: Heals up to 5 allies affected by your heal over time effects for (500% of Spell Power)]

1250646.name: Takedown
1250646.description:
You and your pet leap to your target and strike as one, dealing [(600% of Attack Power) + (1200% of Attack Power)] Physical damage. Your pet frees itself from roots when it leaps.

For the next 8 sec, the damage dealt by you and your pet is increased by 20%.

Generates 50 Focus.

1250684.name: Radiant Plea
1250684.description: Increases Prayer of Mending healing by 15%.

1250691.name: Void Tendrils
1250691.description: Call shadowy tendrils to constrict enemies when Psychic Scream ends, rooting them in place for 4 sec.

1250768.name: Imp Gang Boss
1250768.description: Hand of Gul'dan now empowers 1 of the Wild Imps it summons, increasing its damage dealt by 100%.

1250806.name: False Autonomy
1250806.description: Increases the duration of Mind Control and Dominate Mind against enemy creatures by 15 sec.

1250897.name: Hellbent Commander
1250897.description: Your demons deal 1.0% increased damage for each demon you control.

1250906.name: Memory of Ysera
1250906.description: Heal each time you spend Rage, up to 0.8% of your maximum health for 80 Rage spent.

1250914.name: Clairvoyant
1250914.description: Motes of Possibility may now grant Prescience to allies and have a 10% increased chance to activate.

1250921.name: Antoran Armaments
1250921.description:
Your Demonic Tyrant is equipped with armor forged within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%. While summoned, your Demonic Tyrant now assaults enemies with powerful melee attacks.

 Burning Cleave
Cleaves all enemies in a cone in front of the caster, inflicting (96% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1250923.name: Ward of the Forest
1250923.description: Barkskin increases your maximum health by 20%, but its duration is reduced by 40%.

1251026.name: Overcharge
1251026.description: The critical strike damage of your Nature abilities are increased by 40% of your critical strike chance.

1251029.name: Mindpierce
1251029.description:
Shadow
Increases the damage of Mind Flay by 15%.

 Discipline,  Holy
Increases the damage of Smite by 15%.

1251030.name: Painful Invocation
1251030.description:
Holy (Holy Fire)
Increases the damage of Holy FireHoly Fire and Shadow Word: Pain by 10%.

 Discipline,  Shadow
Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Pain by 10%.

1251069.name: Stormbind
1251069.description: Critical strikes of your Nature abilities reduce the target's movement speed by 60% for 5 sec.

1251077.name: Twin Disciplines
1251077.description: Increases the damage and healing of your Holy and Shadow spells by 2%.

1251406.name: Persistence
1251406.description: When you shapeshift out of Bear Form, its benefits to health and armor slowly decay over 8 sec.

1251417.name: Spectral Sight
1251417.description:
Allows you to see enemies and treasures through physical barriers, as well as enemies that are stealthed and invisible. Lasts 8 sec.

Loss of control effects disrupt the sight.

1251592.name: Flamefang Pitch
1251592.description:
Toss a fiery concoction that explodes violently upon reaching its destination, dealing (600% of Attack Power) Fire damage to enemies in its area. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

After landing, your Flamefang Pitch ignites nearby terrain, dealing [(50% of Attack Power) * 8] Fire damage to enemies in its area over 8 sec.

1251717.name: Strike as One
1251717.description:
Consuming Tip of the Spear provokes your pet to attack your target, dealing (180% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

All damage dealt by your pet is increased by 30%.

1251718.name: Two Against Many
1251718.description: Strike as One damages 2 additional enemies and its damage is increased by 10% for each enemy it strikes beyond the first.

1251778.name: Summon Vilefiend
1251778.description: Call Dreadstalkers also summons a Vilefiend that assists you in combat for 15 sec.

1252215.name: Shadow Mend
1252215.description:
Shadow Word: Pain damage has a chance to upgrade your next Flash Heal to Shadow Mend. Stacks up to 2 charges.

 Shadow Mend:
Wraps an ally in shadows which heal for (1781.25% of Spell Power), but at a price.

The ally will take [(1781.25% of Spell Power) / 20] damage every 1 sec, until they have taken [(1781.25% of Spell Power) / 2] total damage from all sources, or leave combat.

1252373.name: Storm Unleashed
1252373.description: Crash Lightning electrocutes the area struck, dealing 50% of its damage 2 additional times over 2 sec, and its weapon enhancement effect now increases auto-attack speed by 15%.

1252708.name: Mongoose Fury
1252708.description: Raptor Strike increases the damage of Raptor Strike by 10% for 8 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

1252738.name: Wallop
1252738.description: Gaining a stack of Mongoose Fury has a 20% chance to increase the damage of your next Raptor Strike by 50%.

1252841.name: Calm Waters
1252841.description: Reduces the mana cost of Chain Heal by 15%.

1252871.name: Red Moon
1252871.description: Channel the power of the enraged moon to deal (640% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to your target over 8 sec. Casting Mangle extends its duration by 1.0 sec and generates 8 Rage.

1252874.name: Soothing Rain
1252874.description: Increases the healing done by Healing Rain by 10% and reduces its cast time by 0.5 sec.

1252882.name: Double Dip
1252882.description: Healing Rain grants an additional use of Downpour.

1252931.name: Shellshock
1252931.description:
Your Boomstick's damage is increased by 40% when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

1252943.name: Wildfire Imbuement
1252943.description: Throwing your Flamefang Pitch imbues your weapon with flame, causing you and your pet's auto-attacks to deal an additional (40% of Attack Power) Fire damage for 10 sec.

1252994.name: Killing Blow
1252994.description: Maul and Raze may consume up to 20 more Rage to deal up to 70% additional damage.

1253035.name: Harnessed Rage
1253035.description: Mangle has 1 additional charge and when Maul is cast at 80 Rage or above its chance to activate Gore is increased by 100%.

1253053.name: Shower of Blood
1253053.description: Your Bleed effects deal 8% increased damage.

1253090.name: Crashing Waves
1253090.description: Healing Wave's critical strike chance is increased by 12%.

1253093.name: Current Control
1253093.description: Reduces the mana cost of Healing Wave by 15%.

1253099.name: Quickstream
1253099.description: Healing Stream Totem heals 15% more often.

1253137.name: Sic 'Em
1253137.description: When Strike as One critically strikes, it bleeds its target for an additional (40% of Attack Power) damage over 5 sec.

1253172.name: Shrapnel Bomb
1253172.description: Wildfire Bomb's periodic effect is now a Bleed and grants you and your pet 15 Focus over 3 sec.

1253176.name: Flamebreak
1253176.description: All Fire damage dealt is increased by 8%.

1253304.name: Voidfall
1253304.description:
Havoc,  Devourer
Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (176% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

 Vengeance
Fracture has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Soul Cleave consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (540% of Attack Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1253377.name: Meteoric Rise
1253377.description:
Vengeance
Fel Devastation damage increased by 25%.

Fel Devastation generates 3 Soul Fragments over its duration.

 Devourer
Void Ray damage increased by 10%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.

 Havoc
Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.

1253391.name: Meteoric Fall
1253391.description:
Havoc,  Devourer
While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.

 Vengeance
While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Spirit Bomb and Soul Cleave consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.

1253399.name: Path to Oblivion
1253399.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.

1253402.name: State of Matter
1253402.description:
Havoc,  Devourer
Shift has 1 additional charge.

 Vengeance
Torment has 1 additional charge.

1253415.name: Celestial Echoes
1253415.description:
Vengeance
Shear generates 3 additional Fury and deals 25% increased damage.

 Havoc,  Devourer
Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.

1253461.name: Waking Nightmare
1253461.description:
Awaken memories of past conflicts, causing a Dread Shade to take form nearby.

While active, shades slowly travel toward your target, dealing (70% of Attack Power) Nature damage to nearby enemies and mirroring your Thrash casts.

1253590.name: Master the Darkness
1253590.description:
Penance has a high chance to upgrade Power Word: Shield into Void Shield.

 Void Shield:
Shields 3 allies for 15 sec, absorbing 0 damage.

1253598.name: Crusade
1253598.description:
Avenging Wrath now grants you 2% Haste.

Each Holy Power spent during Avenging Wrath increases Haste by an additional 2%, up to 20%.

1253599.name: Sentinel
1253599.description:
Survival
Consuming Tip of the Spear has a 10% chance to summon the aid of a Sentinel Owl that descends from the skies and applies Sentinel's Mark to your target.

Sentinel's Mark
Your next Wildfire Bomb deals 40% increased direct damage to the marked target.

 Marksmanship
Your Eagle is replaced with a Sentinel Owl that applies an enhanced Sentinel's Mark.

Sentinel's Mark
Your next Aimed Shot deals 20% increased direct damage to the marked target.

1253668.name: Swift Erasure
1253668.description:
Devourer
Each stack of Voidfall grants 1% Haste.

 Havoc,  Vengeance
Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

1253676.name: Doomsayer
1253676.description:
Vengeance
Activating Infernal Strike out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 1 Voidfall Meteor.

 Devourer
Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 10 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

 Havoc
Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

1253724.name: Greater Smite
1253724.description: Casting Smite increases the damage of Smite by 15%, stacking 2 times. Lasts 2 sec.

1253732.name: Lunar Storm
1253732.description: When Sentinel's Mark is consumed, it summons a barrage of 4 lunar missiles, each dealing (200% of Attack Power) Arcane damage to enemies within 10 yds.

1253751.name: Stargazer
1253751.description:
Marksmanship
Consuming Precise Shots grants 2% increased critical strike damage for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

 Survival
Consuming Tip of the Spear grants 2% increased critical strike damage for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

1253769.name: Catastrophe
1253769.description:
Havoc,  Vengeance,  Devourer
Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.

1253799.name: Sundering Roar
1253799.description:
Roar with earthshattering ferocity, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Physical damage, and resetting the cooldown of Thrash and allowing it to stack 5 additional times for 12 sec. 

When Sundering Roar ends, any excess stacks of Thrash immediately deal their remaining damage.

1253805.name: Final Hour
1253805.description: Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.

1253807.name: Open Fire
1253807.description:
Survival
Flamefang Pitch damage increased by 15%.

 Marksmanship
Volley damage increased by 25%.

1253817.name: Otherworldly Focus
1253817.description:
Havoc,  Devourer
Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

 Vengeance
Spirit Bomb and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

1253825.name: Moon's Blessing
1253825.description:
Marksmanship
Consuming Precise Shots has a 10% increased chance to summon your Sentinel Owl.

When your Sentinel Owl applies Sentinel's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Aimed Shot by 2.0 sec.

 Survival
Consuming Tip of the Spear has a 10% increased chance to summon your Sentinel Owl.

When your Sentinel Owl applies Sentinel's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 4.0 sec.

1253827.name: Master the Darkness
1253827.description: Void Shield reflects 25% of damage taken to enemies, causing Atonement healing.

1253830.name: Can't Miss, Won't Miss
1253830.description:
Marksmanship
Precise Shots damage bonus increased by 10%.

Trueshot duration increased by 2 sec.

 Survival
Tip of the Spear damage bonus increased by 4%.

Takedown duration increased by 2 sec.

1253831.name: Sanctified Armaments
1253831.description:
Survival
An additional 15% of Raptor Strike's damage is dealt as Arcane damage over 6 sec.

 Marksmanship
An additional 25% of Rapid Fire's damage is dealt as Arcane damage over 6 sec.

1253845.name: Master the Darkness
1253845.description: Shadow damage and Atonement healing increased by 3%.

1253846.name: Arcane Talons
1253846.description:
Marksmanship
Sentinel's Mark further increases the damage of Aimed Shot by 15% 

 Survival
Sentinel's Mark further increases the damage of Wildfire Bomb by 50%

1253852.name: Lunar Calling
1253852.description:
Marksmanship
Feathered Frenzy further increases your chance to summon your Sentinel Owl during Trueshot by 10%.

 Survival
Takedown summons your Sentinel Owl and your chance to summon your Sentinel Owl is increased by an additional 10% during Takedown.

1253887.name: Conditioning
1253887.description:
Your movement speed is increased by 8%.

Aspect of the Cheetah's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

1253892.name: Scout's Vigil
1253892.description:
Enemy detection radius reduced by 10 yds.

While in Camouflage, your stealth detection radius is increased by 25 yds.

1253945.name: Mongoose Rounds
1253945.description:
Damaging one or more enemies with your Boomstick grants you 1 stack of Mongoose Fury.

 Mongoose Fury
Raptor Strike damage increased by 10%.

1254194.name: Kindling
1254194.description: Combustion's cooldown is reduced by 60 sec.

1254251.name: Rip Current
1254251.description: Reduces the cooldown of Riptide by 1.0 sec.

1254512.name: Burn It All
1254512.description: Combustion grants you 10% increased spell damage plus an additional 20% of your critical strike chance as spell damage.

1254552.name: Blightburst
1254552.description:
The explosion effect of Putrefy extends the duration of your plagues by 4.5 sec and deals 35% of the damage they would deal over that time instantly.

Putrefy now applies your plagues to unaffected targets.

1254756.name: Ignition
1254756.description:
Fire Blast now spreads 50% of your target's Ignite to 1 enemy.

Flamestrike applies 15% more Ignite.

1254828.name: Wildfire
1254828.description: Fire Blast damage increased by 10% and it now spreads Ignite to 1 additional target.

1254851.name: Flamestrike
1254851.description:
Calls down a pillar of fire on your target, burning all enemies within the area for (300% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

This spell is cast at your target.

1254857.name: Deep Impact
1254857.description: The enemy closest to the center of Meteor's impact takes 75% increased damage.

1254865.name: Cinderstorm
1254865.description: Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike has a 8% chance to summon a storm of 5 cinders that pursue your target. Upon reaching your target, each cinder deals (200% of Spell Power) Fire damage, applies Ignite at 100% effectiveness, and spreads 50% of your Ignite to up to 1 nearby target.

1255166.name: Time Twist
1255166.description: The cooldown of Alter Time is reduced by 10 sec.

1256245.name: Phase Shift
1256245.description: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.

1256295.name: Mass Acceleration
1256295.description:
Havoc,  Devourer
Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.

 Vengeance
Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Spirit Bomb upon activating Metamorphosis.

1256307.name: Dark Matter
1256307.description:
Havoc,  Devourer
Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing [(50% of Spell Power) * 12] Cosmic damage over 6 sec.

 Vengeance
Your first Spirit Bomb after entering demon form causes a Shadowflame meteor shower to assault the area, dealing [(90% of Attack Power) * 12] Shadowflame damage over 6 sec.

1256353.name: World Killer
1256353.description:
Havoc,  Devourer
The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment.

 Vengeance
The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and reduces the remaining cooldown of Metamorphosis by 10 sec.

1256565.name: Forbidden Knowledge
1256565.description:
Putrefy causes your next 1 Scourge Strike to summon a Lesser Ghoul, and grants you 3% Mastery for 12 sec.

Multiple applications may overlap.

1256566.name: Forbidden Knowledge
1256566.description:
Each Magus of the Dead under your command increases the damage of Necrotic Coil and Graveyard by 8%.

Dread Plague has a 20% chance to rouse the dead, causing a Lesser Ghoul to unearth and leap at the target to Putrefy at 60% effectiveness.

1256577.name: Merithra's Blessing
1256577.description:
Essence abilities have a chance to infuse your next Reversion with the power of the Green Dragonflight, upgrading it to Merithra's Blessing:

 Merithra's Blessing
Spring a bloom of life from your target, healing them and up to 4 other allies within 30 yards for (250% of Spell Power). Blooms may heal your primary target multiple times if no nearby injured allies are present.

1256630.name: Menacing Rush
1256630.description: Adrenaline Rush magnifies your precision and power, increasing the damage your combo point generating abilities and finishers deal by 20%.

1256682.name: Merithra's Blessing
1256682.description: Reversion protects allies, reversing 0.5% of all damage taken and healing them instead.

1256689.name: Merithra's Blessing
1256689.description: Dream Breath's instant healing is increased by 250% and Dream Breath has a 100% chance to grant Merithra's Blessing.

1256813.name: Reanimation
1256813.description:
When you Putrefy a Lesser Ghoul, it has a 100% chance to reanimate as a Magus of the Dead who hurls Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts at your foes for 15 sec.

Magus of the Dead Frostbolts and Shadow Bolts deal 25% increased damage.

1256938.name: Flanked
1256938.description:
Takedown damage increased by 50% and it now strikes 4 additional nearby targets.

During Takedown, your attack speed is increased by 100%.

1257011.name: Vulnerability
1257011.description: Raptor Strike and Boomstick deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

1257052.name: Dark Harvest
1257052.description:
Consume the life force of each target afflicted by your damaging periodic effects, dealing [(839.552% of Spell Power) * (4)] Shadowflame damage over 3 sec.

Damage dealt by Dark Harvest heals you for 50% of damage done.

1257343.name: Fired Up
1257343.description: Consuming Hot Streak has a 20% chance to grant you a stack of Fired Up, increasing your Fire damage by 4% for 12 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

1257348.name: Fired Up
1257348.description:
Combustion significantly increases your chance of gaining Fired Up, reducing each time you gain Fired Up.

Additionally Fired Up now extends Combustion's duration by 1.0 sec.

1257349.name: Fired Up
1257349.description:
Gaining Fired Up reduces the cooldown of Fire Blast by 2.5 sec.

All Fire damage dealt is increased by 3%.

1257942.name: Touch of the Archmage
1257942.description: Touch of the Magi increases the damage your target receives from you by 15%.

1257947.name: Touch of the Archmage
1257947.description:
Arcane Charges further increase the damage of Arcane Blast, Arcane Pulse, and Arcane Barrage by 15%.

Arcane Missiles damage increased by 10%.

1257950.name: Touch of the Archmage
1257950.description: When Touch of the Magi explodes, it leaves behind a pulsing rune on its target, dealing 75% of its damage over 6 sec to nearby enemies. Damage is increased by 50% on your initial Touch of the Magi target.

1258402.name: Touch of Grass
1258402.description: Your maximum health is increased by 5%.

1258404.name: Catlike Reflexes
1258404.description: Aspect of the Cheetah's initial burst of speed is increased by 2.0 sec.

1258407.name: Improved Aspect of the Cheetah
1258407.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Cheetah is reduced by 30 sec.

1258485.name: Improved Aspect of the Turtle
1258485.description: The cooldown of Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by 30 sec.

1258486.name: Improved Feign Death
1258486.description: The cooldown of Feign Death is reduced by 5 sec.

1258509.name: Guttural Roar
1258509.description: Intimidation now also stuns nearby enemies for 1.0 sec.

1258889.name: Storm Infusion
1258889.description:
Elemental Resonance
All elemental damage is increased by an additional 2%.

 Thunderstrike Ward
Increases the chance for Thunderstrikes to occur by 30% and increases Thunderstrike damage by 75%.

1258899.name: Tectonic Collapse
1258899.description: Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake deal 20% increased damage.

1259003.name: Raptor Swipe
1259003.description: Raptor Strike has a 25% chance to upgrade itself to a Raptor Swipe, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies within 15 yds in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

1259017.name: Raptor Swipe
1259017.description:
Raptor Strike, Wildfire Bomb, and Raptor Swipe damage increased by 10%.

Raptor Swipe deals 35% increased damage to its primary target.

1259019.name: Raptor Swipe
1259019.description:
Raptor Strike now has a 100% chance to upgrade itself to a Raptor Swipe.

Raptor Swipes that benefit from Tip of the Spear provoke an additional Strike as One at 300% effectiveness.

1259047.name: Inferno Arc
1259047.description: Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Earth Shock, Elemental Blast, and Earthquake deal 10% increased damage to targets affected by Flame Shock.

1259173.name: Duplicate
1259173.description: Breath of Eons summons a version of you from the future to assist you in battle, lasting 20 sec. Your duplicate casts Eruption, Fire Breath, and Upheaval.

1259174.name: Duplicate
1259174.description: Any time you extend Ebon Might, your duplicate is also extended, equal to 50% of the amount you extended Ebon Might by.

1259175.name: Duplicate
1259175.description: While your duplicate is active, your Ebon Might grants 75% additional stats and Upheaval and Eruption deal 25% increased damage.

1259457.name: Find an Opening
1259457.description: Your chance for Sinister Strike to strike twice and grant Opportunity is increased by 10%

1259465.name: Heightened Rush
1259465.description: Adrenaline Rush's duration is increased by 4 sec.

1259469.name: Grand Melee
1259469.description: Blade Flurry causes your attacks to hit nearby enemies for an additional 8% of their normal damage.

1259471.name: Purging Flames
1259471.description:
Voltaic Blaze unleashes volcanic rage, causing your next Lava Burst to also fire at 5 additional targets with your Flame Shock at 80% effectiveness with reduced Maelstrom generation.

Lava Burst damage increased by 10%.

1259480.name: Fast Action
1259480.description: The cooldown of Between the Eyes is reduced by 5 sec.

1259481.name: Dragon-Bone Dice
1259481.description:
The bonuses granted by your Roll the Bones are stronger.

Bonuses to chance for Sinister Strike to strike twice are 5% greater.
Bonuses to Sinister Strike and Ambush damage are 5% greater.
Bonuses to Restless Blades cooldown reduction are 10% greater.
Jackpot's bonus to critical strike chance is 5% greater.

1259485.name: Zero In
1259485.description: Your auto-attack critical strikes increase the damage and critical strike chance of your next Between the Eyes by 3%, stacking up to 20 times.

1259492.name: Flickering Steel
1259492.description: Sinister Strike and Ambush deal 20% increased damage. They also generate 5 Energy when they grant you Opportunity.

1259498.name: Expert Duelist
1259498.description: Between the Eyes increases your damage dealt by an additional 2%.

1259499.name: Crescendo of Violence
1259499.description: Your finishing moves deal 10% increased damage.

1259612.name: Deadly Pursuit
1259612.description: After spending 15 combo points, if you spend no combo points for 4 sec, abilities affected by Restless Blades will cool down 200% faster for 5 sec or until you spend a combo point.

1259790.name: Unstable Affliction
1259790.description:
Afflicts the target with (302.36% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 8 sec. Multiple uses of this ability may overlap.

If dispelled, deals [(75.59% of Spell Power) * 5170 / 100] damage to the dispeller and silences them for 4 sec. This damage is increased by 15% per stack on the target.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies while afflicted.

1259815.name: Potent Soul Shards
1259815.description: Increases damage dealt by Unstable Affliction and Seed of Corruption by 5%.

1259825.name: Shared Agony
1259825.description: Increases Agony damage by 10% and Agony now hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

1259838.name: Seeds of Destruction
1259838.description: Reduces the cast time of Seed of Corruption by 0.20 sec and increases its damage by 5%.

1259886.name: Cull the Weak
1259886.description: Casting Unstable Affliction or Seed of Corruption reduces the cooldown of Dark Harvest by 1.5 sec.

1260209.name: Sudden Onset
1260209.description: Agony damage is increased by 10% and starts at 3 stacks.

1260229.name: Fatal Echoes
1260229.description: When Unstable Affliction expires, it has a 10% chance to reapply itself.

1260264.name: Shard Instability
1260264.description: Damage dealt by [Drain Soul / Shadow Bolt] has a [Drain Soul: 10 / 20]% chance to make your next Unstable Affliction cost no Soul Shards and cast instantly.

1260271.name: Nocturnal Yield
1260271.description: Increases Corruption damage by 10% and Nightfall additionally makes your next Seed of Corruption cost no Soul Shards and cast instantly.

1260272.name: Ashes of Inspiration
1260272.description:
When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it grants you Lesser Time Warp for 6 sec.

 Lesser Time Warp
Warp the flow of time, increasing your haste by 15%.

1260285.name: Patient Zero
1260285.description: Increases damage dealt by Seed of Corruption to its host by 50%.

1260429.name: Divine Exaction
1260429.description: Divine Toll casts 2 additional times on your target at 150% effectiveness.

1260484.name: Chronoboon
1260484.description: Tip the Scales' cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

1260511.name: Spiritfont
1260511.description:
Rising Sun Kick and Vivify have a chance to activate Spiritfont, causing your next Enveloping Mist's cast time to be reduced by 50% and channel Soothing Mist from you onto up to 5 allies at 20% effectiveness for 8 sec.

If Spiritfont's Soothing Mists heal a full health target, they will jump to another injured ally or split its healing into your remaining Soothing Mists.

1260616.name: Spellfire Salvo
1260616.description:
Arcane
Arcane Salvo can stack 5 additional times.

Meteorite damage increased by 15%.

 Fire
Fire Blast cooldown reduced by 1.0 sec.

Meteorite damage increased by 15%.

1260644.name: Totemic Momentum
1260644.description:
Enhancement
Lava Lash damage increased by 10%.

Each stack of Maelstrom Weapon consumed increases the duration of an active Hot Hand by 0.20 sec.

 Restoration
Reduces the cooldown of Healing Stream Totem by 3 sec.

1260647.name: Overclock
1260647.description: Chrono Flames' maximum damage or healing is increased by 40%, up to [(Spell Power * 3.5) * (1 + Versatility)] Arcane.

1260666.name: Fire Nova
1260666.description:
Voltaic Blaze generates 2 additional Maelstrom Weapon and has a 30% chance to cause a Fire Nova.

Fire Nova
Erupt a burst of fiery damage from all targets affected by your Flame Shock, dealing (99.682% of Attack Power) Volcanic damage to up to 6 targets within 8 yds of your Flame Shock targets.

1260673.name: Pyrocosm
1260673.description:
Fire
Damage from Fireball has a 20% chance to summon a Meteorite.

When a Meteorite lands, the cooldown of Fire Blast is reduced by 0.5 sec.

 Arcane
Each wave of Arcane Missiles has a 10% chance to summon a Meteorite.

When a Meteorite lands, you have a 5% chance to gain Clearcasting.

1260677.name: Spiritfont
1260677.description: Rising Sun Kick damage increased by 10% and Enveloping Mist healing increased by 10%. These bonuses are increased by 50% while Spiritfont is active.

1260680.name: Spiritfont
1260680.description: Thunder Focus Tea activates Spiritfont and Spiritfont applies Chi Cocoons at 30% effectiveness to allies targeted.

1260745.name: Command Squadron
1260745.description: While flying during [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] you are assisted by a squadron of Dracthyr who assault enemies with Pyre, dealing (180% of Spell Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies up to 8 times.

1260874.name: Primal Catalyst
1260874.description:
Enhancement
After casting Surging Totem, your next Lava Lash casts again at 150% effectiveness.

 Restoration
Healing Stream Totem and Healing Tide Totem healing has a 8% chance to apply Earthliving to allies it heals.

1261046.name: Brute Force
1261046.description: Slam has a 10% increased chance to trigger Tactician.

1261047.name: Efficiency
1261047.description: Slam's Rage cost is reduced by 25%.

1261049.name: Broad Strokes
1261049.description: Colossus Smash grants you Sweeping Strikes.

1261050.name: Powerful Momentum
1261050.description: Secondary targets take an additional 25% damage from Sweeping Strikes.

1261051.name: Tactical Edge
1261051.description: Colossus Smash causes your next 2 Mortal Strikes to have a 100% chance to trigger Tactician.

1261056.name: Crushing Combo
1261056.description: Colossus Smash causes your next 2 Cleaves within 20 sec to trigger no cooldown.

1261057.name: Master Tactician
1261057.description: Tactician has a 5% increased chance to trigger.

1261060.name: Deep Wounds
1261060.description:
Execute inflicts Deep Wounds on the target.

 Deep Wounds
Causes the target to suffer (145.48% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 6 sec. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Deep Wounds.

1261062.name: Mortal Wounds
1261062.description:
Mortal Strike and Slam critical strikes inflict Deep Wounds at 100% effectiveness.

 Deep Wounds
Causes the target to suffer (145.48% of Attack Power) Bleed damage over 6 sec. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Deep Wounds.

1261080.name: Infused Splinters
1261080.description:
Arcane
Direct damage from Arcane Splinters have a 25% chance to grant 1 stack Arcane Salvo.

 Arcane Salvo
Increases the damage of your next Arcane Barrage by 3%.

 Frost
Direct damage from Frost Splinters have a 15% chance to apply 1 stack of Freezing.

1261082.name: Polished Focus
1261082.description:
Arcane
Casting Arcane Barrage while at 20 or more Arcane Salvo stacks refunds 5 Arcane Salvo stacks.

Arcane Barrage damage increased by 15%.

 Frost
Ice Lance Shatters 1 additional stack of Freezing.

Shatter damage increased by 20%.

1261106.name: Attuned Familiar
1261106.description:
Arcane
Your Arcane Familiar has a 50% chance to conjure a Splinter alongside its Arcane Assault.

 Frost
Your Water Elemental has a 50% chance to conjure a Splinter alongside its Waterbolt.

1261111.name: Light Within
1261111.description: Avenging Wrath further increases the damage of [Final Verdict / Templar's Verdict] and Divine Storm by 10%.

1261113.name: Light Within
1261113.description: [Righteous Cause / Art of War] increases the damage of your next Blade of Justice by 150%.

1261124.name: Cascading Calamity
1261124.description: Casting Unstable Affliction on a target affected by your Unstable Affliction increases your Haste by 5% for 15 sec.

1261149.name: Malefic Grasp
1261149.description:
While Darkglare is active, your Shadow Bolt becomes Malefic Grasp. 

 Malefic Grasp
Binds the target in twilight, dealing (1053% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 4 sec.

When Malefic Grasp deals damage, it causes all of your other periodic Affliction damage effects to instantly deal 30% of their normal periodic damage.

1261159.name: Light Within
1261159.description: [Righteous Cause / Art of War] further empowers Blade of Justice to unleash a wave of Holy energy, dealing [(442.557% of Attack Power) * 2.5] Holy damage to its primary target and (442.557% of Attack Power) Holy damage to all other enemies in its path.

1261193.name: Boomstick
1261193.description: Unload a series of 4 shotgun blasts 20 yds in front of you, dealing [(607.5% of Attack Power) * 4] Physical damage over 3 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1261229.name: Wildfire Shells
1261229.description: Damaging one or more enemies with your Boomstick reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 2.0 sec.

1261409.name: Inevitable End
1261409.description: Collapsing Star can no longer be interrupted and its cast time is reduced by 25%.

1261414.name: Armor of Souls
1261414.description: Your Armor is increased by 100%. Taking damage has a 12% chance to generate a Soul Fragment.

1261423.name: Surrender to the Void
1261423.description:
Void Metamorphosis requires 50 additional souls.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your damage is increased by 10% and effects that grant you Fury grant 100% additional Fury.

1261448.name: Concentrated Power
1261448.description:
Devastation
Mass Disintegrate strikes 1 additional target.

 Preservation,  Augmentation
Mass Eruption strikes 1 additional target.

1261525.name: Light's Judicator
1261525.description: Empyrean Hammer deals 20% increased critical strike damage and its critical strikes have 50% chance to grant an additional stack of Light's Deliverance.

1261543.name: Fast Feet
1261543.description: Blackout Kick deals 20% increased damage. Spinning Crane Kick deals 10% additional damage.

1261562.name: Shield of Vengeance
1261562.description:
Divine Protection reduces damage taken by an additional 10% and casts Shield of Vengeance.

Shield of Vengeance
Creates a barrier of holy light that absorbs [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage for 10 sec.

When the shield expires, it bursts to inflict Holy damage equal to the total amount absorbed, divided among all nearby enemies.

1261564.name: Ascendant Eclipses
1261564.description: Activating an Eclipse makes your next Wrath or Starfire instant. The first 3 Starsurges or Starfalls you cast during each Eclipse deal 20% increased damage.

1261565.name: Ascendant Eclipses
1261565.description: Your critical strikes dealt during an Eclipse cause their victims to languish for an additional 12% of damage dealt for 6 sec.

1261566.name: Ascendant Eclipses
1261566.description:
Activating an Eclipse also launches Solar or Lunar Bolts at enemies within 40 yds that always critically strike.

 Solar Bolt
Entering Solar Eclipse launches a Solar Bolt at 1 enemy that deals (500% of Spell Power) Nature damage.

 Lunar Bolt
Entering Lunar Eclipse launches 3 Lunar Bolts at enemies that deal (90.55% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to them and nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

1261684.name: Entropy
1261684.description:
While in combat, generate 1 Soul Fragment every 12 sec.

While out of combat, you will slowly build towards your Void Metamorphosis, up to 25 Soul Fragments.

1261697.name: Beckon
1261697.description: Reap reduces the cast time of your next Consume by 100% and causes it to generate 1 additional Soul Fragment.

1261703.name: Tigereye Brew
1261703.description:
Every 3 Chi spent generates Tigereye Brew. Zenith consumes up to 20 Tigereye Brew stacks to increase your critical strike chance for its duration by 1% per stack.

Generates quickly up to 10 stacks while out of combat and may generate up to a maximum of 30 stacks.

1261844.name: Tigereye Brew
1261844.description: Your spells and abilities deal 5% increased critical strike damage.

1261849.name: Tigereye Brew
1261849.description:
Zenith now grants access to 2 additional Zenith Stomps.

 Zenith Stomp:
Release a powerful stomp, dealing (1000% of Attack Power) Nature damage to nearby enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 2 Chi.

1261867.name: Heart of the Wild
1261867.description:
Restoration
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

 Balance,  Feral
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

Non-shapeshifted:
Empowered Wild Growth that heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for [(254.87% of Spell Power) * 600 / 100] over 7 sec.

 Guardian
Perform a powerful off-role ability depending on your currently active shapeshift form.

Non-shapeshifted:
Empowered Wild Growth that heals up to 5 injured allies within 30 yards of the target for [(254.87% of Spell Power) * 600 / 100] over 7 sec.

Cat Form:
Unleash an empowered Feral Frenzy, clawing your target 5 times for [5 * (16.3% of Attack Power) * 1000 / 100] Physical damage and an additional [5 * 1000 / 100 * (32.67% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec. Awards 5 combo points.

Moonkin Form:
Call down waves of empowered falling stars upon enemies within 40 yds, dealing [54 * (25.3% of Spell Power)] Astral damage over 8 sec.

1261984.name: Shadow of Nathreza
1261984.description:
Haunt now calls upon a demonic soul from within the Twisting Nether to haunt your target.

The soul is unstable and ravenous, dealing [(36.181% of Spell Power) * 18] Shadow damage to its host and 3 enemies within 10 yards suffering from your Corruption over its duration.

1261990.name: Shadow of Nathreza
1261990.description: Increases the initial damage of Haunt by 50% and Haunt increases damage dealt to its host by an additional 2%.

1261992.name: Shadow of Nathreza
1261992.description:
Damage dealt by Haunt has a chance to release the demonic soul haunting its target. When released, it unleashes a devastating attack before being banished back to Nathreza.

 Wrath of Nathreza
Calls down a meteor formed from the ruins of Nathreza that explodes upon impact, dealing (1684.51% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1262017.name: Fuel on the Fire
1262017.description: Exploding Keg also causes your next 2 casts of Keg Smash to summon a whirl of flame which spirals outwards, dealing (200% of Attack Power) additional Fire damage to each enemy struck.

1262034.name: Gift of the Wild
1262034.description: Mark of the Wild is 100% more effective on yourself.

1262329.name: Empty the Cellar
1262329.description: Exploding Keg can be reactivated within 20 sec to throw 5 additional kegs at nearby targets, each dealing (200% of Attack Power) Physical damage and reducing the cooldown of your Brews by 3.0 sec.

1262334.name: Jade Flash
1262334.description: Crackling Jade Lightning deals its damage in 75% less time, costs 75% less Energy, and strikes 4 additional targets, but has a 60 sec cooldown.

1262409.name: Lethal Calibration
1262409.description: Wildfire Bomb reduces the cooldown of Boomstick by 2.0 sec for each enemy hit, up to 10 sec.

1262442.name: Bonding
1262442.description:
Mastery increased by 3%.

You gain 5% increased Mastery from all Mastery sources.

1262603.name: Stand Ready
1262603.description:
Brewmaster
Activating Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox instantly grants 10 stacks of Flurry Strikes that trigger on your next attack at 70% effectiveness.

 Windwalker
Activating Zenith instantly grants 10 stacks of Flurry Strikes that trigger on your next attack at 70% effectiveness.

1262610.name: Weapons of the Wall
1262610.description:
Brewmaster
Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox's stomp damage increased by 20%.

 Windwalker
Zenith Stomp damage increased by 20%.

1262612.name: Shado Over the Battlefield
1262612.description: Flurry Strikes deal (52% of Attack Power) Nature damage to all enemies within 6 yds, reduced beyond 8 targets.

1262628.name: Awakening Spirit
1262628.description:
Purifying Brew also surrounds you with protective energies for 15 sec. 

When Staggered damage would be dealt to you, you instead absorb up to 50%, until [(Attack Power * 6) * (1 + Versatility)] has been prevented.

1262635.name: Thunder Capacitor
1262635.description: Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning deal 20% increased damage and have a 20% chance to refund the Maelstrom Weapon spent.

1262659.name: Vital Flame
1262659.description: Heal for 40% of all Fire or Nature damage dealt by your spells and abilities.

1262667.name: Yu'lon's Avatar
1262667.description:
Windwalker
Heart of the Jade Serpent additionally triggers for 4 sec at 100% effectiveness after you cast Zenith.

 Mistweaver
Vivify and Sheilun's Gift have a chance to trigger Heart of the Jade Serpent for 4 sec at 100% effectiveness.

1262672.name: Flowing Wisdom
1262672.description: Heart of the Jade Serpent increases your haste by 10% while active.

1262713.name: Storm Unleashed
1262713.description: Each Maelstrom Weapon spent has a 2% chance to cause your next Crash Lightning to ignore its cooldown. The weapon enhancement effect of Crash Lightning may now overlap.

1262755.name: Benediction
1262755.description: Prayer of Mending healing has a chance to upgrade your next Flash Heal to Benediction, healing the target for 30% more and causing a Cosmic Ripple.

1262756.name: Stampede of the Ancients
1262756.description: Strength of the Black Ox's effect is 400% more effective on your primary target.

1262758.name: Benediction
1262758.description:
Cosmic Ripple healing increased by 25%.

All healing done increased by 6%.

1262760.name: Benediction
1262760.description:
Each pulse of Divine Hymn emits a Cosmic Ripple at 75% effectiveness.

During Apotheosis, Flash Heal is upgraded to Benediction.

1262761.name: Storm Unleashed
1262761.description:
Maelstrom Weapon spending abilities deal 8% increased damage. 

Weapon Imbuements deal 10% increased damage.

1262843.name: Duality
1262843.description:
Frost
Casting Glacial Spike also casts a Pyroblast, dealing (881.3% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

 Fire
Casting Pyroblast has a 20% chance to also cast a Glacial Spike, dealing (366.24% of Spell Power) Frost damage.

1262844.name: Molten Chill
1262844.description:
Fire
Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite at 10% increased effectiveness.

 Frost
Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite, dealing an additional 30% of their damage over 9 sec.

1262845.name: Elemental Conduit
1262845.description:
Fire
Comet Storm and Glacial Spike now apply Ignite.

Your Haste is increased by 2%.

 Frost
Meteor and Pyroblast now apply Ignite.

Your Haste is increased by 2%.

1262935.name: Hand of Frost
1262935.description: Shattering an enemy has a 10% chance to summon a Hand of Frost to pursue your target, dealing (500% of Spell Power) Frost damage and applying 1 stack of Freezing on contact.

1262981.name: Hand of Frost
1262981.description:
Each stack of Freezing you Shatter increases your chance to summon a Hand of Frost by an additional 1.0%.

Damage from Hand of Frost increases your spell damage by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

1263245.name: Heart of the Ox
1263245.description: Mastery increased by 5%. Double this effect while Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox is active.

1263249.name: Hand of Frost
1263249.description:
Ray of Frost summons 4 Hands of Frost over its duration.

Ray of Frost gains an additional charge and its damage is increased by 25%.

1263252.name: Seal of the Templar
1263252.description:
Retribution
 damage increased by 25%.

 Protection
Judgment damage increased by 30%.

1263346.name: Swift as a Coursing River
1263346.description: Drinking from a Brew increases your movement speed by 15% and your auto-attack speed by 10% for 15 sec.

1263353.name: Celestial Flames
1263353.description:
Drinking from Brews has a 30% chance to coat you with Celestial Flames for 6 sec. While Celestial Flames is active:

 Special Delivery:
Kegs thrown by Special Delivery are ignited and splash upon landing, dealing (100% of Attack Power) Fire damage to up to 5 nearby enemies.

 Rushing Jade Wind:
Rushing Jade Wind becomes a firestorm, increasing its radius by 30% and causing it to deal Fire damage.

1263569.name: Abomination Limb
1263569.description:
Sprout an additional limb, pulling enemies further than 8 yds from you every 1 sec.  

The same enemy can only be pulled once every 4 sec.

1263657.name: Unseen Predator
1263657.description:
When you Ferocious Bite, you have a 15% chance per combo point spent to flicker to an enemy within 30 yds and deliver an Unseen Attack. Unseen Attack damage is reduced if less than 5 combo points and 50 Energy are spent on Ferocious Bite.

 Unseen Slash
Slash the target, dealing (65.7% of Attack Power) Physical damage and an additional [(46% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new Bleed.

 Unseen Swipe
Swipe nearby targets, dealing (188.75% of Attack Power) Physical damage. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

1263658.name: Unseen Predator
1263658.description: Unseen Attacks increase your damage done by 0% for 1 sec per combo point spend to trigger it. Additional applications extend this effect.

1263660.name: Unseen Predator
1263660.description: Tiger's Fury causes you to perform an Unseen Attack for maximum damage after your next 2 combo point generating attacks. Rip and Unseen Attack damage increased by 30%.

1263743.name: Blood Mist
1263743.description:
When you cast Dancing Rune Weapon, you become enveloped in a blood mist that surrounds you for 8 sec, increasing your Parry by 5%. 

Deals (64% of Attack Power) Shadow damage every 1 sec to enemies within 10 yds. Every time it deals damage you gain 2 Runic Power, up to a maximum of 10 Runic Power. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1263781.name: Sanguinary Burst
1263781.description: When Blood Mist ends it deals (276% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to 8 nearby enemies, healing you for 15% of the damage dealt. The damage is increased by 2% for every 1 Runic Power spent while Blood Mist was active.

1263782.name: Walk Into Light
1263782.description:
Holy
Infusion of Light occurs 100% more often during Avenging Wrath.

 Retribution
You have a 100% chance to gain Blessing of An'she and generate 2 Holy Power after casting Avenging Wrath.

During Avenging Wrath, Hammer of Wrath casts Blade of Justice at 100% effectiveness.

1263787.name: Endless Gleam
1263787.description:
Retribution
Dawnlight's duration is increased by 0.3 sec whenever struck by Divine Storm or Templar's Verdict.

When 2 Dawnlights are struck by Divine Storm, their durations are extended by an additional 0.5 sec.

 Holy
Dawnlight's duration is increased by 0.5 sec when it heals an ally with full health.

1263824.name: Consumption
1263824.description:
Empower the runes in your weapon, reducing the damage you take over the duration and unleashing a devastating attack that deals (625.1% of Attack Power) Shadow damage and consumes up to 75% of your Blood Plague instantly from enemies in front of you.

I: Consumes up to 25% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 5% and an additional 8 sec after empowering.

II: Consumes up to 50% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 10% and an additional 4 sec after empowering.

III: Consumes up to 75% of your Blood Plague. While empowering, your damage taken is reduced by 15% and an additional 2 sec after empowering.

1263879.name: Nature's Bounty
1263879.description: Regrowth heals all other allies with Regrowth for 20% of its healing.

1263920.name: Born in Sunlight
1263920.description: Dawnlight's critical strike chance is increased by 15% during Avenging Wrath.

1263935.name: Fel Armaments
