1263935.description: The cooldown of your Felguard's Felstorm is reduced by 10 sec and damage dealt to your primary demon is reduced by 10%.

1263941.name: Infernal Rapidity
1263941.description: When your Wild Imps cast Fel Firebolt, they have 10% chance to instantly cast another Fel Firebolt at 200% effectiveness.

1264096.name: Void Apparitions
1264096.description: When an effect from an Idol is activated, conjure Shadowy Apparitions.

1264104.name: Void Apparitions
1264104.description:
Shadowy Apparitions have a 15% chance to spawn as Void Apparitions that release a Void Bolt at their target and deal 50% increased damage.

 Void Bolt
Sends a bolt of pure void energy at your target, dealing (150% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

1264107.name: Void Apparitions
1264107.description:
Tentacle Slam has a 100% chance to activate an effect from one of your Idols.

 Idol of Y'Shaarj
Summons a Shadowfiend.

 Idol of N'Zoth
Your target witnesses a nightmare or vision of N'Zoth.

 Idol of Yogg-Saron
Summons a Thing From Beyond.

 Idol of C'Thun
Summons a Void Tendril or Void Lasher.

1264235.name: Deadly Reach
1264235.description: Death Strike hits an additional 2 enemies at 75% effectiveness.

1264269.name: Legacy of the Lifebinder
1264269.description:
Preservation
Dream Breath and Fire Breath gain an additional charge.

 Devastation
Fire Breath gains an additional charge.

1264289.name: Corpsecaller
1264289.description:
Marksmanship
Black Arrow's periodic damage has a small chance to rouse the dead, summoning a Dark Minion to fight alongside you for 20 sec.

 Beast Mastery
When summoning a Dire Beast, you have a 10% chance to instead summon a Dark Hound that deals significantly increased damage.

1264290.name: Wailing Dead
1264290.description:
Beast Mastery
Bestial Wrath summons a Dark Hound.

For 15 sec after casting Bestial Wrath, Bestial Wrath is replaced with Wailing Arrow.

 Wailing Arrow
Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing (1400% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to your target and an additional (700% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Non-Player targets struck by a Wailing Arrow have their spellcasting interrupted and are silenced for 1 sec.

Grants Deathblow.

 Marksmanship
Trueshot summons a Dark Minion.

For 15 sec after casting Trueshot, Trueshot is replaced with Wailing Arrow.

 Wailing Arrow
Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing (1400% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to your target and an additional (700% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Non-Player targets struck by a Wailing Arrow have their spellcasting interrupted and are silenced for 1 sec.

Grants Deathblow.

1264291.name: Blighted Quiver
1264291.description:
Beast Mastery
You fire 2 additional Black Arrows during Withering Fire's barrage.

Beast Cleave and Kill Cleave damage increased by 5%.

 Marksmanship
You fire 2 additional Black Arrows during Withering Fire's barrage.

Trick Shots damage bonus increased by 10%. Aspect of the Hydra's damage bonus increased by 12%.

1264296.name: Lifeblood
1264296.description: Death Strike heals for an additional 20% of its healing over 5 sec.

1264321.name: Deep Exhalation
1264321.description:
Devastation
Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

 Preservation
Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.

Dream Breath's heal over time lasts 6 sec longer.

1264330.name: Devastating Focus
1264330.description:
You focus on the target struck by your Devastator, dealing 30% additional Revenge damage to them.

Only one target can have your focus at a time.

1264351.name: Dance of Midnight
1264351.description: When you consume a Rune you have a chance to call a Dancing Rune Weapon to your aid for 8 sec.

1264359.name: Wild Thrash
1264359.description:
Command your pet to thrash all enemies within 10 yds, dealing (191% of Attack Power) Physical damage to them. Damage is increased by 200% if Wild Thrash hits 2 or more enemies.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1264365.name: Ashes in Motion
1264365.description: Fire Breath's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

1264378.name: Unravel
1264378.description: Direct damage from Fire Breath consumes absorb shields from enemies, dealing (1200% of Spell Power) additional Spellfrost damage to them.

1264405.name: Dance of Midnight
1264405.description: For each Dancing Rune Weapon active your damage is increased by 0% and your damage taken is reduced by 0%.

1264506.name: Dance of Midnight
1264506.description: While Dancing Rune Weapon is active, Parrying an attack has a chance to make your next Heart Strike cost no Runes and deal 150% increased damage.

1264614.name: Sylvan Beckoning
1264614.description:
Balance
Entering an Eclipse summons a Dryad to assist you for 8 sec, casting Starsurge dealing (150% of Spell Power) Astral damage and Starfall at 200% effectiveness.

 Restoration
Your periodic heals have a chance to empower your next Swiftmend to summon a Dryad to assist you, casting Tranquility at 10% effectiveness and Regrowth to heal (658.507% of Spell Power) damage onto your lowest health ally.

1264649.name: Intensity
1264649.description: When Regrowth critically heals, it is 260% effective instead of the usual 200%.

1264688.name: Descending Skies
1264688.description:
Enhancement
Ascendance upgrades your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

 Elemental
Casting Ascendance upgrades your next Lightning Bolt to Tempest.

1264690.name: Pact of the Hollow
1264690.description:
Marksmanship
Aimed Shot causes your Dark Minion to fire a Blighted Arrow, dealing (500% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

 Beast Mastery
Kill Command causes your Dark Hound to Shadow Thrash, dealing (210% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

1264691.name: Natural Gift
1264691.description:
Elemental
Nature damage is increased by 2%

 Enhancement
Nature damage is increased by 6%

1264762.name: Stormwell
1264762.description:
Elemental
Storm Elemental lasts 2 sec longer, and Stormkeeper generates 10 Maelstrom.

 Enhancement
Windfury Weapon damage increased by 10%.

When Crash Lightning hits a single enemy, it activates Windfury Weapon.

1264764.name: Shuriken Tornado
1264764.description: Shuriken Storm has a 15% chance to create a Shadow Clone that repeats the attack for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

1264775.name: Sharpened Fangs
1264775.description:
Beast Mastery
Your mastery is increased by 3%.

 Survival
Your mastery is increased by 3%.

Wildfire Bomb deals an additional 15% increased damage to its primary target.

1264776.name: Dryad's Dance
1264776.description:
Restoration
Dryads cause Swiftmend to cool down 25% faster.

 Balance
Dryads cause most of your Astral power generation to be increased by 10%.

1264781.name: Lethal Barbs
1264781.description:
Survival
Your auto attacks grant 1 Focus to you and your pet.

Auto attack damage increased by 15%.

 Beast Mastery
Your auto shot grants 1 Focus to you and your pet.

Auto shot damage increased by 25%.

1264792.name: Wyvern's Gaze
1264792.description: The damage bonus from your Wyvern now lasts an additional 2.0 sec.

1264797.name: Hoof and Blade
1264797.description:
Survival
Hogstrider further increases the damage of Boomstick by 2%.

 Beast Mastery
Hogstrider further increases the damage of Cobra Shot by 50% and it now strikes up to 3 additional targets.

1264899.name: Spirit of the Thicket
1264899.description:
Restoration
Ironbark summons a Dryad to channel a beam of pure nature onto your target, healing them for (4392% of Spell Power) over 6 sec.

 Balance
Your Starfall damage is increased by 12% and your Starsurge damage is increased by 8%.

1264902.name: Moonlight Chakram
1264902.description:
Survival
For 15 sec after casting Takedown, Takedown is replaced with Moonlight Chakram.

 Moonlight Chakram
Throw a chakram blessed with moonlight at your current target that will rapidly deal (284.4% of Attack Power) Physical damage 7 times, bouncing to other targets if they are nearby.

 Marksmanship
For 15 sec after casting Trueshot, Trueshot is replaced with Moonlight Chakram.

 Moonlight Chakram
Throw a chakram blessed with moonlight at your current target that will rapidly deal (284.4% of Attack Power) Physical damage 7 times, bouncing to other targets if they are nearby.

1264903.name: Radiant Edge
1264903.description: Your Moonlight Chakram deals 25% increased damage each time it bounces.

1264904.name: Twilight Requiem
1264904.description: When your Moonlight Chakram expires, it summons an explosion of moonlight, dealing (200% of Attack Power) Arcane damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1264934.name: Frenzy
1264934.description: Increases the attack speed of your active pets by 20%.

1265044.name: Jagged Wounds
1265044.description: All bleed damage dealt by you and your pets  increased by 10%.

1265051.name: Thrill of the Hunt
1265051.description:
Barbed Shot critical strike chance increased by 5%.

Cobra Shot critical strike chance increased by 15%.

1265052.name: Heart of the Pack
1265052.description: Summoning a Dire Beast grants 0.50% haste for 8 sec.

1265129.name: Bring Me Another
1265129.description: Drinking a Brew has a 20% chance to leave you with an Empty Barrel, which is tossed along with your next Keg Smash to deal (300% of Attack Power) Physical damage to your target. Ricochets up to 4 times at 80% effectiveness.

1265138.name: Bring Me Another
1265138.description:
Gaining an Empty Barrel resets the cooldown of Keg Smash and makes its next cast cost 0% less energy. 

Physical damage dealt increased by 10%.

1265141.name: Bring Me Another
1265141.description:
When you cast Fortifying Brew or [Celestial Infusion / Celestial Brew] you tap a fresh keg, granting yourself and 2 nearby allies a refreshing drink, and leaving you with an Empty Barrel.

Empty Barrels deal 100% increased damage.

 Refreshing Drink:
Upon taking damage, automatically consume a refreshing drink to heal for (3200% of Attack Power) over 8 sec.

1265385.name: Implacable
1265385.description:
Nothing will save your target from you. Envenom damage increased by 10%. When your Envenom bonus expires, gain 20% increased Energy generation for 5 sec. 

Gain an additional 15% increased Energy generation for each Envenom you used while Envenom's bonus was active, up to 80% total.

1265386.name: Implacable
1265386.description: Your Nature and Bleed ability damage is increased by 10%.

1265387.name: Implacable
1265387.description: After striking with Kingsbane, rapidly strike that target 5 times over 1 sec for (260% of Attack Power) Physical and (180% of Attack Power) Nature damage. Each strike applies the Lethal Poisons on your weapons and generates a combo point.

1265517.name: Permafrost Bauble
1265517.description: The cooldown of Ice Block and Ice Cold are reduced by 30 sec.

1265541.name: Fear No Evil
1265541.description: Fear duration on you reduced by 20%. This effect is increased to 60% during Avenging Wrath.

1265547.name: Thrill of Blood
1265547.description:
Unholy
Essence of the Blood Queen additionally increases your Mastery by 0.2% per stack.

Dread Plague deals 10% and Virulent Plague deals 10% increased damage.

 Blood
Essence of the Blood Queen additionally increases your Mastery by 1.0% per stack.

Blood Plague deals 5% increased damage.

1265549.name: Brought to Light
1265549.description: Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor causes you to explode with holy energy, healing up to 5 nearby allies and yourself for (500% of Attack Power), split evenly among them.

1265574.name: Transfusion
1265574.description:
Unholy
Vampiric Strike increases the damage of the Lesser Ghoul it summons by 10%.

 Blood
Vampiric Strike increases the damage of your Dancing Rune Weapons by 20% for 8 sec. 

Multiple applications may overlap.

1265632.name: Chosen of Frostbrood
1265632.description: Frostwyrm's Fury deals 100% increased damage to the first enemy it hits and grants you 15% Haste for 12 sec.

1265633.name: Chosen of Frostbrood
1265633.description:
Frostwyrm's Fury extends the duration of an active Pillar of Frost by 2.0 sec.

Enduring Strength grants an additional 4% Strength.

1265637.name: Chosen of Frostbrood
1265637.description:
All Frost damage increased by 10%.

Frostwyrm's Fury deals 100% increased damage. After the Frostwyrm flies away, you may cast Frostwyrm's Fury again to recall it at 50% effectiveness.

1265770.name: Embers of Nihilam
1265770.description:
Casting Incinerate has a chance to evoke an echo of the Dark Titan's power.

 Echo of Sargeras
Hurl an ember torn from Nihilam at the target, dealing (187.5% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage and an additional (162.5% of Spell Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 10 yds.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1265772.name: Embers of Nihilam
1265772.description: Memories of the Titans' destruction flash in your mind when you evoke the Dark Titan's power, increasing critical strike by 4% and haste by 4% for 6 sec.

1265774.name: Embers of Nihilam
1265774.description:
Casting Chaos Bolt, Shadowburn, or Rain of Fire evokes an echo of the Dark Titan's power at 50%, 50%, or 60% effectiveness respectively.

If no target is found, a random target suffering from your Immolate will be selected.

1265790.name: Boiling Point
1265790.description: Heart Strike has a chance to make your next Blood Boil empowered, dealing 50% increased damage and echoing after 3 sec.

1265801.name: Frequent Traveler
1265801.description: Reduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 sec and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.

1265802.name: Shattering Stars
1265802.description:
Eternity Surge additionally releases a Shattering Star at your target that deals 50% more damage per empower level reached.

 Shattering Star
Exhale a bolt of concentrated power from your mouth at the target for (173.645% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage.

1265810.name: Infernal Beneficiary
1265810.description: Healing done by Drain Life also heals your primary demon at 400% effectiveness.

1265813.name: Foul Mouth
1265813.description: Casting Curse of Exhaustion, Curse of Tongues, or Curse of Weakness now curses all enemies within 10 yds of the target.

1265816.name: Improved Mortal Coil
1265816.description: Increases the range of Mortal Coil by 10 yds and Mortal Coil now heals for an additional 5% of maximum health.

1265818.name: Vengeful Beast
1265818.description: Metamorphosis has 5 sec increased duration and increases the damage of Fracture, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb by 20%.

1265826.name: Star Salvo
1265826.description:
Increases Shattering Star damage by 35%.

Shattering Stars are exhaled at all of your Eternity Surge targets.

1265855.name: Echoing Fury
1265855.description:
Blood
Reaper's Mark deals 5% increased damage.

Casting Dancing Rune Weapon grants 1 stack of Exterminate with 100% first scythe and 100% second scythe effectiveness.

 Frost
Reaper's Mark deals 5% increased damage.

Casting Reaper's Mark grants 1 stack of Exterminate with 100% first scythe and 100% second scythe effectiveness.

1265859.name: Frigid Resolve
1265859.description:
Blood
The effectiveness of Permafrost is increased by 100% and Exterminate grants Permafrost equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

Permafrost
Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

 Frost
The effectiveness of Permafrost is increased by 50%.

Permafrost
Your auto attack damage grants you an absorb shield equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

1265861.name: Gravedigger
1265861.description: Between the Eyes has a 45% chance to apply 2 stacks of its bonus to your damage dealt.

1265862.name: Gravedigger
1265862.description: When you spend 5 or more combo points on Dispatch, immediately strike your target with an underhanded Scoundrel Strike for (160% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

1265863.name: Gravedigger
1265863.description: When you Dispatch you have a 12% chance per combo point spent to hide a bullet up your sleeve. When you've hidden 6 bullets, your next Between the Eyes consumes them and costs no Energy, generates 6 combo points, and immediately resets its own cooldown.

1265867.name: Azure Sweep
1265867.description:
Eternity Surge upgrades your next Azure Strike to Azure Sweep, damaging all nearby enemies and dealing 75% additional damage.

 Azure Sweep
Concentrate azure energy into your tail and sweep to release pure magic upon an enemy and nearby targets for (163.185% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1265869.name: Plague Infusion
1265869.description: Your Blood Plague critical hits have a chance to reduce the cooldown of your Blood Boil by 0.25 sec.

1265924.name: Soul Barrier
1265924.description: Spirit Bomb shields you for 10 sec, absorbing (Total Health * 8 / 100) damage plus (Total Health * 2 / 100) for each Soul Fragment consumed.

1265932.name: Deathly Blows
1265932.description:
Blood
Death Strike damage increased by 12%.

 Frost
Frost Strike damage is increased by 15% and Glacial Advance damage is increased by 5%.

Reaper's Mark grants 3 charges of Bonegrinder if it is known.

1265949.name: Let Terror Reign
1265949.description:
Unholy
Casting Death Coil or Epidemic orders Whitemane to cast her Death Coil or Epidemic alongside you at 125% effectiveness.

 Frost
Casting Obliterate or Frostscythe orders Trollbane to cast his Obliterate or Frostscythe alongside you at 100% effectiveness.

1265952.name: Potent Powder
1265952.description: Black Powder deals increased damage equal to 20% of your Mastery when it spends 5 or more combo points.

1265959.name: Ride or Die!
1265959.description:
Unholy
Dark Transformation summons forth Whitemane for 6 sec.

 Frost
Pillar of Frost summons forth Trollbane for 6 sec.

1265971.name: Unholy Armaments
1265971.description:
Frost
The abilities that Horsemen cast deal 5% increased damage..

 Unholy
The abilities that Horsemen cast deal 5% increased damage.

Your Ghoul and skeletal archer deals 10% and Lesser Ghouls deal 20% increased damage.

1265979.name: Twin Flame
1265979.description:
Preservation
Consuming Essence Burst fires a twin flame, healing your target for (390% of Spell Power).

 Devastation
Consuming Essence Burst fires a twin flame, striking your target for (180% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

1265992.name: Fire Torrent
1265992.description: Twin Flame bounces to up to 2 additional targets.

1265993.name: Essence Well
1265993.description:
Preservation
Dream Breath and Fire Breath have a 50% chance to generate Essence Burst.

 Devastation
Fire Breath has a 50% chance to generate Essence Burst.

1266069.name: Stalk and Strike
1266069.description:
Marksmanship
Throwing your Moonlight Chakram grants you Lock and Load.

 Survival
Throwing your Moonlight Chakram reduces the cooldown of Wildfire Bomb by 10 sec.

1266151.name: Strafing Run
1266151.description:
Deep Breath deals 20% increased damage and can be cast again within 18 sec of being used.

Recall will be available after the second cast if talented.

1266296.name: Focused Ire
1266296.description:
Havoc,  Vengeance
The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.

 Devourer
The primary target of Void Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.

1266307.name: Demonic Resilience
1266307.description:
Havoc,  Devourer
Blur gains 1 additional charge.

 Vengeance
Demon Spikes gains 1 additional charge.

1266316.name: Burn It Out
1266316.description:
Havoc,  Vengeance
Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect.

 Devourer
Soul Immolation removes 1 Disease effect.

1266326.name: Furious
1266326.description: Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.

1266328.name: Remorseless
1266328.description: Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.

1266329.name: Demon Muzzle
1266329.description: Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

1266330.name: Soul Splitter
1266330.description: Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.

1266496.name: Soul Cleanse
1266496.description:
Havoc,  Vengeance
Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.

 Devourer
Soul Immolation removes 1 Curse effect.

1266497.name: First In, Last Out
1266497.description:
Havoc
Fel Rush grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

 Vengeance
Infernal Strike grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

 Devourer
Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

1266500.name: Final Breath
1266500.description:
Havoc
Fully channeling Eye Beam increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

 Vengeance
Fully channeling Fel Devastation increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

 Devourer
Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

1266719.name: Silent Sanctuary
1266719.description: While no enemies are within 15 yds, you heal for (300% of Spell Power) every 3 sec.

1266733.name: Stillstep Coil
1266733.description: Leg Sweep applies Disable for 5.0 sec when it ends.

1266734.name: Serene Surge
1266734.description: After casting Enveloping Mist, your next [Sheilun's Gift / Vivify] becomes instant cast.

1266740.name: Reinvigoration
1266740.description: After Detox successfully removes an effect from an ally, their movement speed is increased by 30% for 5 sec.

1266748.name: Vital Clarity
1266748.description: Vivify and Sheilun's Gift critical strike chances are increased by 15% on yourself.

1266762.name: Felbound
1266762.description: Your movement speed is increased by 3%.

1266799.name: Through the Felvine
1266799.description:
Destruction
Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 35% and Rain of Fire by 6%.

This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.

 Affliction
Increases the damage of Unstable Affliction by 8% and Seed of Corruption by 4%.

This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.

1266803.name: Alzzin's Iniquity
1266803.description: Malevolence grants an additional 4% Haste and when cast increases the stack count of active Withers by an additional 2 stacks.

1266805.name: Devil Fruit
1266805.description: Periodic damage dealt by Wither has a chance to grant Malevolence for 8 sec.

1266811.name: Mist Caller
1266811.description: Vivify and Sheilun's Gift trigger a Gust of Mist on yourself.

1266818.name: Death Defiance
1266818.description: The cooldown of Death Pact is reduced by 30 sec, and you receive 50% increased healing while its healing absorb is active.

1266819.name: Death Notes
1266819.description: Raise Ally costs 30 less Runic Power.

1266845.name: Quickened Pulse
1266845.description:
Shadow
Shadow Word: Pain and Entropic Rift deal damage 14.9425% more often.

 Discipline
Shadow Word: Pain and Entropic Rift deal damage 25% more often.

1266856.name: Touch of the Void
1266856.description: Voidheart now persists for 8 sec after Entropic Rift ends.

1266883.name: Overwhelming Shadows
1266883.description:
Discipline
Mind Blast deals 100% increased damage.

 Shadow
Void Torrent deals 30% increased damage.

1267003.name: Precision Strikes
1267003.description:
Survival
Your auto attack damage is increased by 25%.

 Beast Mastery,  Marksmanship
Your auto shot damage is increased by 25%.

1267016.name: Stormstream Totem
1267016.description: Riptide has a 6% chance to upgrade your next Healing Stream Totem to Stormstream Totem which heals for 10% more, heals 1 additional ally at 100% effectiveness, and heals 2 injured allies for (1323% of Spell Power) healing when used.

1267028.name: Blood Bond
1267028.description: While you are below 50% health, your Ghoul sacrifices 4% of its maximum health to heal you for 1% of your maximum health every sec.

1267093.name: Stormstream Totem
1267093.description: Healing Stream and Stormstream Totem healing increased by 30%.

1267120.name: Stormstream Totem
1267120.description: Casting [Ancestral Swiftness: Ancestral / Nature's] Swiftness grants a use of Stormstream Totem and Stormstream Totem no longer consumes a charge of Healing Stream Totem when used.

1267182.name: Toxic Stiletto
1267182.description: Shiv's Energy cost is reduced by 20, its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec, and its range is increased by 3 yds.

1267203.name: Glory of the Vanguard
1267203.description: Judgment has a chance to grant you Vanguard, causing your next Avenger's Shield to leave an echoing bolt of light in a line between you and the initial target, piercing any enemies for (300% of Attack Power) Holy damage.

1267206.name: Strike from Above
1267206.description: Glide speed and height increased by 10%.

1267211.name: Glory of the Vanguard
1267211.description: Judgment deals 10% increased damage. When you consume Vanguard you gain 1 Holy Power.

1267215.name: Glory of the Vanguard
1267215.description:
Your next cast of Shield of the Righteous after Vanguard deals 100% additional damage to your primary target and causes light to refract onto 4 other targets for (200% of Attack Power) Holy damage.

During Avenging Wrath your Avenger's Shield always benefits from Vanguard.

1267216.name: Deep Cuts
1267216.description: Your finishing moves deal 6% increased damage.

1267218.name: Shell Wall
1267218.description: Damage taken during Aspect of the Turtle is reduced by an additional 20%.

1267220.name: Danger Sense
1267220.description: You have a 20% chance to partially evade any damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 20%.

1268671.name: Cold Feet
1268671.description: When your Freezing Trap breaks, the victim's movement speed is reduced by 70% for 4 sec.

1268705.name: Masterful Call
1268705.description: The duration of Master's Call is increased by 2 sec and it increases the movement speed of its target by 20%.

1268709.name: Diabolic Oculi
1268709.description:
You summon a Diabolic Oculus, up to 3, each time the duration of Diabolic Ritual is reduced by one of your spells.

Diabolic Oculi explode when consuming Demonic Art, dealing (234.62% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1268713.name: Looks That Kill
1268713.description:
Your Diabolic Oculi now cast Diabolic Gaze at your primary demon's target every 1 sec while active.

 Diabolic Gaze
Fire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing (80% of Spell Power) Chaos damage.

Damage is increased by 100% per Demonic Oculus active.

1268716.name: Mind's Eyes
1268716.description: Your Diabolic Oculi observe the battlefield and collect information that is imparted to you upon being exploded, each Diabolic Oculi increasing your Intellect by 2% for 10 sec.

1268807.name: Emperor's Elixir
1268807.description:
Thunder Focus Tea now empowers Enveloping Mist and Rising Sun Kick further.

 Enveloping Mist:
Begins a channel of Soothing Mist onto your target.

 Rising Sun Kick:
Releases a Jadefire Stomp infront of you that transfers damage into Ancient Teachings at 20% effectiveness.

 Jadefire Stomp:
You release a Jadefire Stomp, dealing (100% of Attack Power) damage to 5 enemies in front of you.

1268817.name: Misty Coalescence
1268817.description: Renewing Mist healing is increased by up to 300% in proportion to its coverage on yourself and your allies.

1268868.name: Improved Snaring
1268868.description:
Wing Clip slows an additional 25%.

Concussive Shot slows an additional 10%.

1268881.name: Improved Defy Fate
1268881.description: Defy Fate healing increased by 100% and its cooldown is reduced by 1 min.

1268884.name: Manifested Avarice
1268884.description:
Each Succulent Soul consumed has an increasing chance to unleash the Demonic Soul within you, enabling it to assault your enemies for 9 sec.

 Soul Swipe
Strikes nearby enemies with a malevolent claw, dealing (195.514% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to its target and (130.346% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to other enemies in 10 yds.

1268889.name: Shared Vessel
1268889.description:
Increases your Mastery by 2%.

This effect is doubled while the demonic entity is aiding you in combat.

1268903.name: Eternal Hunger
1268903.description: Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 sec and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.

1268932.name: Ancient Arts
1268932.description: Damaging attacks that expend Shadow Techniques to generate combo points have a 15% chance per stack expended to create a Shadow Clone that repeats the attack for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

1268936.name: Ancient Arts
1268936.description:
Shadow damage increased by 5%.

Shadow Clones have a 50% chance to trigger Shadow Techniques' effect.

1268939.name: Ancient Arts
1268939.description: After attacks that generate combo points, if 5 or more stacks of Shadow Techniques remain, your next damaging finishing move will expend them to generate combo points up to your max.

1269215.name: Crackling Fury
1269215.description: Voltaic Blaze's cooldown is reduced by 3 sec and its instant damage is increased by 50%.

1269306.name: Master of Warfare
1269306.description: Each stack of Master of Warfare increases Mortal Strike, Cleave, and Overpower damage by 2.5% and critical strike damage by 2.5%.

1269307.name: Master of Warfare
1269307.description: Heroic Strike increases the damage you deal to enemies affected by your next Colossus Smash by an additional 3.0%. Stacks up to 5 times.

1269311.name: Phalanx
1269311.description: Thunder Clap causes your next Shield Slam to deal 10% additional damage and unleash a wave of force, dealing (198% of Attack Power) Physical damage to all enemies in front of you.

1269312.name: Phalanx
1269312.description: Damage dealt by Thunder Clap and Phalanx's wave of force is increased by 10%.

1269313.name: Phalanx
1269313.description:
While Shield Block is active, Shield Slam deals 10% additional damage and has a 20% increased chance to critically strike.

Enemies damaged by Phalanx's wave of force deal 8.0% reduced damage to you for 8 sec.

1269314.name: Master of Warfare
1269314.description:
Your single target melee abilities have a chance to upgrade Slam to Heroic Strike.
All modifiers and talents that affect Slam also affect Heroic Strike.

 
Heroic Strike20 RageMelee RangeInstant
Requires Warrior
Requires level 1Requires Melee Weapon
Powerfully strike an opponent, causing (600% of Attack Power) Physical damage and gaining a stack of Master of Warfare, allowing your attacks to penetrate 3% armor for 30 sec. Multiple applications of this effect may overlap.

1269614.name: Wild Guardian
1269614.description:
After you cast Berserk or Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc, you gain access to Wild Guardian:
 Wild Guardian:
Spirits of the wild come to your aid, causing your next 2 casts of Ironfur, Maul, and Frenzied Regeneration to be echoed at 50% effectiveness.

1269617.name: Wild Guardian
1269617.description:
Mastery increased by 3%. 

When you cast Wild Guardian, you gain 1 charges of Dream Guide.

1269619.name: Wild Guardian
1269619.description:
Wild Guardian's echoes are now cast at 200% effectiveness, and each echo 2 additional times over 8 sec.

Maul is always empowered and deals 40% additional Nature damage over 12 sec.

1270062.name: Feedback Loop
1270062.description: Spell critical strike chance increased by 5%. Elemental Fury increases spell critical strike damage by an additional 25%.

1270064.name: Feedback Loop
1270064.description: Elemental Overloads have a 25% chance to cause an additional Elemental Overload. This effect cannot chain.

1270255.name: Oppressive Darkness
1270255.description:
Reduces the cooldown of Shadowfury by 15 sec and increases its radius by 2 yds.

Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 sec and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

1270350.name: Instinctive Imbuements
1270350.description:
Enhancement
Lightning Shield increases your Agility by 3%.

Casting Lightning Shield now applies your weapon imbuements. Earth Shield is also applied if you have the Elemental Orbit talent.

 Elemental
Lightning Shield increases your Intellect by 3%.

Casting Lightning Shield now applies your weapon imbuements. Earth Shield is also applied if you have the Elemental Orbit talent.

 Restoration
Water Shield increases your Intellect by 3%.

Casting Water Shield now applies your weapon imbuements. Earth Shield is also applied if you have the Elemental Orbit talent.

1270444.name: Untethered Rage
1270444.description: Soul Cleave and Spirit Bomb have a chance per soul fragment consumed to grant Untethered Rage, allowing Metamorphosis to be cast without incurring its cooldown and lasting 10 sec.

1270446.name: Ancestral Influence
1270446.description: Your Intellect is increased by 1.0% for each Ancestor active.

1270447.name: Windspeaker
1270447.description:
Elemental
The cast times of Healing Surge, Chain Heal and Lava Burst are reduced by 10%.

 Restoration
The cast times of Healing Wave, Chain Heal, and Lava Burst are reduced by 10%.

1270448.name: Untethered Rage
1270448.description: Soul Cleave and Spirit Bomb can consume an additional soul fragment and deal an additional 5% damage for each consumed.

1270449.name: Untethered Rage
1270449.description:
Each cast of Soul Cleave and Spirit Bomb that does not grant Untethered Rage instead applies a stack of Seething Anger.

Seething Anger grants 1% Agility and increases your chance to gain Untethered Rage. Lasts 12 sec and cannot be refreshed after gaining Untethered Rage.

1270450.name: Mystic Knowledge
1270450.description:
Restoration
For 8 sec sec after casting Nature's Swiftness or Ancestral Swiftness, the recharge rate of Riptide is increased by 10%.

Increases the chance for Lava Surge to occur by 20%.

 Elemental
Increases the chance for Lava Surge to occur by 20%.

1270565.name: Green Thumb
1270565.description:
Feral
The rate at which Bloodseeker Vines grow is increased by 20%.

 Restoration
The rate at which Symbiotic Blooms grow is increased by 20%.

1270586.name: Rampancy
1270586.description:
Feral
Bloodseeker Vines have a 30% chance to trigger Bursting Growth every 2 sec at 100% effectiveness.

 Restoration
Symbiotic Blooms have a 20% chance to trigger Bursting Growth every 2 sec at 100% effectiveness.

1270592.name: Patient Custodian
1270592.description:
Feral
Your Bleeds and other damage over time effects are 8% more effective.

 Restoration
Your heal over time effects are 6% more effective.

1270621.name: Tranquil Tea
1270621.description: Consuming Mana Tea generates 1 cloud of mist.

1270693.name: Pact of the Annihilan
1270693.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

1270701.name: Gorefiend's Avarice
1270701.description: Drain Life now channels 100% faster and restores health 100% faster.

1270704.name: Decimator
1270704.description: Demolish's final strike applies Deep Wounds to all targets at 100% effectiveness.

1270709.name: Cut to the Bone
1270709.description:
Arms
Mortal Strike critical strikes increase your Rend and Deep Wounds damage by 15% for 8 sec.

 Protection
Shield Slam critical strikes increase your Rend and Deep Wounds damage by 15% for 8 sec.

1270710.name: Celeritous Conclusion
1270710.description:
Arms
Demolish's final strike grants 10% Haste for 10 sec and increases the critical strike chance of your next Mortal Strike by 100%.

 Protection
Demolish's final strike grants 10% Haste for 10 sec and increases the critical strike chance of your next Shield Slam by 100%.

1270717.name: Violent Euphoria
1270717.description: Bladestorm puts you into a battle trance, granting you 15% haste for 8 sec after you stop Bladestorming.

1270718.name: Deadly Focus
1270718.description: Executioner's duration is increased by 6 sec.

1270723.name: Conductivity
1270723.description: Lightning Strike damage increased by 10% and critical strike damage increased by 10%.

1270724.name: Capacitance
1270724.description: During Avatar, Thunder Blast extends Avatar's duration by 2.0 sec.

1270827.name: Improved Spellsteal
1270827.description: Spellsteal repeats its effect after 4 sec, but it now has a cooldown of 4.0 sec.

1270829.name: Reflection
1270829.description:
After casting [Shimmer / Blink], it is replaced with Reflection for 8 sec.

 Reflection
Teleports you back to where you last [Shimmer: Shimmered / Blinked]. Castable while casting and unaffected by the global cooldown.

1270845.name: Mana Confluence
1270845.description: Your mana costs are reduced by 5%.

1270847.name: Improved Remove Curse
1270847.description: Casting Remove Curse on a friendly target also casts it on yourself, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

1270865.name: Improved Counterspell
1270865.description: Counterspell prevents casting for an additional 1.0 sec.

1270872.name: Captured Thoughts
1270872.description:
Frost
The duration of Brain Freeze is increased by 15 sec.

 Arcane
The duration of Clearcasting is increased by 10 sec.

 Fire
The duration of Hot Streak is increased by 15 sec.

1270898.name: Eternal Hunt
1270898.description: The Hunt empowers your next Eye Beam, increasing damage by 100% and affecting enemies in a wider area.

1270900.name: Eternal Hunt
1270900.description: The Hunt has 15 sec reduced cooldown, deals 15% more damage, and its damage over time effect applies to 2 additional enemies.

1270901.name: Eternal Hunt
1270901.description:
Blade Dance damage increased by 20%.

Fully channeling Eye Beam causes your next Blade Dance to refresh its own cooldown.

1270916.name: Divine Favor
1270916.description: The mana cost of Holy Light is reduced by 10% and its cast time is reduced by 15%.

1270958.name: Harmonic Surge
1270958.description:
Mistweaver
Casting Thunder Focus Tea grants 2 charges of Potential Energy. Your next cast of Tiger Palm or Vivify consumes all charges of Potential Energy to cause a Harmonic Surge.

Harmonic Surge:
For each charge of Potential Energy, deal [(400% of Spell Power) * 10 / 100] Nature damage to your target and [(400% of Spell Power) * 10 / 100] Nature damage to other nearby enemies, and heal up to 5 allies for [(500% of Spell Power) * 40 / 100]. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

 Brewmaster
Casting  grants 2 charges of Potential Energy. Your next cast of Tiger Palm or Vivify consumes all charges of Potential Energy to cause a Harmonic Surge.

Harmonic Surge:
For each charge of Potential Energy, deal [(400% of Spell Power) * 55 / 100] Nature damage to your target and [(400% of Spell Power) * 55 / 100] Nature damage to other nearby enemies, and heal up to 5 allies for [(500% of Spell Power) * 10 / 100]. Damage reduced above 5 targets.

1271016.name: Seek Deliverance
1271016.description:
While Avenging Wrath is not active, you gain 5% Mastery.

While Avenging Wrath is active, you gain 30% movement speed.

1271048.name: Potential Energy
1271048.description:
Brewmaster
Casting Keg Smash grants a charge of Potential Energy.

 Mistweaver
Casting Rising Sun Kick or Rushing Wind Kick grants a charge of Potential Energy.

1271077.name: Divine Overload
1271077.description: Holy Light's healing is increased by 30%, but its mana cost is increased by 20%.

1271104.name: Earthen Accord
1271104.description: Unleash Life heals for 30% more and its bonus healing effect is increased by 20%.

1271105.name: Meditative Focus
1271105.description:
Blackout Combo:
Increases Tiger Palm damage by an additional 50% and Keg Smash reduces the cooldown on your Brews by an additional 1.0 sec.

  Press the Advantage:
Nature damage dealt by your main hand auto-attacks is increased by 100% and they now reduce the cooldown on your Brews by an additional 0.25 sec.

1271171.name: Conflagration
1271171.description: Fire Blast deals (40% of Spell Power) additional Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

1271177.name: Burnout
1271177.description: When Combustion expires, all of your active Ignites explode, dealing 75% of their remaining damage.

1271206.name: Star Cascade
1271206.description:
Balance
Gaining Astral Power with Wrath or Starfire has a 40% chance to launch a Starsurge at a victim at 70% effectiveness.

 Guardian
Thrash has a 50% chance to launch a Starsurge at a victim at 120% effectiveness.

1271221.name: Unending Light
1271221.description: Light of Dawn receives 20% increased benefit from Mastery: Lightbringer.

1271261.name: Penumbral Swell
1271261.description:
Guardian

Lunar Beam increases Arcane damage you deal by 10% while it is active.

 Balance
Lunar Eclipse increases Arcane damage by an additional 3%.

1271305.name: Bask in Moonlight
1271305.description:
Guardian
 damage increased by 10%. Lunar Beam's damage dealt to its primary target increased by 30%.

 Balance
Starsurge damage increased by 10%. 
Starfall damage increased by 10%.

1271387.name: Masterwork
1271387.description: After casting a Holy Armament, your next 3 abilities cast a Lesser Armament of the same kind on a nearby ally.

1271431.name: Amplified Rush
1271431.description: The healing of Gusts of Mist caused by Renewing Mist is increased by 100%.

1271466.name: Reflection of Radiance
1271466.description:
Holy
When your Holy Bulwark absorbs damage or your Sacred Weapon deals damage or healing, you have a chance to gain Awakening.

 Protection
When your Holy Bulwark absorbs damage or your Sacred Weapon deals damage or healing, you have a chance to gain Grand Crusader.

1271540.name: Limb from Limb
1271540.description:
Guardian
Your auto-attacks are 30% more likely to make your next  become Ravage.

 Feral
Your auto-attacks are 30% more likely to make your next Ferocious Bite become Ravage.

1271553.name: Resounding Strike
1271553.description:
Protection
Divine Toll activates Hammer and Anvil at 100% effectiveness.

 Holy
Holy Armaments activate Hammer and Anvil at 100% effectiveness.

1271635.name: Twin Claw
1271635.description:
Feral
You have a 16% chance to follow up any single target melee ability with a Twin Claw, dealing (300% of Attack Power) Physical damage and generating 3 Energy.

 Guardian
You have a 18% chance to follow up any single target melee ability or Raze with a Twin Claw, dealing (340% of Attack Power) Physical damage and generating 5 Rage.

1271687.name: Rising Fury
1271687.description: While Dragonrage is active you gain Rising Fury every 6 sec, increasing your haste by 4%, stacking up to 5 times.

1271689.name: Empowered Drain Life
1271689.description: Drain Life heals for an additional 200% of damage dealt and grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of damage dealt.

1271694.name: Fortified Soul
1271694.description: Soul Leech may now absorb an additional 5% of your maximum health.

1271699.name: Empowered Healthstone
1271699.description: Healthstones heal you for an additional 5% additional health.

1271748.name: Blight of Weakness
1271748.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing the time between their attacks by 100% and reducing their critical strike chance by 10% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

1271788.name: Rising Fury
1271788.description:
When Dragonrage ends, gain Risen Fury for 4 sec for each stack of Rising Fury.

Risen Fury grants the damage and haste bonuses accumulated from Rising Fury and generates Essence Burst every 4 sec.

1271796.name: Rising Fury
1271796.description: At 5 stacks of Rising Fury, all damage dealt is increased by 8%.

1271802.name: Blight of Tongues
1271802.description:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

1271839.name: Exacerbating Wounds
1271839.description:
Guardian
Your Dreadful Wounds increase the damage afflicted enemies take from your Bleed damage over time effects by 15%.

 Feral
Your Dreadful Wounds increase the damage afflicted enemies take from your Bleed damage over time effects by 8%.

1271925.name: Fearless
1271925.description: Cooldown of Berserker Rage is reduced by 50% and Berseker Rage removes all movement speed-impairing effects.

1271926.name: Field Dressing
1271926.description: Healing received increased by 3% and all self-healing increased by an additional 10%.

1271948.name: Javelineer
1271948.description:
Range of your thrown abilities is increased by 5 yards.

Damage dealt by Champion's Spear, Shattering Throw, and Wrecking Throw increased by 20%.

Shattering Throw and Wrecking Throw silence non-players for 3 sec.

1271974.name: Blightfall
1271974.description:
Dark Transformation grants access to Blightfall.

Blightfall
Consume 100% of your plagues around you and deal 100% of their remaining damage instantly.

Grants 1 charge of Putrefy.

1272094.name: Guardian's Hide
1272094.description: Your pet protects you at all times, reducing the damage you take by 3%. Your pet receives 100% of the damage it mitigates.

1272099.name: Bloodshed
1272099.description: Bestial Wrath provokes your pets to tear into your target, causing your target to bleed for (1440% of Attack Power) damage over 12 sec.

1272136.name: Quick Reload
1272136.description: Boomstick's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

1272138.name: Keen Edge
1272138.description: Reaver's Glaive damage is increased by 20% and other Physical-only damage is increased by 10%.

1272139.name: Twin Fangs
1272139.description: Takedown grants 3 stacks of Tip of the Spear.

1272143.name: Broken Spirit
1272143.description:
Vengeance
Sigil of Spite shatters 1 additional Soul Fragment. Soul Cleave has a 20% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment.

 Havoc
The Hunt shatters 1 Soul Fragment. Blade Dance and Chaos Strike have a 15% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment.

1272153.name: Bladecraft
1272153.description:
Havoc
Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Blade Dance when cast after Chaos Strike, increasing slashes to 12.

Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Chaos Strike when cast after Blade Dance, applying an additional stack.

 Vengeance
Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Soul Cleave when cast after Fracture, increasing slashes to 12.

Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Fracture when cast after Soul Cleave, applying an additional stack.

1272154.name: Primal Surge
1272154.description:
Kill Command grants 1 additional stack of Tip of the Spear.

Tip of the Spear's damage bonus is increased by 5%.

1272175.name: Universal Energy
1272175.description: Your magical damage is increased by 8%.

1272308.name: Energy Conservation
1272308.description: Power Surge lasts an additional 5 sec.

1272320.name: Focused Outburst
1272320.description:
Holy
Prayer of Healing mana cost reduced by 10% and its cast time is reduced by 15%.

 Shadow
Void Volley damage increased by 15% and its cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

1272326.name: Realized Potential
1272326.description:
Holy
Flash Heal healing increased by 10%. 

Healing spells and Smite have an additional 2% chance to grant Surge of Light.

 Shadow
Shadow Word: Death damage increased by 25% and its cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.

1272352.name: Words of the Wise
1272352.description:
Discipline
Flash Heal, Plea, and Power Word: Radiance healing increased by 15%.

 Holy,  Holy (Ultimate Serenity)
Holy Word: Serenity healing increased by 10%.Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify healing increased by 10%.

1272359.name: Prophet's Insight
1272359.description:
Discipline
Atonement healing from Holy spells is increased by 15%.

 Holy
Reduces the cooldown of your Holy Words by 5 sec.

1272363.name: Unfolding Vision
1272363.description:
Discipline

When Power Word: Shield or Void Shield expires with absorption remaining, it jumps to a nearby injured ally and loses 40% of its maximum absorb instead.

 Holy
When Prayer of Mending expires without healing, it jumps to a nearby injured ally and loses 2 stacks instead.

1272364.name: Blind Focus
1272364.description:
Devourer
Cosmic damage increased by 2%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.

 Havoc
Fire damage increased by 5%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.

1272405.name: Undying Embers
1272405.description:
Havoc
Immolation Aura has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.

 Devourer
Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.

1272415.name: Sunfire Spiral
1272415.description: Rising Sun Kick gains 40% additional effectiveness from Mastery: Combo Strikes.

1272422.name: Voidrush
1272422.description:
Collapsing Star reduces the cooldown of Voidblade by 10 sec.

Voidblade and The Hunt briefly reduce your Fury drain while in Void Metamorphosis.

1272432.name: Soulforged Blades
1272432.description: Hungering Slash and Voidblade's critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

1272452.name: Chi Transfer
1272452.description: Touch of Death now heals you for 50% of its damage done.

1272453.name: Volatile Instinct
1272453.description:
Devourer
Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay.

 Havoc
Entering demon form immediately induces a Demonsurge.

1272678.name: Weapon of Wind
1272678.description: Your damage during Zenith is increased by 10%.

1272685.name: Martial Agility
1272685.description: Your melee attack speed is increased by 30%. This bonus is increased to 60% during Zenith.

1272694.name: Zenith Stomp
1272694.description:
Activating Zenith causes you to release a powerful stomp, dealing (1000% of Attack Power) Nature damage to nearby enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 2 Chi.

1272770.name: Singular Strikes
1272770.description:
Voidblade damage increased by 25%.

Hungering Slash deals 50% increased damage to its primary target.

1272781.name: Tiger Fang
1272781.description: Your auto attack critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

1272817.name: Improved Consume
1272817.description: Consume deals 10% increased damage and its cast time is reduced by 0.25 sec.

1272821.name: Wisdom of the Wall
1272821.description:
Brewmaster
Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox causes Breath of Fire to launch 3 Flurry Strikes.

 Windwalker
Zenith causes Rising Sun Kick and Spinning Crane Kick to launch 3 Flurry Strikes.

1272832.name: Singed Spirit
1272832.description: Soul Immolation generates an additional 12 Fury over its duration.

1272842.name: Umbral Blade
1272842.description: Reap's cooldown is reduced by your Haste.

1272844.name: Combat Stance
1272844.description: The cooldown of Roll is decreased by 10%.

1272847.name: Gift of the Void
1272847.description: Your critical strike chance is increased by 2%.

1272849.name: Initiator's Edge
1272849.description: Movement speed is increased by 50% for the first 8 sec of combat.

1272989.name: Precise Killer
1272989.description: Critical strike damage bonus increased by 20%.

1273017.name: Quietus Celeris
1273017.description: Deathstalker's Mark has a 30% chance to immediately consume a stack when applied.

1273035.name: Mass Casualty
1273035.description:
Assassination
Deathstalker's Mark deals 40% of its normal damage to all other enemies within 8 yds that are afflicted by Rupture.

 Subtlety
Deathstalker's Mark deals 75% of its normal damage to all other enemies within 8 yds when a stack is consumed by Black Powder.

1273043.name: Nature's Ally
1273043.description: Bestial Wrath summons an Animal Companion from your Stable to fight alongside you for 15 sec. The summoned Animal Companion obeys your Kill Command, Wild Thrash, and Stomps alongside your other pets.

1273062.name: Martial Prowess
1273062.description: Overpower and Slam increase the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 5%, stacking up to 3 times.

1273065.name: Nature's Ally
1273065.description:
Damage dealt by your pets increased by 5%.

Bestial Wrath strikes 2 additional targets.

1273075.name: Mass Execution
1273075.description: Cleave and Whirlwind deal 20% additional damage to targets below 35% health.

1273126.name: Nature's Ally
1273126.description:
Barbed Shot and Cobra Shot damage increased by 15%.

Barbed Shot, Cobra Shot, and Black Arrow increases the damage of your next Kill Command by 30%.

1273129.name: Take Aim
1273129.description:
Aimed Shot's critical strike damage is increased by 25% of your critical strike chance.

The damage of your other ranged abilities is increased by 3%.

1273132.name: Take Aim
1273132.description:
Rapid Fire damage increased by 25%.

Each shot fired from Rapid Fire reduces the cooldown of Aimed Shot by 0.50 sec.

1273154.name: Path of the Falling Star
1273154.description:
Celestial Conduit's healing and damage is increased by 100% when striking a single target.

Each addtional target reduces this bonus by 20%.

1273485.name: Lava Flows
1273485.description:
Lava Burst damage increased by 5%.

Lava Burst and Lava Burst Overload generate 1 additional Maelstrom.

1276163.name: Dominion of Argus
1276163.description: Summoning your Demonic Tyrant leaves open a portal to Argus for 15 sec, causing every 2 casts of Hand of Gul'dan to summon a subjugated demon that serves you for 10 sec.

1276190.name: Dominion of Argus
1276190.description: Increases the duration of Dominion of Argus by 5 sec and increases damage dealt by Hand of Gul'dan by 10%.

1276222.name: Dominion of Argus
1276222.description:
While Dominion of Argus is active, Hand of Gul'dan refunds 1 Soul Shard.

Demons summoned by Dominion of Argus last an additional 4 sec.

1276433.name: Dominant Hand
1276433.description: Increases damage dealt by Hand of Gul'dan to its main target by 20%.

1276452.name: Grimoire: Imp Lord
1276452.description:
Summons an Imp Lord to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will remove 1 harmful effect from you when summoned. 

Transforms into Singe Magic while on cooldown.

1276467.name: Grimoire: Fel Ravager
1276467.description:
Summons a Fel Ravager to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will purge 1 beneficial magic effect from an enemy.

Turns into Devour Magic while on cooldown.

1276626.name: Hoodwink
1276626.description: Fazed increases damage taken by an additional 3%.

1276630.name: Flashing Steel
1276630.description: Unseen Blade may now occur once every 15 sec and has 25% chance to strike twice.

1276661.name: Stabilized Portals
1276661.description: Increases the duration of your Summon Vilefiend, Grimoire: Imp Lord, and Grimoire: Fel Ravager by 3 sec.

1276672.name: Summon Doomguard
1276672.description:
Summons a Doomguard to assist you in combat for 12 sec. Consuming a Demonic Core reduces the cooldown of Summon Doomguard by 3 sec.

 Doom Bolt Volley
Sends a volley of malefic bolts at 5 enemies within 40 yds, inflicting (413.929% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to each target.

1276679.name: Clever Combatant
1276679.description:
Outlaw
Pistol Shot has 20% increased critical strike chance and now triggers Unseen Blade when available.

 Subtlety
Shuriken Storm has 10% increased critical strike chance and now triggers Unseen Blade when available.

1276746.name: Tyrant's Oblation
1276746.description: Your Demonic Tyrant also empowers you while active, increasing your haste by 8%.

1276748.name: Reign of Tyranny
1276748.description: Your Demonic Tyrant lasts an additional 5 sec and extends the duration of your Dreadstalkers by 15 sec when summoned.

1276809.name: Ravenholdt Mint
1276809.description: Flipping Heads increases damage by an additional 4%. Damage dealt by flipping Tails is increased by 12%.

1276816.name: Controlled Chaos
1276816.description: After flipping a Fatebound Coin that ends a streak of 4 or more, flip another that matches the same face.

1276945.name: Imbued Shield
1276945.description: Shield of the Righteous reduces magical damage taken by 12%.

1276947.name: Demonic Calling
1276947.description: Call Dreadstalkers costs 1 less Soul Shard and its cast time is reduced by 50%.

1276956.name: Blighted Maw
1276956.description: The fangs of your Dreadstalkers are coated in corrosive bile, causing Dreadbite to deal additional damage equal to 50% of damage dealt as Plague damage.

1277005.name: Adjudication
1277005.description: Judgment causes its primary target's successful melee attacks against you to grant a Physical absorb shield for 20% of the damage dealt. Limit 1.

1277162.name: Instrument of the Divine
1277162.description: Shield of the Righteous consumes up to 2 more Holy Power and deals 50% increased damage for each additional Holy Power consumed.

1277297.name: Ignore Pain
1277297.description: Fight through the pain, ignoring 50% of damage taken for 12 sec or until [0 * (1 + Versatility)] damage has been prevented.

1277302.name: Morning Breeze
1277302.description: Rising Sun Kick's damage is increased by your Mastery rating and Thunder Focus Tea resets its cooldown.

1277443.name: Armory of Light
1277443.description:
While holding a shield, you have a 15% chance to block incoming spells, reducing their damage by 20%. 

Without a shield, you have a 15% chance to parry incoming melee attacks, reducing their damage by 20%.

1277444.name: Chi Warding
1277444.description: You heal for 3% of all magical damage taken.

1277546.name: Focus Fire
1277546.description: When Surging Shots resets the cooldown of Rapid Fire, the damage of your next Rapid Fire is increased by 20%.

1277548.name: Unload
1277548.description:
When Rapid Fire begins and finishes channeling, it releases an Arcane Shot at 100% effectiveness.

If your target is below 20% health, Rapid Fire instead releases Kill Shots.

1277565.name: Through the Eyes
1277565.description:
Beast Mastery
Black Arrow deals 20% increased damage to enemies affected by Black Arrow's periodic damage.

 Marksmanship
Headshot can now stack 5 additional times.

 Headshot
Damage from Kill Shot increases the damage your target receives from Kill Shot by 3%, stacking up to 10 times.

1277572.name: Critical Precision
1277572.description: Precise Shots now increases the critical strike chance of Arcane Shot and Multi-Shot by 10%

1277651.name: Rising Sunlight
1277651.description: Your healing is increased by up to 10%, based on the average health percentage of allies with your Beacon of Light.

1277933.name: Preparation
1277933.description: Immediately reset the cooldowns of Adrenaline Rush, Between the Eyes, Blade Flurry, Blade Rush, and Killing Spree.

1278789.name: Natural Resilience
1278789.description: When Frenzied Regeneration would heal you above maximum health, 80% of its excess healing is instead converted to an absorb shield.

1278886.name: Dream Guide
1278886.description:
When you take non-periodic damage, you have a chance to gain a charge of Dream Guide. 

When you or a nearby ally drops below 40% health, you consume a charge of Dream Guide to automatically cast Regrowth on them. This Regrowth heals for an additional 100%.

1279350.name: Invoked Nightmare
1279350.description: Shadow Word: Pain deals 150% increased damage.

1279353.name: Maddening Tentacles
1279353.description: Tentacle Slam afflicts your target with Shadow Word: Madness at 25% effectiveness.

1279354.name: Crushing Void
1279354.description:
Tentacle Slam deals 50% increased damage and Void Volley deals 15% increased damage.

When Voidform ends, you can cast Void Volley 1 additional time within 30 sec.

1279355.name: Haunting Shadows
1279355.description:
Shadowy Apparition damage increased by 10%.

When Shadowy Apparitions deal damage, they extend the duration of your Shadow Word: Pain and Vampiric Touch on the target by 1.0 sec.

1279510.name: Niskaran Methods
1279510.description: Increases damage dealt by Agony and Corruption by 10%.

1279521.name: Eye Contract
1279521.description: Increases the duration of Summon Darkglare by 5.0 sec.

1279575.name: Empowered Felstorm
1279575.description: Increases the damage of your Felguard's Felstorm by 20% and its duration by 4.0 sec.

1279633.name: Bloody Reflection
1279633.description: While Blood Shield is active, taking direct damage reflects (110% of Attack Power) Shadow damage back to the attacker. Blood Shield can now absorb up to 65% of your maximum health.

1279819.name: Primordial Bond
1279819.description: Your Earth Elemental no longer taunts nearby enemies or generates threat and instead increases your maximum health by 15% while active.

1280131.name: Searing Light
1280131.description: Your Penance bolts sear the enemy, dealing 20% of its damage over 8 sec.

1280137.name: Mindbender
1280137.description:
Evangelism summons a Mindbender to attack a nearby target for 12 sec.

Generates 0.2% Mana each time the Mindbender attacks.

1280165.name: Augury Abounds
1280165.description:
Arcane
Conjuring one or more Arcane Splinters has a 10% chance to conjure a burst of 8 Arcane Splinters.

 Frost
Conjuring one or more Frost Splinters has a 10% chance to conjure a burst of 8 Frost Splinters.

1280297.name: Mistline
1280297.description: Renewing Mist's healing is increased by 500% on your lowest health ally with its effect.

1280316.name: Panther's Guile
1280316.description: When Shred or Moonfire generate combo points, they have a 25% chance to generate full combo points.

1280483.name: Inferno
1280483.description: Reduces the cooldown of Summon Infernal by 30.0 sec and increases your Mastery by 3%.

1280658.name: Inevitable
1280658.description:
Blood
Blood Plague deals up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health.

 Unholy
Your plagues deal up to 30% increased damage based on the target's missing health.

Vampiric Strike grants maximum stacks of Clawing Shadows.

1280733.name: Nether Plating
1280733.description:
Adorns your Darkglare with armor forged from within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%. 

Eye Beam now jumps to up to 4 additional targets within 10 yards and deals 10% increased damage.

1280779.name: Glacial Chill
1280779.description: Glacial Spike deals 5% increased damage and applies 2 additional stacks of Freezing.

1280780.name: Glacial Shatter
1280780.description: Glacial Spike no longer applies Freezing, and instead Shatters 5 stacks of Freezing.

1280868.name: Dimensional Rift
1280868.description:
Chaos Bolt and Shadowburn have a 10% chance to rip open a hole in space and time, opening a random portal that damages your target:

Shadowy Tear
Deals [(105.487% of Spell Power) * 7] Shadow damage over 14 sec.

Unstable Tear
Deals [(26.3718% of Spell Power) * 24] Chaos damage over 6 sec.

Chaos Tear
Fires a Chaos Bolt, dealing (326.508% of Spell Power) Chaos damage. This Chaos Bolt always critically strikes and your critical strike chance increases its damage.

Generates 10 Soul Shard Fragments.

1280961.name: Stance Mastery
1280961.description:
Fury
Your stances have additional effects.

 Berserker Stance
Increases your auto-attack speed by 3%.

 Defensive Stance
When an attack deals 20% or more of your maximum health in damage, that damage is reduced by 15%.

 Arms,  Protection
Your stances have additional effects.

 Battle Stance
Increases the critical strike damage of your abilities by 3%.

 Defensive Stance
When an attack deals 20% or more of your maximum health in damage, that damage is reduced by 15%.

1281468.name: Umbral Edge
1281468.description:
Shadow Clones deal 15% increased damage.

Cheap Shot creates a Shadow Clone to Shadowstrike the target for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

Kidney Shot creates a Shadow Clone to Eviscerate the target for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

1281511.name: To Hell and Back
1281511.description:
Power Siphon and Implosion summon 1 Imp Gang Boss for every 2 Wild Imps sacrificed. Wild Imps summoned this way gain Unstable Soul.

 Unstable Soul
Increases damage done by 50% and Fel Firebolt now jumps to 4 additional targets.

1281529.name: Stitchmaster
1281529.description:
When a Lesser Ghoul dies, you gather the remains to heal for 2% of its maximum health.

Death Strike sacrifices all Lesser Ghouls under your command.

1281638.name: White Out
1281638.description: Ice Lance reduces the cooldown of Frozen Orb by 0.5 sec, increased by 0.1 sec for each stack of Freezing Shattered.

1289789.name: Battle Visage
1289789.description: Activate to automatically assume your Visage whenever you are not casting draconic spells such as Fire Breath and Soar.

1290864.name: Cycle of Death
1290864.description:
Putrefy reduces the cooldown of Death and Decay by 1.0 sec.

Death and Decay reduces the cooldown of Putrefy by 0.3 sec for each enemy it damages, up to 3.0 sec.

1291457.name: Mighty Inferno
1291457.description: Inferno's Blessing's damage is increased by 40%, and your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Inferno's Blessing.

1291522.name: Chronal Dynamo
1291522.description: Living Flame's cast time is reduced by 0.2 sec, and it deals 50% increased damage or healing when it is a non-instant cast.

1291636.name: Temporal Barrier
1291636.description: Send out a ripple of temporal energy, absorbing 0 damage and applying Echo at 30% effectiveness on your target and up to 4 allies within 40 yds.

1292996.name: Negotiable Contract
1292996.description: If the target of your Deathmark dies, Deathmark jumps to a nearby enemy combatant for its remaining duration.

1293135.name: Sanguine Vial
1293135.description: When you deal the killing blow to a target that yields experience or honor, the cooldown of Crimson Vial is reduced by 15 sec and your next use heals 5% of your health instantly.
